jobs.title: React Native Developer (Wallet team) - 100% remote
jobs.description:
Join Tether and Shape the Future of Digital Finance 
 At Tether, we’re not just building products, we’re pioneering a global financial revolution. Our cutting-edge solutions empower businesses—from exchanges and wallets to payment processors and ATMs—to seamlessly integrate reserve-backed tokens across blockchains. By harnessing the power of blockchain technology, Tether enables you to store, send, and receive digital tokens instantly, securely, and globally, all at a fraction of the cost. Transparency is the bedrock of everything we do, ensuring trust in every transaction. 
 
 Innovate with Tether 
 Tether Finance: Our innovative product suite features the world’s most trusted stablecoin, USDT , relied upon by hundreds of millions worldwide, alongside pioneering digital asset tokenization services. 
 But that’s just the beginning: 
 Tether Power: Driving sustainable growth, our energy solutions optimize excess power for Bitcoin mining using eco-friendly practices in state-of-the-art, geo-diverse facilities. 
 Tether Data: Fueling breakthroughs in AI and peer-to-peer technology, we reduce infrastructure costs and enhance global communications with cutting-edge solutions like KEET , our flagship app that redefines secure and private data sharing. 
 Tether Education : Democratizing access to top-tier digital learning, we empower individuals to thrive in the digital and gig economies, driving global growth and opportunity. 
 Tether Evolution : At the intersection of technology and human potential, we are pushing the boundaries of what is possible, crafting a future where innovation and human capabilities merge in powerful, unprecedented ways. 
 
 Why Join Us? 
 Our team is a global talent powerhouse, working remotely from every corner of the world. If you’re passionate about making a mark in the fintech space, this is your opportunity to collaborate with some of the brightest minds, pushing boundaries and setting new standards. We’ve grown fast, stayed lean, and secured our place as a leader in the industry. 
 If you have excellent English communication skills and are ready to contribute to the most innovative platform on the planet, Tether is the place for you. 
 Are you ready to be part of the future? 
 
 About the job 
 The role involves working in a dynamic environment with a diverse team of senior backend developers, product managers and leadership to build crypto wallet solutions . The applications are meant to be high performance, light-weight and highly intuitive to cater to a variety of audiences. 
 You will be working on developing cutting edge mobile applications integrating crypto wallets and defi features. 
 
 Responsibilities 
 
• Development: Design and build advanced and secure cross platform applications for the [iOS/Android] platform using React Native. Collaborate with UI/UX designers to ensure applications are visually appealing and intuitive. 

• Integration: Work closely with backend developers and integrate Javascript SDKs, libraries, and backend services into mobile applications. 

• Collaboration: Collaborate with product managers, designers, and other developers to deliver innovative solutions. 

 
 Mandatory 
 
• 3+ years of experience with React , React-Native (mainly around Expo) , Redux and the core principles surrounding these. 

• Highly proficient in JavaScript and ES6+ . 

• Experience with CI/CD pipelines for mobile development . 

• Familiar with modern front-end pipelines and tools . 

• Experienced with Native modules (C++) , WebSockets, RESTful based APIs . 

• Experience in Swift/Objective-C (iOS) or Kotlin/Java (Android) for low level implementation. 

 
 Important information for candidates 
Recruitment scams have become increasingly common. To protect yourself, please keep the following in mind when applying for roles:
 
• Apply only through our official channels. We do not use third-party platforms or agencies for recruitment unless clearly stated. All open roles are listed on our official careers page: https://tether.recruitee.com/

• Verify the recruiter’s identity. All our recruiters have verified LinkedIn profiles. If you’re unsure, you can confirm their identity by checking their profile or contacting us through our website.

• Be cautious of unusual communication methods. We do not conduct interviews over WhatsApp, Telegram, or SMS. All communication is done through official company emails and platforms.

• Double-check email addresses. All communication from us will come from emails ending in @ tether.to or @ tether.io 

• We will never request payment or financial details. If someone asks for personal financial information or payment at any point during the hiring process, it is a scam. Please report it immediately.

 When in doubt, feel free to reach out through our official website.

descriptionByLocale.it:
Descrizione Unisciti a Tether e Plasmare il Futuro della Finanza Digitale In Tether, non stiamo solo costruendo prodotti, stiamo guidando una rivoluzione finanziaria globale. Le nostre soluzioni all'avanguardia consentono alle aziende—da exchange e wallet a processori di pagamento e ATM—di integrare senza problemi token garantiti da riserve su blockchain. Sfruttando la potenza della tecnologia blockchain, Tether ti permette di archiviare, inviare e ricevere token digitali istantaneamente, in modo sicuro e globale, il tutto a una frazione del costo. La trasparenza è il fondamento di tutto ciò che facciamo, garantendo fiducia in ogni transazione. Innovare con Tether Tether Finance: La nostra suite di prodotti innovativi include la stablecoin più affidabile al mondo, USDT, utilizzata da centinaia di milioni di persone in tutto il mondo, insieme a servizi pionieristici di tokenizzazione di asset digitali. Ma questo è solo l'inizio: Tether Power: Promuovendo una crescita sostenibile, le nostre soluzioni energetiche ottimizzano l'energia in eccesso per il mining di Bitcoin utilizzando pratiche ecologiche in strutture all'avanguardia e geograficamente diversificate. Tether Data: Alimentando progressi nell'IA e nella tecnologia peer-to-peer, riduciamo i costi infrastrutturali e miglioriamo le comunicazioni globali con soluzioni all'avanguardia come KEET, la nostra app di punta che ridefinisce la condivisione sicura e privata dei dati. Tether Education: Democratizzando l'accesso all'apprendimento digitale di alto livello, permettiamo agli individui di prosperare nelle economie digitali e gig, promuovendo crescita e opportunità globali. Tether Evolution: All'intersezione tra tecnologia e potenziale umano, stiamo spingendo i confini di ciò che è possibile, creando un futuro in cui innovazione e capacità umane si fondono in modi potenti e senza precedenti. Perché unirti a noi? Il nostro team è una potenza di talento globale, che lavora da remoto da ogni angolo del mondo. Se sei appassionato di lasciare il segno nello spazio fintech, questa è la tua opportunità per collaborare con alcune delle menti più brillanti, spingendo i confini e stabilendo nuovi standard. Siamo cresciuti rapidamente, siamo rimasti snelli e ci siamo assicurati il nostro posto come leader nel settore. Se hai eccellenti competenze di comunicazione in inglese e sei pronto a contribuire alla piattaforma più innovativa del pianeta, Tether è il posto giusto per te. Sei pronto a far parte del futuro? ### Informazioni sul lavoro Il ruolo prevede di lavorare in un ambiente dinamico con un team diversificato di sviluppatori backend senior, product manager e leadership per costruire soluzioni di wallet crypto. Le applicazioni devono essere ad alte prestazioni, leggere e altamente intuitive per soddisfare una varietà di pubblici. Lavorerai allo sviluppo di applicazioni mobili all'avanguardia che integrano wallet crypto e funzionalità defi. ## Mansioni - Sviluppo: Progettare e costruire applicazioni avanzate e sicure cross-platform per la piattaforma [iOS/Android] utilizzando React Native. Collaborare con designer UI/UX per garantire che le applicazioni siano visivamente accattivanti e intuitive. - Integrazione: Lavorare a stretto contatto con sviluppatori backend e integrare SDK Javascript, librerie e servizi backend nelle applicazioni mobili. - Collaborazione: Collaborare con product manager, designer e altri sviluppatori per fornire soluzioni innovative. ##
• Requisiti - 3+ anni di esperienza con React, React-Native (principalmente con Expo), Redux e i principi fondamentali che li circondano. - Elevata competenza in JavaScript e ES6+. - Esperienza con pipeline CI/CD per lo sviluppo mobile. - Familiarità con pipeline e strumenti moderni per il front-end. - Esperienza con moduli nativi (C++), WebSockets, API RESTful. - Esperienza in Swift/Objective-C (iOS) o Kotlin/Java (Android) per implementazioni di basso livello. ## Informazioni importanti per i candidati Le truffe di reclutamento sono diventate sempre più comuni. Per proteggerti, tieni presente quanto segue quando ti candidi per le posizioni: - Candidati solo attraverso i nostri canali ufficiali. Non utilizziamo piattaforme o agenzie di terze parti per il reclutamento, a meno che non sia chiaramente indicato. Tutte le posizioni aperte sono elencate sulla nostra pagina ufficiale delle carriere: https://tether.recruitee.com/ - Verifica l'identità del reclutatore. Tutti i nostri reclutatori hanno profili LinkedIn verificati. Se hai dubbi, puoi confermare la loro identità controllando il loro profilo o contattandoci tramite il nostro sito web. - Fai attenzione a metodi di comunicazione insoliti. Non conduciamo colloqui tramite WhatsApp, Telegram o SMS. Tutte le comunicazioni avvengono tramite email e piattaforme ufficiali dell'azienda. - Controlla due volte gli indirizzi email. Tutte le comunicazioni da parte nostra provengono da email che terminano con @tether.to o @tether.io. - Non richiederemo mai pagamenti o dettagli finanziari. Se qualcuno ti chiede informazioni finanziarie personali o pagamenti in qualsiasi momento durante il processo di assunzione, si tratta di una truffa. Segnalalo immediatamente. - In caso di dubbio, non esitare a contattarci tramite il nostro sito web ufficiale.

descriptionByLocale.de:
Beschreibung Schließen Sie sich Tether an und gestalten Sie die Zukunft der digitalen Finanzwelt Bei Tether entwickeln wir nicht nur Produkte, sondern treiben eine globale Finanzrevolution voran. Unsere hochmodernen Lösungen ermöglichen es Unternehmen – von Börsen und Wallets bis hin zu Zahlungsabwicklern und Geldautomaten – Reserve-gestützte Token nahtlos in Blockchains zu integrieren. Durch die Nutzung der Blockchain-Technologie ermöglicht Tether Ihnen, digitale Token sofort, sicher und weltweit zu speichern, zu senden und zu empfangen – und das zu einem Bruchteil der Kosten. Transparenz ist das Fundament all dessen, was wir tun, und gewährleistet Vertrauen in jede Transaktion. Innovieren Sie mit Tether Tether Finance: Unsere innovative Produktpalette umfasst den weltweit vertrauenswürdigsten Stablecoin, USDT, der von Hunderten Millionen weltweit genutzt wird, sowie wegweisende Dienstleistungen zur Tokenisierung digitaler Vermögenswerte. Aber das ist erst der Anfang: Tether Power: Mit nachhaltigem Wachstum als Ziel optimieren unsere Energielösungen überschüssige Energie für das Bitcoin-Mining unter Verwendung umweltfreundlicher Praktiken in hochmodernen, geografisch diversifizierten Einrichtungen. Tether Data: Durchbrüche in KI und Peer-to-Peer-Technologie treiben wir voran, indem wir Infrastrukturkosten senken und die globale Kommunikation mit innovativen Lösungen wie KEET verbessern – unserer Vorzeige-App, die sichere und private Datenfreigabe neu definiert. Tether Education: Wir demokratisieren den Zugang zu erstklassigem digitalen Lernen und befähigen Einzelpersonen, in der digitalen und Gig-Wirtschaft erfolgreich zu sein, was globales Wachstum und Chancen fördert. Tether Evolution: An der Schnittstelle von Technologie und menschlichem Potenzial verschieben wir die Grenzen des Möglichen und gestalten eine Zukunft, in der Innovation und menschliche Fähigkeiten auf kraftvolle, beispiellose Weise verschmelzen. Warum zu uns kommen? Unser Team ist eine globale Talent-Powerhouse, das aus allen Ecken der Welt remote arbeitet. Wenn Sie leidenschaftlich daran interessiert sind, im Fintech-Bereich Spuren zu hinterlassen, ist dies Ihre Chance, mit einigen der klügsten Köpfe zusammenzuarbeiten, Grenzen zu verschieben und neue Standards zu setzen. Wir sind schnell gewachsen, schlank geblieben und haben uns als Branchenführer etabliert. Wenn Sie über ausgezeichnete Englischkenntnisse verfügen und bereit sind, zur innovativsten Plattform der Welt beizutragen, ist Tether der richtige Ort für Sie. Sind Sie bereit, Teil der Zukunft zu sein? ### Über die Stelle Die Rolle umfasst die Arbeit in einer dynamischen Umgebung mit einem vielfältigen Team von Senior-Backend-Entwicklern, Produktmanagern und Führungskräften, um Krypto-Wallet-Lösungen zu entwickeln. Die Anwendungen sollen leistungsstark, leichtgewichtig und hochintuitiv sein, um eine Vielzahl von Zielgruppen anzusprechen. Sie werden an der Entwicklung modernster mobiler Anwendungen arbeiten, die Krypto-Wallets und DeFi-Funktionen integrieren. ##
• Aufgaben - Entwicklung: Entwerfen und entwickeln Sie fortschrittliche und sichere plattformübergreifende Anwendungen für die [iOS/Android]-Plattform mit React Native. Arbeiten Sie mit UI/UX-Designern zusammen, um sicherzustellen, dass die Anwendungen visuell ansprechend und intuitiv sind. - Integration: Arbeiten Sie eng mit Backend-Entwicklern zusammen und integrieren Sie JavaScript-SDKs, Bibliotheken und Backend-Dienste in mobile Anwendungen. - Zusammenarbeit: Arbeiten Sie mit Produktmanagern, Designern und anderen Entwicklern zusammen, um innovative Lösungen zu liefern. ##
• Anforderungen - 3+ Jahre Erfahrung mit React, React-Native (hauptsächlich mit Expo), Redux und den Kernprinzipien. - Sehr gute Kenntnisse in JavaScript und ES6+. - Erfahrung mit CI/CD-Pipelines für die mobile Entwicklung. - Vertrautheit mit modernen Frontend-Pipelines und Tools. - Erfahrung mit nativen Modulen (C++), WebSockets, RESTful-APIs. - Erfahrung in Swift/Objective-C (iOS) oder Kotlin/Java (Android) für Low-Level-Implementierungen. ## Wichtige Informationen für Bewerber Betrugsversuche bei der Rekrutierung nehmen zu. Um sich zu schützen, beachten Sie bitte Folgendes, wenn Sie sich auf Stellen bewerben: - Bewerben Sie sich nur über unsere offiziellen Kanäle. Wir nutzen keine Drittanbieterplattformen oder -agenturen für die Rekrutierung, es sei denn, dies ist ausdrücklich angegeben. Alle offenen Stellen sind auf unserer offiziellen Karriereseite aufgeführt: https://tether.recruitee.com/ - Überprüfen Sie die Identität des Recruiters. Alle unsere Recruiter haben verifizierte LinkedIn-
• Profile. Wenn Sie unsicher sind, können Sie deren Identität überprüfen, indem Sie ihr Profil überprüfen oder uns über unsere Website kontaktieren. - Seien Sie vorsichtig bei ungewöhnlichen Kommunikationsmethoden. Wir führen keine Interviews über WhatsApp, Telegram oder SMS. Alle Kommunikation erfolgt über offizielle Firmen-E-Mails und Plattformen. - Überprüfen Sie E-Mail-Adressen doppelt. Alle unsere E-Mails enden mit @tether.to oder @tether.io. - Wir werden niemals Zahlungen oder finanzielle Details anfordern. Wenn jemand während des Einstellungsprozesses persönliche Finanzinformationen oder Zahlungen anfordert, handelt es sich um einen Betrug. Bitte melden Sie dies umgehend. - Wenn Sie Zweifel haben, zögern Sie nicht, uns über unsere offizielle Website zu kontaktieren.
descriptionByLocale.fr:
Description Rejoignez Tether et façonnez l'avenir de la finance numérique Chez Tether, nous ne nous contentons pas de créer des produits, nous sommes les pionniers d'une révolution financière mondiale. Nos solutions de pointe permettent aux entreprises – des plateformes d'échange et portefeuilles aux processeurs de paiement et distributeurs automatiques – d'intégrer facilement des jetons adossés à des réserves sur les blockchains. En exploitant la puissance de la technologie blockchain, Tether vous permet de stocker, envoyer et recevoir des jetons numériques instantanément, en toute sécurité et à l'échelle mondiale, le tout à une fraction du coût. La transparence est la pierre angulaire de tout ce que nous faisons, garantissant la confiance dans chaque transaction. Innover avec Tether Tether Finance : Notre gamme de produits innovants comprend le stablecoin le plus fiable au monde, l'USDT, utilisé par des centaines de millions de personnes dans le monde entier, ainsi que des services pionniers de tokenisation d'actifs numériques. Mais ce n'est que le début : Tether Power : En favorisant une croissance durable, nos solutions énergétiques optimisent l'énergie excédentaire pour le minage de Bitcoin en utilisant des pratiques respectueuses de l'environnement dans des installations ultramodernes et géographiquement diversifiées. Tether Data : En favorisant des avancées dans l'IA et la technologie peer-to-peer, nous réduisons les coûts d'infrastructure et améliorons les communications mondiales grâce à des solutions de pointe comme KEET, notre application phare qui redéfinit le partage sécurisé et privé des données. Tether Education : En démocratisant l'accès à un apprentissage numérique de premier ordre, nous permettons aux individus de prospérer dans les économies numériques et de gig, favorisant ainsi la croissance et les opportunités mondiales. Tether Evolution : À l'intersection de la technologie et du potentiel humain, nous repoussons les limites du possible, en façonnant un avenir où l'innovation et les capacités humaines se rejoignent de manière puissante et sans précédent. Pourquoi nous rejoindre ? Notre équipe est un vivier de talents mondial, travaillant à distance depuis tous les coins du monde. Si vous êtes passionné par l'idée de marquer votre empreinte dans le domaine de la fintech, c'est votre chance de collaborer avec certaines des esprits les plus brillants, de repousser les limites et de définir de nouvelles normes. Nous avons connu une croissance rapide, sommes restés agiles et avons consolidé notre place en tant que leader du secteur. Si vous avez d'excellentes compétences en communication en anglais et êtes prêt à contribuer à la plateforme la plus innovante de la planète, Tether est l'endroit qu'il vous faut. Êtes-vous prêt à faire partie de l'avenir ? ### À propos du poste Le rôle consiste à travailler dans un environnement dynamique avec une équipe diversifiée de développeurs backend seniors, de chefs de produit et de dirigeants pour créer des solutions de portefeuilles crypto. Les applications doivent être performantes, légères et très intuitives pour répondre à une variété de publics. Vous travaillerez au développement d'applications mobiles de pointe intégrant des portefeuilles crypto et des fonctionnalités DeFi. ## Missions - Développement : Concevoir et développer des applications avancées et sécurisées multiplateformes pour les plateformes [iOS/Android] en utilisant React Native. Collaborer avec les designers UI/UX pour garantir que les applications soient visuellement attrayantes et intuitives. - Intégration : Travailler en étroite collaboration avec les développeurs backend et intégrer des SDK JavaScript, des bibliothèques et des services backend dans les applications mobiles. - Collaboration : Collaborer avec les chefs de produit, les designers et d'autres développeurs pour fournir des solutions innovantes. ##
• Exigences - 3+ ans d'expérience avec React, React-Native (principalement avec Expo), Redux et les principes fondamentaux associés. - Maîtrise de JavaScript et ES6+. - Expérience avec les pipelines CI/CD pour le développement mobile. - Familiarité avec les pipelines et outils modernes de front-end. - Expérience avec les modules natifs (C++), WebSockets, APIs RESTful. - Expérience en Swift/Objective-C (iOS) ou Kotlin/Java (Android) pour les implémentations de bas niveau. ## Informations importantes pour les candidats Les arnaques au recrutement sont de plus en plus courantes. Pour vous protéger, veuillez garder à l'esprit les points suivants lorsque vous postulez à des postes : - Postulez uniquement via nos canaux officiels. Nous n'utilisons pas de plateformes ou d'agences tierces pour le recrutement, sauf indication contraire. Tous les postes ouverts sont répertoriés sur notre page officielle des carrières : https://tether.recruitee.com/ - Vérifiez l'identité du recruteur. Tous nos recruteurs ont des profils LinkedIn vérifiés. Si vous avez des doutes, vous pouvez vérifier leur identité en consultant leur profil ou en nous contactant via notre site Web. - Méfiez-vous des méthodes de communication inhabituelles. Nous ne menons pas d'entretiens via WhatsApp, Telegram ou SMS. Toutes les communications se font via des e-mails et des plateformes officielles de l'entreprise. - Vérifiez les adresses e-mail. Toutes nos communications proviennent d'adresses e-mail se terminant par @tether.to ou @tether.io. - Nous ne demanderons jamais de paiement ou de détails financiers. Si quelqu'un vous demande des informations financières personnelles ou un paiement à un moment quelconque du processus de recrutement, il s'agit d'une arnaque. Veuillez le signaler immédiatement. - En cas de doute, n'hésitez pas à nous contacter via notre site Web officiel.

 About the job 
 The role involves working in a dynamic environment with a diverse team of senior backend developers, product managers and leadership to build crypto wallet solutions . The applications are meant to be high performance, light-weight and highly intuitive to cater to a variety of audiences. 
 You will be working on developing cutting edge mobile applications integrating crypto wallets and defi features . 
 You will also contribute to backend components when needed to support mobile features and unblock mobile delivery. 
 You will also provide technical leadership , guide mobile engineering best practices, and support other engineers through reviews and mentoring. 
 
 Responsibilities 
 
• Leadership: Lead a small group of React Native engineers. Drive architectural decisions, enforce coding standards, and ensure timely high quality delivery. 

• Development: Design and build advanced cross platform applications for the iOS and Android platforms using React Native, review work from other engineers to ensure quality and architectural alignment, and contribute to backend services or APIs when required to support mobile functionality. 

• Integration: Work closely with backend developers, integrate Javascript SDKs, libraries, and backend services into mobile applications, and extend backend logic when needed to complete end-to-end features. 

• Collaboration: Collaborate with product managers, designers, and other developers to deliver innovative solutions. 

• Architecture: Own and define patterns for state management, navigation, performance, modularization, and security across mobile applications. 

 
 Mandatory 
 
• Thoroughly experienced with React, React-Native (mainly around Expo), Redux and the core principles surrounding these. 

• Highly proficient in JavaScript and ES6+ . 

• Experience with CI/CD pipelines for mobile development. 

• Familiar with modern front-end pipelines and tools . 

• Experienced with Native modules (C++) , WebSockets, RESTful based APIs. 

• Experience in Swift/Objective-C (iOS) or Kotlin/Java (Android) for low level implementation. 

• Proven experience leading or mentoring mobile engineers . 

• Demonstrated ability to own architecture for large scale React Native applications . 

• Strong decision making skills in evaluating frameworks, tooling, and mobile development patterns. 

• Experience with b ackend development using Node or similar environments , with the ability to implement or adjust APIs and services that power mobile features. 

• Comfortable working across the stack when required, while still maintaining strong depth in mobile development. 

 
 Important information for candidates 
Recruitment scams have become increasingly common. To protect yourself, please keep the following in mind when applying for roles:
 
• Apply only through our official channels. We do not use third-party platforms or agencies for recruitment unless clearly stated. All open roles are listed on our official careers page: https://tether.recruitee.com/

• Verify the recruiter’s identity. All our recruiters have verified LinkedIn profiles. If you’re unsure, you can confirm their identity by checking their profile or contacting us through our website.

• Be cautious of unusual communication methods. We do not conduct interviews over WhatsApp, Telegram, or SMS. All communication is done through official company emails and platforms.

• Double-check email addresses. All communication from us will come from emails ending in @ tether.to or @ tether.io 

• We will never request payment or financial details. If someone asks for personal financial information or payment at any point during the hiring process, it is a scam. Please report it immediately.

 When in doubt, feel free to reach out through our official website.

descriptionByLocale.it: Descrizione Unisciti a Tether e Plasma il Futuro della Finanza Digitale In Tether, non stiamo solo costruendo prodotti, stiamo guidando una rivoluzione finanziaria globale. Le nostre soluzioni all'avanguardia consentono alle aziende—dagli exchange e portafogli ai processori di pagamento e agli ATM—di integrare senza problemi token garantiti da riserve su blockchain. Sfruttando la potenza della tecnologia blockchain, Tether ti permette di conservare, inviare e ricevere token digitali istantaneamente, in modo sicuro e globale, il tutto a una frazione del costo. La trasparenza è il fondamento di tutto ciò che facciamo, garantendo fiducia in ogni transazione. Innovare con Tether Tether Finance: La nostra suite di prodotti innovativi include la stablecoin più affidabile al mondo, USDT, utilizzata da centinaia di milioni di persone in tutto il mondo, insieme a servizi pionieristici di tokenizzazione di asset digitali. Ma questo è solo l'inizio: Tether Power: Promuovendo una crescita sostenibile, le nostre soluzioni energetiche ottimizzano l'energia in eccesso per il mining di Bitcoin utilizzando pratiche ecologiche in strutture all'avanguardia e geograficamente diversificate. Tether Data: Alimentando innovazioni nell'IA e nella tecnologia peer-to-peer, riduciamo i costi infrastrutturali e miglioriamo le comunicazioni globali con soluzioni all'avanguardia come KEET, la nostra app di punta che ridefinisce la condivisione sicura e privata dei dati. Tether Education: Democratizzando l'accesso all'apprendimento digitale di alto livello, offriamo alle persone gli strumenti per prosperare nelle economie digitali e gig, promuovendo crescita e opportunità globali. Tether Evolution: All'intersezione tra tecnologia e potenziale umano, stiamo spingendo i limiti di ciò che è possibile, creando un futuro in cui innovazione e capacità umane si fondono in modi potenti e senza precedenti. Perché unirsi a noi? Il nostro team è un concentrato di talenti globali, che lavora da remoto da ogni angolo del mondo. Se sei appassionato di lasciare il segno nel settore fintech, questa è la tua opportunità per collaborare con alcune delle menti più brillanti, superare i limiti e stabilire nuovi standard. Siamo cresciuti rapidamente, siamo rimasti snelli e ci siamo assicurati il nostro posto come leader del settore. Se hai eccellenti capacità di comunicazione in inglese e sei pronto a contribuire alla piattaforma più innovativa del pianeta, Tether è il posto giusto per te. Sei pronto a far parte del futuro? Informazioni sul lavoro Il ruolo prevede di lavorare in un ambiente dinamico con un team diversificato di sviluppatori backend senior, product manager e leadership per costruire soluzioni di portafogli crypto. Le applicazioni devono essere ad alte prestazioni, leggere e altamente intuitive per soddisfare una varietà di pubblici. Lavorerai allo sviluppo di applicazioni mobili all'avanguardia che integrano portafogli crypto e funzionalità defi. Contribuirai anche ai componenti backend quando necessario per supportare le funzionalità mobili e sbloccare la consegna mobile. Fornirai inoltre leadership tecnica, guiderai le migliori pratiche di ingegneria mobile e supporterai altri ingegneri attraverso revisioni e mentoring. ## Responsabilità Leadership: Guidare un piccolo gruppo di ingegneri React Native. Prendere decisioni architettoniche, applicare standard di codifica e garantire una consegna tempestiva e di alta qualità. Sviluppo: Progettare e costruire applicazioni avanzate cross-platform per le piattaforme iOS e Android utilizzando React Native, revisionare il lavoro di altri ingegneri per garantire qualità e allineamento architettonico, e contribuire ai servizi backend o API quando richiesto per supportare la funzionalità mobile. Integrazione: Collaborare strettamente con gli sviluppatori backend, integrare SDK Javascript, librerie e servizi backend nelle applicazioni mobili, ed estendere la logica backend quando necessario per completare le funzionalità end-to-end. Collaborazione: Collaborare con product manager, designer e altri sviluppatori per fornire soluzioni innovative. Architettura: Possedere e definire modelli per la gestione dello stato, navigazione, prestazioni, modularizzazione e sicurezza nelle applicazioni mobili. ## Obbligatorio Esperienza approfondita con React, React-Native (principalmente con Expo), Redux e i principi fondamentali che li circondano. Altamente competente in JavaScript e ES6+. Esperienza con pipeline CI/CD per lo sviluppo mobile. Familiarità con pipeline e strumenti moderni per il front-end. Esperienza con moduli nativi (C++), WebSockets, API basate su RESTful. Esperienza in Swift/Objective-C (iOS) o Kotlin/Java (Android) per implementazioni a basso livello. Esperienza comprovata nella guida o mentoring di ingegneri mobili. Capacità dimostrata di possedere l'architettura per applicazioni React Native su larga scala. Forti capacità decisionali nella valutazione di framework, strumenti e modelli di sviluppo mobile. Esperienza nello sviluppo backend utilizzando Node o ambienti simili, con la capacità di implementare o regolare API e servizi che alimentano le funzionalità mobili. Comodità nel lavorare su tutto lo stack quando richiesto, mantenendo comunque una forte profondità nello sviluppo mobile. ## Informazioni importanti per i candidati Le truffe di reclutamento sono diventate sempre più comuni. Per proteggerti, tieni presente quanto segue quando candidati per ruoli: Candidati solo attraverso i nostri canali ufficiali. Non utilizziamo piattaforme o agenzie di terze parti per il reclutamento, a meno che non sia chiaramente indicato. Tutti i ruoli aperti sono elencati sulla nostra pagina ufficiale delle carriere: https://tether.recruitee.com/ Verifica l'identità del recruiter. Tutti i nostri recruiter hanno profili LinkedIn verificati. Se hai dubbi, puoi confermare la loro identità controllando il loro profilo o contattandoci tramite il nostro sito web. Sii cauto con metodi di comunicazione insoliti. Non conduciamo interviste tramite WhatsApp, Telegram o SMS. Tutte le comunicazioni avvengono tramite email e piattaforme ufficiali dell'azienda. Controlla due volte gli indirizzi email. Tutte le comunicazioni da parte nostra provengono da email che terminano con @tether.to o @tether.io Non richiederemo mai pagamenti o dettagli finanziari. Se qualcuno ti chiede informazioni finanziarie personali o pagamenti in qualsiasi momento durante il processo di assunzione, si tratta di una truffa. Segnalalo immediatamente. In caso di dubbi, non esitare a contattarci tramite il nostro sito web ufficiale.
descriptionByLocale.en:

Our cutting-edge solutions empower businesses—from exchanges and wallets to payment processors and ATMs—to seamlessly integrate reserve-backed tokens across blockchains. By harnessing the power of blockchain technology, Tether enables you to store, send, and receive digital tokens instantly, securely, and globally, all at a fraction of the cost. Transparency is the bedrock of everything we do, ensuring trust in every transaction. But that’s just the beginning: Tether Power: Driving sustainable growth, our energy solutions optimize excess power for Bitcoin mining using eco-friendly practices in state-of-the-art, geo-diverse facilities. Tether Data: Fueling breakthroughs in AI and peer-to-peer technology, we reduce infrastructure costs and enhance global communications with cutting-edge solutions like KEET , our flagship app that redefines secure and private data sharing. descriptionByLocale.de:
Beschreibung Werden Sie Teil von Tether und gestalten Sie die Zukunft der digitalen Finanzen Bei Tether entwickeln wir nicht nur Produkte, sondern treiben eine globale Finanzrevolution voran. Unsere hochmodernen Lösungen ermöglichen es Unternehmen—von Börsen und Wallets bis hin zu Zahlungsabwicklern und Geldautomaten—Reserve-gestützte Token nahtlos in Blockchains zu integrieren. Durch die Nutzung der Blockchain-Technologie ermöglicht Tether Ihnen, digitale Token sofort, sicher und weltweit zu speichern, zu senden und zu empfangen, und das zu einem Bruchteil der Kosten. Transparenz ist das Fundament von allem, was wir tun, und gewährleistet Vertrauen in jede Transaktion. Innovieren mit Tether Tether Finance: Unsere innovative Produktpalette umfasst die weltweit vertrauenswürdigste Stablecoin, USDT, die von Hunderten von Millionen weltweit genutzt wird, sowie bahnbrechende Dienstleistungen zur Tokenisierung digitaler Vermögenswerte. Aber das ist erst der Anfang: Tether Power: Nachhaltiges Wachstum fördern, unsere Energielösungen optimieren überschüssige Energie für das Bitcoin-Mining unter Verwendung umweltfreundlicher Praktiken in hochmodernen, geografisch diversifizierten Einrichtungen. Tether Data: Durchbrüche in KI und Peer-to-Peer-Technologie fördern, wir senken Infrastrukturkosten und verbessern globale Kommunikation mit hochmodernen Lösungen wie KEET, unserer Flaggschiff-App, die sichere und private Datenfreigabe neu definiert. Tether Education: Demokratisierung des Zugangs zu erstklassigem digitalen Lernen, wir befähigen Einzelpersonen, in den digitalen und Gig-Ökonomien erfolgreich zu sein, und fördern globales Wachstum und Chancen. Tether Evolution: An der Schnittstelle von Technologie und menschlichem Potenzial erweitern wir die Grenzen des Möglichen und gestalten eine Zukunft, in der Innovation und menschliche Fähigkeiten auf kraftvolle, beispiellose Weise verschmelzen. Warum bei uns arbeiten? Unser Team ist ein globales Talentkraftwerk, das remote aus allen Ecken der Welt arbeitet. Wenn Sie leidenschaftlich daran interessiert sind, im Fintech-Bereich Spuren zu hinterlassen, ist dies Ihre Gelegenheit, mit einigen der klügsten Köpfe zusammenzuarbeiten, Grenzen zu überschreiten und neue Standards zu setzen. Wir sind schnell gewachsen, schlank geblieben und haben uns als Branchenführer etabliert. Wenn Sie über ausgezeichnete Englischkenntnisse verfügen und bereit sind, zur innovativsten Plattform der Welt beizutragen, ist Tether der richtige Ort für Sie. Sind Sie bereit, Teil der Zukunft zu sein? Über die Stelle Die Rolle beinhaltet die Arbeit in einer dynamischen Umgebung mit einem vielfältigen Team von erfahrenen Backend-Entwicklern, Produktmanagern und Führungskräften, um Lösungen für Krypto-Wallets zu entwickeln. Die Anwendungen sollen leistungsstark, leicht und hochintuitiv sein, um eine Vielzahl von Zielgruppen anzusprechen. Sie werden an der Entwicklung hochmoderner mobiler Anwendungen arbeiten, die Krypto-Wallets und DeFi-Funktionen integrieren. Sie werden auch zu Backend-Komponenten beitragen, wenn nötig, um mobile Funktionen zu unterstützen und die mobile Bereitstellung zu ermöglichen. Darüber hinaus werden Sie technische Führung übernehmen, mobile Engineering-Best Practices leiten und andere Ingenieure durch Reviews und Mentoring unterstützen. ## Verantwortlichkeiten Führung: Führen Sie eine kleine Gruppe von React Native-Ingenieuren. Treffen Sie architektonische Entscheidungen, setzen Sie Codierungsstandards durch und stellen Sie eine rechtzeitige und qualitativ hochwertige Lieferung sicher. Entwicklung: Entwerfen und entwickeln Sie fortschrittliche plattformübergreifende Anwendungen für die iOS- und Android-Plattformen mit React Native, überprüfen Sie die Arbeit anderer Ingenieure, um Qualität und architektonische Ausrichtung sicherzustellen, und tragen Sie bei Bedarf zu Backend-Diensten oder APIs bei, um die mobile Funktionalität zu unterstützen. Integration: Arbeiten Sie eng mit Backend-Entwicklern zusammen, integrieren Sie Javascript-SDKs, Bibliotheken und Backend-Dienste in mobile Anwendungen und erweitern Sie die Backend-Logik, wenn nötig, um End-to-End-Funktionen abzuschließen. Zusammenarbeit: Arbeiten Sie mit Produktmanagern, Designern und anderen Entwicklern zusammen, um innovative Lösungen zu liefern. Architektur: Besitzen und definieren Sie Muster für Zustandsverwaltung, Navigation, Leistung, Modularisierung und Sicherheit in mobilen Anwendungen. ## Erforderlich Umfassende Erfahrung mit React, React-Native (hauptsächlich rund um Expo), Redux und den grundlegenden Prinzipien. Hochkompetent in JavaScript und ES6+. Erfahrung mit CI/CD-Pipelines für die mobile Entwicklung. Vertraut mit modernen Front-End-Pipelines und Tools. Erfahren mit nativen Modulen (C++), WebSockets, RESTful-basierten APIs. Erfahrung in Swift/Objective-C (iOS) oder Kotlin/Java (Android) für Implementierungen auf niedriger Ebene. Nachgewiesene Erfahrung in der Führung oder Mentoring von mobilen Ingenieuren. Nachgewiesene Fähigkeit, Architektur für groß angelegte React Native-Anwendungen zu besitzen. Starke Entscheidungsfähigkeiten bei der Bewertung von Frameworks, Tools und mobilen Entwicklungsmodellen. Erfahrung in der Backend-Entwicklung mit Node oder ähnlichen Umgebungen, mit der Fähigkeit, APIs und Dienste zu implementieren oder anzupassen, die mobile Funktionen unterstützen. Komfortables Arbeiten über den gesamten Stack, wenn erforderlich, während dennoch eine starke Tiefe in der mobilen Entwicklung beibehalten wird. ## Wichtige Informationen für Bewerber Rekrutierungsbetrug wird immer häufiger. Um sich zu schützen, beachten Sie bitte Folgendes bei der Bewerbung für Stellen: Bewerben Sie sich nur über unsere offiziellen Kanäle. Wir nutzen keine Drittanbieterplattformen oder Agenturen für die Rekrutierung, es sei denn, dies ist ausdrücklich angegeben. Alle offenen Stellen sind auf unserer offiziellen Karriereseite aufgeführt: https://tether.recruitee.com/ Überprüfen Sie die Identität des Recruiters. Alle unsere Recruiter haben verifizierte LinkedIn-
• Profile. Wenn Sie unsicher sind, können Sie deren Identität überprüfen, indem Sie deren Profil überprüfen oder uns über unsere Website kontaktieren. Seien Sie vorsichtig bei ungewöhnlichen Kommunikationsmethoden. Wir führen keine Interviews über WhatsApp, Telegram oder SMS. Alle Kommunikation erfolgt über offizielle Unternehmens-E-Mails und Plattformen. Überprüfen Sie E-Mail-Adressen doppelt. Alle Kommunikation von uns erfolgt über E-Mails, die mit @tether.to oder @tether.io enden. Wir werden niemals Zahlungen oder finanzielle Details anfordern. Wenn jemand zu irgendeinem Zeitpunkt während des Einstellungsprozesses nach persönlichen finanziellen Informationen oder Zahlungen fragt, handelt es sich um einen Betrug. Bitte melden Sie dies sofort. Im Zweifelsfall können Sie uns gerne über unsere offizielle Website kontaktieren.
descriptionByLocale.fr: Description Rejoignez Tether et façonnez l'avenir de la finance numérique Chez Tether, nous ne nous contentons pas de créer des produits, nous révolutionnons la finance mondiale. Nos solutions de pointe permettent aux entreprises—des plateformes d'échange et portefeuilles aux processeurs de paiement et distributeurs automatiques—d'intégrer facilement des tokens adossés à des réserves sur des blockchains. En exploitant la puissance de la technologie blockchain, Tether vous permet de stocker, envoyer et recevoir des tokens numériques instantanément, en toute sécurité et à l'échelle mondiale, le tout à une fraction du coût. La transparence est la pierre angulaire de tout ce que nous faisons, garantissant la confiance dans chaque transaction. Innover avec Tether Tether Finance: Notre suite de produits innovants comprend le stablecoin le plus fiable au monde, USDT, utilisé par des centaines de millions de personnes dans le monde, ainsi que des services pionniers de tokenisation d'actifs numériques. Mais ce n'est que le début: Tether Power: Favorisant une croissance durable, nos solutions énergétiques optimisent l'excès d'énergie pour le minage de Bitcoin en utilisant des pratiques écologiques dans des installations géographiquement diversifiées et à la pointe de la technologie. Tether Data: Alimentant des avancées dans l'IA et la technologie peer-to-peer, nous réduisons les coûts d'infrastructure et améliorons les communications mondiales avec des solutions de pointe comme KEET, notre application phare qui redéfinit le partage sécurisé et privé de données. Tether Education: Démocratisant l'accès à l'apprentissage numérique de haut niveau, nous donnons aux individus les moyens de réussir dans les économies numériques et de travail indépendant, favorisant la croissance et les opportunités mondiales. Tether Evolution: À l'intersection de la technologie et du potentiel humain, nous repoussons les limites de ce qui est possible, créant un avenir où l'innovation et les capacités humaines se fusionnent de manière puissante et sans précédent. Pourquoi nous rejoindre? Notre équipe est un concentré de talents mondiaux, travaillant à distance depuis tous les coins du monde. Si vous êtes passionné par l'idée de laisser votre empreinte dans le domaine de la fintech, c'est votre opportunité de collaborer avec certaines des esprits les plus brillants, de repousser les limites et de définir de nouvelles normes. Nous avons grandi rapidement, sommes restés agiles et avons sécurisé notre place en tant que leader de l'industrie. Si vous avez d'excellentes compétences en communication en anglais et êtes prêt à contribuer à la plateforme la plus innovante de la planète, Tether est l'endroit qu'il vous faut. Êtes-vous prêt à faire partie de l'avenir? À propos du poste Le rôle implique de travailler dans un environnement dynamique avec une équipe diversifiée de développeurs backend seniors, chefs de produit et dirigeants pour construire des solutions de portefeuilles crypto. Les applications doivent être performantes, légères et hautement intuitives pour répondre à une variété de publics. Vous travaillerez au développement d'applications mobiles de pointe intégrant des portefeuilles crypto et des fonctionnalités DeFi. Vous contribuerez également aux composants backend lorsque nécessaire pour soutenir les fonctionnalités mobiles et débloquer la livraison mobile. Vous fournirez également un leadership technique, guiderez les meilleures pratiques en ingénierie mobile et soutiendrez d'autres ingénieurs à travers des revues et du mentorat. ## Responsabilités Leadership: Diriger un petit groupe d'ingénieurs React Native. Prendre des décisions architecturales, appliquer des normes de codage et garantir une livraison rapide et de haute qualité. Développement: Concevoir et construire des applications avancées multiplateformes pour les plateformes iOS et Android en utilisant React Native, examiner le travail d'autres ingénieurs pour garantir la qualité et l'alignement architectural, et contribuer aux services backend ou API lorsque nécessaire pour soutenir la fonctionnalité mobile. Intégration: Travailler en étroite collaboration avec les développeurs backend, intégrer des SDK Javascript, des bibliothèques et des services backend dans les applications mobiles, et étendre la logique backend lorsque nécessaire pour compléter les fonctionnalités de bout en bout. Collaboration: Collaborer avec les chefs de produit, les designers et d'autres développeurs pour fournir des solutions innovantes. Architecture: Posséder et définir des modèles pour la gestion d'état, la navigation, les performances, la modularisation et la sécurité dans les applications mobiles. ## Obligatoire Expérience approfondie avec React, React-Native (principalement autour d'Expo), Redux et les principes fondamentaux qui les entourent. Très compétent en JavaScript et ES6+. Expérience avec les pipelines CI/CD pour le développement mobile. Familiarité avec les pipelines et outils modernes de front-end. Expérience avec les modules natifs (C++), WebSockets, APIs basées sur RESTful. Expérience en Swift/Objective-C (iOS) ou Kotlin/Java (Android) pour les implémentations de bas niveau. Expérience avérée dans la direction ou le mentorat d'ingénieurs mobiles. Capacité démontrée à posséder l'architecture pour des applications React Native à grande échelle. Solides compétences en prise de décision dans l'évaluation des frameworks, outils et modèles de développement mobile. Expérience en développement backend utilisant Node ou des environnements similaires, avec la capacité d'implémenter ou d'ajuster des APIs et services qui alimentent les fonctionnalités mobiles. À l'aise pour travailler sur toute la pile lorsque nécessaire, tout en maintenant une forte expertise en développement mobile. ## Informations importantes pour les candidats Les arnaques de recrutement sont de plus en plus courantes. Pour vous protéger, veuillez garder à l'esprit les points suivants lors de votre candidature: Postulez uniquement via nos canaux officiels. Nous n'utilisons pas de plateformes ou agences tierces pour le recrutement sauf indication contraire. Tous les postes ouverts sont listés sur notre page officielle des carrières: https://tether.recruitee.com/ Vérifiez l'identité du recruteur. Tous nos recruteurs ont des profils LinkedIn vérifiés. Si vous avez des doutes, vous pouvez confirmer leur identité en vérifiant leur profil ou en nous contactant via notre site web. Soyez prudent avec les méthodes de communication inhabituelles. Nous ne menons pas d'entretiens via WhatsApp, Telegram ou SMS. Toutes les communications se font via des emails et des plateformes officielles de l'entreprise. Vérifiez les adresses email. Toutes les communications de notre part proviendront d'emails se terminant par @tether.to ou @tether.io Nous ne demanderons jamais de paiement ou de détails financiers. Si quelqu'un vous demande des informations financières personnelles ou un paiement à tout moment du processus de recrutement, il s'agit d'une arnaque. Veuillez le signaler immédiatement. En cas de doute, n'hésitez pas à nous contacter via notre site web officiel.

jobs.title: Vendor & Procurement Manager (100% remote)
jobs.description:
Join Tether and Shape the Future of Digital Finance 
 At Tether, we’re not just building products, we’re pioneering a global financial revolution. Our cutting-edge solutions empower businesses—from exchanges and wallets to payment processors and ATMs—to seamlessly integrate reserve-backed tokens across blockchains. By harnessing the power of blockchain technology, Tether enables you to store, send, and receive digital tokens instantly, securely, and globally, all at a fraction of the cost. Transparency is the bedrock of everything we do, ensuring trust in every transaction. 
 
 Innovate with Tether 
 Tether Finance: Our innovative product suite features the world’s most trusted stablecoin, USDT , relied upon by hundreds of millions worldwide, alongside pioneering digital asset tokenization services. 
 But that’s just the beginning: 
 Tether Power: Driving sustainable growth, our energy solutions optimize excess power for Bitcoin mining using eco-friendly practices in state-of-the-art, geo-diverse facilities. 
 Tether Data: Fueling breakthroughs in AI and peer-to-peer technology, we reduce infrastructure costs and enhance global communications with cutting-edge solutions like KEET , our flagship app that redefines secure and private data sharing. 
 Tether Education : Democratizing access to top-tier digital learning, we empower individuals to thrive in the digital and gig economies, driving global growth and opportunity. 
 Tether Evolution : At the intersection of technology and human potential, we are pushing the boundaries of what is possible, crafting a future where innovation and human capabilities merge in powerful, unprecedented ways. 
 
 Why Join Us? 
 Our team is a global talent powerhouse, working remotely from every corner of the world. If you’re passionate about making a mark in the fintech space, this is your opportunity to collaborate with some of the brightest minds, pushing boundaries and setting new standards. We’ve grown fast, stayed lean, and secured our place as a leader in the industry. 
 If you have excellent English communication skills and are ready to contribute to the most innovative platform on the planet, Tether is the place for you. 
 Are you ready to be part of the future? 
 
 About the job 
 
 As part of the Technology Distribution team of Tether Data, we are seeking a Vendor & Procurement Manager to oversee all aspects of procurement, contracting, and relationship management related to development outsourcing — including software development partners, technology service providers, and specialized consultants in the field of app development, blockchain, AI engineering, P2P technologies, and digital assets. 
 The ideal candidate will combine strong commercial acumen with a technical understanding of development processes, ensuring that external resources are aligned with internal delivery, quality, and cost objectives. 
 
 
 Responsibilities 
 
• Vendor & Supplier Management 

 
• Coordinate assessment and onboard new development and technology outsourcing partners. 

• Maintain a structured vendor registry and performance database. 

• Ensure proper monitoring of supplier performance across stakeholders (technical architects, product and project managers) 

• Lead regular reviews and ensure continuous improvement from suppliers. 

 2. Procurement & Contracting 
 
• Drive end-to-end procurement processes for outsourced development initiatives, from collection of requirements from internal stakeholders to contract negotiation and award. 

• Collaborate with Legal to define contract terms, SLAs, NDAs, and master service agreements. 

• Ensure compliance with company procurement policies (e.g., data protection, IP ownership, open-source software, coding standards). 

 3. Financial & Commercial Oversight 
 
• Control vendor budgets, purchase orders, and invoicing workflows. 

• Support forecasting and cost optimization across multi-vendor environments. 

• Identify opportunities for consolidation, cost efficiencies, and strategic partnerships. 

 4. Cross-Functional Collaboration 
 
• Partner closely with Engineering, Product Management, and Project Management teams to translate technical requirements into vendor scopes. 

• Support project managers in vendor selection, resource allocation, and escalation management. 

• Anticipate vendor-related issues, disputes, or performance shortcomings and escalate as appropriate. 

 5. Strategic Development Sourcing 
 
• Map capabilities of external development partners (AI, blockchain, backend, frontend, QA, DevOps, etc.). 

• Lead vendor evaluation and due diligence processes for new technologies or geographies. 

• Contribute to make-vs-buy decisions and outsourcing strategy evolution. 

 

 
 
• 3+ years of experience at the intersection of technology, innovation, and strategic sourcing, procurement and vendor management . 

• Demonstrated ability of shaping the company’s outsourcing and supplier ecosystem in a high-growth environment. 

• Collaborate with world-class technical and business teams across multiple regions. 

• English is a must, any other language a plus 

• Crypto/blockchain/AI sourcing and vendor management expertise is an advantage 

 
 
 Important information for candidates 
Recruitment scams have become increasingly common. To protect yourself, please keep the following in mind when applying for roles:
 
• Apply only through our official channels. We do not use third-party platforms or agencies for recruitment unless clearly stated. All open roles are listed on our official careers page: https://tether.recruitee.com/

• Verify the recruiter’s identity. All our recruiters have verified LinkedIn profiles. If you’re unsure, you can confirm their identity by checking their profile or contacting us through our website.

• Be cautious of unusual communication methods. We do not conduct interviews over WhatsApp, Telegram, or SMS. All communication is done through official company emails and platforms.

• Double-check email addresses. All communication from us will come from emails ending in @ tether.to or @ tether.io 

• We will never request payment or financial details. If someone asks for personal financial information or payment at any point during the hiring process, it is a scam. Please report it immediately.

 When in doubt, feel free to reach out through our official website.

jobs.title: Research Engineer Intern (Multimodal LLM)
jobs.description:

 Tether Finance: Our innovative product suite features the world’s most trusted stablecoin, USDT , relied upon by hundreds of millions worldwide, alongside pioneering digital asset tokenization services.
 But that’s just the beginning:
 Tether Power: Driving sustainable growth, our energy solutions optimize excess power for Bitcoin mining using eco-friendly practices in state-of-the-art, geo-diverse facilities.
 Tether Data: Fueling breakthroughs in AI and peer-to-peer technology, we reduce infrastructure costs and enhance global communications with cutting-edge solutions like KEET , our flagship app that redefines secure and private data sharing.
 Tether Education : Democratizing access to top-tier digital learning, we empower individuals to thrive in the digital and gig economies, driving global growth and opportunity.
 Tether Evolution : At the intersection of technology and human potential, we are pushing the boundaries of what is possible, crafting a future where innovation and human capabilities merge in powerful, unprecedented ways.
 
 Why Join Us? 
 Our team is a global talent powerhouse, working remotely from every corner of the world. If you’re passionate about making a mark in the fintech space, this is your opportunity to collaborate with some of the brightest minds, pushing boundaries and setting new standards. We’ve grown fast, stayed lean, and secured our place as a leader in the industry.
 If you have excellent English communication skills and are ready to contribute to the most innovative platform on the planet, Tether is the place for you.
 Are you ready to be part of the future? 
 
 About the job 
 
• We are looking for talented individuals to join us for an internship in 2025/2026. MSc/PhD Internships at Tether aim to provide students with the opportunity to actively contribute to our products and research, and to the organization's future plans and emerging technologies.

• In our team, you will have the opportunity to participate in the development of the state-of-the-art (SOTA) foundation models, and will also be responsible for optimizing our distributed model training framework continuously.

• PhD internships at Tether provide students with the opportunity to actively contribute to our products and research, and to the organization's future plans and emerging technologies. Our dynamic internship experience blends hands-on learning, enriching community-building and development events, and collaboration with industry experts.

• Applications will be reviewed on a rolling basis. We encourage you to apply early. Please state your availability clearly in your resume (Start date, End date).
 

 Responsibilities 
 
• Research and develop state-of-the-art LLM and/or video or multimodality models to accelerate open-source progress in the domains.

• Implement the application of large models in our business scenarios, like pre-training, supervised fine-tuning, post-training, inference etc.

• Continuously optimize the training framework to better adapt to the training of large models on thousands of multi-node GPUs.

• In this role, you’ll have the opportunity to advance the development of open-source LLM, vision and/or multimodal foundation models and products. You will have the opportunity to collaborate with broader teams across Tether.

 
 
• MSc/PhD candidate in computer science or a related technical discipline

• Related Research Experience at least one of the following areas: LLM, computer vision, multimodality

• Be proficient with PyTorch deep learning framework and libraries

• Have excellent analytical and problem-solving skills, logical thinking skills, communication and collaboration skills

• Publications in the top AI conferences (e.g., ACL, NIPS, ICML, ICLR, CVPR, ICCV, ECCV, TPAMI, IJCV, etc.) is a nice to have.

 
 Important information for candidates 
Recruitment scams have become increasingly common. To protect yourself, please keep the following in mind when applying for roles:
 
• Apply only through our official channels. We do not use third-party platforms or agencies for recruitment unless clearly stated. All open roles are listed on our official careers page: https://tether.recruitee.com/

• Verify the recruiter’s identity. All our recruiters have verified LinkedIn profiles. If you’re unsure, you can confirm their identity by checking their profile or contacting us through our website.

• Be cautious of unusual communication methods. We do not conduct interviews over WhatsApp, Telegram, or SMS. All communication is done through official company emails and platforms.

• Double-check email addresses. All communication from us will come from emails ending in @ tether.to or @ tether.io 

• We will never request payment or financial details. If someone asks for personal financial information or payment at any point during the hiring process, it is a scam. Please report it immediately.

 When in doubt, feel free to reach out through our official website.

jobs.title: Account Manager (100% remote)
jobs.description:
Join Tether and Shape the Future of Digital Finance 
 At Tether, we’re not just building products, we’re pioneering a global financial revolution. Our cutting-edge solutions empower businesses—from exchanges and wallets to payment processors and ATMs—to seamlessly integrate reserve-backed tokens across blockchains. By harnessing the power of blockchain technology, Tether enables you to store, send, and receive digital tokens instantly, securely, and globally, all at a fraction of the cost. Transparency is the bedrock of everything we do, ensuring trust in every transaction. 
 
 Innovate with Tether 
 Tether Finance: Our innovative product suite features the world’s most trusted stablecoin, USDT , relied upon by hundreds of millions worldwide, alongside pioneering digital asset tokenization services. 
 But that’s just the beginning: 
 Tether Power: Driving sustainable growth, our energy solutions optimize excess power for Bitcoin mining using eco-friendly practices in state-of-the-art, geo-diverse facilities. 
 Tether Data: Fueling breakthroughs in AI and peer-to-peer technology, we reduce infrastructure costs and enhance global communications with cutting-edge solutions like KEET , our flagship app that redefines secure and private data sharing. 
 Tether Education : Democratizing access to top-tier digital learning, we empower individuals to thrive in the digital and gig economies, driving global growth and opportunity. 
 Tether Evolution : At the intersection of technology and human potential, we are pushing the boundaries of what is possible, crafting a future where innovation and human capabilities merge in powerful, unprecedented ways. 
 
 Why Join Us? 
 Our team is a global talent powerhouse, working remotely from every corner of the world. If you’re passionate about making a mark in the fintech space, this is your opportunity to collaborate with some of the brightest minds, pushing boundaries and setting new standards. We’ve grown fast, stayed lean, and secured our place as a leader in the industry. 
 If you have excellent English communication skills and are ready to contribute to the most innovative platform on the planet, Tether is the place for you. 
 Are you ready to be part of the future? 
 
 About the job 
 As part of the Technology Distribution team of Tether Data, we are seeking a highly organized and strategically minded Account Manager to oversee complex, cross-functional initiatives involving digital wallets and payments, asset tokenization, P2P technologies, and decentralized AI. The role combines client engagement, project governance, and multi-stakeholder coordination across external companies, government entities, and internal teams. 
 This position is pivotal in ensuring timely delivery of strategic programs, maintaining alignment between stakeholders, and supporting the deployment of transformational technologies in a fast-paced, regulated environment. 
 
 Responsibilities 
 Client & Partner Engagement 
 
• Act as the primary point of contact for clients and institutional partners, ensuring consistent communication, expectation management, and long-term relationship building. 

• Coordinate with external companies providing payment and exchange services, government institutions, and technology vendors. 

• Liaise with Expansion team to support the definition of collaboration opportunities across sectors. 

• Identify cross-initiative opportunities to introduce and leverage multiple Tether technologies 

 Project Governance & Delivery Oversight 
 
• Oversee implementation progress led by Product Managers and ensure alignment with contractual terms, expectations, and delivery timelines. 

• Maintain governance frameworks including meeting notes, action logs, risk registers, and decision records. 

• Drive accountability by ensuring tasks, responsibilities, and milestones are clearly tracked and documented. 

• Support escalation management to Head of Technology Distribution and ensure timely resolution of operational or strategic issues. 

 Cross-Team and Stakeholders Coordination 
 
• Facilitate information flow between internal product, engineering, legal/compliance, marketing and operations teams. 

• Maintain dashboards and executive reports summarizing status, risks, and next steps. 

• Engage and maintain relationships with external companies involved in the initiative at all levels 

 

 
• 5+ years of experience in account management, program coordination, or project governance within technology, fintech, or consulting environments. 

• Proven ability to engage with corporate and government stakeholders at multiple levels. 

• Strong understanding of digital assets, blockchain, or financial technology ecosystems (experience with tokenization, custodial solutions, or payment infrastructure is a plus). 

• Excellent communication, documentation, and analytical skills. 

• Strong sense of ownership, initiative, and ability to operate in a fast-paced, evolving environment. 

• English is a must, any other language a plus 

• Crypto/blockchain/AI sourcing and vendor management expertise is an advantage 

 
 
 Important information for candidates 
Recruitment scams have become increasingly common. To protect yourself, please keep the following in mind when applying for roles:
 
• Apply only through our official channels. We do not use third-party platforms or agencies for recruitment unless clearly stated. All open roles are listed on our official careers page: https://tether.recruitee.com/

• Verify the recruiter’s identity. All our recruiters have verified LinkedIn profiles. If you’re unsure, you can confirm their identity by checking their profile or contacting us through our website.

• Be cautious of unusual communication methods. We do not conduct interviews over WhatsApp, Telegram, or SMS. All communication is done through official company emails and platforms.

• Double-check email addresses. All communication from us will come from emails ending in @ tether.to or @ tether.io 

• We will never request payment or financial details. If someone asks for personal financial information or payment at any point during the hiring process, it is a scam. Please report it immediately.

 When in doubt, feel free to reach out through our official website.

About the job As part of the Technology Distribution team of Tether Data, we are seeking a highly organized and strategically minded Account Manager to oversee complex, cross-functional initiatives involving digital wallets and payments, asset tokenization, P2P technologies, and decentralized AI. The role combines client engagement, project governance, and multi-stakeholder coordination across external companies, government entities, and internal teams. This position is pivotal in ensuring timely delivery of strategic programs, maintaining alignment between stakeholders, and supporting the deployment of transformational technologies in a fast-paced, regulated environment. Responsibilities Client & Partner Engagement
• Act as the primary point of contact for clients and institutional partners, ensuring consistent communication, expectation management, and long-term relationship building.
• Coordinate with external companies providing payment and exchange services, government institutions, and technology vendors.
• Liaise with Expansion team to support the definition of collaboration opportunities across sectors.
• Identify cross-initiative opportunities to introduce and leverage multiple Tether technologies Project Governance & Delivery Oversight
• Oversee implementation progress led by Product Managers and ensure alignment with contractual terms, expectations, and delivery timelines.
• Maintain governance frameworks including meeting notes, action logs, risk registers, and decision records.
• Drive accountability by ensuring tasks, responsibilities, and milestones are clearly tracked and documented.
• Support escalation management to Head of Technology Distribution and ensure timely resolution of operational or strategic issues. Cross-Team and Stakeholders Coordination
• Facilitate information flow between internal product, engineering, legal/compliance, marketing and operations teams.
• Maintain dashboards and executive reports summarizing status, risks, and next steps.
• Engage and maintain relationships with external companies involved in the initiative at all levels
• 5+ years of experience in account management, program coordination, or project governance within technology, fintech, or consulting environments.
• Proven ability to engage with corporate and government stakeholders at multiple levels.
• Strong understanding of digital assets, blockchain, or financial technology ecosystems (experience with tokenization, custodial solutions, or payment infrastructure is a plus).
• Excellent communication, documentation, and analytical skills.
• Strong sense of ownership, initiative, and ability to operate in a fast-paced, evolving environment.
• English is a must, any other language a plus
• Crypto/blockchain/AI sourcing and vendor management expertise is an advantage Important information for candidates Recruitment scams have become increasingly common. To protect yourself, please keep the following in mind when applying for roles:
• Apply only through our official channels. We do not use third-party platforms or agencies for recruitment unless clearly stated. All open roles are listed on our official careers page: https://tether.recruitee.com/
• Verify the recruiter’s identity. All our recruiters have verified LinkedIn profiles. If you’re unsure, you can confirm their identity by checking their profile or contacting us through our website.
• Be cautious of unusual communication methods. We do not conduct interviews over WhatsApp, Telegram, or SMS. All communication is done through official company emails and platforms.
• Double-check email addresses. All communication from us will come from emails ending in @ tether.to or @ tether.io
• We will never request payment or financial details. If someone asks for personal financial information or payment at any point during the hiring process, it is a scam. Please report it immediately. When in doubt, feel free to reach out through our official website.

jobs.title: Solutions Partner Manager (100% remote)
jobs.description:
Join Tether and Shape the Future of Digital Finance 
 At Tether, we’re not just building products, we’re pioneering a global financial revolution. Our cutting-edge solutions empower businesses—from exchanges and wallets to payment processors and ATMs—to seamlessly integrate reserve-backed tokens across blockchains. By harnessing the power of blockchain technology, Tether enables you to store, send, and receive digital tokens instantly, securely, and globally, all at a fraction of the cost. Transparency is the bedrock of everything we do, ensuring trust in every transaction. 
 
 Innovate with Tether 
 Tether Finance: Our innovative product suite features the world’s most trusted stablecoin, USDT , relied upon by hundreds of millions worldwide, alongside pioneering digital asset tokenization services. 
 But that’s just the beginning: 
 Tether Power: Driving sustainable growth, our energy solutions optimize excess power for Bitcoin mining using eco-friendly practices in state-of-the-art, geo-diverse facilities. 
 Tether Data: Fueling breakthroughs in AI and peer-to-peer technology, we reduce infrastructure costs and enhance global communications with cutting-edge solutions like KEET , our flagship app that redefines secure and private data sharing. 
 Tether Education : Democratizing access to top-tier digital learning, we empower individuals to thrive in the digital and gig economies, driving global growth and opportunity. 
 Tether Evolution : At the intersection of technology and human potential, we are pushing the boundaries of what is possible, crafting a future where innovation and human capabilities merge in powerful, unprecedented ways. 
 
 Why Join Us? 
 Our team is a global talent powerhouse, working remotely from every corner of the world. If you’re passionate about making a mark in the fintech space, this is your opportunity to collaborate with some of the brightest minds, pushing boundaries and setting new standards. We’ve grown fast, stayed lean, and secured our place as a leader in the industry. 
 If you have excellent English communication skills and are ready to contribute to the most innovative platform on the planet, Tether is the place for you. 
 Are you ready to be part of the future? 
 
 About the job 
 As part of the Technology Distribution team of Tether Data, the Solutions Partner Manager is responsible for managing, enabling, and governing a network of consulting firms, system integrators, and delivery partners who implement Tether products (WDK, QVAC, and MOS). The role ensures partners deliver high-quality projects, align with Tether’s interests, meet certification standards, and drive customer satisfaction. 
 
 Responsibilities 
 1. Partner Relationship & Capability Management 
 
• Act as the primary relationship owner for all Solutions Partners. 

• Coordinate the assessment of partner capabilities, delivery maturity, and resources. 

• Ensure partners maintain sufficient certified consultants and technical capacity. 

• Conduct regular capability reviews and develop partner improvement plans as needed. 

 2. Partner Onboarding & Certification 
 
• Lead the onboarding of new implementation partners, including due diligence and contract execution. 

• Coordinate partner training and certification programs 

• Ensure adherence to implementation playbooks, best practices, and delivery frameworks. 

 3. Delivery Governance 
 
• Oversee partner-led implementations to ensure alignment with methodology, quality standards, and timelines. 

• Participate in project kick-offs, milestone reviews, and governance checkpoints. 

• Validate partner deliverables (e.g., configurations, integration setups, testing documentation). 

• Manage escalations and coordinate resolutions with internal Technical, Support, and Product teams. 

 4. Project Portfolio Monitoring 
 
• Maintain visibility over the entire portfolio of partner-led projects. 

• Identify and flag cross-sell opportunities with other Tether products or with services offered by Tether portfolio companies, where relevant. 

• Track delivery risks, resourcing gaps, and escalations across the partner ecosystem. 

• Ensure Partners receive Technical support as required during their implementations 

 5. Quality Assurance & Performance Management 
 
• Monitor KPIs such as project success rate, CSAT, and partner delivery quality. 

• Perform quarterly partner performance reviews. 

• Define corrective action plans or temporary delivery restrictions when required. 

• Manage re-certification cycles and partner tiering. 

 7. Cross-Functional Coordination 
 
• Work closely with Customer Success, Delivery, Support, Product, and Training teams. 

• Ensure smooth transitions between sales-to-delivery and delivery-to-support phases. 

• Provide feedback from partner projects to internal teams to improve product quality and implementation processes. 

 8. Partner Lifecycle Management 
 
• Manage partner renewal, re-certification, and (if necessary) offboarding. 

• Maintain partner records, capability matrices, and project performance logs. 

 

 
 
• 4–8 years in Partner Management, Delivery Management, Professional Services, or Project Governance roles. 

• Experience working with implementation partners, system integrators, or consulting firms. 

• Strong understanding of software/IT implementation processes (integration, configuration, change management, UAT, go-live). 

• Collaborate with world-class technical and business teams across multiple regions. 

• Experience in SaaS, fintech, AI, blockchain, digital content platforms, or enterprise open source software. 

• Previous work with partner-led delivery models or certification programs. 

• Knowledge of partner governance tools, PMO frameworks, and QA processes. 

• English is a must, any other language a plus 

 
 
 Important information for candidates 
Recruitment scams have become increasingly common. To protect yourself, please keep the following in mind when applying for roles:
 
• Apply only through our official channels. We do not use third-party platforms or agencies for recruitment unless clearly stated. All open roles are listed on our official careers page: https://tether.recruitee.com/

• Verify the recruiter’s identity. All our recruiters have verified LinkedIn profiles. If you’re unsure, you can confirm their identity by checking their profile or contacting us through our website.

• Be cautious of unusual communication methods. We do not conduct interviews over WhatsApp, Telegram, or SMS. All communication is done through official company emails and platforms.

• Double-check email addresses. All communication from us will come from emails ending in @ tether.to or @ tether.io 

• We will never request payment or financial details. If someone asks for personal financial information or payment at any point during the hiring process, it is a scam. Please report it immediately.

 When in doubt, feel free to reach out through our official website.
