About the job As part of the Technology Distribution team of Tether Data, the Solutions Partner Manager is responsible for managing, enabling, and governing a network of consulting firms, system integrators, and delivery partners who implement Tether products (WDK, QVAC, and MOS). The role ensures partners deliver high-quality projects, align with Tether’s interests, meet certification standards, and drive customer satisfaction. Responsibilities 1. Partner Relationship & Capability Management
• Act as the primary relationship owner for all Solutions Partners.
• Coordinate the assessment of partner capabilities, delivery maturity, and resources.
• Ensure partners maintain sufficient certified consultants and technical capacity.
• Conduct regular capability reviews and develop partner improvement plans as needed. 2. Partner Onboarding & Certification
• Lead the onboarding of new implementation partners, including due diligence and contract execution.
• Coordinate partner training and certification programs
• Ensure adherence to implementation playbooks, best practices, and delivery frameworks. 3. Delivery Governance
• Oversee partner-led implementations to ensure alignment with methodology, quality standards, and timelines.
• Participate in project kick-offs, milestone reviews, and governance checkpoints.
• Validate partner deliverables (e.g., configurations, integration setups, testing documentation).
• Manage escalations and coordinate resolutions with internal Technical, Support, and Product teams. 4. Project Portfolio Monitoring
• Maintain visibility over the entire portfolio of partner-led projects.
• Identify and flag cross-sell opportunities with other Tether products or with services offered by Tether portfolio companies, where relevant.
• Track delivery risks, resourcing gaps, and escalations across the partner ecosystem.
• Ensure Partners receive Technical support as required during their implementations 5. Quality Assurance & Performance Management
• Monitor KPIs such as project success rate, CSAT, and partner delivery quality.
• Perform quarterly partner performance reviews.
• Define corrective action plans or temporary delivery restrictions when required.
• Manage re-certification cycles and partner tiering. 7. Cross-Functional Coordination
• Work closely with Customer Success, Delivery, Support, Product, and Training teams.
• Ensure smooth transitions between sales-to-delivery and delivery-to-support phases.
• Provide feedback from partner projects to internal teams to improve product quality and implementation processes. 8. Partner Lifecycle Management
• Manage partner renewal, re-certification, and (if necessary) offboarding.
• Maintain partner records, capability matrices, and project performance logs.
• 4–8 years in Partner Management, Delivery Management, Professional Services, or Project Governance roles.
• Experience working with implementation partners, system integrators, or consulting firms.
• Strong understanding of software/IT implementation processes (integration, configuration, change management, UAT, go-live).
• Collaborate with world-class technical and business teams across multiple regions.
• Experience in SaaS, fintech, AI, blockchain, digital content platforms, or enterprise open source software.
• Previous work with partner-led delivery models or certification programs.
• Knowledge of partner governance tools, PMO frameworks, and QA processes.
• English is a must, any other language a plus Important information for candidates Recruitment scams have become increasingly common. To protect yourself, please keep the following in mind when applying for roles:
• Apply only through our official channels. We do not use third-party platforms or agencies for recruitment unless clearly stated. All open roles are listed on our official careers page: https://tether.recruitee.com/
• Verify the recruiter’s identity. All our recruiters have verified LinkedIn profiles. If you’re unsure, you can confirm their identity by checking their profile or contacting us through our website.
• Be cautious of unusual communication methods. We do not conduct interviews over WhatsApp, Telegram, or SMS. All communication is done through official company emails and platforms.
• Double-check email addresses. All communication from us will come from emails ending in @ tether.to or @ tether.io
• We will never request payment or financial details. If someone asks for personal financial information or payment at any point during the hiring process, it is a scam. Please report it immediately. When in doubt, feel free to reach out through our official website.

jobs.title: AI Filmmaker (100% Remote)
jobs.description:
Join Tether and Shape the Future of Digital Finance 
At Tether, we’re not just building products, we’re pioneering a global financial revolution. Our cutting-edge solutions empower businesses—from exchanges and wallets to payment processors and ATMs—to seamlessly integrate reserve-backed tokens across blockchains. By harnessing the power of blockchain technology, Tether enables you to store, send, and receive digital tokens instantly, securely, and globally, all at a fraction of the cost. Transparency is the bedrock of everything we do, ensuring trust in every transaction.
 
 Innovate with Tether 
 Tether Finance: Our innovative product suite features the world’s most trusted stablecoin, USDT , relied upon by hundreds of millions worldwide, alongside pioneering digital asset tokenization services.
But that’s just the beginning:
 Tether Power: Driving sustainable growth, our energy solutions optimize excess power for Bitcoin mining using eco-friendly practices in state-of-the-art, geo-diverse facilities.
 Tether Data: Fueling breakthroughs in AI and peer-to-peer technology, we reduce infrastructure costs and enhance global communications with cutting-edge solutions like KEET , our flagship app that redefines secure and private data sharing.
 Tether Education : Democratizing access to top-tier digital learning, we empower individuals to thrive in the digital and gig economies, driving global growth and opportunity.
 Tether Evolution : At the intersection of technology and human potential, we are pushing the boundaries of what is possible, crafting a future where innovation and human capabilities merge in powerful, unprecedented ways.
 
 Why Join Us? 
Our team is a global talent powerhouse, working remotely from every corner of the world. If you’re passionate about making a mark in the fintech space, this is your opportunity to collaborate with some of the brightest minds, pushing boundaries and setting new standards. We’ve grown fast, stayed lean, and secured our place as a leader in the industry.
If you have excellent English communication skills and are ready to contribute to the most innovative platform on the planet, Tether is the place for you.
 Are you ready to be part of the future? 
 
 About the job 
 As an AI Filmmaker, you will leverage AI-based photo and video tools to conceptualize, create, and edit short films and videos. These videos will be used to tell stories, showcase products, and bring the visions of Tether and its affiliated companies to life. You’ll work closely within the marketing department to ensure that each video aligns with the brand’s message, tone, and visual style.
 
 Responsibilities 
 
• Create short films and videos using AI-driven photo and video generation tools.

• Edit and refine AI-generated content to produce high-quality, engaging visuals.

• Collaborate with the marketing team colleagues to develop video concepts for Tether, and other affiliated brands.

• Ensure all video content aligns with brand guidelines and communicates key messages effectively.

• Stay updated on the latest AI filmmaking tools and techniques, incorporating innovations into your workflow.

• Manage multiple projects with tight deadlines, ensuring timely delivery.

• Experiment with creative formats, styles, and effects to produce unique, memorable content.

 
 
• Proven experience in video production and editing, with a strong portfolio of work.

• Proficiency in AI video generation tools (e.g., Runway, Stable Diffusion, MidJourney, DALL-E, or others).

• Expertise in video editing software (e.g., Adobe Premiere, After Effects, DaVinci Resolve).

• Creative storytelling skills with a keen eye for visual composition and detail.

• Ability to conceptualize and execute ideas quickly using AI tools.

• Familiarity with digital marketing and the ability to tailor content for social media platforms.

• Strong project management and organizational skills, with the ability to work independently and meet deadlines.

• A passion for technology, bitcoin, and innovation is a plus.

 
 What we offer 
 
• Competitive compensation.

• Opportunity to work with a global team on cutting-edge projects.

• Flexibility to work remotely.

• Access to advanced AI tools and resources.

• A collaborative environment where your creativity will have a direct impact on the brand’s narrative.

descriptionByLocale.it:
Tether e la tua futura carriera ### Descrizione Unisciti a Tether e contribuisci a plasmare il futuro della finanza digitale At Tether, non stiamo solo costruendo prodotti, stiamo rivoluzionando il panorama finanziario globale. Le nostre soluzioni all'avanguardia consentono alle aziende - dalle borse e dai portafogli ai processori di pagamento e alle bancomat - di integrare in modo fluido token garantiti da riserve su blockchain. Sfruttando il potere della tecnologia blockchain, Tether ti consente di memorizzare, inviare e ricevere token digitali istantaneamente, in modo sicuro e globale, a un costo inferiore del 10%. L'innovazione è il nostro pilastro, assicurando la trasparenza in ogni transazione. ### Innovare con Tether Tether Finance: La nostra suite di prodotti innovativi comprende la stablecoin più affidata al mondo, USDT, utilizzata da centinaia di milioni di persone in tutto il mondo, insieme a servizi di tokenizzazione di asset digitali pionieristici. Ma questo è solo l'inizio: Tether Power: La nostra soluzione per il potenziamento sostenibile ottimizza l'energia in eccesso per il mining del Bitcoin utilizzando pratiche ecocompatibili in strutture di ultima generazione e geo-diverse. Tether Data: I nostri strumenti di avanzata tecnologia riducono i costi di infrastruttura e migliorano le comunicazioni globali con soluzioni come KEET, il nostro app di punta che ridefinisce la condivisione di dati sicuri e privati. Tether Education : La democratizzazione dell'accesso all'apprendimento digitale di alto livello consente alle persone di prosperare nelle economie digitali e gig, promuovendo la crescita e l'opportunità globali. Tether Evolution : Al confine tra tecnologia e potenziale umano, stiamo spingendo i limiti di ciò che è possibile, creando un futuro in cui l'innovazione e le capacità umane si fondono in modi potenti e inediti. ### Perché unirti a noi? Il nostro team è una potenza di talento globale, che lavora a distanza da ogni angolo del mondo. Se sei appassionato di lasciare il tuo segno nel settore fintech, questo è il tuo momento per collaborare con alcuni dei cervelli più brillanti, spingendo i limiti e stabilendo nuovi standard. Abbiamo cresciuto rapidamente, mantenuto la nostra struttura snella e assicurato il nostro posto di leader nel settore. Se hai eccellenti abilità di comunicazione in inglese e sei pronto a contribuire al più innovativo platform del pianeta, Tether è il posto giusto per te. Sei pronto a essere parte del futuro? ### Informazioni sul lavoro Come Filmmaker AI, utilizzerai strumenti di generazione di foto e video basati sull'intelligenza artificiale per concepire, creare e editare cortometraggi e video. Questi video saranno utilizzati per raccontare storie, presentare prodotti e portare le visioni di Tether e delle sue società affiliate alla vita. ### Responsabilità - Creare cortometraggi e video utilizzando strumenti di generazione di foto e video basati sull'intelligenza artificiale. - Editare e perfezionare il contenuto generato dall'intelligenza artificiale per produrre visuali di alta qualità e coinvolgenti. - Collaborare con i colleghi del team di marketing per sviluppare concetti di video per Tether e altre marche affiliate. - Assicurarsi che tutti i contenuti video siano in linea con le linee guida della marca e comunicino i messaggi chiave in modo efficace. - Restare aggiornato sulle ultime tecnologie e tecniche di filmmaking con AI, incorporando innovazioni nel proprio workflow. - Gestire più progetti con scadenze strette, assicurando la consegna tempestiva. - Sperimentare con formati, stili e effetti creativi per produrre contenuti unici e memorabili. ###
• Requisiti - Esperienza provata nella produzione e editing di video, con un portafoglio di lavoro solido. - Abilità nella generazione di video con strumenti AI (ad esempio, Runway, Stable Diffusion, MidJourney, DALL-E o altri). - Esperto in software di editing video (ad esempio, Adobe Premiere, After Effects, DaVinci Resolve). - Abilità di raccontare storie creative con un occhio attento per la composizione visiva e i dettagli. - Capacità di concepire e eseguire idee rapidamente utilizzando strumenti AI. - Familiarità con il marketing digitale e capacità di adattare il contenuto per piattaforme di social media. - Abilità di gestire progetti e organizzare il lavoro, con la capacità di lavorare indipendentemente e rispettare i tempi di consegna. - Passione per la tecnologia, il bitcoin e l'innovazione (un plus). ###
• Cosa offriamo - Compensazione competitiva. - Opportunità di lavorare con un team globale su progetti all'avanguardia. - Flessibilità di lavorare a distanza. - Accesso a strumenti e risorse di AI avanzati. - Un ambiente collaborativo in cui la tua creatività avrà un impatto diretto sulla narrazione della marca.

descriptionByLocale.de:
Tether und deine Zukunft ### Beschreibung Bist du bereit, Teil von Tether zu werden und den Zukunft der digitalen Finanzen zu gestalten? Bei Tether bauen wir nicht nur Produkte, wir revolutionieren den globalen Finanzmarkt. Unsere fortschrittlichen Lösungen ermöglichen es Unternehmen - von Börsen und Portfolios bis hin zu Zahlungssystemen und Bankautomaten - tokens mit garantierten Reserven auf der Blockchain zu integrieren. Durch die Nutzung der Blockchain-Technologie ermöglicht Tether es dir, tokens digital zu speichern, zu senden und zu empfangen, sofort, sicher und global, zu einem Kostenrabatt von 10%. Innovation ist unser Leitprinzip, das Transparenz in jeder Transaktion gewährleistet. ### Innovieren mit Tether Tether Finance: Unsere innovative Produkt-Suite umfasst die weltweit vertrauenswürdigste Stablecoin, USDT, die von Hunderten Millionen Menschen weltweit verwendet wird, zusammen mit Pionierleistungen in der Tokenisierung digitaler Vermögenswerte. Aber das ist nur der Anfang: Tether Power: Unsere Lösung für nachhaltige Leistungsoptimierung nutzt überschüssige Energie für den Bitcoin-Mining mit umweltfreundlichen Methoden in modernen, geo-verteilten Strukturen. Tether Data: Unsere fortschrittlichen Technologien reduzieren die Infrastrukturkosten und verbessern die globale Kommunikation mit Lösungen wie KEET, unserem Flaggschiff-App, die die sichere und private Datenverteilung neu definiert. Tether Education : Die Demokratisierung des Zugangs zu hochwertigem digitalen Lernen ermöglicht es Menschen, in digitalen und Gig-Ökonomien zu prosperieren, die Wachstum und globale Chancen fördert. Tether Evolution : Am Schnittpunkt von Technologie und menschlichem Potenzial drücken wir die Grenzen dessen, was möglich ist, und schaffen einen Zukunft, in der Innovation und menschliche Fähigkeiten in neuen und kraftvollen Wegen zusammenfließen. ### Warum bist du Teil von uns? Unser Team ist eine globale Kraft aus Talenten, die von jedem Winkel der Welt aus arbeitet. Wenn du begeistert bist, deinen Einfluss im FinTech-Sektor zu hinterlassen, ist dies dein Moment, um mit einigen der brillantesten Köpfe zusammenzuarbeiten, Grenzen zu sprengen und neue Standards zu setzen. Wir haben schnell gewachsen, unsere Struktur erhalten und unseren Platz als Führer im Sektor gesichert. Wenn du ausgezeichnete Kommunikationsfähigkeiten auf Englisch hast und bereit bist, zum innovativsten Plattform der Welt beizutragen, ist Tether der richtige Ort für dich. Bist du bereit, Teil der Zukunft zu werden? ### Arbeitsinformationen Als AI-Filmmaker wirst du Tools für die generative Bild- und Videoproduktion basierend auf künstlicher Intelligenz verwenden, um Kurzfilme und Videos zu konzipieren, zu erstellen und zu bearbeiten. Diese Videos werden verwendet, um Geschichten zu erzählen, Produkte vorzustellen und die Visionen von Tether und seinen verbundenen Unternehmen in das Leben zu bringen. ###
• Aufgaben - Kurzfilme und Videos erstellen, indem man Tools für die generative Bild- und Videoproduktion basierend auf künstlicher Intelligenz verwendet. - Inhalte, die von der künstlichen Intelligenz generiert wurden, bearbeiten und vervollständigen, um hochwertige und fesselnde visuelle Inhalte zu produzieren. - Mit den Kollegen des Marketing-Teams zusammenarbeiten, um Konzepte für Videos für Tether und andere Marken zu entwickeln. - Sichergestellt, dass alle Videoinhalte den Markenleitlinien entsprechen und die wichtigsten Botschaften effektiv übermitteln. - Sich auf dem Laufenden halten, was die neuesten Technologien und -Techniken der künstlichen Intelligenz-basierten Filmmaking sind, und Innovationen in den eigenen Workflow integrieren. - Mehrere Projekte mit engen Fristen verwalten, um sicherzustellen, dass die Termine eingehalten werden. - Experimentieren mit Formaten, Stilen und Effekten, um einzigartige und erinnerungswürdige Inhalte zu produzieren. ###
• Anforderungen - Erfahrung in der Produktion und Bearbeitung von Videos, mit einem soliden Portfolio. - Fähigkeit, Videos mit Tools für künstliche Intelligenz (z.B. Runway, Stable Diffusion, MidJourney, DALL-E oder andere) zu generieren. - Experte in Software für die Videobearbeitung (z.B. Adobe Premiere, After Effects, DaVinci Resolve). - Fähigkeit, kreative Geschichten zu erzählen, mit einem Auge für visuelle Komposition und Details. - Fähigkeit, Ideen schnell zu konzipieren und umzusetzen, indem man Tools für künstliche Intelligenz verwendet. - Kenntnisse im digitalen Marketing und Fähigkeit, Inhalte für soziale Medien anzupassen. - Fähigkeit, Projekte zu verwalten und das Arbeitspensum zu organisieren, mit der Fähigkeit, unabhängig zu arbeiten und Termine einzuhalten. - Leidenschaft für Technologie, Bitcoin und Innovation (optional). ###
• Was wir bieten - Gute Bezahlung. - Möglichkeit, mit einem globalen Team an fortschrittlichen Projekten zu arbeiten. - Flexibilität, um von überall aus zu arbeiten. - Zugang zu fortschrittlichen AI-Tools und -Ressourcen. - Ein kollaborativer Umfeld, in dem deine Kreativität direkt auf die Markenbotschaft wirkt.
descriptionByLocale.fr:
Tether et ton avenir ### Description Rejoins Tether et contribue à façonner l'avenir de la finance numérique Chez Tether, nous ne construisons pas seulement des produits, nous révolutionnons le marché financier mondial. Nos solutions innovantes permettent aux entreprises - des bourses et des portefeuilles aux systèmes de paiement et aux distributeurs automatiques - d'intégrer des jetons garanties par des réserves sur la blockchain. En utilisant le pouvoir de la technologie blockchain, Tether vous permet de stocker, d'envoyer et de recevoir des jetons numériques instantanément, de manière sécurisée et mondiale, avec un coût inférieur de 10%. L'innovation est notre pilier, garantissant la transparence dans chaque transaction. ### Innover avec Tether Tether Finance: Notre suite de produits innovants comprend la stablecoin la plus fiable au monde, USDT, utilisée par des centaines de millions de personnes dans le monde entier, ainsi que des services de tokenisation d'actifs numériques pionniers. Mais c'est juste le début: Tether Power: Notre solution pour l'optimisation de l'énergie durable optimise l'énergie en excès pour le mining du Bitcoin en utilisant des pratiques écologiques dans des structures de dernière génération et géodiverses. Tether Data: Nos outils de technologie avancée réduisent les coûts d'infrastructure et améliorent les communications mondiales avec des solutions comme KEET, notre application de pointe qui redéfinit la partage de données sécurisées et privées. Tether Education : La démocratisation de l'accès à l'apprentissage numérique de haut niveau permet aux personnes de prospérer dans les économies numériques et gig, promouvant la croissance et les opportunités mondiales. Tether Evolution : Au point de rencontre entre technologie et potentiel humain, nous pouvons pousser les limites de ce qui est possible, créant un avenir où l'innovation et les capacités humaines se fondent en nouvelles et puissantes manières. ### Pourquoi rejoindre notre équipe? Notre équipe est une force de talent mondiale, travaillant à distance de tous les coins du monde. Si vous êtes passionné de laisser votre marque dans le secteur fintech, c'est votre moment pour collaborer avec quelques-uns des cerveaux les plus brillants, pousser les limites et établir de nouveaux standards. Nous avons grandi rapidement, maintenu notre structure fine et assuré notre place de leader dans le secteur. Si vous avez de solides compétences en communication en anglais et êtes prêt à contribuer au plus innovant platform du monde, Tether est le bon endroit pour vous. Soyez prêt à être partie de l'avenir? ### Informations sur le travail En tant que Filmmaker AI, vous utiliserez des outils de génération d'image et de vidéo basés sur l'intelligence artificielle pour concevoir, créer et éditer des courts-métrages et des vidéos. Ces vidéos seront utilisées pour raconter des histoires, présenter des produits et faire connaître les visions de Tether et de ses sociétés affiliées. ### Responsabilités - Créer des courts-métrages et des vidéos en utilisant des outils de génération d'image et de vidéo basés sur l'intelligence artificielle. - Éditer et améliorer le contenu généré par l'intelligence artificielle pour produire des visuels de haute qualité et captivants. - Collaborer avec les collègues du département marketing pour développer des concepts de vidéos pour Tether et d'autres marques. - S'assurer que tous les contenus vidéo soient conformes aux lignes directrices de la marque et transmettent les messages clés de manière efficace. - Rester à jour sur les dernières technologies et techniques de filmmaking avec IA, en incorporant des innovations dans son workflow. - Gérer plusieurs projets avec des délais serrés, en s'assurant que les délais soient respectés. - Expérimenter avec des formats, des styles et des effets créatifs pour produire des contenus uniques et mémorables. ###
• Exigences - Expérience prouvée dans la production et l'édition de vidéos, avec un portefolio solide. - Compétence dans la génération de vidéos avec des outils AI (par exemple, Runway, Stable Diffusion, MidJourney, DALL-E ou autres). - Expert en logiciels d'édition vidéo (par exemple, Adobe Premiere, After Effects, DaVinci Resolve). - Compétence pour raconter des histoires créatives avec un regard attentif pour la composition visuelle et les détails. - Capacité à concevoir et exécuter des idées rapidement en utilisant des outils AI. - Connaissance du marketing numérique et capacité à adapter le contenu pour les plateformes de médias sociaux. - Compétence pour gérer des projets et organiser le travail, avec la capacité de travailler de manière indépendante et de respecter les délais. - Passion pour la technologie, le bitcoin et l'innovation (facultatif). ### Ce que nous offrons - Salaire compétitif. - Opportunité de travailler avec un équipe mondiale sur des projets innovants. - Flexibilité pour travailler à distance. - Accès à des outils et des ressources AI avancés. - Un environnement collaboratif où votre créativité aura un impact direct sur la narration de la marque.

jobs.title: Social Media Manager (100% remote)
jobs.description:
Join Tether and Shape the Future of Digital Finance 
 At Tether, we’re not just building products, we’re pioneering a global financial revolution. Our cutting-edge solutions empower businesses—from exchanges and wallets to payment processors and ATMs—to seamlessly integrate reserve-backed tokens across blockchains. By harnessing the power of blockchain technology, Tether enables you to store, send, and receive digital tokens instantly, securely, and globally, all at a fraction of the cost. Transparency is the bedrock of everything we do, ensuring trust in every transaction. 
 
 Innovate with Tether 
 Tether Finance: Our innovative product suite features the world’s most trusted stablecoin, USDT , relied upon by hundreds of millions worldwide, alongside pioneering digital asset tokenization services. 
 But that’s just the beginning: 
 Tether Power: Driving sustainable growth, our energy solutions optimize excess power for Bitcoin mining using eco-friendly practices in state-of-the-art, geo-diverse facilities. 
 Tether Data: Fueling breakthroughs in AI and peer-to-peer technology, we reduce infrastructure costs and enhance global communications with cutting-edge solutions like KEET , our flagship app that redefines secure and private data sharing. 
 Tether Education : Democratizing access to top-tier digital learning, we empower individuals to thrive in the digital and gig economies, driving global growth and opportunity. 
 Tether Evolution : At the intersection of technology and human potential, we are pushing the boundaries of what is possible, crafting a future where innovation and human capabilities merge in powerful, unprecedented ways. 
 
 Why Join Us? 
 Our team is a global talent powerhouse, working remotely from every corner of the world. If you’re passionate about making a mark in the fintech space, this is your opportunity to collaborate with some of the brightest minds, pushing boundaries and setting new standards. We’ve grown fast, stayed lean, and secured our place as a leader in the industry. 
 If you have excellent English communication skills and are ready to contribute to the most innovative platform on the planet, Tether is the place for you. 
 Are you ready to be part of the future? 
 
 About the job 
 We’re seeking a Social Media Manager focused on Tether tech products and events. You will plan, coordinate, and implement social media campaigns and community growth strategies — supporting product launches, engagement, education, and user outreach globally. You will also be encouraged to leverage AI tools to generate creative content ideas and concepts, helping the team explore new ways to communicate our products and initiatives (AI-generated ideas are for internal review and ideation, not for direct publishing). 
 
 Responsibilities: 
 
• Develop and implement a social media strategy aligned with product launches, marketing goals, and audience needs 

• Create, edit, and publish content across platforms (e.g., X/Twitter, Instagram, LinkedIn, Telegram) 

• Manage content calendars, posting schedules, and distribution plans in coordination with global marketing and product teams 

• Work closely with product managers to communicate updates, new features, and benefits of Tether products 

• Collaborate with partners, influencers, and community leaders to drive awareness and trust 

• Track key performance indicators (KPIs) — engagement, growth, reach — and report campaign results to senior stakeholders 

• Adapt messaging for clarity, cultural relevance, and brand consistency 

• Use AI tools to brainstorm content ideas, visuals, and messaging frameworks to enhance campaigns (ideas only, not for final publication) 

 
 
 

 Requirements: 
 
• 3–5 years of professional experience in social media management, ideally in fintech or tech sectors 

• Fluent in English (writing and speaking); Spanish is a bonus 

• Proven ability to grow and engage online communities across multiple social platforms 

• Skills in content creation — copywriting, basic graphics or multimedia (images, GIFs, short video) 

• Strong organizational skills and ability to manage deadlines, priorities, and cross-team coordination 

• Autonomous, self-starter attitude; able to work remotely and collaborate across time zones 

• Basic understanding of Bitcoin / stablecoins / blockchain products is preferred 

• Familiarity or willingness to use AI tools to generate creative social media concepts 

 
 
 Important information for candidates 
Recruitment scams have become increasingly common. To protect yourself, please keep the following in mind when applying for roles:
 
• Apply only through our official channels. We do not use third-party platforms or agencies for recruitment unless clearly stated. All open roles are listed on our official careers page: https://tether.recruitee.com/

• Verify the recruiter’s identity. All our recruiters have verified LinkedIn profiles. If you’re unsure, you can confirm their identity by checking their profile or contacting us through our website.

• Be cautious of unusual communication methods. We do not conduct interviews over WhatsApp, Telegram, or SMS. All communication is done through official company emails and platforms.

• Double-check email addresses. All communication from us will come from emails ending in @ tether.to or @ tether.io 

• We will never request payment or financial details. If someone asks for personal financial information or payment at any point during the hiring process, it is a scam. Please report it immediately.

 When in doubt, feel free to reach out through our official website.

jobs.title: Marketing Project Manager (100% remote)
jobs.description:
Join Tether and Shape the Future of Digital Finance 
 At Tether, we’re not just building products, we’re pioneering a global financial revolution. Our cutting-edge solutions empower businesses—from exchanges and wallets to payment processors and ATMs—to seamlessly integrate reserve-backed tokens across blockchains. By harnessing the power of blockchain technology, Tether enables you to store, send, and receive digital tokens instantly, securely, and globally, all at a fraction of the cost. Transparency is the bedrock of everything we do, ensuring trust in every transaction. 
 
 Innovate with Tether 
 Tether Finance: Our innovative product suite features the world’s most trusted stablecoin, USDT , relied upon by hundreds of millions worldwide, alongside pioneering digital asset tokenization services. 
 But that’s just the beginning: 
 Tether Power: Driving sustainable growth, our energy solutions optimize excess power for Bitcoin mining using eco-friendly practices in state-of-the-art, geo-diverse facilities. 
 Tether Data: Fueling breakthroughs in AI and peer-to-peer technology, we reduce infrastructure costs and enhance global communications with cutting-edge solutions like KEET , our flagship app that redefines secure and private data sharing. 
 Tether Education : Democratizing access to top-tier digital learning, we empower individuals to thrive in the digital and gig economies, driving global growth and opportunity. 
 Tether Evolution : At the intersection of technology and human potential, we are pushing the boundaries of what is possible, crafting a future where innovation and human capabilities merge in powerful, unprecedented ways. 
 
 Why Join Us? 
 Our team is a global talent powerhouse, working remotely from every corner of the world. If you’re passionate about making a mark in the fintech space, this is your opportunity to collaborate with some of the brightest minds, pushing boundaries and setting new standards. We’ve grown fast, stayed lean, and secured our place as a leader in the industry. 
 If you have excellent English communication skills and are ready to contribute to the most innovative platform on the planet, Tether is the place for you. 
 Are you ready to be part of the future? 
 
 About the job 
 We are looking for a highly organized and proactive Marketing Project Manager to drive execution across the marketing design function. In this role, you will manage workflows for designers, ensure clear scope definition, and align priorities with Product, and Development teams. 

 You will act as the central point of coordination, translating product requirements into clear, actionable briefs, managing timelines and dependencies, and ensuring high-quality, on-time delivery. 
 
 The ideal candidate is detail-oriented, highly structured, and experienced in working with cross-functional, globally distributed teams on AI-driven software products or digital wallet solutions. 
 
 Responsibilities 
 Project & Workflow Management 
 • Own and manage the end-to-end workflow for marketing design projects, from intake and scoping through delivery and launch 
 • Define and document clear project scope, requirements, timelines, and deliverables for designers 
 • Prioritize incoming requests in partnership with Product and Development teams, balancing urgency, impact, and capacity 
 • Track progress, manage dependencies, and proactively identify risks or blockers 
 • Ensure projects are delivered on time, on scope, and aligned with business objectives 
 
 Cross-Functional Alignment 
 • Serve as the primary liaison between Marketing, Product, and Development to ensure alignment on priorities and execution 
 • Translate product and technical requirements into clear design and marketing briefs 
 • Facilitate regular check-ins, reviews, and feedback loops to keep stakeholders aligned 

 Digital & Website Execution 
 • Oversee website launches and updates, including coordinating design, content, and development changes 
 • Ensure accuracy, consistency, and brand alignment across digital touchpoints 
 • Manage content updates across CMS, landing pages, and marketing platforms in collaboration with designers and developers 

 Operational Support & Process Improvement 
 • Establish and refine processes, templates, and tools to improve efficiency and clarity within the marketing design workflow 
 • Maintain documentation for project tracking, status reporting, and post-launch reviews 
 • Support campaign execution, events, and other marketing initiatives as needed 
 

 
 
• 3+ years of experience in marketing project management, design operations, or a similar role 
 
• Proven experience managing design workflows and coordinating cross-functional teams 
 
• Demonstrated success leading website and digital products launch, including close collaboration with design and development teams 
 
• Strong organizational skills with the ability to manage multiple projects simultaneously 
 
• Familiarity with CMS platforms and digital marketing workflows 
 
• Excellent written and verbal communication skills in English 
 
• Experience working in a fully remote environment with global teams 
 
• Background in tech, finance, or infrastructure-related industries is a plus 
 
• Italian or Spanish fluency is a bonus 
 
 
 Important information for candidates 
Recruitment scams have become increasingly common. To protect yourself, please keep the following in mind when applying for roles:
 
• Apply only through our official channels. We do not use third-party platforms or agencies for recruitment unless clearly stated. All open roles are listed on our official careers page: https://tether.recruitee.com/

• Verify the recruiter’s identity. All our recruiters have verified LinkedIn profiles. If you’re unsure, you can confirm their identity by checking their profile or contacting us through our website.

• Be cautious of unusual communication methods. We do not conduct interviews over WhatsApp, Telegram, or SMS. All communication is done through official company emails and platforms.

• Double-check email addresses. All communication from us will come from emails ending in @ tether.to or @ tether.io 

• We will never request payment or financial details. If someone asks for personal financial information or payment at any point during the hiring process, it is a scam. Please report it immediately.

 When in doubt, feel free to reach out through our official website.

jobs.description:
Join Tether and Shape the Future of Digital Finance 
 At Tether, we’re not just building products, we’re pioneering a global financial revolution. Our cutting-edge solutions empower businesses—from exchanges and wallets to payment processors and ATMs—to seamlessly integrate reserve-backed tokens across blockchains. By harnessing the power of blockchain technology, Tether enables you to store, send, and receive digital tokens instantly, securely, and globally, all at a fraction of the cost. Transparency is the bedrock of everything we do, ensuring trust in every transaction.
 
 Innovate with Tether 
 Tether Finance: Our innovative product suite features the world’s most trusted stablecoin, USDT , relied upon by hundreds of millions worldwide, alongside pioneering digital asset tokenization services.
 But that’s just the beginning:
 Tether Power: Driving sustainable growth, our energy solutions optimize excess power for Bitcoin mining using eco-friendly practices in state-of-the-art, geo-diverse facilities.
 Tether Data: Fueling breakthroughs in AI and peer-to-peer technology, we reduce infrastructure costs and enhance global communications with cutting-edge solutions like KEET , our flagship app that redefines secure and private data sharing.
 Tether Education : Democratizing access to top-tier digital learning, we empower individuals to thrive in the digital and gig economies, driving global growth and opportunity.
 Tether Evolution : At the intersection of technology and human potential, we are pushing the boundaries of what is possible, crafting a future where innovation and human capabilities merge in powerful, unprecedented ways.
 
 Why Join Us? 
 Our team is a global talent powerhouse, working remotely from every corner of the world. If you’re passionate about making a mark in the fintech space, this is your opportunity to collaborate with some of the brightest minds, pushing boundaries and setting new standards. We’ve grown fast, stayed lean, and secured our place as a leader in the industry.
 If you have excellent English communication skills and are ready to contribute to the most innovative platform on the planet, Tether is the place for you.
 Are you ready to be part of the future? 
 
 About the job: 
 As a member of the AI model team, you will drive innovation in architecture development for cutting-edge models of various scales, including small, large, and multi-modal systems. Your work will enhance intelligence, improve efficiency, and introduce new capabilities to advance the field.
 
 You will have a deep expertise in LLM architectures, a strong grasp of pre-training optimization with a hands-on, research-driven approach. Your mission is to explore and implement novel techniques and algorithms that lead to groundbreaking advancements: data curation, strengthening baselines, identifying and resolving existing pre-training bottlenecks to push the limits of AI performance.
 
 Responsibilities :
 
• Conduct pre-training AI models on large, distributed servers equipped with thousands of NVIDIA GPUs.

• Design, prototype, and scale innovative architectures to enhance model intelligence.

• Independently and collaboratively execute experiments, analyze results, and refine methodologies for optimal performance.

• Investigate, debug, and improve both model efficiency and computational performance.

• Contribute to the advancement of training systems to ensure seamless scalability and efficiency on target platforms.

 
 
• A degree in Computer Science or related field. Ideally PhD in NLP, Machine Learning, or a related field, complemented by a solid track record in AI R&D (with good publications in A* conferences).

• Hands-on experience contributing to large-scale LLM training runs on large, distributed servers equipped with thousands of NVIDIA GPUs, ensuring scalability and impactful advancements in model performance.

• Familiarity and practical experience with large-scale, distributed training frameworks, libraries and tools.

• Deep knowledge of state-of-the-art transformer and non-transformer modifications aimed at enhancing intelligence, efficiency and scalability.

• Strong expertise in PyTorch and Hugging Face libraries with practical experience in model development, continual pretraining, and deployment.

descriptionByLocale.it:
Tether e la Rivoluzione del Finanza Digitale A Tether, non stiamo solo costruendo prodotti, siamo pionieri di una rivoluzione finanziaria globale. Le nostre soluzioni all'avanguardia consentono alle aziende, dagli scambi e dai portafogli ai processori di pagamento e agli sportelli bancomat, di integrare senza soluzione di continuità i gettoni di riserva in blockchains. Imbragando la potenza della tecnologia blockchain, Tether consente di memorizzare, inviare e ricevere gettoni digitali istantaneamente, in modo sicuro e globale, il tutto ad una frazione del costo. La trasparenza è la base di tutto ciò che facciamo, garantendo fiducia in ogni transazione. ## Innovare con Tether Tether Finance: La nostra innovativa suite di prodotti presenta il più affidabile stablecoin del mondo, USDT , basato su centinaia di milioni di persone in tutto il mondo, insieme ai servizi di tokenizzazione digitale di asset pionieristici. Ma questo è solo l'inizio: Tether Power: Guidare la crescita sostenibile, le nostre soluzioni energetiche ottimizzano l'eccesso di potenza per l'estrazione mineraria di Bitcoin utilizzando pratiche eco-friendly in strutture geo-diverse all'avanguardia. Tether Data: Riduciamo i costi delle infrastrutture e miglioriamo le comunicazioni globali con soluzioni all'avanguardia come KEET , la nostra app di punta che ridefinisce la condivisione dei dati sicura e privata. Tether Education: Democratizzazione dell'accesso all'apprendimento digitale di alto livello, forniamo agli individui di prosperare nelle economie digitali e di gig, guidando la crescita globale e l'opportunità. Tether Evolution: All'incrocio tra tecnologia e potenziale umano, stiamo spingendo i confini di ciò che è possibile, realizzando un futuro in cui innovazione e capacità umane si fondono in modi potenti e senza precedenti. # Perché Unirti a Noi? Il nostro team è una potenza di talento globale, lavorando da remoto da ogni angolo del mondo. Se siete appassionati di fare un segno nello spazio fintech, questa è la vostra opportunità di collaborare con alcune delle menti più brillanti, spingendo i confini e stabilendo nuovi standard. Siamo cresciuti veloci, siamo stati magra, e assicurato il nostro posto come leader nel settore. Se avete eccellenti capacità di comunicazione inglese e siete pronti a contribuire alla piattaforma più innovativa del pianeta, Tether è il posto per voi. Sei pronto a far parte del futuro? ## Descrizione del lavoro Come membro del team di modelli AI, guiderai l'innovazione nello sviluppo dell'architettura per modelli all'avanguardia di varie scale, tra cui piccoli, grandi e sistemi multi-modali. Il vostro lavoro aumenterà l'intelligenza, migliorerà l'efficienza e introdurrà nuove capacità per far progredire il campo. ## Responsabilità - Condurre pre-training di modelli AI su grandi server equipaggiati con migliaia di NVIDIA GPUs. - Progettare, prototipare e scalare architetture innovative per migliorare l'intelligenza dei modelli. - Esegue esperimenti indipendentemente e in collaborazione, analizza i risultati e perfezionare le metodologie per un ottimo rendimento. - Investigare, debug e migliorare sia l'efficienza dei modelli che la prestazione computazionale. - Contribuire allo sviluppo di sistemi di formazione per garantire una scalabilità e un'efficienza senza problemi sulle piattaforme di destinazione. ##
• Requisiti - Laurea in Informatica o campo correlato. Ideale PhD in NLP, Machine Learning o campo correlato, accompagnato da un solido track record in AI R&D (con buone notizie in conferenze A*). - Esperienza pratica nel contributo a grandi scale LLM training run su grandi server suddivisati con migliaia di NVIDIA GPUs, scalabilità e avanzamenti significativi nel rendimento dei modelli. - Familiarità e esperienza con grandi scale, framework di training distribuito, librerie e strumenti. - Profonda conoscenza delle modifiche trasformatore all'avanguardia e non-transformer mirate a migliorare l'intelligenza, l'efficienza e la scalabilità. - Esperto forte in PyTorch e Hugging Face librerie con esperienza pratica nel sviluppo dei modelli, pretraining continuo e deploy.

If you have excellent English communication skills and are ready to contribute to the most innovative platform on the planet, Tether is the place for you. Are you ready to be part of the future? About the job: As a member of the AI model team, you will drive innovation in architecture development for cutting-edge models of various scales, including small, large, and multi-modal systems. Your work will enhance intelligence, improve efficiency, and introduce new capabilities to advance the field. You will have a deep expertise in LLM architectures, a strong grasp of pre-training optimization with a hands-on, research-driven approach. Your mission is to explore and implement novel techniques and algorithms that lead to groundbreaking advancements: data curation, strengthening baselines, identifying and resolving existing pre-training bottlenecks to push the limits of AI performance. Responsibilities :
• Conduct pre-training AI models on large, distributed servers equipped with thousands of NVIDIA GPUs.
• Design, prototype, and scale innovative architectures to enhance model intelligence.
• Independently and collaboratively execute experiments, analyze results, and refine methodologies for optimal performance.
• Investigate, debug, and improve both model efficiency and computational performance.
• Contribute to the advancement of training systems to ensure seamless scalability and efficiency on target platforms.
• A degree in Computer Science or related field. Ideally PhD in NLP, Machine Learning, or a related field, complemented by a solid track record in AI R&D (with good publications in A* conferences).
• Hands-on experience contributing to large-scale LLM training runs on large, distributed servers equipped with thousands of NVIDIA GPUs, ensuring scalability and impactful advancements in model performance.
• Familiarity and practical experience with large-scale, distributed training frameworks, libraries and tools.
• Deep knowledge of state-of-the-art transformer and non-transformer modifications aimed at enhancing intelligence, efficiency and scalability.
• Strong expertise in PyTorch and Hugging Face libraries with practical experience in model development, continual pretraining, and deployment.
descriptionByLocale.de:
Tether und die Revolution der digitalen Finanzen Bei Tether bauen wir nicht nur Produkte, wir revolutionieren die globale Finanzwelt. Unsere fortschrittlichen Lösungen ermöglichen es Unternehmen - von Börsen und Wallets bis hin zu Zahlungsverarbeitern und Automaten - , reservierte Token auf verschiedenen Blockchain-Netzwerken zu integrieren. Durch die Nutzung der Blockchain-Technologie ermöglicht Tether es Ihnen, digitale Token sofort, sicher und weltweit zu speichern, zu senden und zu empfangen, alles zu einem Bruchteil des Kosten. Transparenz ist das Fundament alles, was wir tun, um Vertrauen in jeden einzelnen Handel zu gewährleisten. ## Innovieren mit Tether Tether Finance: Unsere innovative Produktlinie umfasst die weltweit vertrauenswürdigste stabilen Währung, USDT , die von Hunderten Millionen Menschen weltweit abgerufen wird, neben den Pionierleistungen in der Tokenisierung digitaler Vermögenswerte. Aber das ist nur der Anfang: Tether Power: Wir treiben nachhaltigen Wachstum an, indem wir unsere Energie-Lösungen optimieren, um überschüssige Energie für Bitcoin-Mining mit ökologischen Praktiken in hochmodernen, geo-diversen Anlagen zu nutzen. Tether Data: Wir fördern Durchbrüche in der KI und Peer-to-Peer-Technologie, indem wir die Infrastrukturkosten reduzieren und die globale Kommunikation mit fortschrittlichen Lösungen wie KEET , unserem Flaggschiff-App, die sichere und private Datenübertragung neu definiert. Tether Education : Wir demokratisieren den Zugang zu Spitzenleistungen in der digitalen Bildung, indem wir Einzelpersonen in der digitalen und Gig-Wirtschaft ermöglichen, zu gedeihen, globales Wachstum und Möglichkeiten zu treiben. Tether Evolution : Am Schnittpunkt von Technologie und menschlicher Potenzialität drücken wir die Grenzen dessen, was möglich ist, aus, indem wir eine Zukunft schaffen, in der Innovation und menschliche Fähigkeiten in mächtigen, unvorhergesehenen Weisen zusammenkommen. ## Warum dich uns anschließen? Unsere Mannschaft ist ein globales Talent-Übermacht, das von jedem Winkel der Welt aus remote arbeitet. Wenn du dich leidenschaftlich für die Fintech-Szene einsetzt, ist dies deine Chance, mit einigen der hellsten Köpfe zusammenzuarbeiten, Grenzen zu überwinden und neue Standards zu setzen. Wir haben schnell gewachsen, geblieben schlank und sicherten unseren Platz als Führer in der Branche. Wenn du ausgezeichnete Englisch-Kommunikationsfähigkeiten hast und bereit bist, zum innovativsten Plattform der Welt beizutragen, ist Tether der Ort für dich. Bist du bereit, Teil der Zukunft zu sein? ## Beschreibung der Arbeit Als Mitglied des AI-Modellteams wirst du Innovationen in der Architekturentwicklung für fortschrittliche Modelle verschiedener Skalen, einschließlich kleiner, großer und multimodaler Systeme, treiben. Deine Arbeit wird Intelligenz verbessern, Effizienz verbessern und neue Fähigkeiten einführen, um das Feld voranzutreiben. ##
• Aufgaben - Durchführen von Vortrainings von AI-Modellen auf großen verteilten Servern mit Tausenden von NVIDIA-GPUs. - Entwerfen, Prototypen und skalieren von innovativen Architekturen, um die Intelligenz der Modelle zu verbessern. - Durchführen von Experimenten, unabhängig und in Zusammenarbeit, Analysieren der Ergebnisse und verbessern die Methoden für eine optimale Leistung. - Untersuchen, debuggen und verbessern sowohl die Effizienz der Modelle als auch die Rechenleistung. - Beiträge zum Entwickeln von Trainingsystemen, um eine Skalierbarkeit und Effizienz ohne Probleme auf den Zielplattformen zu gewährleisten. ##
• Anforderungen - Abschluss in Informatik oder einem verwandten Fach. Idealerweise PhD in NLP, Machine Learning oder einem verwandten Fach, begleitet von einem soliden Track-Record in AI-Forschung (mit guten Veröffentlichungen in A*-Konferenzen). - Praktische Erfahrung bei der Beiträgen zu großen Skalen LLM-Trainingsläufen auf großen verteilten Servern mit Tausenden von NVIDIA-GPUs, um Skalierbarkeit und bedeutende Fortschritte im Modellrenden zu gewährleisten. - Vertrautheit und praktische Erfahrung mit großen Skalen, verteilten Trainingsframeworks, Bibliotheken und Werkzeugen. - Tiefes Verständnis der state-of-the-art-Änderungen von Transformer und nicht-Transformer, die darauf abzielen, Intelligenz, Effizienz und Skalierbarkeit zu verbessern. - Starkes Experte in PyTorch und Hugging Face Bibliotheken mit praktischer Erfahrung im Modellentwicklung, kontinuierlichem Vortrainieren und Deployment.
descriptionByLocale.fr:
Tether et la révolution de la finance numérique Chez Tether, nous ne construisons pas seulement des produits, nous révolutionnons le monde financier global. Nos solutions de pointe permettent aux entreprises - des bourses et des portefeuilles aux processeurs de paiement et aux distributeurs automatiques - d'intégrer des jetons réservés sur plusieurs réseaux de blockchain. En utilisant la technologie de la blockchain, Tether permet de stocker, d'envoyer et de recevoir des jetons numériques instantanément, de manière sécurisée et mondiale, à un coût fractionnaire. La transparence est la pierre angulaire de tout ce que nous faisons, garantissant la confiance dans chaque transaction. ## Innover avec Tether Tether Finance : Notre gamme de produits innovants comprend la monnaie stable la plus fiable au monde, USDT , utilisée par des centaines de millions de personnes dans le monde, ainsi que des services de tokenisation de valeurs numériques pionnières. Mais c'est juste le début : Tether Power : Nous poussons le développement durable en optimisant nos solutions d'énergie pour le minage de Bitcoin en utilisant des pratiques écologiques dans des installations de pointe et diversifiées géographiquement. Tether Data : Nous favorisons les avancées en intelligence artificielle et en technologie de peer-to-peer en réduisant les coûts d'infrastructure et en améliorant les communications mondiales avec des solutions de pointe comme KEET , notre application d'icône qui redéfinit la partage de données sécurisée et privée. Tether Education : Nous démocratisons l'accès à l'apprentissage numérique de haut niveau en permettant aux individus de prospérer dans les économies numériques et de la gig, en promouvant le développement global et les opportunités. Tether Evolution : Au carrefour de la technologie et du potentiel humain, nous poussons les limites de ce qui est possible, en créant un avenir où l'innovation et les capacités humaines se mélangent de manière puissante et inattendue. ## Pourquoi rejoindre notre équipe ? Notre équipe est une puissance de talent mondiale, travaillant à distance de tous les coins du monde. Si vous êtes passionné par l'espace fintech, c'est votre chance de collaborer avec quelques-uns des esprits les plus brillants, de dépasser les limites et de fixer de nouveaux standards. Nous avons grandi rapidement, resté léger et sécurisé notre place en tant que leader dans l'industrie. Si vous avez des compétences de communication en anglais exceptionnelles et que vous êtes prêt à contribuer à la plateforme la plus innovante du monde, Tether est l'endroit pour vous. Êtes-vous prêt à être partie de l'avenir ? ## Description du travail En tant que membre de l'équipe de modèles d'intelligence artificielle, vous conduirez l'innovation dans le développement d'architecture pour des modèles de pointe de différentes échelles, y compris des petits, grands et des systèmes multimodaux. Votre travail améliorera l'intelligence, l'efficacité et introduira de nouvelles capacités pour avancer le domaine. ## Tâches - Effectuer des pré-entraînements de modèles d'intelligence artificielle sur des serveurs distribués importants équipés de milliers de GPU NVIDIA. - Concevoir, prototyper et échelonner des architectures innovantes pour améliorer l'intelligence des modèles. - Effectuer des expériences indépendantes et en collaboration, analyser les résultats et améliorer les méthodes pour une performance optimale. - Investiguer, déboguer et améliorer à la fois l'efficacité des modèles et la performance informatique. - Contribuer au développement de systèmes de formation pour garantir une scalabilité et une efficacité sans problème sur les plateformes cibles. ##
• Exigences - Diplôme en informatique ou un domaine connexe. Idéal : PhD en NLP, Machine Learning ou un domaine connexe, accompagné d'un solide historique de recherche en intelligence artificielle (avec de bonnes publications dans des conférences A*). - Expérience pratique dans la contribution à des entraînements de grandes échelles LLM sur des serveurs distribués importants équipés de milliers de GPU NVIDIA, garantissant une scalabilité et des progrès significatifs dans la performance des modèles. - Familiarité et expérience pratique avec des grandes échelles, des frameworks de formation distribués, des bibliothèques et des outils. - Connaissance approfondie des modifications state-of-the-art transformer et non-transformer visant à améliorer l'intelligence, l'efficacité et la scalabilité. - Expert en PyTorch et Hugging Face bibliothèques avec expérience pratique dans le développement de modèles, le pré-entraînement continu et le déploiement.

jobs.title: Account and Project Manager (100% Remote)
jobs.description:
Join Tether and Shape the Future of Digital Finance 
 At Tether, we’re not just building products, we’re pioneering a global financial revolution. Our cutting-edge solutions empower businesses—from exchanges and wallets to payment processors and ATMs—to seamlessly integrate reserve-backed tokens across blockchains. By harnessing the power of blockchain technology, Tether enables you to store, send, and receive digital tokens instantly, securely, and globally, all at a fraction of the cost. Transparency is the bedrock of everything we do, ensuring trust in every transaction. 
 
 Innovate with Tether 
 Tether Finance: Our innovative product suite features the world’s most trusted stablecoin, USDT , relied upon by hundreds of millions worldwide, alongside pioneering digital asset tokenization services. 
 But that’s just the beginning: 
 Tether Power: Driving sustainable growth, our energy solutions optimize excess power for Bitcoin mining using eco-friendly practices in state-of-the-art, geo-diverse facilities. 
 Tether Data: Fueling breakthroughs in AI and peer-to-peer technology, we reduce infrastructure costs and enhance global communications with cutting-edge solutions like KEET , our flagship app that redefines secure and private data sharing. 
 Tether Education : Democratizing access to top-tier digital learning, we empower individuals to thrive in the digital and gig economies, driving global growth and opportunity. 
 Tether Evolution : At the intersection of technology and human potential, we are pushing the boundaries of what is possible, crafting a future where innovation and human capabilities merge in powerful, unprecedented ways. 
 
 Why Join Us? 
 Our team is a global talent powerhouse, working remotely from every corner of the world. If you’re passionate about making a mark in the fintech space, this is your opportunity to collaborate with some of the brightest minds, pushing boundaries and setting new standards. We’ve grown fast, stayed lean, and secured our place as a leader in the industry. 
 If you have excellent English communication skills and are ready to contribute to the most innovative platform on the planet, Tether is the place for you. 
 Are you ready to be part of the future? 
 
 About the job 
 As part of the Technology Distribution team of Tether Data, we are seeking a highly organized and strategically minded Account Manager to oversee complex, cross-functional initiatives involving digital wallets and payments, asset tokenization, P2P technologies, and decentralized AI. The role combines client engagement, project governance, and multi-stakeholder coordination across external companies, government entities, and internal teams. 
 This position is pivotal in ensuring timely delivery of strategic programs, maintaining alignment between stakeholders, and supporting the deployment of transformational technologies in a fast-paced, regulated environment. 
 
 Responsibilities 
 Client & Partner Engagement 
 
• Act as the primary point of contact for clients and institutional partners, ensuring consistent communication, expectation management, and long-term relationship building. 

• Coordinate with external companies providing payment and exchange services, government institutions, and technology vendors. 

• Liaise with Expansion team to support the definition of collaboration opportunities across sectors. 

• Identify cross-initiative opportunities to introduce and leverage multiple Tether technologies 

 Project Governance & Delivery Oversight 
 
• Oversee implementation progress led by Product Managers and ensure alignment with contractual terms, expectations, and delivery timelines. 

• Maintain governance frameworks including meeting notes, action logs, risk registers, and decision records. 

• Drive accountability by ensuring tasks, responsibilities, and milestones are clearly tracked and documented. 

• Support escalation management to Head of Technology Distribution and ensure timely resolution of operational or strategic issues. 

 Cross-Team and Stakeholders Coordination 
 
• Facilitate information flow between internal product, engineering, legal/compliance, marketing and operations teams. 

• Maintain dashboards and executive reports summarizing status, risks, and next steps. 

• Engage and maintain relationships with external companies involved in the initiative at all levels 

 

 
• 5+ years of experience in account management, program coordination, or project governance within technology, fintech, or consulting environments. 

• Experience in overseeing implementation of advanced tech solutions 

• Skilled at leading complex, preferably international, projects 

• Proven ability to engage with corporate and government stakeholders at multiple levels. 

• Understanding of digital assets, blockchain, or financial technology ecosystems will be an asset 

• Excellent communication, documentation, and analytical skills. 

• Strong sense of ownership, initiative, and ability to operate in a fast-paced, evolving environment. 

• English is a must, any other language a plus 

• Crypto/blockchain/AI sourcing and vendor management expertise is an advantage 

 
 
 Important information for candidates 
Recruitment scams have become increasingly common. To protect yourself, please keep the following in mind when applying for roles:
 
• Apply only through our official channels. We do not use third-party platforms or agencies for recruitment unless clearly stated. All open roles are listed on our official careers page: https://tether.recruitee.com/

• Verify the recruiter’s identity. All our recruiters have verified LinkedIn profiles. If you’re unsure, you can confirm their identity by checking their profile or contacting us through our website.

• Be cautious of unusual communication methods. We do not conduct interviews over WhatsApp, Telegram, or SMS. All communication is done through official company emails and platforms.

• Double-check email addresses. All communication from us will come from emails ending in @ tether.to or @ tether.io 

• We will never request payment or financial details. If someone asks for personal financial information or payment at any point during the hiring process, it is a scam. Please report it immediately.

 When in doubt, feel free to reach out through our official website.

• Coordinate with external companies providing payment and exchange services, government institutions, and technology vendors.
• Liaise with Expansion team to support the definition of collaboration opportunities across sectors.
• Identify cross-initiative opportunities to introduce and leverage multiple Tether technologies Project Governance & Delivery Oversight
• Oversee implementation progress led by Product Managers and ensure alignment with contractual terms, expectations, and delivery timelines.
• Maintain governance frameworks including meeting notes, action logs, risk registers, and decision records.
• Drive accountability by ensuring tasks, responsibilities, and milestones are clearly tracked and documented.
• Support escalation management to Head of Technology Distribution and ensure timely resolution of operational or strategic issues. Cross-Team and Stakeholders Coordination
• Facilitate information flow between internal product, engineering, legal/compliance, marketing and operations teams.
• Maintain dashboards and executive reports summarizing status, risks, and next steps.
• Engage and maintain relationships with external companies involved in the initiative at all levels
• 5+ years of experience in account management, program coordination, or project governance within technology, fintech, or consulting environments.
• Experience in overseeing implementation of advanced tech solutions
• Skilled at leading complex, preferably international, projects
• Proven ability to engage with corporate and government stakeholders at multiple levels.
• Understanding of digital assets, blockchain, or financial technology ecosystems will be an asset
• Excellent communication, documentation, and analytical skills.
• Strong sense of ownership, initiative, and ability to operate in a fast-paced, evolving environment.
• English is a must, any other language a plus
• Crypto/blockchain/AI sourcing and vendor management expertise is an advantage Important information for candidates Recruitment scams have become increasingly common. To protect yourself, please keep the following in mind when applying for roles:
• Apply only through our official channels. We do not use third-party platforms or agencies for recruitment unless clearly stated. All open roles are listed on our official careers page: https://tether.recruitee.com/
• Verify the recruiter’s identity. All our recruiters have verified LinkedIn profiles. If you’re unsure, you can confirm their identity by checking their profile or contacting us through our website.
• Be cautious of unusual communication methods. We do not conduct interviews over WhatsApp, Telegram, or SMS. All communication is done through official company emails and platforms.
• Double-check email addresses. All communication from us will come from emails ending in @ tether.to or @ tether.io
• We will never request payment or financial details. If someone asks for personal financial information or payment at any point during the hiring process, it is a scam. Please report it immediately. When in doubt, feel free to reach out through our official website.

jobs.title: AI Research Engineer - Pre training
jobs.description:
Join Tether and Shape the Future of Digital Finance 
 At Tether, we’re not just building products, we’re pioneering a global financial revolution. Our cutting-edge solutions empower businesses—from exchanges and wallets to payment processors and ATMs—to seamlessly integrate reserve-backed tokens across blockchains. By harnessing the power of blockchain technology, Tether enables you to store, send, and receive digital tokens instantly, securely, and globally, all at a fraction of the cost. Transparency is the bedrock of everything we do, ensuring trust in every transaction.
 
 Innovate with Tether 
 Tether Finance: Our innovative product suite features the world’s most trusted stablecoin, USDT , relied upon by hundreds of millions worldwide, alongside pioneering digital asset tokenization services.
 But that’s just the beginning:
 Tether Power: Driving sustainable growth, our energy solutions optimize excess power for Bitcoin mining using eco-friendly practices in state-of-the-art, geo-diverse facilities.
 Tether Data: Fueling breakthroughs in AI and peer-to-peer technology, we reduce infrastructure costs and enhance global communications with cutting-edge solutions like KEET , our flagship app that redefines secure and private data sharing.
 Tether Education : Democratizing access to top-tier digital learning, we empower individuals to thrive in the digital and gig economies, driving global growth and opportunity.
 Tether Evolution : At the intersection of technology and human potential, we are pushing the boundaries of what is possible, crafting a future where innovation and human capabilities merge in powerful, unprecedented ways.
 
 Why Join Us? 
 Our team is a global talent powerhouse, working remotely from every corner of the world. If you’re passionate about making a mark in the fintech space, this is your opportunity to collaborate with some of the brightest minds, pushing boundaries and setting new standards. We’ve grown fast, stayed lean, and secured our place as a leader in the industry.
 If you have excellent English communication skills and are ready to contribute to the most innovative platform on the planet, Tether is the place for you.
 Are you ready to be part of the future? 
 
 About the job: 
 As a member of the AI model team, you will drive innovation in architecture development for cutting-edge models of various scales, including small, large, and multi-modal systems. Your work will enhance intelligence, improve efficiency, and introduce new capabilities to advance the field.
 
 You will have a deep expertise in LLM architectures, a strong grasp of pre-training optimization with a hands-on, research-driven approach. Your mission is to explore and implement novel techniques and algorithms that lead to groundbreaking advancements: data curation, strengthening baselines, identifying and resolving existing pre-training bottlenecks to push the limits of AI performance.
 
 Responsibilities :
 
• Conduct pre-training AI models on large, distributed servers equipped with thousands of NVIDIA GPUs.

• Design, prototype, and scale innovative architectures to enhance model intelligence.

• Independently and collaboratively execute experiments, analyze results, and refine methodologies for optimal performance.

• Investigate, debug, and improve both model efficiency and computational performance.

• Contribute to the advancement of training systems to ensure seamless scalability and efficiency on target platforms.

 
 
• A degree in Computer Science or related field. Ideally PhD in NLP, Machine Learning, or a related field, complemented by a solid track record in AI R&D (with good publications in A* conferences).

• Hands-on experience contributing to large-scale LLM training runs on large, distributed servers equipped with thousands of NVIDIA GPUs, ensuring scalability and impactful advancements in model performance.

• Familiarity and practical experience with large-scale, distributed training frameworks, libraries and tools.

• Deep knowledge of state-of-the-art transformer and non-transformer modifications aimed at enhancing intelligence, efficiency and scalability.

• Strong expertise in PyTorch and Hugging Face libraries with practical experience in model development, continual pretraining, and deployment.
