jobs.title: Senior Blockchain Expansion Manager (100% remote)

titleByLocale.it: Senior Blockchain Expansion Manager (100% da remoto)

jobs.description:
Join Tether and Shape the Future of Digital Finance 
 At Tether, we’re not just building products, we’re pioneering a global financial revolution. Our cutting-edge solutions empower businesses—from exchanges and wallets to payment processors and ATMs—to seamlessly integrate reserve-backed tokens across blockchains. By harnessing the power of blockchain technology, Tether enables you to store, send, and receive digital tokens instantly, securely, and globally, all at a fraction of the cost. Transparency is the bedrock of everything we do, ensuring trust in every transaction. 
 
 Innovate with Tether 
 Tether Finance: Our innovative product suite features the world’s most trusted stablecoin, USDT , relied upon by hundreds of millions worldwide, alongside pioneering digital asset tokenization services. 
 But that’s just the beginning: 
 Tether Power: Driving sustainable growth, our energy solutions optimize excess power for Bitcoin mining using eco-friendly practices in state-of-the-art, geo-diverse facilities. 
 Tether Data: Fueling breakthroughs in AI and peer-to-peer technology, we reduce infrastructure costs and enhance global communications with cutting-edge solutions like KEET , our flagship app that redefines secure and private data sharing. 
 Tether Education : Democratizing access to top-tier digital learning, we empower individuals to thrive in the digital and gig economies, driving global growth and opportunity. 
 Tether Evolution : At the intersection of technology and human potential, we are pushing the boundaries of what is possible, crafting a future where innovation and human capabilities merge in powerful, unprecedented ways. 
 
 Why Join Us? 
 Our team is a global talent powerhouse, working remotely from every corner of the world. If you’re passionate about making a mark in the fintech space, this is your opportunity to collaborate with some of the brightest minds, pushing boundaries and setting new standards. We’ve grown fast, stayed lean, and secured our place as a leader in the industry. 
 If you have excellent English communication skills and are ready to contribute to the most innovative platform on the planet, Tether is the place for you. 
 Are you ready to be part of the future? 
 
 About the job 
 Tether is seeking a Blockchain Expansion Manager to drive strategic growth initiatives across Tether’s blockchain partner ecosystem. This role sits within the Blockchain Expansion function and focuses on building and managing high-impact relationships with blockchain foundations while executing strategic projects that expand the real-world adoption and utility of Tether assets. 
 The Blockchain Expansion Manager will work closely with blockchain partners to design and deliver initiatives that meaningfully grow Tether’s asset usage through practical, real-world use cases. This role requires strong partnership management skills, strategic thinking, and the ability to execute complex projects across multiple internal and external stakeholders. 
 This is a hands-on role suited to someone who thrives in a fast-moving environment, operates with autonomy, and brings structure and rigor to high-impact growth initiatives. 
 
 Responsibilities 
 
• Manage and deepen strategic relationships with blockchain foundations and ecosystem partners.
Act as the primary point of contact for assigned blockchain partners, ensuring alignment between partner objectives and Tether’s strategic priorities. 

• Design and execute high-impact growth projects in collaboration with blockchain partners to drive adoption of Tether assets through real-world use cases. 

• Think strategically about how Tether can work with blockchain ecosystems to create scalable, sustainable projects that expand asset usage and circulation. 

• Coordinate and manage cross-functional initiatives involving regional expansion, economics, marketing, and other internal teams. 

• Track, manage, and report on project progress, outcomes, and effectiveness, ensuring initiatives deliver against defined objectives. 

• Identify opportunities to improve execution efficiency, project structure, and partner outcomes. 

• Operate with a high degree of autonomy, taking initiative to identify new opportunities and drive them forward. 

• Support internal leadership with clear updates, insights, and recommendations based on partner and project performance. 

 
 Mandatory 
 
• Proven experience in partnership or ecosystem management , ideally within crypto, fintech, or technology. 

• Strong track record of managing high-impact, strategic growth projects from concept through execution. 

• Excellent organisational skills with a high level of attention to detail . 

• Ability to track, manage, and optimise multiple initiatives simultaneously. 

• Strong strategic thinking skills with the ability to translate ideas into executable projects. 

• Experience working cross-functionally with teams such as expansion, economics, marketing, or product. 

• Ability to work autonomously, take initiative, and operate effectively in a remote, global environment. 

• Excellent written and verbal English communication skills.

 

 Preferred 
 
• Experience working with blockchain foundations or Layer 1 / Layer 2 ecosystems. 

• Familiarity with stablecoins, blockchain infrastructure, or real-world blockchain use cases. 

• Experience operating in fast-growing or unstructured environments. 

 
 
 
 Important information for candidates 
Recruitment scams have become increasingly common. To protect yourself, please keep the following in mind when applying for roles:
 
• Apply only through our official channels. We do not use third-party platforms or agencies for recruitment unless clearly stated. All open roles are listed on our official careers page: https://tether.recruitee.com/

• Verify the recruiter’s identity. All our recruiters have verified LinkedIn profiles. If you’re unsure, you can confirm their identity by checking their profile or contacting us through our website.

• Be cautious of unusual communication methods. We do not conduct interviews over WhatsApp, Telegram, or SMS. All communication is done through official company emails and platforms.

• Double-check email addresses. All communication from us will come from emails ending in @ tether.to or @ tether.io 

• We will never request payment or financial details. If someone asks for personal financial information or payment at any point during the hiring process, it is a scam. Please report it immediately.

 When in doubt, feel free to reach out through our official website.

descriptionByLocale.it: Unisciti a Tether e dai forma al futuro della finanza digitale In Tether non stiamo solo costruendo prodotti, siamo pionieri di una rivoluzione finanziaria globale. Le nostre soluzioni all'avanguardia consentono alle aziende, dagli scambi e portafogli ai processori di pagamento e agli sportelli bancomat, di integrare perfettamente token garantiti da riserve attraverso blockchain. Sfruttando la potenza della tecnologia blockchain, Tether ti consente di archiviare, inviare e ricevere token digitali in modo istantaneo, sicuro e globale, il tutto a una frazione del costo. La trasparenza è il fondamento di tutto ciò che facciamo, garantendo fiducia in ogni transazione. Innova con Tether Tether Finance: la nostra suite di prodotti innovativa comprende la stablecoin più affidabile al mondo, USDT, su cui fanno affidamento centinaia di milioni di persone in tutto il mondo, insieme a servizi pionieristici di tokenizzazione delle risorse digitali. Ma questo è solo l’inizio: Tether Power: guidando la crescita sostenibile, le nostre soluzioni energetiche ottimizzano l’energia in eccesso per l’estrazione di Bitcoin utilizzando pratiche ecocompatibili in strutture all’avanguardia e geodiversificate. Tether Data: alimentando innovazioni nell'intelligenza artificiale e nella tecnologia peer-to-peer, riduciamo i costi dell'infrastruttura e miglioriamo le comunicazioni globali con soluzioni all'avanguardia come KEET, la nostra app di punta che ridefinisce la condivisione sicura e privata dei dati. Tether Education: democratizzando l’accesso all’apprendimento digitale di alto livello, consentiamo alle persone di prosperare nelle economie digitali e gig economy, guidando la crescita e le opportunità globali. Tether Evolution: all'intersezione tra tecnologia e potenziale umano, stiamo spingendo i confini di ciò che è possibile, creando un futuro in cui innovazione e capacità umane si fondono in modi potenti e senza precedenti. Perché unirsi a noi? Il nostro team è una potenza globale di talenti, che lavora in remoto da ogni angolo del mondo. Se la tua passione è lasciare il segno nel settore fintech, questa è la tua occasione per collaborare con alcune delle menti più brillanti, spingendo oltre i confini e stabilendo nuovi standard. Siamo cresciuti rapidamente, siamo rimasti snelli e ci siamo assicurati il ​​posto di leader nel settore. Se hai eccellenti capacità di comunicazione in inglese e sei pronto a contribuire alla piattaforma più innovativa del pianeta, Tether è il posto che fa per te. Sei pronto a far parte del futuro? Informazioni sul lavoro Tether sta cercando un Blockchain Expansion Manager per guidare iniziative di crescita strategica nell'ecosistema dei partner blockchain di Tether. Questo ruolo rientra nella funzione Blockchain Expansion e si concentra sulla costruzione e gestione di relazioni ad alto impatto con le fondazioni blockchain mentre si eseguono progetti strategici che espandono l'adozione e l'utilità nel mondo reale delle risorse Tether. Il Blockchain Expansion Manager lavorerà a stretto contatto con i partner blockchain per progettare e realizzare iniziative che aumentino in modo significativo l’utilizzo delle risorse di Tether attraverso casi d’uso pratici e reali. Questo ruolo richiede forti capacità di gestione delle partnership, pensiero strategico e capacità di eseguire progetti complessi tra più stakeholder interni ed esterni. Questo è un ruolo pratico adatto a qualcuno che prospera in un ambiente in rapida evoluzione, opera con autonomia e apporta struttura e rigore a iniziative di crescita ad alto impatto. Responsabilità Gestire e approfondire le relazioni strategiche con fondazioni blockchain e partner dell'ecosistema. Agire come punto di contatto principale per i partner blockchain assegnati, garantendo l'allineamento tra gli obiettivi dei partner e le priorità strategiche di Tether. Progetta ed esegui progetti di crescita ad alto impatto in collaborazione con i partner blockchain per promuovere l'adozione delle risorse Tether attraverso casi d'uso reali. Pensa in modo strategico a come Tether può lavorare con gli ecosistemi blockchain per creare progetti scalabili e sostenibili che espandono l’utilizzo e la circolazione delle risorse. Coordinare e gestire iniziative interfunzionali che coinvolgono espansione regionale, economia, marketing e altri team interni. Monitora, gestisci e crea report sullo stato di avanzamento, sui risultati e sull'efficacia del progetto, garantendo che le iniziative raggiungano gli obiettivi definiti. Identificare le opportunità per migliorare l'efficienza dell'esecuzione, la struttura del progetto e i risultati dei partner. Operare con un elevato grado di autonomia, prendendo l'iniziativa per identificare nuove opportunità e portarle avanti. Supporta la leadership interna con aggiornamenti, approfondimenti e consigli chiari basati sulle prestazioni dei partner e del progetto. Obbligatoria Comprovata esperienza nella gestione di partnership o ecosistemi, idealmente nell'ambito di criptovalute, fintech o tecnologia. Forte esperienza nella gestione di progetti di crescita strategica ad alto impatto, dall'ideazione fino all'esecuzione. Eccellenti capacità organizzative con un elevato livello di attenzione ai dettagli. Capacità di monitorare, gestire e ottimizzare più iniziative contemporaneamente. Forti capacità di pensiero strategico con la capacità di tradurre le idee in progetti eseguibili. Esperienza di lavoro interfunzionale con team come espansione, economia, marketing o prodotto. Capacità di lavorare in modo autonomo, prendere iniziative e operare in modo efficace in un ambiente globale e remoto. Eccellenti capacità di comunicazione scritta e verbale in inglese. Esperienza preferita di lavoro con basi blockchain o ecosistemi Layer 1/Layer 2. Familiarità con le stablecoin, l'infrastruttura blockchain o i casi d'uso della blockchain nel mondo reale. Esperienza di funzionamento in ambienti in rapida crescita o non strutturati. Informazioni importanti per i candidati Le truffe nel reclutamento sono diventate sempre più comuni. Per proteggerti, tieni presente quanto segue quando fai domanda per un ruolo: fai domanda solo attraverso i nostri canali ufficiali. Non utilizziamo piattaforme o agenzie di terze parti per il reclutamento se non chiaramente indicato. Tutti i ruoli aperti sono elencati nella nostra pagina ufficiale delle carriere: https://tether.recruitee.com/ Verifica l'identità del reclutatore. Tutti i nostri reclutatori hanno profili LinkedIn verificati. Se non sei sicuro, puoi confermare la loro identità controllando il loro profilo o contattandoci tramite il nostro sito web. Fai attenzione ai metodi di comunicazione insoliti. Non conduciamo interviste tramite WhatsApp, Telegram o SMS. Tutte le comunicazioni avvengono tramite e-mail e piattaforme ufficiali dell'azienda. Ricontrolla gli indirizzi email. Tutte le nostre comunicazioni arriveranno da e-mail che terminano con @ tether.to o @ tether.io Non richiederemo mai pagamenti o dettagli finanziari. Se qualcuno chiede informazioni finanziarie personali o un pagamento in qualsiasi momento durante il processo di assunzione, si tratta di una truffa. Per favore segnalatelo immediatamente. In caso di dubbi, non esitate a contattarci tramite il nostro sito Web ufficiale.
descriptionByLocale.en:
Join Tether and Shape the Future of Digital Finance At Tether, we’re not just building products, we’re pioneering a global financial revolution. Our cutting-edge solutions empower businesses—from exchanges and wallets to payment processors and ATMs—to seamlessly integrate reserve-backed tokens across blockchains. By harnessing the power of blockchain technology, Tether enables you to store, send, and receive digital tokens instantly, securely, and globally, all at a fraction of the cost. Transparency is the bedrock of everything we do, ensuring trust in every transaction. Innovate with Tether Tether Finance: Our innovative product suite features the world’s most trusted stablecoin, USDT , relied upon by hundreds of millions worldwide, alongside pioneering digital asset tokenization services. But that’s just the beginning: Tether Power: Driving sustainable growth, our energy solutions optimize excess power for Bitcoin mining using eco-friendly practices in state-of-the-art, geo-diverse facilities. Tether Data: Fueling breakthroughs in AI and peer-to-peer technology, we reduce infrastructure costs and enhance global communications with cutting-edge solutions like KEET , our flagship app that redefines secure and private data sharing. Tether Education : Democratizing access to top-tier digital learning, we empower individuals to thrive in the digital and gig economies, driving global growth and opportunity. Tether Evolution : At the intersection of technology and human potential, we are pushing the boundaries of what is possible, crafting a future where innovation and human capabilities merge in powerful, unprecedented ways. Why Join Us? Our team is a global talent powerhouse, working remotely from every corner of the world. If you’re passionate about making a mark in the fintech space, this is your opportunity to collaborate with some of the brightest minds, pushing boundaries and setting new standards. We’ve grown fast, stayed lean, and secured our place as a leader in the industry. If you have excellent English communication skills and are ready to contribute to the most innovative platform on the planet, Tether is the place for you. Are you ready to be part of the future? About the job Tether is seeking a Blockchain Expansion Manager to drive strategic growth initiatives across Tether’s blockchain partner ecosystem. This role sits within the Blockchain Expansion function and focuses on building and managing high-impact relationships with blockchain foundations while executing strategic projects that expand the real-world adoption and utility of Tether assets. The Blockchain Expansion Manager will work closely with blockchain partners to design and deliver initiatives that meaningfully grow Tether’s asset usage through practical, real-world use cases. This role requires strong partnership management skills, strategic thinking, and the ability to execute complex projects across multiple internal and external stakeholders. This is a hands-on role suited to someone who thrives in a fast-moving environment, operates with autonomy, and brings structure and rigor to high-impact growth initiatives. Responsibilities
• Manage and deepen strategic relationships with blockchain foundations and ecosystem partners. Act as the primary point of contact for assigned blockchain partners, ensuring alignment between partner objectives and Tether’s strategic priorities.
• Design and execute high-impact growth projects in collaboration with blockchain partners to drive adoption of Tether assets through real-world use cases.
• Think strategically about how Tether can work with blockchain ecosystems to create scalable, sustainable projects that expand asset usage and circulation.
• Coordinate and manage cross-functional initiatives involving regional expansion, economics, marketing, and other internal teams.
• Track, manage, and report on project progress, outcomes, and effectiveness, ensuring initiatives deliver against defined objectives.
• Identify opportunities to improve execution efficiency, project structure, and partner outcomes.
• Operate with a high degree of autonomy, taking initiative to identify new opportunities and drive them forward.
• Support internal leadership with clear updates, insights, and recommendations based on partner and project performance. Mandatory
• Proven experience in partnership or ecosystem management , ideally within crypto, fintech, or technology.
• Strong track record of managing high-impact, strategic growth projects from concept through execution.
• Excellent organisational skills with a high level of attention to detail .
• Ability to track, manage, and optimise multiple initiatives simultaneously.
• Strong strategic thinking skills with the ability to translate ideas into executable projects.
• Experience working cross-functionally with teams such as expansion, economics, marketing, or product.
• Ability to work autonomously, take initiative, and operate effectively in a remote, global environment.
• Excellent written and verbal English communication skills. Preferred
• Experience working with blockchain foundations or Layer 1 / Layer 2 ecosystems.
• Familiarity with stablecoins, blockchain infrastructure, or real-world blockchain use cases.
• Experience operating in fast-growing or unstructured environments. Important information for candidates Recruitment scams have become increasingly common. To protect yourself, please keep the following in mind when applying for roles:
• Apply only through our official channels. We do not use third-party platforms or agencies for recruitment unless clearly stated. All open roles are listed on our official careers page: https://tether.recruitee.com/
• Verify the recruiter’s identity. All our recruiters have verified LinkedIn profiles. If you’re unsure, you can confirm their identity by checking their profile or contacting us through our website.
• Be cautious of unusual communication methods. We do not conduct interviews over WhatsApp, Telegram, or SMS. All communication is done through official company emails and platforms.
• Double-check email addresses. All communication from us will come from emails ending in @ tether.to or @ tether.io
• We will never request payment or financial details. If someone asks for personal financial information or payment at any point during the hiring process, it is a scam. Please report it immediately. When in doubt, feel free to reach out through our official website.
descriptionByLocale.de:
Treten Sie Tether bei und gestalten Sie die Zukunft des digitalen Finanzwesens. Bei Tether entwickeln wir nicht nur Produkte, wir sind Vorreiter einer globalen Finanzrevolution. Unsere hochmodernen Lösungen ermöglichen es Unternehmen – von Börsen und Wallets bis hin zu Zahlungsabwicklern und Geldautomaten –, rücklagegesicherte Token nahtlos über Blockchains hinweg zu integrieren. Durch die Nutzung der Leistungsfähigkeit der Blockchain-Technologie ermöglicht Ihnen Tether das sofortige, sichere und globale Speichern, Senden und Empfangen digitaler Token – und das alles zu einem Bruchteil der Kosten. Transparenz ist die Grundlage unseres Handelns und gewährleistet Vertrauen bei jeder Transaktion. Innovation mit Tether Tether Finance: Unsere innovative Produktsuite umfasst den vertrauenswürdigsten Stablecoin der Welt, USDT, auf den sich Hunderte Millionen Menschen auf der ganzen Welt verlassen, sowie bahnbrechende Dienste zur Tokenisierung digitaler Vermögenswerte. Aber das ist erst der Anfang: Tether Power: Unsere Energielösungen fördern nachhaltiges Wachstum und optimieren überschüssigen Strom für das Bitcoin-Mining durch umweltfreundliche Praktiken in hochmodernen, geografisch vielfältigen Anlagen. Tether Data: Wir treiben Durchbrüche in der KI- und Peer-to-Peer-Technologie voran, senken Infrastrukturkosten und verbessern die globale Kommunikation mit modernsten Lösungen wie KEET, unserer Flaggschiff-App, die den sicheren und privaten Datenaustausch neu definiert. Tether Education: Durch die Demokratisierung des Zugangs zu erstklassigem digitalen Lernen ermöglichen wir Einzelpersonen, in der Digital- und Gig-Wirtschaft erfolgreich zu sein und so globales Wachstum und Chancen voranzutreiben. Tether Evolution: An der Schnittstelle von Technologie und menschlichem Potenzial verschieben wir die Grenzen des Möglichen und gestalten eine Zukunft, in der Innovation und menschliche Fähigkeiten auf kraftvolle, beispiellose Weise verschmelzen. Warum sollten Sie bei uns mitmachen? Unser Team ist ein globales Talent-Powerhouse, das von überall auf der Welt aus arbeitet. Wenn es Ihnen am Herzen liegt, sich im Fintech-Bereich einen Namen zu machen, ist dies Ihre Gelegenheit, mit einigen der klügsten Köpfe zusammenzuarbeiten, Grenzen zu überschreiten und neue Standards zu setzen. Wir sind schnell gewachsen, schlank geblieben und haben uns unseren Platz als Branchenführer gesichert. Wenn Sie über ausgezeichnete Englischkenntnisse verfügen und bereit sind, einen Beitrag zur innovativsten Plattform der Welt zu leisten, ist Tether der richtige Ort für Sie. Sind Sie bereit, Teil der Zukunft zu sein? Über die Stelle: Tether sucht einen Blockchain Expansion Manager, um strategische Wachstumsinitiativen im gesamten Blockchain-Partner-Ökosystem von Tether voranzutreiben. Diese Rolle ist innerhalb der Blockchain-Erweiterungsfunktion angesiedelt und konzentriert sich auf den Aufbau und die Verwaltung wirkungsvoller Beziehungen zu Blockchain-Grundlagen sowie auf die Durchführung strategischer Projekte, die die reale Akzeptanz und den Nutzen von Tether-Assets erweitern. Der Blockchain Expansion Manager wird eng mit Blockchain-Partnern zusammenarbeiten, um Initiativen zu entwerfen und umzusetzen, die die Asset-Nutzung von Tether durch praktische, reale Anwendungsfälle sinnvoll steigern. Diese Rolle erfordert ausgeprägte Fähigkeiten im Partnerschaftsmanagement, strategisches Denken und die Fähigkeit, komplexe Projekte über mehrere interne und externe Stakeholder hinweg durchzuführen. Dies ist eine praktische Rolle, die für jemanden geeignet ist, der in einem schnelllebigen Umfeld erfolgreich ist, autonom agiert und Struktur und Genauigkeit in wirkungsvolle Wachstumsinitiativen einbringt. Verantwortlichkeiten: Verwalten und vertiefen Sie strategische Beziehungen mit Blockchain-Stiftungen und Ökosystempartnern. Fungieren Sie als Hauptansprechpartner für die zugewiesenen Blockchain-Partner und stellen Sie die Übereinstimmung zwischen den Partnerzielen und den strategischen Prioritäten von Tether sicher. Entwerfen und führen Sie in Zusammenarbeit mit Blockchain-Partnern wirkungsvolle Wachstumsprojekte durch, um die Einführung von Tether-Assets durch reale Anwendungsfälle voranzutreiben. Denken Sie strategisch darüber nach, wie Tether mit Blockchain-Ökosystemen zusammenarbeiten kann, um skalierbare, nachhaltige Projekte zu schaffen, die die Nutzung und Verbreitung von Vermögenswerten erweitern. Koordinieren und verwalten Sie funktionsübergreifende Initiativen, die regionale Expansion, Wirtschaft, Marketing und andere interne Teams umfassen. Verfolgen, verwalten und berichten Sie über den Projektfortschritt, die Ergebnisse und die Wirksamkeit, um sicherzustellen, dass Initiativen definierte Ziele erreichen. Identifizieren Sie Möglichkeiten zur Verbesserung der Ausführungseffizienz, der Projektstruktur und der Partnerergebnisse. Arbeiten Sie mit einem hohen Maß an Autonomie und ergreifen Sie die Initiative, um neue Möglichkeiten zu erkennen und voranzutreiben. Unterstützen Sie die interne Führung mit klaren Updates, Erkenntnissen und Empfehlungen basierend auf der Partner- und Projektleistung. Obligatorisch Nachgewiesene Erfahrung im Partnerschafts- oder Ökosystemmanagement, idealerweise in den Bereichen Krypto, Fintech oder Technologie. Starke Erfolgsbilanz bei der Leitung wirkungsvoller, strategischer Wachstumsprojekte vom Konzept bis zur Ausführung. Ausgezeichnete organisatorische Fähigkeiten mit einem hohen Maß an Liebe zum Detail. Möglichkeit, mehrere Initiativen gleichzeitig zu verfolgen, zu verwalten und zu optimieren. Starke strategische Denkfähigkeiten mit der Fähigkeit, Ideen in umsetzbare Projekte umzusetzen. Erfahrung in der funktionsübergreifenden Zusammenarbeit mit Teams wie Expansion, Wirtschaft, Marketing oder Produkt. Fähigkeit, autonom zu arbeiten, Initiative zu ergreifen und in einer entfernten, globalen Umgebung effektiv zu agieren. Ausgezeichnete schriftliche und mündliche Englischkenntnisse. Bevorzugte Erfahrung in der Arbeit mit Blockchain-Grundlagen oder Layer-1-/Layer-2-Ökosystemen. Vertrautheit mit Stablecoins, Blockchain-Infrastruktur oder realen Blockchain-Anwendungsfällen. Erfahrung in der Arbeit in schnell wachsenden oder unstrukturierten Umgebungen. Wichtige Informationen für Kandidaten: Betrug bei der Personalbeschaffung kommt immer häufiger vor. Um sich selbst zu schützen, beachten Sie bitte Folgendes, wenn Sie sich auf Stellen bewerben: Bewerben Sie sich ausschließlich über unsere offiziellen Kanäle. Wir nutzen für die Rekrutierung keine Plattformen oder Agenturen Dritter, sofern dies nicht ausdrücklich angegeben ist. Alle offenen Stellen sind auf unserer offiziellen Karriereseite aufgeführt: https://tether.recruitee.com/ Überprüfen Sie die Identität des Personalvermittlers. Alle unsere Personalvermittler verfügen über verifizierte LinkedIn-
• Profile. Wenn Sie sich nicht sicher sind, können Sie ihre Identität bestätigen, indem Sie ihr Profil überprüfen oder uns über unsere Website kontaktieren. Seien Sie vorsichtig bei ungewöhnlichen Kommunikationsmethoden. Wir führen keine Interviews über WhatsApp, Telegram oder SMS durch. Die gesamte Kommunikation erfolgt über offizielle E-Mails und Plattformen des Unternehmens. Überprüfen Sie die E-Mail-Adressen noch einmal. Die gesamte Kommunikation von uns erfolgt über E-Mails mit der Endung @ tether.to oder @ tether.io. Wir werden niemals nach Zahlungs- oder Finanzdaten fragen. Wenn jemand zu irgendeinem Zeitpunkt während des Einstellungsprozesses nach persönlichen Finanzinformationen oder Zahlungen fragt, handelt es sich um Betrug. Bitte melden Sie es umgehend. Im Zweifelsfall können Sie sich gerne über unsere offizielle Website an uns wenden.
descriptionByLocale.fr: Rejoignez Tether et façonnez l'avenir de la finance numérique Chez Tether, nous ne nous contentons pas de créer des produits, nous sommes les pionniers d'une révolution financière mondiale. Nos solutions de pointe permettent aux entreprises (des bourses et portefeuilles aux processeurs de paiement et aux distributeurs automatiques) d'intégrer de manière transparente les jetons adossés à des réserves dans les blockchains. En exploitant la puissance de la technologie blockchain, Tether vous permet de stocker, d'envoyer et de recevoir des jetons numériques instantanément, en toute sécurité et à l'échelle mondiale, le tout pour une fraction du coût. La transparence est le fondement de tout ce que nous faisons, garantissant la confiance dans chaque transaction. Innovez avec Tether Tether Finance : notre suite de produits innovants comprend le stablecoin le plus fiable au monde, l'USDT, sur lequel s'appuient des centaines de millions de personnes dans le monde, ainsi que des services pionniers de tokenisation d'actifs numériques. Mais ce n’est qu’un début : Tether Power : favorisant une croissance durable, nos solutions énergétiques optimisent l’énergie excédentaire pour l’extraction de Bitcoin en utilisant des pratiques respectueuses de l’environnement dans des installations de pointe et géodiverses. Tether Data : En alimentant les percées dans l'IA et la technologie peer-to-peer, nous réduisons les coûts d'infrastructure et améliorons les communications mondiales avec des solutions de pointe comme KEET, notre application phare qui redéfinit le partage de données sécurisé et privé. Tether Education : en démocratisant l'accès à un apprentissage numérique de haut niveau, nous permettons aux individus de s'épanouir dans l'économie numérique et des petits boulots, stimulant ainsi la croissance et les opportunités mondiales. Tether Evolution : À l'intersection de la technologie et du potentiel humain, nous repoussons les limites de ce qui est possible, en créant un avenir où l'innovation et les capacités humaines fusionnent de manière puissante et sans précédent. Pourquoi nous rejoindre ? Notre équipe est une centrale mondiale de talents, travaillant à distance depuis tous les coins du monde. Si vous souhaitez vous démarquer dans le domaine de la fintech, c'est l'occasion de collaborer avec certains des esprits les plus brillants, de repousser les limites et d'établir de nouvelles normes. Nous avons connu une croissance rapide, sommes restés minces et avons assuré notre place de leader du secteur. Si vous possédez d'excellentes compétences en communication en anglais et êtes prêt à contribuer à la plateforme la plus innovante de la planète, Tether est fait pour vous. Êtes-vous prêt à faire partie du futur ? À propos du poste Tether recherche un responsable de l'expansion de la blockchain pour mener des initiatives de croissance stratégique dans l'écosystème de partenaires blockchain de Tether. Ce rôle s'inscrit dans la fonction Blockchain Expansion et se concentre sur l'établissement et la gestion de relations à fort impact avec les fondations blockchain tout en exécutant des projets stratégiques qui élargissent l'adoption et l'utilité dans le monde réel des actifs Tether. Le Blockchain Expansion Manager travaillera en étroite collaboration avec les partenaires blockchain pour concevoir et mettre en œuvre des initiatives qui augmentent de manière significative l’utilisation des actifs de Tether grâce à des cas d’utilisation pratiques et réels. Ce rôle nécessite de solides compétences en gestion de partenariats, une réflexion stratégique et la capacité d'exécuter des projets complexes avec plusieurs parties prenantes internes et externes. Il s'agit d'un rôle pratique adapté à quelqu'un qui s'épanouit dans un environnement en évolution rapide, opère avec autonomie et apporte structure et rigueur aux initiatives de croissance à fort impact. Responsabilités Gérer et approfondir les relations stratégiques avec les fondations blockchain et les partenaires de l'écosystème. Agir en tant que point de contact principal pour les partenaires blockchain assignés, en assurant l'alignement entre les objectifs des partenaires et les priorités stratégiques de Tether. Concevez et exécutez des projets de croissance à fort impact en collaboration avec des partenaires blockchain pour favoriser l'adoption des actifs Tether à travers des cas d'utilisation réels. Réfléchissez de manière stratégique à la manière dont Tether peut fonctionner avec les écosystèmes blockchain pour créer des projets évolutifs et durables qui élargissent l'utilisation et la circulation des actifs. Coordonner et gérer des initiatives interfonctionnelles impliquant l’expansion régionale, l’économie, le marketing et d’autres équipes internes. Suivre, gérer et rendre compte de l'avancement, des résultats et de l'efficacité du projet, en garantissant que les initiatives atteignent les objectifs définis. Identifiez les opportunités pour améliorer l’efficacité de l’exécution, la structure du projet et les résultats des partenaires. Travailler avec un haut degré d'autonomie, en prenant des initiatives pour identifier de nouvelles opportunités et les faire avancer. Soutenez le leadership interne avec des mises à jour claires, des informations et des recommandations basées sur les performances des partenaires et des projets. Expérience avérée obligatoire en partenariat ou en gestion d'écosystèmes, idéalement dans le domaine de la cryptographie, de la fintech ou de la technologie. Solide expérience dans la gestion de projets de croissance stratégique à fort impact, de la conception à l'exécution. Excellentes compétences organisationnelles et grand souci du détail. Capacité à suivre, gérer et optimiser plusieurs initiatives simultanément. Solides compétences en matière de réflexion stratégique et capacité de traduire des idées en projets exécutables. Expérience de travail interfonctionnel avec des équipes telles que l'expansion, l'économie, le marketing ou les produits. Capacité à travailler de manière autonome, à prendre des initiatives et à opérer efficacement dans un environnement mondial distant. Excellentes compétences en communication écrite et verbale en anglais. Expérience préférée de travail avec des fondations blockchain ou des écosystèmes de couche 1/couche 2. Familiarité avec les pièces stables, l'infrastructure blockchain ou les cas d'utilisation réels de la blockchain. Expérience de travail dans des environnements à croissance rapide ou non structurés. Informations importantes pour les candidats Les escroqueries au recrutement sont devenues de plus en plus courantes. Pour vous protéger, veuillez garder les points suivants à l'esprit lorsque vous postulez à des postes : postulez uniquement via nos canaux officiels. Nous n'utilisons pas de plateformes ou d'agences tierces pour le recrutement, sauf indication contraire. Tous les postes ouverts sont répertoriés sur notre page officielle des carrières : https://tether.recruitee.com/ Vérifiez l'identité du recruteur. Tous nos recruteurs ont des profils LinkedIn vérifiés. En cas de doute, vous pouvez confirmer leur identité en vérifiant leur profil ou en nous contactant via notre site Web. Méfiez-vous des méthodes de communication inhabituelles. Nous ne menons pas d'entretiens via WhatsApp, Telegram ou SMS. Toutes les communications se font via les e-mails et les plateformes officielles de l'entreprise. Vérifiez les adresses e-mail. Toutes les communications de notre part proviendront d'e-mails se terminant par @ tether.to ou @ tether.io. Nous ne demanderons jamais de paiement ou de détails financiers. Si quelqu’un demande des informations financières personnelles ou un paiement à tout moment du processus d’embauche, il s’agit d’une arnaque. Veuillez le signaler immédiatement. En cas de doute, n'hésitez pas à nous contacter via notre site officiel.

jobs.title: Backend Engineer - Wallets (100% Remote)
jobs.description:
Join Tether and Shape the Future of Digital Finance 
 At Tether, we’re not just building products, we’re pioneering a global financial revolution. Our cutting-edge solutions empower businesses—from exchanges and wallets to payment processors and ATMs—to seamlessly integrate reserve-backed tokens across blockchains. By harnessing the power of blockchain technology, Tether enables you to store, send, and receive digital tokens instantly, securely, and globally, all at a fraction of the cost. Transparency is the bedrock of everything we do, ensuring trust in every transaction. 
 
 Innovate with Tether 
 Tether Finance: Our innovative product suite features the world’s most trusted stablecoin, USDT , relied upon by hundreds of millions worldwide, alongside pioneering digital asset tokenization services. 
 But that’s just the beginning: 
 Tether Power: Driving sustainable growth, our energy solutions optimize excess power for Bitcoin mining using eco-friendly practices in state-of-the-art, geo-diverse facilities. 
 Tether Data: Fueling breakthroughs in AI and peer-to-peer technology, we reduce infrastructure costs and enhance global communications with cutting-edge solutions like KEET , our flagship app that redefines secure and private data sharing. 
 Tether Education : Democratizing access to top-tier digital learning, we empower individuals to thrive in the digital and gig economies, driving global growth and opportunity. 
 Tether Evolution : At the intersection of technology and human potential, we are pushing the boundaries of what is possible, crafting a future where innovation and human capabilities merge in powerful, unprecedented ways. 
 
 Why Join Us? 
 Our team is a global talent powerhouse, working remotely from every corner of the world. If you’re passionate about making a mark in the fintech space, this is your opportunity to collaborate with some of the brightest minds, pushing boundaries and setting new standards. We’ve grown fast, stayed lean, and secured our place as a leader in the industry. 
 If you have excellent English communication skills and are ready to contribute to the most innovative platform on the planet, Tether is the place for you. 
 Are you ready to be part of the future? 
 
 About the job 
 In this pivotal role, you will leverage your expertise to build robust, scalable, and secure backend solutions that contribute to Tether’s mission of pioneering a decentralized future in digital finance. This is an opportunity to take on formidable challenges and make a significant impact on our cutting-edge, global platform. 
 
 Responsibilities 
 
• Innovative Solutions: Contribute to the creation of groundbreaking projects, utilizing agile methodologies and innovative technologies to create incredible platforms. 

• Scalability: Ensure backend services remain effortlessly responsive and real-time, accommodating the platform's continual growth and evolving user base. 

• Security: Uphold the highest security standards in all backend processes and services to safeguard our users' assets and data. 

 
 
• Node/JavaScript Expertise: Very proficient in Node.js and JavaScript programming. 

• Microservices Architecture: Familiarity with microservices architecture for scalable applications. 

• Complex Platform Development: Experience in actively developing complex platforms. 

• Peer-to-Peer Technologies: Understanding of Peer-to-Peer technologies. 

• Database Interaction: Proficiency in interacting with databases such as MySQL and MongoDB. 

• Quick Learner: Ability to quickly adapt and learn new technologies. 

• Security Awareness: Strong understanding and experience implementing best security practices. 

 
 
 Important information for candidates 
Recruitment scams have become increasingly common. To protect yourself, please keep the following in mind when applying for roles:
 
• Apply only through our official channels. We do not use third-party platforms or agencies for recruitment unless clearly stated. All open roles are listed on our official careers page: https://tether.recruitee.com/

• Verify the recruiter’s identity. All our recruiters have verified LinkedIn profiles. If you’re unsure, you can confirm their identity by checking their profile or contacting us through our website.

• Be cautious of unusual communication methods. We do not conduct interviews over WhatsApp, Telegram, or SMS. All communication is done through official company emails and platforms.

• Double-check email addresses. All communication from us will come from emails ending in @ tether.to or @ tether.io 

• We will never request payment or financial details. If someone asks for personal financial information or payment at any point during the hiring process, it is a scam. Please report it immediately.

 When in doubt, feel free to reach out through our official website.

descriptionByLocale.it:
Partecipa a Tether e Scegli di Formare il Futuro della Finanza Digitale A Tether, non stiamo solo considerando i prodotti, stiamo rivoluzionando il futuro della finanza digitale a livello globale. Le nostre soluzioni all'avanguardia consentono alle aziende - dalle borse e dalle portafogli ai processori di pagamento e alle macchine per il denaro - di integrare in modo trasparente i token garantiti da riserve su blockchain. Sfruttando il potere della tecnologia blockchain, Tether consente di memorizzare, inviare e ricevere token digitali istantaneamente, in modo sicuro e globale, a un costo un inferiore del 10%. ## Innovare con Tether Tether Finance: La nostra innovazione suite di prodotti comprende la più attendibile stablecoin al mondo, USDT, utilizzata da centinaia di milioni di persone in tutto il mondo, insieme ai servizi di tokenizzazione di asset digitali pionieristici. Ma questo è solo l'inizio: Tether Power: La nostra soluzione per il potenziamento sostenibile l'eccesso di potenza per il mining del Bitcoin utilizzando pratiche ecocompatibili in strutture di ultima generazione e geo-diverse. Tether Data: Le nostre soluzioni di ultima generazione ho costi di infrastruttura e migliorano le comunicazioni globali con tecnologie avanzate come KEET, il nostro app di punta che ridefinisce la condivisione di dati sicuri e privati. Tether Education: La democratizzazione dell'accesso all'apprendimento digitale di alto livello consente alle persone di prosperare nelle economie digitali e di gig, promuovendo la crescita e l'opportunità globali. Tether Evolution: Al confini tra tecnologia e potenziale umano, stiamo spingendo i limiti di ciò che è possibile, creando un futuro in cui l'innovazione e le capacità umane si fondono in modi potenzi e inediti. # Perché Unirti a Noi? Il nostro team è una potenza di talento globale, che lavora a distanza da ogni angolo del mondo. Se sei appassionato di lasciare un segno nel settore fintech, questo è il tuo per collaborare con alcuni dei cervelli più brillanti, spingendo i limiti endo stabili nuovi standard. Abbiamo cresciuto rapidamente, tenuto la nostra struttura snella e deriva il nostro posto come leader nel settore. Se hai eccellenti abilità di comunicazione in inglese e sei pronto a contribuire al più innovativo piattaforma del pianeta, Tether è il posto per te. Sei pronto a essere parte del futuro? ## Descrizione del lavoro In questo ruolo fondamentale, impiegaerai le tue competenze per costruire soluzioni backend robuste, scalabili e sicure che servono alla missione di Tether di rivoluzionare il futuro della finanza digitale. ## Mansioni - Creare progetti innovativi, utilizzando metodi agili e tecnologie innovative per creare piattaforme incredibili. - Assicurare che i servizi backend restano facilmente rispondenti e in tempo reale, adattandosi alla crescita continua e all'evoluzione della piattaforma e del suo utente. - Mantenere gli standard di sicurezza più alti in tutti i processi e i servizi backend per proteggere i beni e i dati degli utenti. ##
• Requisiti - Esperto di Node.js e JavaScript. - Familiarità con l'architettura dei microservizi per applicazioni scalabili. - Esperienza nell'attiva sviluppo di piattaforme complesse. - Capacità di interagire con database come MySQL e MongoDB. - Capacità di adattarsi e imparare rapidamente nuove tecnologie. - Consapevolezza e esperienza nell'implementazione delle migliori pratiche di sicurezza. # Cosa# offrendo - Opportunità di lavorare con un team di talento globale. - Ambiente di lavoro innovativo e dinamico. - Possibilità di contribuire a progetti innovativi e di impatto. - Opportunità di crescita e sviluppo professionale. ## Contatto Per ulteriori informazioni o per candidarti, visita il nostro sito web ufficiale: https://tether.recruitee.com/ Attenzione: i reclutatori falsi sono sempre più comuni. Per proteggersi, ricorda di: - Candidarti solo attraverso i nostri canali ufficiali. - Verifica l'identità del reclutatore. Tutti i nostri reclutatori hanno profili LinkedIn verificati. Se sei incerto, puoi confermare la loro identità controllando il loro profilo o contattandoci attraverso il nostro sito web. - Essere cauti con i metodi di comunicazione insoliti. Non favoramo interviste su WhatsApp, Telegram o SMS. Tutta la comunicazione avviene attraverso email ufficiali e piattaforme. - Controllare gli indirizzi. Tutta la comunicazione da parte nostra proviene da email che terminano con @tether.to o @tether. io - Non fornire mai informazioni finanziarie personali o pagamenti. Se qualcuno chiede informazioni finanziarie personali o pagamenti in qualsiasi momento durante il processo di assunzione, è uno schermo. Segnala immediatamente. Se hai doppia, non esitare a contattarci attraverso il nostro sito web ufficiale.

jobs.title: Senior Frontend Developer (100% remote)
jobs.description:
Join Tether and Shape the Future of Digital Finance 
 At Tether, we’re not just building products, we’re pioneering a global financial revolution. Our cutting-edge solutions empower businesses—from exchanges and wallets to payment processors and ATMs—to seamlessly integrate reserve-backed tokens across blockchains. By harnessing the power of blockchain technology, Tether enables you to store, send, and receive digital tokens instantly, securely, and globally, all at a fraction of the cost. Transparency is the bedrock of everything we do, ensuring trust in every transaction. 
 
 Innovate with Tether 
 Tether Finance: Our innovative product suite features the world’s most trusted stablecoin, USDT , relied upon by hundreds of millions worldwide, alongside pioneering digital asset tokenization services. 
 But that’s just the beginning: 
 Tether Power: Driving sustainable growth, our energy solutions optimize excess power for Bitcoin mining using eco-friendly practices in state-of-the-art, geo-diverse facilities. 
 Tether Data: Fueling breakthroughs in AI and peer-to-peer technology, we reduce infrastructure costs and enhance global communications with cutting-edge solutions like KEET , our flagship app that redefines secure and private data sharing. 
 Tether Education : Democratizing access to top-tier digital learning, we empower individuals to thrive in the digital and gig economies, driving global growth and opportunity. 
 Tether Evolution : At the intersection of technology and human potential, we are pushing the boundaries of what is possible, crafting a future where innovation and human capabilities merge in powerful, unprecedented ways. 
 
 Why Join Us? 
 Our team is a global talent powerhouse, working remotely from every corner of the world. If you’re passionate about making a mark in the fintech space, this is your opportunity to collaborate with some of the brightest minds, pushing boundaries and setting new standards. We’ve grown fast, stayed lean, and secured our place as a leader in the industry. 
 If you have excellent English communication skills and are ready to contribute to the most innovative platform on the planet, Tether is the place for you. 
 Are you ready to be part of the future? 
 
 About the job 
 As a senior Frontend Developer, you will be a part of the team that works on the development and maintenance of the frontend components of multiple applications related to the platform. This includes: 
 
• New Products and Features - Tether continuously strives to create innovative new features in order to provide the most professional experience for customers. These are developed and deployed using agile methodologies, to ensure the user experience remains the best in the industry. 

• Performance - all ui components that power Tether platform must remain effortlessly smooth, responsive, and real-time for customers as the platform continues to scale to accommodate new user growth. 

• Security - Tether makes Security its most important feature. The Frontend Development team is responsible for building all the interactions with API services with the highest security principles and standard, in order to protect the safety of the entire user base. 

 
 
 Responsibilities 
 Collaborate with the team to work on the development of the Bitfinex KYC webapps. Including: 
 
• New Features: Create innovative new features in order to provide the most professional KYC experience for customers and compliance officers. These are developed and deployed using agile methodologies. 

• Scalability: The web application must remain effortlessly smooth, responsive, and real-time for customers as the platform continues to scale to accommodate new user growth. 

• Design: Build beautiful reactive applications and trading tools. 

• Domain knowledge: willing to learn the domain-related logic and condition-based logic, including the one based on difference between multiple users scenarios and combinations of factors 

• Debugging: Being able to debug hidden/hard to find issues when needed, advanced usage of browser debugging tools, including network, source, stop points etc. 

 

 
• With 5+ years of proven experience in software development, with a strong focus on Frontend. 

• Knowledgeable and experienced with micro-service architecture. 

• Comfortable with high-availability concepts. 

• Highly proficient in JavaScript and ES6+. 

• Thoroughly experienced with React, SASS, Redux, build tools and the core principles surrounding these. 

• Some backend experience to be able to run the app locally via NodeJS, with MongoDB, configuring ports and local environment 

• Familiar with modern front-end pipelines and tools. 

• Experienced with RESTful and RPC-based APIs. 

• Interest in bringing diverse, innovative applications to life. 

• Interest in modernising and optimising different web applications. 

 
 
 
 Important information for candidates 
Recruitment scams have become increasingly common. To protect yourself, please keep the following in mind when applying for roles:
 
• Apply only through our official channels. We do not use third-party platforms or agencies for recruitment unless clearly stated. All open roles are listed on our official careers page: https://tether.recruitee.com/

• Verify the recruiter’s identity. All our recruiters have verified LinkedIn profiles. If you’re unsure, you can confirm their identity by checking their profile or contacting us through our website.

• Be cautious of unusual communication methods. We do not conduct interviews over WhatsApp, Telegram, or SMS. All communication is done through official company emails and platforms.

• Double-check email addresses. All communication from us will come from emails ending in @ tether.to or @ tether.io 

• We will never request payment or financial details. If someone asks for personal financial information or payment at any point during the hiring process, it is a scam. Please report it immediately.

 When in doubt, feel free to reach out through our official website.

Tether Evolution : At the intersection of technology and human potential, we are pushing the boundaries of what is possible, crafting a future where innovation and human capabilities merge in powerful, unprecedented ways. Why Join Us? Our team is a global talent powerhouse, working remotely from every corner of the world. If you’re passionate about making a mark in the fintech space, this is your opportunity to collaborate with some of the brightest minds, pushing boundaries and setting new standards. We’ve grown fast, stayed lean, and secured our place as a leader in the industry. If you have excellent English communication skills and are ready to contribute to the most innovative platform on the planet, Tether is the place for you. Are you ready to be part of the future? About the job As a senior Frontend Developer, you will be a part of the team that works on the development and maintenance of the frontend components of multiple applications related to the platform. This includes:
• New Products and Features - Tether continuously strives to create innovative new features in order to provide the most professional experience for customers. These are developed and deployed using agile methodologies, to ensure the user experience remains the best in the industry.
• Performance - all ui components that power Tether platform must remain effortlessly smooth, responsive, and real-time for customers as the platform continues to scale to accommodate new user growth.
• Security - Tether makes Security its most important feature. The Frontend Development team is responsible for building all the interactions with API services with the highest security principles and standard, in order to protect the safety of the entire user base. Responsibilities Collaborate with the team to work on the development of the Bitfinex KYC webapps. Including:
• New Features: Create innovative new features in order to provide the most professional KYC experience for customers and compliance officers. These are developed and deployed using agile methodologies.
• Scalability: The web application must remain effortlessly smooth, responsive, and real-time for customers as the platform continues to scale to accommodate new user growth.
• Design: Build beautiful reactive applications and trading tools.
• Domain knowledge: willing to learn the domain-related logic and condition-based logic, including the one based on difference between multiple users scenarios and combinations of factors
• Debugging: Being able to debug hidden/hard to find issues when needed, advanced usage of browser debugging tools, including network, source, stop points etc.
• With 5+ years of proven experience in software development, with a strong focus on Frontend.
• Knowledgeable and experienced with micro-service architecture.
• Comfortable with high-availability concepts.
• Highly proficient in JavaScript and ES6+.
• Thoroughly experienced with React, SASS, Redux, build tools and the core principles surrounding these.
• Some backend experience to be able to run the app locally via NodeJS, with MongoDB, configuring ports and local environment
• Familiar with modern front-end pipelines and tools.
• Experienced with RESTful and RPC-based APIs.
• Interest in bringing diverse, innovative applications to life.
• Interest in modernising and optimising different web applications. Important information for candidates Recruitment scams have become increasingly common. To protect yourself, please keep the following in mind when applying for roles:
• Apply only through our official channels. We do not use third-party platforms or agencies for recruitment unless clearly stated. All open roles are listed on our official careers page: https://tether.recruitee.com/
• Verify the recruiter’s identity. All our recruiters have verified LinkedIn profiles. If you’re unsure, you can confirm their identity by checking their profile or contacting us through our website.
• Be cautious of unusual communication methods. We do not conduct interviews over WhatsApp, Telegram, or SMS. All communication is done through official company emails and platforms.
• Double-check email addresses. All communication from us will come from emails ending in @ tether.to or @ tether.io
• We will never request payment or financial details. If someone asks for personal financial information or payment at any point during the hiring process, it is a scam. Please report it immediately. When in doubt, feel free to reach out through our official website.

jobs.title: Head of Regulatory Affairs and Licensing - Middle East

titleByLocale.it: Responsabile Regulatory Affairs and Licensing - Middle East

titleByLocale.de: Leiter Regulatory Affairs and Licensing - Middle East
titleByLocale.fr: Responsable Regulatory Affairs and Licensing - Middle East

jobs.description:
Join Tether and Shape the Future of Digital Finance 
 At Tether, we’re not just building products, we’re pioneering a global financial revolution. Our cutting-edge solutions empower businesses—from exchanges and wallets to payment processors and ATMs—to seamlessly integrate reserve-backed tokens across blockchains. By harnessing the power of blockchain technology, Tether enables you to store, send, and receive digital tokens instantly, securely, and globally, all at a fraction of the cost. Transparency is the bedrock of everything we do, ensuring trust in every transaction. 
 
 Innovate with Tether 
 Tether Finance: Our innovative product suite features the world’s most trusted stablecoin, USDT , relied upon by hundreds of millions worldwide, alongside pioneering digital asset tokenization services. 
 But that’s just the beginning: 
 Tether Power: Driving sustainable growth, our energy solutions optimize excess power for Bitcoin mining using eco-friendly practices in state-of-the-art, geo-diverse facilities. 
 Tether Data: Fueling breakthroughs in AI and peer-to-peer technology, we reduce infrastructure costs and enhance global communications with cutting-edge solutions like KEET , our flagship app that redefines secure and private data sharing. 
 Tether Education : Democratizing access to top-tier digital learning, we empower individuals to thrive in the digital and gig economies, driving global growth and opportunity. 
 Tether Evolution : At the intersection of technology and human potential, we are pushing the boundaries of what is possible, crafting a future where innovation and human capabilities merge in powerful, unprecedented ways. 
 
 Why Join Us? 
 Our team is a global talent powerhouse, working remotely from every corner of the world. If you’re passionate about making a mark in the fintech space, this is your opportunity to collaborate with some of the brightest minds, pushing boundaries and setting new standards. We’ve grown fast, stayed lean, and secured our place as a leader in the industry. 
 If you have excellent English communication skills and are ready to contribute to the most innovative platform on the planet, Tether is the place for you. 
 Are you ready to be part of the future? 
 
 About the job 
 Tether and its affiliated entities (e.g. Bitfinex) are searching for an organized self-starter to join our Regulatory and Licensing team, to lead efforts in the Middle East. The successful candidate is someone with an understanding of the regulatory environment pertaining to the crypto-asset industry / stablecoin industry in the Middle East, and who is excited by the opportunity to apply their existing legal and / or regulatory experience in an exciting and dynamic business environment. 
 To succeed in this role, the incumbent will continuously strive to self-develop and enhance their skill sets including understanding the Company’s products and services, blockchain technology, and regulatory requirements. 
 You will have a focus around working with regulators to translate policy objectives of the companies into favourable regulatory requirements in the region, as part of enabling the broader business strategy across Tether’s business verticals. 
 The successful candidate should be comfortable managing relationships and communications between various stakeholders both internal and external to the business, including regulators and policy setters, as well as working with cross-functional teams such as Operations, Finance, Technology, Business Development. 
 You will report to the Vice President of the Regulatory and Licensing division, and work alongside project managers and members of the wider business to execute on regulatory affairs initiatives. 
 
 Responsibilities: 
 Regulatory Affairs 
 
• Monitor regulatory developments impacting Tether and affiliates companies in the region. 

• Maintain active relationships with policymakers, regulators, central banks, and financial intelligence units. 

• Represent the company in consultations, workshops, industry roundtables, and regulatory dialogues. 

• Prepare briefing papers, comment letters, and policy submissions aligned with broader global regulatory strategy. 

• Identify and successfully realise opportunities to shape emerging frameworks in a risk-sensitive, innovation-oriented manner. 

 Licensing & Authorisations 
 
• Conduct structured assessments on whether licensing/registration is required for operations in the region. 

• Working with your team and local advisor, you will be responsible for successfully obtaining regulatory authorisations in the region, where required. 

 Strategy & Cross-Functional Collaboration 
 
• Support enterprise-level planning for new products or expansions in the region, advising on regulatory constraints and enablers to the Company’s leadership. 

• Contribute to internal reporting and executive briefings on policy risks and regulatory trajectory regionally. 

 

 
• Minimum of 8 years governmental affairs / regulatory affairs / legal experience ideally within the financial services or crypto-asset industry in the Middle East. 

• Proven ability in successfully leading regulatory affairs teams within either the financial services industry, or the digital asset industry. 

• Demonstrated experience working with regulators and government bodies advocating and advising in a regulatory capacity, with demonstrated achievements securing favourable policy positions on behalf of another organisation. 

• Excellent written and verbal communication skills, with the ability to synthesise complex regulatory topics for non-technical audiences. 

• Proven ability to manage multiple stakeholders across borders and time zones. 

• Communication: Exceptional communication skills, both written and verbal, with experience in public speaking and representing companies in regulatory discussions. 

• Must be a strong team player, and willing to be fully engaged with key stakeholders both in our company but also with our partners. Must be a hands-on professional capable of working collaboratively and independently. 

 
 
 
 Important information for candidates 
Recruitment scams have become increasingly common. To protect yourself, please keep the following in mind when applying for roles:
 
• Apply only through our official channels. We do not use third-party platforms or agencies for recruitment unless clearly stated. All open roles are listed on our official careers page: https://tether.recruitee.com/

• Verify the recruiter’s identity. All our recruiters have verified LinkedIn profiles. If you’re unsure, you can confirm their identity by checking their profile or contacting us through our website.

• Be cautious of unusual communication methods. We do not conduct interviews over WhatsApp, Telegram, or SMS. All communication is done through official company emails and platforms.

• Double-check email addresses. All communication from us will come from emails ending in @ tether.to or @ tether.io 

• We will never request payment or financial details. If someone asks for personal financial information or payment at any point during the hiring process, it is a scam. Please report it immediately.

 When in doubt, feel free to reach out through our official website.

About the job Tether and its affiliated entities (e.g. Bitfinex) are searching for an organized self-starter to join our Regulatory and Licensing team, to lead efforts in the Middle East. The successful candidate is someone with an understanding of the regulatory environment pertaining to the crypto-asset industry / stablecoin industry in the Middle East, and who is excited by the opportunity to apply their existing legal and / or regulatory experience in an exciting and dynamic business environment. To succeed in this role, the incumbent will continuously strive to self-develop and enhance their skill sets including understanding the Company’s products and services, blockchain technology, and regulatory requirements. You will have a focus around working with regulators to translate policy objectives of the companies into favourable regulatory requirements in the region, as part of enabling the broader business strategy across Tether’s business verticals. The successful candidate should be comfortable managing relationships and communications between various stakeholders both internal and external to the business, including regulators and policy setters, as well as working with cross-functional teams such as Operations, Finance, Technology, Business Development. You will report to the Vice President of the Regulatory and Licensing division, and work alongside project managers and members of the wider business to execute on regulatory affairs initiatives. Responsibilities: Regulatory Affairs
• Monitor regulatory developments impacting Tether and affiliates companies in the region.
• Maintain active relationships with policymakers, regulators, central banks, and financial intelligence units.
• Represent the company in consultations, workshops, industry roundtables, and regulatory dialogues.
• Prepare briefing papers, comment letters, and policy submissions aligned with broader global regulatory strategy.
• Identify and successfully realise opportunities to shape emerging frameworks in a risk-sensitive, innovation-oriented manner. Licensing & Authorisations
• Conduct structured assessments on whether licensing/registration is required for operations in the region.
• Working with your team and local advisor, you will be responsible for successfully obtaining regulatory authorisations in the region, where required. Strategy & Cross-Functional Collaboration
• Support enterprise-level planning for new products or expansions in the region, advising on regulatory constraints and enablers to the Company’s leadership.
• Contribute to internal reporting and executive briefings on policy risks and regulatory trajectory regionally.
• Minimum of 8 years governmental affairs / regulatory affairs / legal experience ideally within the financial services or crypto-asset industry in the Middle East.
• Proven ability in successfully leading regulatory affairs teams within either the financial services industry, or the digital asset industry.
• Demonstrated experience working with regulators and government bodies advocating and advising in a regulatory capacity, with demonstrated achievements securing favourable policy positions on behalf of another organisation.
• Excellent written and verbal communication skills, with the ability to synthesise complex regulatory topics for non-technical audiences.
• Proven ability to manage multiple stakeholders across borders and time zones.
• Communication: Exceptional communication skills, both written and verbal, with experience in public speaking and representing companies in regulatory discussions.
• Must be a strong team player, and willing to be fully engaged with key stakeholders both in our company but also with our partners. Must be a hands-on professional capable of working collaboratively and independently. Important information for candidates Recruitment scams have become increasingly common. To protect yourself, please keep the following in mind when applying for roles:
• Apply only through our official channels. We do not use third-party platforms or agencies for recruitment unless clearly stated. All open roles are listed on our official careers page: https://tether.recruitee.com/
• Verify the recruiter’s identity. All our recruiters have verified LinkedIn profiles. If you’re unsure, you can confirm their identity by checking their profile or contacting us through our website.
• Be cautious of unusual communication methods. We do not conduct interviews over WhatsApp, Telegram, or SMS. All communication is done through official company emails and platforms.
• Double-check email addresses. All communication from us will come from emails ending in @ tether.to or @ tether.io
• We will never request payment or financial details. If someone asks for personal financial information or payment at any point during the hiring process, it is a scam. Please report it immediately. When in doubt, feel free to reach out through our official website.

jobs.title: Head of Licensing and Regulatory Authorisations

titleByLocale.en: Head of Licensing and Regulatory Authorisations

jobs.description:
Join Tether and Shape the Future of Digital Finance 
 At Tether, we’re not just building products, we’re pioneering a global financial revolution. Our cutting-edge solutions empower businesses—from exchanges and wallets to payment processors and ATMs—to seamlessly integrate reserve-backed tokens across blockchains. By harnessing the power of blockchain technology, Tether enables you to store, send, and receive digital tokens instantly, securely, and globally, all at a fraction of the cost. Transparency is the bedrock of everything we do, ensuring trust in every transaction. 
 
 Innovate with Tether 
 Tether Finance: Our innovative product suite features the world’s most trusted stablecoin, USDT , relied upon by hundreds of millions worldwide, alongside pioneering digital asset tokenization services. 
 But that’s just the beginning: 
 Tether Power: Driving sustainable growth, our energy solutions optimize excess power for Bitcoin mining using eco-friendly practices in state-of-the-art, geo-diverse facilities. 
 Tether Data: Fueling breakthroughs in AI and peer-to-peer technology, we reduce infrastructure costs and enhance global communications with cutting-edge solutions like KEET , our flagship app that redefines secure and private data sharing. 
 Tether Education : Democratizing access to top-tier digital learning, we empower individuals to thrive in the digital and gig economies, driving global growth and opportunity. 
 Tether Evolution : At the intersection of technology and human potential, we are pushing the boundaries of what is possible, crafting a future where innovation and human capabilities merge in powerful, unprecedented ways. 
 
 Why Join Us? 
 Our team is a global talent powerhouse, working remotely from every corner of the world. If you’re passionate about making a mark in the fintech space, this is your opportunity to collaborate with some of the brightest minds, pushing boundaries and setting new standards. We’ve grown fast, stayed lean, and secured our place as a leader in the industry. 
 If you have excellent English communication skills and are ready to contribute to the most innovative platform on the planet, Tether is the place for you. 
 Are you ready to be part of the future? 
 
 About the job 
 Tether and its affiliated entities (e.g. Bitfinex) are searching for an organized self-starter to join our Regulatory and Licensing team as Head of Licensing and Regulatory Authorisations. The successful candidate is someone with an understanding of the regulatory environment pertaining to the digital-asset industry / stablecoin industry, and who is excited by the opportunity to apply their existing legal and / or regulatory experience in an exciting and dynamic business environment. 
 The Head of Licensing and Regulatory Authorisations will lead the development and execution of our global authorisations strategy across key jurisdictions, working through a geographically distributed team of regional regulatory affairs and licensing teams. This role is responsible for securing and maintaining regulatory approvals required for the company’s operations, ensuring alignment with shifting regulatory landscapes, and enabling sustainable market expansion. 
 As a senior leader within the Regulatory Affairs & Licensing function, you will collaborate closely with regional licensing personnel, legal, compliance, product, and executive leadership to drive licensing initiatives end-to-end—from early regulatory assessments and submissions through to supervisory engagement and operational readiness. The ideal candidate brings deep multi-jurisdictional licensing expertise, exceptional stakeholder management skills, and the ability to coordinate across regions in a cohesive, consistent manner. 
 You will report to the Vice President of the Regulatory Affairs and Licensing division, and work alongside project managers and members of the wider business to execute on regulatory and licensing initiatives. 
 
 Responsibilities 
 Licensing Strategy & Execution 
 
• Design and implement a unified global licensing strategy, ensuring consistency across regional approaches. 

• Work closely with regional licensing personnel to assess regulatory pathways, evaluate market feasibility, and prioritise jurisdictions. 

• Oversee and guide the preparation, submission, and management of licensing applications and / or other regulatory authorisation processes, in collaboration with regional teams. 

• Ensure alignment between regional licensing efforts and global business priorities. 

 Regional Coordination & Stakeholder Management 
 
• Serve as the central point of coordination for licensing and regulatory authorisation activity across all regions, ensuring standards, documentation, and approaches remain cohesive. 

• Provide direct support, guidance, and escalation oversight to regional licensing personnel. 

• Align regulatory authorisation efforts with regulatory affairs leads to coordinate regulatory engagement strategies across regions. 

 Regulatory Engagement 
 
• Act as a senior representative in regulatory engagements where global coordination or executive-level involvement is required. 

• Support regional teams in interactions with local regulators, offering strategic guidance and ensuring consistent messaging. 

 Operational Readiness & Governance 
 
• Coordinate with regional teams to ensure their understanding around local regulatory requirements such that they are prepared to meet jurisdictional authorisation obligations, where needed and / or desired, including governance, capital, operational, and reporting requirements. 

• Maintain global oversight of regulatory authorisation conditions, ensuring local compliance is consistent with global policies and standards. 

• Lead responses to cross-regional regulatory queries or supervisory reviews related to authorisation activities. 

 Market Expansion & Risk Analysis 
 
• Work with regional personnel to conduct regulatory feasibility assessments for new markets and product expansions. 

• Provide strategic recommendations to executive leadership on prioritisation of authorisation efforts and regulatory risk. 

 Team Leadership 
 
• Lead and mentor the global regulatory and licensing team, including regional leads and supporting personnel. 

• Build capability, consistency, and knowledge-sharing across regions to strengthen the company’s global licensing and authorisations function. 

• Promote a culture of regulatory excellence, transparency, and disciplined execution. 

 
 

 Experience & Expertise 
 
• 10+ years of experience in regulatory licensing and authorisations, regulatory affairs, compliance, or related fields (financial services, payments, fintech, crypto, or technology). 

• Proven experience managing complex regulatory authorisation processes across multiple regions or markets. 

• Strong understanding of diverse regulatory frameworks and supervisory expectations globally. 

• Experience working within or leading a regional or matrixed team structure is highly preferred. 

 Skills & Competencies 
 
• Exceptional cross-regional coordination and stakeholder engagement skills. 

• Strong project management capabilities and ability to manage complex, multi-jurisdictional workstreams. 

• Excellent written and verbal communication, able to synthesise regional inputs into a coherent global strategy. 

• Strategic thinker with strong execution discipline. 

• Ability to build trust and credibility with regulators and internal leadership. 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Important information for candidates 
Recruitment scams have become increasingly common. To protect yourself, please keep the following in mind when applying for roles:
 
• Apply only through our official channels. We do not use third-party platforms or agencies for recruitment unless clearly stated. All open roles are listed on our official careers page: https://tether.recruitee.com/

• Verify the recruiter’s identity. All our recruiters have verified LinkedIn profiles. If you’re unsure, you can confirm their identity by checking their profile or contacting us through our website.

• Be cautious of unusual communication methods. We do not conduct interviews over WhatsApp, Telegram, or SMS. All communication is done through official company emails and platforms.

• Double-check email addresses. All communication from us will come from emails ending in @ tether.to or @ tether.io 

• We will never request payment or financial details. If someone asks for personal financial information or payment at any point during the hiring process, it is a scam. Please report it immediately.

 When in doubt, feel free to reach out through our official website.
