• Support regional teams in interactions with local regulators, offering strategic guidance and ensuring consistent messaging. Operational Readiness & Governance
• Coordinate with regional teams to ensure their understanding around local regulatory requirements such that they are prepared to meet jurisdictional authorisation obligations, where needed and / or desired, including governance, capital, operational, and reporting requirements.
• Maintain global oversight of regulatory authorisation conditions, ensuring local compliance is consistent with global policies and standards.
• Lead responses to cross-regional regulatory queries or supervisory reviews related to authorisation activities. Market Expansion & Risk Analysis
• Work with regional personnel to conduct regulatory feasibility assessments for new markets and product expansions.
• Provide strategic recommendations to executive leadership on prioritisation of authorisation efforts and regulatory risk. Team Leadership
• Lead and mentor the global regulatory and licensing team, including regional leads and supporting personnel.
• Build capability, consistency, and knowledge-sharing across regions to strengthen the company’s global licensing and authorisations function.
• Promote a culture of regulatory excellence, transparency, and disciplined execution. Experience & Expertise
• 10+ years of experience in regulatory licensing and authorisations, regulatory affairs, compliance, or related fields (financial services, payments, fintech, crypto, or technology).
• Proven experience managing complex regulatory authorisation processes across multiple regions or markets.
• Strong understanding of diverse regulatory frameworks and supervisory expectations globally.
• Experience working within or leading a regional or matrixed team structure is highly preferred. Skills & Competencies
• Exceptional cross-regional coordination and stakeholder engagement skills.
• Strong project management capabilities and ability to manage complex, multi-jurisdictional workstreams.
• Excellent written and verbal communication, able to synthesise regional inputs into a coherent global strategy.
• Strategic thinker with strong execution discipline.
• Ability to build trust and credibility with regulators and internal leadership. Important information for candidates Recruitment scams have become increasingly common. To protect yourself, please keep the following in mind when applying for roles:
• Apply only through our official channels. We do not use third-party platforms or agencies for recruitment unless clearly stated. All open roles are listed on our official careers page: https://tether.recruitee.com/
• Verify the recruiter’s identity. All our recruiters have verified LinkedIn profiles. If you’re unsure, you can confirm their identity by checking their profile or contacting us through our website.
• Be cautious of unusual communication methods. We do not conduct interviews over WhatsApp, Telegram, or SMS. All communication is done through official company emails and platforms.
• Double-check email addresses. All communication from us will come from emails ending in @ tether.to or @ tether.io
• We will never request payment or financial details. If someone asks for personal financial information or payment at any point during the hiring process, it is a scam. Please report it immediately. When in doubt, feel free to reach out through our official website.
descriptionByLocale.de:
Join Tether and Shape the Future of Digital Finance At Tether, we’re not just building products, we’re pioneering a global financial revolution. Our cutting-edge solutions empower businesses—from exchanges and wallets to payment processors and ATMs—to seamlessly integrate reserve-backed tokens across blockchains. By harnessing the power of blockchain technology, Tether enables you to store, send, and receive digital tokens instantly, securely, and globally, all at a fraction of the cost. Transparency is the bedrock of everything we do, ensuring trust in every transaction. Innovate with Tether Tether Finance: Our innovative product suite features the world’s most trusted stablecoin, USDT , relied upon by hundreds of millions worldwide, alongside pioneering digital asset tokenization services. But that’s just the beginning: Tether Power: Driving sustainable growth, our energy solutions optimize excess power for Bitcoin mining using eco-friendly practices in state-of-the-art, geo-diverse facilities. Tether Data: Fueling breakthroughs in AI and peer-to-peer technology, we reduce infrastructure costs and enhance global communications with cutting-edge solutions like KEET , our flagship app that redefines secure and private data sharing. Tether Education : Democratizing access to top-tier digital learning, we empower individuals to thrive in the digital and gig economies, driving global growth and opportunity. Tether Evolution : At the intersection of technology and human potential, we are pushing the boundaries of what is possible, crafting a future where innovation and human capabilities merge in powerful, unprecedented ways. Why Join Us? Our team is a global talent powerhouse, working remotely from every corner of the world. If you’re passionate about making a mark in the fintech space, this is your opportunity to collaborate with some of the brightest minds, pushing boundaries and setting new standards. We’ve grown fast, stayed lean, and secured our place as a leader in the industry. If you have excellent English communication skills and are ready to contribute to the most innovative platform on the planet, Tether is the place for you. Are you ready to be part of the future? About the job Tether and its affiliated entities (e.g. Bitfinex) are searching for an organized self-starter to join our Regulatory and Licensing team as Head of Licensing and Regulatory Authorisations. The successful candidate is someone with an understanding of the regulatory environment pertaining to the digital-asset industry / stablecoin industry, and who is excited by the opportunity to apply their existing legal and / or regulatory experience in an exciting and dynamic business environment. The Head of Licensing and Regulatory Authorisations will lead the development and execution of our global authorisations strategy across key jurisdictions, working through a geographically distributed team of regional regulatory affairs and licensing teams. This role is responsible for securing and maintaining regulatory approvals required for the company’s operations, ensuring alignment with shifting regulatory landscapes, and enabling sustainable market expansion. As a senior leader within the Regulatory Affairs & Licensing function, you will collaborate closely with regional licensing personnel, legal, compliance, product, and executive leadership to drive licensing initiatives end-to-end—from early regulatory assessments and submissions through to supervisory engagement and operational readiness. The ideal candidate brings deep multi-jurisdictional licensing expertise, exceptional stakeholder management skills, and the ability to coordinate across regions in a cohesive, consistent manner. You will report to the Vice President of the Regulatory Affairs and Licensing division, and work alongside project managers and members of the wider business to execute on regulatory and licensing initiatives. Responsibilities Licensing Strategy & Execution
• Design and implement a unified global licensing strategy, ensuring consistency across regional approaches.
• Work closely with regional licensing personnel to assess regulatory pathways, evaluate market feasibility, and prioritise jurisdictions.
• Oversee and guide the preparation, submission, and management of licensing applications and / or other regulatory authorisation processes, in collaboration with regional teams.
• Ensure alignment between regional licensing efforts and global business priorities. Regional Coordination & Stakeholder Management
• Serve as the central point of coordination for licensing and regulatory authorisation activity across all regions, ensuring standards, documentation, and approaches remain cohesive.
• Provide direct support, guidance, and escalation oversight to regional licensing personnel.
• Align regulatory authorisation efforts with regulatory affairs leads to coordinate regulatory engagement strategies across regions. Regulatory Engagement
• Act as a senior representative in regulatory engagements where global coordination or executive-level involvement is required.
• Support regional teams in interactions with local regulators, offering strategic guidance and ensuring consistent messaging. Operational Readiness & Governance
• Coordinate with regional teams to ensure their understanding around local regulatory requirements such that they are prepared to meet jurisdictional authorisation obligations, where needed and / or desired, including governance, capital, operational, and reporting requirements.
• Maintain global oversight of regulatory authorisation conditions, ensuring local compliance is consistent with global policies and standards.
• Lead responses to cross-regional regulatory queries or supervisory reviews related to authorisation activities. Market Expansion & Risk Analysis
• Work with regional personnel to conduct regulatory feasibility assessments for new markets and product expansions.
• Provide strategic recommendations to executive leadership on prioritisation of authorisation efforts and regulatory risk. Team Leadership
• Lead and mentor the global regulatory and licensing team, including regional leads and supporting personnel.
• Build capability, consistency, and knowledge-sharing across regions to strengthen the company’s global licensing and authorisations function.
• Promote a culture of regulatory excellence, transparency, and disciplined execution. Experience & Expertise
• 10+ years of experience in regulatory licensing and authorisations, regulatory affairs, compliance, or related fields (financial services, payments, fintech, crypto, or technology).
• Proven experience managing complex regulatory authorisation processes across multiple regions or markets.
• Strong understanding of diverse regulatory frameworks and supervisory expectations globally.
• Experience working within or leading a regional or matrixed team structure is highly preferred. Skills & Competencies
• Exceptional cross-regional coordination and stakeholder engagement skills.
• Strong project management capabilities and ability to manage complex, multi-jurisdictional workstreams.
• Excellent written and verbal communication, able to synthesise regional inputs into a coherent global strategy.
• Strategic thinker with strong execution discipline.
• Ability to build trust and credibility with regulators and internal leadership. Important information for candidates Recruitment scams have become increasingly common. To protect yourself, please keep the following in mind when applying for roles:
• Apply only through our official channels. We do not use third-party platforms or agencies for recruitment unless clearly stated. All open roles are listed on our official careers page: https://tether.recruitee.com/
• Verify the recruiter’s identity. All our recruiters have verified LinkedIn profiles. If you’re unsure, you can confirm their identity by checking their profile or contacting us through our website.
• Be cautious of unusual communication methods. We do not conduct interviews over WhatsApp, Telegram, or SMS. All communication is done through official company emails and platforms.
• Double-check email addresses. All communication from us will come from emails ending in @ tether.to or @ tether.io
• We will never request payment or financial details. If someone asks for personal financial information or payment at any point during the hiring process, it is a scam. Please report it immediately. When in doubt, feel free to reach out through our official website.

jobs.description:
Join Tether and Shape the Future of Digital Finance 
 At Tether, we’re not just building products, we’re pioneering a global financial revolution. Our cutting-edge solutions empower businesses—from exchanges and wallets to payment processors and ATMs—to seamlessly integrate reserve-backed tokens across blockchains. By harnessing the power of blockchain technology, Tether enables you to store, send, and receive digital tokens instantly, securely, and globally, all at a fraction of the cost. Transparency is the bedrock of everything we do, ensuring trust in every transaction. 
 
 Innovate with Tether 
 Tether Finance: Our innovative product suite features the world’s most trusted stablecoin, USDT , relied upon by hundreds of millions worldwide, alongside pioneering digital asset tokenization services. 
 But that’s just the beginning: 
 Tether Power: Driving sustainable growth, our energy solutions optimize excess power for Bitcoin mining using eco-friendly practices in state-of-the-art, geo-diverse facilities. 
 Tether Data: Fueling breakthroughs in AI and peer-to-peer technology, we reduce infrastructure costs and enhance global communications with cutting-edge solutions like KEET , our flagship app that redefines secure and private data sharing. 
 Tether Education : Democratizing access to top-tier digital learning, we empower individuals to thrive in the digital and gig economies, driving global growth and opportunity. 
 Tether Evolution : At the intersection of technology and human potential, we are pushing the boundaries of what is possible, crafting a future where innovation and human capabilities merge in powerful, unprecedented ways. 
 
 Why Join Us? 
 Our team is a global talent powerhouse, working remotely from every corner of the world. If you’re passionate about making a mark in the fintech space, this is your opportunity to collaborate with some of the brightest minds, pushing boundaries and setting new standards. We’ve grown fast, stayed lean, and secured our place as a leader in the industry. 
 If you have excellent English communication skills and are ready to contribute to the most innovative platform on the planet, Tether is the place for you. 
 Are you ready to be part of the future? 
 
 About the job 
 Tether is seeking an experienced and visionary Head of Regulatory Affairs to design and execute global regulatory affairs strategies for our Tether Data business vertical. At Tether Data, we are committed to pioneering advancements in AI and peer-to-peer (P2P) technologies. Our mission is to innovate and lead in the creation of technological solutions that empower people, communities, cities and countries to become more independent and sovereign. In a world constantly changing and becoming more unpredictable, technology should be used to ensure freedom and respect of human rights, rather than capturing people’s private digital lives. 
 
 Responsibilities 
 
• Policy Advocacy, Monitoring, Analysis and Guidance : Monitor, analyse and communicate changes in global regulatory policies, and advise executive leadership on potential regulatory risks and opportunities, while driving initiatives to influence regulatory frameworks as well as monitoring for change across regulations to ensure proactive compliance where required. 

• Regulatory Advocacy and Thought Leadership : Leading or participating in regulatory agency interactions and advocacy work regarding legislation relevant to this field. Engaging with relevant regulatory authorities, industry bodies, collaborative communities, and policymakers to shape the regulatory landscape for AI and P2P. 

• Regulatory Strategy Development : As appropriate, leading the development and execution of regulatory strategies, identifying preferable market/s from which to operate, and to ensure the company’s readiness for compliance with relevant national and international regulations. 

• Cross-functional Leadership and Product Development : Collaborate with internal teams (e.g., R&D, legal, compliance) in both Tether and with our partners to to integrate regulatory considerations into the design and deployment of AI models and technologies, as applicable. 

 
• Thought Leadership: Act as a thought leader both externally and within the organization, educating internal teams on regulatory issues, trends, and best practices in the AI and P2P space. 

 

 
• Proven experience in a senior regulatory role, ideally within the technology, AI, or digital industries. 

• Extensive Hands-on experience in AI regulation is essential (non negotiable) 

• Expertise on AI Governance & AI policy not only in Europe but in different jurisdictions ( This is a must since this is a global role) 

• Strong knowledge of global AI regulations, data privacy laws (e.g., GDPR), and emerging trends in AI and P2P governance. Legal, compliance, or policy background with a deep understanding of ethical AI principles is a plus. 

• Demonstrated understanding of decentralised, self-sovereign and locally executed AI/P2P architectures—and the regulatory implications of these models—distinct from traditional centralised platform approaches. 

• Demonstrated experience working with regulators and government bodies advocating and advising in a regulatory capacity, with demonstrated achievements securing favourable policy positions on behalf of another organisation. 

• Expertise in preparing complex regulatory documents and other major regulatory submissions, including the preparation and execution of interactions with regulatory authorities. 

• Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Law, Policy, Computer Science, or related fields. 

• Excellent written and verbal communication skills, with the ability to synthesise complex regulatory topics for non-technical audiences. 

• Proven ability to manage multiple stakeholders across borders and time zones. 

• Communication: Exceptional communication skills, both written and verbal, with experience in public speaking and representing companies in regulatory discussions. 

• Must be a strong team player, and willing to be fully engaged with key stakeholders both in our company but also with our partners. Must be a hands-on professional capable of working collaboratively and independently. 
 
 

 
 
 Important information for candidates 
Recruitment scams have become increasingly common. To protect yourself, please keep the following in mind when applying for roles:
 
• Apply only through our official channels. We do not use third-party platforms or agencies for recruitment unless clearly stated. All open roles are listed on our official careers page: https://tether.recruitee.com/

• Verify the recruiter’s identity. All our recruiters have verified LinkedIn profiles. If you’re unsure, you can confirm their identity by checking their profile or contacting us through our website.

• Be cautious of unusual communication methods. We do not conduct interviews over WhatsApp, Telegram, or SMS. All communication is done through official company emails and platforms.

• Double-check email addresses. All communication from us will come from emails ending in @ tether.to or @ tether.io 

• We will never request payment or financial details. If someone asks for personal financial information or payment at any point during the hiring process, it is a scam. Please report it immediately.

 When in doubt, feel free to reach out through our official website.

descriptionByLocale.it:
Descrizione - Unisciti a Tether e Forma il Futuro della Finanza Digitale - A Tether, non stiamo solo costruendo prodotti, siamo pionieri di una rivoluzione finanziaria globale. Le nostre soluzioni all'avanguardia consentono alle aziende, dagli scambi e dai portafogli ai processori di pagamento e agli sportelli bancomat, di integrare senza soluzione di continuità i gettoni di riserva in blockchains. Imbragando la potenza della tecnologia blockchain, Tether consente di memorizzare, inviare e ricevere gettoni digitali istantaneamente, in modo sicuro e globale, il tutto ad una frazione del costo. La trasparenza è la base di tutto ciò che facciamo, garantendo fiducia in ogni transazione. - Innovare con Tether - Tether Finance: La nostra innovativa suite di prodotti presenta il più affidabile stablecoin, USDT , basato su centinaia di milioni di persone in tutto il mondo, insieme ai servizi di tokenizzazione digitale di asset. - No. Ma questo è solo l'inizio: - Tether Power: Guidare la crescita sostenibile, le nostre soluzioni energetiche ottimizzano l'eccesso di potenza per l'estrazione mineraria di Bitcoin utilizzando pratiche eco-friendly nelle strutture all'avanguardia e geo-diverse. - Tether Data: Riduciamo le innovazioni nella tecnologia AI e peer-to-peer, riduciamo i costi delle infrastrutture e miglioriamo le comunicazioni globali con soluzioni all'avanguardia come KEET, la nostra app di punta che ridefinisce la condivisione dei dati sicura e privata. - Tether Education: Democratizzazione dell'accesso all'apprendimento digitale di alto livello, forniamo agli individui di prosperare nelle economie digitali e di gig, guidando la crescita globale e l'opportunità. - Tether Evolution: All'incrocio tra tecnologia e potenziale umano, stiamo spingendo i confini di ciò che è possibile, realizzando un futuro in cui innovazione e capacità umane si fondono in modi potenti e senza precedenti. - Il nostro team è una centrale di talento globale, che lavora in remoto da ogni angolo del mondo. Se siete appassionati di fare un segno nello spazio fintech, questa è la vostra opportunità di collaborare con alcune delle menti più brillanti, spingendo i confini e stabilendo nuovi standard. Siamo cresciuti veloci, siamo stati magra, e assicurato il nostro posto come leader nel settore. - No. Se avete eccellenti capacità di comunicazione inglese e siete pronti a contribuire alla piattaforma più innovativa del pianeta, Tether è il posto per voi. - No. Sei pronto a far parte del futuro? - Riguardo al lavoro - Tether sta cercando un esperto e visionario Capo degli Affari Regolatori di progettare ed eseguire strategie di regolamentazione globali per il nostro business Tether Data verticale. A Tether Data, siamo impegnati a progressi pionieristici nelle tecnologie AI e peer-to-peer (P2P). La nostra missione è di innovare e guidare nella creazione di soluzioni tecnologiche che consentano a persone, comunità, città e paesi di diventare più indipendenti e sovrani. In un mondo che cambia continuamente e diventa più imprevedibile, la tecnologia dovrebbe essere utilizzata per garantire la libertà e il rispetto dei diritti umani, piuttosto che catturare la vita privata digitale delle persone. ## Responsabilità - Policy Advocacy, Monitoring, Analysis and Guidance: Monitorare, analizzare e comunicare i cambiamenti nelle politiche normative globali e consigliare la leadership esecutiva sui potenziali rischi e opportunità di regolamentazione, mentre guida iniziative per influenzare i quadri normativi e il monitoraggio dei cambiamenti nelle normative per garantire la conformità proattiva laddove necessario. - Leadership di Advocacy e di Pensiero: Leader o partecipante alle interazioni dell'agenzia di regolamentazione e ai lavori di advocacy in materia di legislazione in materia. Impegnarsi con le competenti autorità di regolamentazione, gli organismi del settore, le comunità collaborative e i responsabili politici per modellare il paesaggio normativo per AI e P2P. - Sviluppo della strategia regolamentare: come opportuno, che conduce lo sviluppo e l’esecuzione delle strategie di regolamentazione, individuando il mercato/i preferibili da cui operare, e per garantire la disponibilità dell’azienda per il rispetto delle pertinenti normative nazionali e internazionali. - Leadership interfunzionale e sviluppo del prodotto: collaborare con i team interni (ad esempio R&D, legal, compliance) sia in Tether che con i nostri partner per integrare le considerazioni normative nella progettazione e distribuzione dei modelli e delle tecnologie AI, come applicabile. - Leadership del pensiero: agire come leader di pensiero sia all'esterno che all'interno dell'organizzazione, educare i team interni su questioni regolamentari, tendenze e best practice nello spazio AI e P2P. ##
• Requisiti - Esperienza dimostrata in un ruolo normativo senior, idealmente all'interno della tecnologia, AI, o industrie digitali. - L'esperienza pluriennale nel regolamento AI è essenziale (non negoziabile) - La competenza sulla politica AI Governance & AI non solo in Europa ma in diverse giurisdizioni (Questo è un must dal momento che questo è un ruolo globale) - Una solida conoscenza delle normative AI globali, delle leggi sulla privacy dei dati (ad esempio, GDPR) e delle tendenze emergenti nella governance AI e P2P. Il background legale, la conformità o la politica con una profonda comprensione dei principi etici dell'intelligenza artificiale è un vantaggio. - Comprensione dimostrata delle architetture AI/P2P, decentrate, auto-sovrazionali e localmente eseguite, e delle implicazioni normative di questi modelli, che si distinguono dagli approcci tradizionali della piattaforma centralizzata. - Esperienza dimostrata che lavora con i regolatori e gli organi governativi che promuovono e consigliano in una capacità di regolamentazione, con risultati dimostrati che assicurano posizioni politiche favorevoli per conto di un'altra organizzazione. - Competenza nella preparazione di documenti normativi complessi e altre importanti sottomissioni normative, compresa la preparazione e l'esecuzione delle interazioni con le autorità di regolamentazione. - Corso di laurea o Master in Diritto, Politica, Informatica, o campi correlati. - Eccellente capacità di comunicazione scritta e verbale, con la capacità di sintetizzare argomenti normativi complessi per il pubblico non tecnico. - comprovata capacità di gestire più stakeholder attraverso confini e fusi orari. - Comunicazione: competenze comunicative eccezionali, sia scritte che verbali, con esperienza nel parlare pubblico e nel rappresentare le aziende nelle discussioni regolamentari. - Deve essere un giocatore di squadra forte, e disposto a essere pienamente impegnato con i principali stakeholder sia nella nostra azienda, ma anche con i nostri partner. Deve essere un professionista pratico in grado di lavorare in modo collaborativo e indipendente. ## Informazioni importanti per i candidati - Le truffe di reclutamento sono diventate sempre più comuni. Per proteggersi, si prega di tenere a mente il seguente quando si applica per i ruoli: - Applicare solo attraverso i nostri canali ufficiali. Non utilizziamo piattaforme o agenzie di terze parti per il reclutamento, a meno che non sia chiaro. Tutti i ruoli aperti sono elencati nella nostra pagina di carriera ufficiale: https://tether.recruitee.com/ - Verificare l’identità del reclutatore. Tutti i nostri reclutatori hanno verificato i profili LinkedIn. Se non sei sicuro, puoi confermare la loro identità controllando il loro profilo o contattandoci attraverso il nostro sito web. - No. Siate cauti di metodi di comunicazione insoliti. Non conduciamo interviste su WhatsApp, Telegram o SMS. Tutte le comunicazioni vengono effettuate tramite e-mail e piattaforme aziendali ufficiali. - Controllare gli indirizzi e-mail. Tutte le comunicazioni da noi verranno da e-mail che terminano in @ tether.to o @ tether. io - Non chiederemo mai il pagamento o i dettagli finanziari. Se qualcuno chiede informazioni finanziarie personali o il pagamento in qualsiasi momento durante il processo di assunzione, è una truffa. Si prega di segnalarlo immediatamente. - Quando in dubbio, non esitate a raggiungere il nostro sito ufficiale.
descriptionByLocale.en:
Join Tether and Shape the Future of Digital Finance At Tether, we’re not just building products, we’re pioneering a global financial revolution. Our cutting-edge solutions empower businesses—from exchanges and wallets to payment processors and ATMs—to seamlessly integrate reserve-backed tokens across blockchains. By harnessing the power of blockchain technology, Tether enables you to store, send, and receive digital tokens instantly, securely, and globally, all at a fraction of the cost. Transparency is the bedrock of everything we do, ensuring trust in every transaction. Innovate with Tether Tether Finance: Our innovative product suite features the world’s most trusted stablecoin, USDT , relied upon by hundreds of millions worldwide, alongside pioneering digital asset tokenization services. But that’s just the beginning: Tether Power: Driving sustainable growth, our energy solutions optimize excess power for Bitcoin mining using eco-friendly practices in state-of-the-art, geo-diverse facilities. Tether Data: Fueling breakthroughs in AI and peer-to-peer technology, we reduce infrastructure costs and enhance global communications with cutting-edge solutions like KEET , our flagship app that redefines secure and private data sharing. Tether Education : Democratizing access to top-tier digital learning, we empower individuals to thrive in the digital and gig economies, driving global growth and opportunity. Tether Evolution : At the intersection of technology and human potential, we are pushing the boundaries of what is possible, crafting a future where innovation and human capabilities merge in powerful, unprecedented ways. Why Join Us? Our team is a global talent powerhouse, working remotely from every corner of the world. If you’re passionate about making a mark in the fintech space, this is your opportunity to collaborate with some of the brightest minds, pushing boundaries and setting new standards. We’ve grown fast, stayed lean, and secured our place as a leader in the industry. If you have excellent English communication skills and are ready to contribute to the most innovative platform on the planet, Tether is the place for you. Are you ready to be part of the future? About the job Tether is seeking an experienced and visionary Head of Regulatory Affairs to design and execute global regulatory affairs strategies for our Tether Data business vertical. At Tether Data, we are committed to pioneering advancements in AI and peer-to-peer (P2P) technologies. Our mission is to innovate and lead in the creation of technological solutions that empower people, communities, cities and countries to become more independent and sovereign. In a world constantly changing and becoming more unpredictable, technology should be used to ensure freedom and respect of human rights, rather than capturing people’s private digital lives. Responsibilities
• Policy Advocacy, Monitoring, Analysis and Guidance : Monitor, analyse and communicate changes in global regulatory policies, and advise executive leadership on potential regulatory risks and opportunities, while driving initiatives to influence regulatory frameworks as well as monitoring for change across regulations to ensure proactive compliance where required.
• Regulatory Advocacy and Thought Leadership : Leading or participating in regulatory agency interactions and advocacy work regarding legislation relevant to this field. Engaging with relevant regulatory authorities, industry bodies, collaborative communities, and policymakers to shape the regulatory landscape for AI and P2P.
• Regulatory Strategy Development : As appropriate, leading the development and execution of regulatory strategies, identifying preferable market/s from which to operate, and to ensure the company’s readiness for compliance with relevant national and international regulations.
• Cross-functional Leadership and Product Development : Collaborate with internal teams (e.g., R&D, legal, compliance) in both Tether and with our partners to to integrate regulatory considerations into the design and deployment of AI models and technologies, as applicable.
• Thought Leadership: Act as a thought leader both externally and within the organization, educating internal teams on regulatory issues, trends, and best practices in the AI and P2P space.
• Proven experience in a senior regulatory role, ideally within the technology, AI, or digital industries.
• Extensive Hands-on experience in AI regulation is essential (non negotiable)
• Expertise on AI Governance & AI policy not only in Europe but in different jurisdictions ( This is a must since this is a global role)
• Strong knowledge of global AI regulations, data privacy laws (e.g., GDPR), and emerging trends in AI and P2P governance. Legal, compliance, or policy background with a deep understanding of ethical AI principles is a plus.
• Demonstrated understanding of decentralised, self-sovereign and locally executed AI/P2P architectures—and the regulatory implications of these models—distinct from traditional centralised platform approaches.
• Demonstrated experience working with regulators and government bodies advocating and advising in a regulatory capacity, with demonstrated achievements securing favourable policy positions on behalf of another organisation.
• Expertise in preparing complex regulatory documents and other major regulatory submissions, including the preparation and execution of interactions with regulatory authorities.
• Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Law, Policy, Computer Science, or related fields.
• Excellent written and verbal communication skills, with the ability to synthesise complex regulatory topics for non-technical audiences.
• Proven ability to manage multiple stakeholders across borders and time zones.
• Communication: Exceptional communication skills, both written and verbal, with experience in public speaking and representing companies in regulatory discussions.
• Must be a strong team player, and willing to be fully engaged with key stakeholders both in our company but also with our partners. Must be a hands-on professional capable of working collaboratively and independently. Important information for candidates Recruitment scams have become increasingly common. To protect yourself, please keep the following in mind when applying for roles:
• Apply only through our official channels. We do not use third-party platforms or agencies for recruitment unless clearly stated. All open roles are listed on our official careers page: https://tether.recruitee.com/
• Verify the recruiter’s identity. All our recruiters have verified LinkedIn profiles. If you’re unsure, you can confirm their identity by checking their profile or contacting us through our website.
• Be cautious of unusual communication methods. We do not conduct interviews over WhatsApp, Telegram, or SMS. All communication is done through official company emails and platforms.
• Double-check email addresses. All communication from us will come from emails ending in @ tether.to or @ tether.io
• We will never request payment or financial details. If someone asks for personal financial information or payment at any point during the hiring process, it is a scam. Please report it immediately. When in doubt, feel free to reach out through our official website.
descriptionByLocale.de:
Beschreibung - Join Tether and Shape the Future of Digital Finance - Bei Tether bauen wir nicht nur Produkte, wir sind Pionier einer globalen Finanzrevolution. Unsere fortschrittlichen Lösungen befähigen Unternehmen – von Börsen und Geldbörsen bis hin zu Zahlungsverarbeitern und Geldautomaten –, über Blockchains lückenlos zurückgehaltene Token zu integrieren. Durch die Nutzung der Leistung der Blockchain-Technologie ermöglicht Tether, digitale Token sofort, sicher und global zu einem Bruchteil der Kosten zu speichern, zu senden und zu empfangen. Transparenz ist der Grundstein für alles, was wir tun, um Vertrauen in jede Transaktion zu gewährleisten. - Innovate mit Tether - Tether Finance: Unsere innovative Produkt-Suite verfügt über die weltweit vertrauenswürdigste Stallmünze, USDT, die von Hunderten von Millionen weltweit begehrt wird, sowie wegweisende digitale Asset-Tokenization-Dienste. - Ja. Aber das ist nur der Anfang: - Tether Power: Fahren Sie nachhaltiges Wachstum, unsere Energielösungen optimieren überschüssige Leistung für Bitcoin Bergbau mit umweltfreundlichen Praktiken in modernsten, geodiverse Anlagen. - Tether Data: Durchbrüche in der KI- und Peer‐to-Peer-Technologie reduzieren wir die Infrastrukturkosten und erhöhen die globale Kommunikation mit modernsten Lösungen wie KEET, unserer Flaggschiff-App, die den sicheren und privaten Datenaustausch neu definiert. - Tether Education: Demokratisierung des Zugangs zu erstklassigem digitalem Lernen, wir befähigen Einzelpersonen, in den digitalen und gig Volkswirtschaften zu leben, globales Wachstum und Chance zu treiben. - Tether Evolution: An der Schnittstelle von Technologie und menschlichem Potenzial drängen wir die Grenzen von dem, was möglich ist, und schaffen eine Zukunft, in der Innovation und menschliche Fähigkeiten in leistungsfähigen, beispiellosen Weisen verschmelzen. Unser Team ist ein globales Talent-Powerhouse, das von jeder Ecke der Welt entfernt arbeitet. Wenn Sie leidenschaftlich daran sind, eine Marke im Fintech-Raum zu machen, ist dies Ihre Gelegenheit, mit einigen der hellsten Köpfe zu kooperieren, Grenzen zu drängen und neue Standards zu setzen. Wir sind schnell gewachsen, blieben schlank und sicherten unseren Platz als Marktführer in der Branche. - Ja. Wenn Sie hervorragende englische Kommunikationsfähigkeiten haben und bereit sind, zur innovativsten Plattform auf dem Planeten beizutragen, ist Tether der Ort für Sie. - Ja. Sind Sie bereit, Teil der Zukunft zu sein? - Über den Job - Tether sucht einen erfahrenen und visionären Leiter der Regulierungsangelegenheiten, um globale regulatorische Strategien für unser Tether Data Business vertikal zu entwickeln und umzusetzen. Bei Tether Data setzen wir uns dafür ein, Fortschritte in der KI- und Peer‐to-Peer-Technologie (P2P) voranzutreiben. Unsere Mission ist es, innovativ und führend bei der Schaffung von technologischen Lösungen, die Menschen, Gemeinschaften, Städte und Länder befähigen, unabhängiger und souveräner zu werden. In einer sich ständig verändernden und unvorhersehbareren Welt sollte Technologie verwendet werden, um Freiheit und Achtung der Menschenrechte zu gewährleisten, anstatt das private digitale Leben der Menschen zu erfassen. Responsabilità - Policy Advocacy, Monitoring, Analysis and Guidance: Überwachen, analysieren und kommunizieren Veränderungen der globalen Regulierungspolitiken und beraten die Exekutivführung über potenzielle regulatorische Risiken und Chancen, während die treibenden Initiativen, um regulatorische Rahmenbedingungen zu beeinflussen, sowie Überwachung von Änderungen in den Vorschriften, um eine proaktive Compliance bei Bedarf zu gewährleisten. - Regulatory Advocacy and Thought Leadership : Führung oder Teilnahme an regulatorischen Agentur-Interaktionen und Advocacy-Arbeit in Bezug auf Rechtsvorschriften, die für diesen Bereich relevant sind. Mit relevanten Regulierungsbehörden, Branchenverbänden, Kooperationsgemeinschaften und politischen Entscheidungsträgern, die Regulierungslandschaft für KI und P2P zu gestalten. - Regulatorische Strategieentwicklung : Entsprechend führen die Entwicklung und Umsetzung von Regulierungsstrategien, die Identifizierung von Vorzugsmärkten/en, von denen aus sie betrieben werden, und die Bereitschaft des Unternehmens zur Einhaltung der einschlägigen nationalen und internationalen Vorschriften. - Cross-funktionale Leadership and Product Development: Zusammenarbeit mit internen Teams (z.B. R&D, Legal, Compliance) in Tether und mit unseren Partnern, um regulatorische Überlegungen in die Gestaltung und den Einsatz von AI-Modellen und -Technologien zu integrieren. - Gedankenführung: Handeln Sie als Gedankenleiter sowohl extern als auch innerhalb der Organisation und erziehen interne Teams zu regulatorischen Fragen, Trends und Best Practices im KI- und P2P-Raum.
• Requisiti - Erprobte Erfahrung in einer hochrangigen regulatorischen Rolle, ideal in der Technologie-, KI- oder digitalen Industrie. - Umfangreiche Hands‐on-Erfahrung in der KI-Verordnung ist unerlässlich (nicht verhandelbar) - Expertise zur KI-Governance & KI-Politik nicht nur in Europa, sondern in unterschiedlichen Zuständigkeiten (das ist ein Muss, da dies eine globale Rolle ist) - Starkes Wissen über globale KI-Verordnungen, Datenschutzgesetze (z.B. DSGVO) und aufstrebende Trends in der KI- und P2P-Governordnung. Rechts-, Compliance- oder politischen Hintergrund mit einem tiefen Verständnis ethischer KI-Prinzipien ist ein Plus. - Demonstriertes Verständnis dezentraler, selbstständiger und lokal ausgeführter KI/P2P-Architekturen – und die regulatorischen Auswirkungen dieser Modelle – gehen von traditionellen zentralen Plattformansätzen aus. - Demonstrierte Erfahrung in der Zusammenarbeit mit Regulierungsbehörden und Regierungsstellen, die sich für eine Regulierungskapazität einsetzen und beraten, mit demonstrierten Errungenschaften, die günstige politische Positionen im Namen einer anderen Organisation sichern. - Expertise bei der Vorbereitung komplexer Regulierungsdokumente und anderer wichtiger Regulierungsunterlagen, einschließlich der Vorbereitung und Durchführung von Interaktionen mit Regulierungsbehörden. - Bachelor- oder Masterstudium in Recht, Politik, Informatik oder verwandten Bereichen. - Ausgezeichnete schriftliche und verbale Kommunikationsfähigkeiten, mit der Fähigkeit, komplexe regulatorische Themen für nicht-technische Publikum zu synthetisieren. - Bewiesene Fähigkeit, mehrere Stakeholder über Grenzen und Zeitzonen zu verwalten. - Kommunikation: Außergewöhnliche Kommunikationsfähigkeiten, sowohl schriftlich als auch mündlich, mit Erfahrung im öffentlichen Sprechen und Vertretung von Unternehmen in regulatorischen Diskussionen. - Muss ein starker Teamplayer sein und bereit sein, sich sowohl in unserem Unternehmen als auch mit unseren Partnern voll mit den wichtigsten Interessenvertretern zu beschäftigen. Muss ein Handgelenkprofi sein, der kollaborativ und unabhängig arbeiten kann. Informazioni importanti per i candidati - Recruitment Betrug sind immer häufiger geworden. Um sich selbst zu schützen, beachten Sie bitte bei der Beantragung von Rollen: - Bewerben Sie sich nur über unsere offiziellen Kanäle. Wir verwenden keine Plattformen oder Agenturen von Drittanbietern zur Rekrutierung, sofern nicht klar angegeben. Alle offenen Rollen sind auf unserer offiziellen Karriereseite aufgeführt: https://tether.recruitee.com/ - Überprüfen Sie die Identität des Rekruten. Alle unsere Rekrutierer haben LinkedIn-
• Profile überprüft. Wenn Sie sich nicht sicher sind, können Sie Ihre Identität bestätigen, indem Sie ihr Profil überprüfen oder uns über unsere Website kontaktieren. - Ja. Seien Sie vorsichtig mit ungewöhnlichen Kommunikationsmethoden. Wir führen keine Interviews über WhatsApp, Telegram oder SMS durch. Alle Kommunikation erfolgt über offizielle Firmen-E-Mails und Plattformen. - Doppel-Check-E-Mail-Adressen. Alle Kommunikation von uns wird von E-Mails kommen, die in @ tether.to oder @ tether enden. io - Wir werden keine Zahlungs- oder Finanzdaten verlangen. Wenn jemand während des Einstellungsprozesses persönliche Finanzinformationen oder Zahlung an jedem Punkt verlangt, ist es ein Betrug. Bitte melden Sie es sofort. - Wenn im Zweifel, fühlen Sie sich frei, durch unsere offizielle Website zu erreichen.
descriptionByLocale.fr:
Descrizione - Join Tether and Shape the Future of Digital Finance - Chez Tether, nous ne sommes pas seulement des produits de construction, nous sommes pionniers d'une révolution financière mondiale. Nos solutions de pointe permettent aux entreprises – des échanges et des portefeuilles aux processeurs de paiement et aux distributeurs automatiques de billets – d'intégrer de façon transparente les jetons à l'aide de réserves dans les chaînes de blocs. En exploitant la puissance de la technologie blockchain, Tether vous permet de stocker, d'envoyer et de recevoir des jetons numériques instantanément, en toute sécurité et globalement, le tout à une fraction du coût. La transparence est le fondement de tout ce que nous faisons, assurant la confiance dans chaque transaction. - Innover avec Tether - Tether Finance: Notre suite de produits innovants dispose de la plus fiable écurie du monde, USDT, sur laquelle s'appuient des centaines de millions de personnes dans le monde entier, ainsi que des services de tokenisation numériques pionniers. - Oui. Mais ce n'est qu'un début : - Tether Power : moteur d'une croissance durable, nos solutions énergétiques optimisent l'excès de puissance pour l'exploitation minière Bitcoin en utilisant des pratiques respectueuses de l'environnement dans des installations géo-divers. - Tether Data : alimentant les percées dans l'IA et la technologie pair-to-peer, nous réduisons les coûts d'infrastructure et améliorons les communications mondiales grâce à des solutions de pointe comme KEET , notre application phare qui redéfinit le partage de données sécurisé et privé. - Tether Education : Démocratiser l'accès à l'apprentissage numérique de haut niveau, nous autonomisons les individus à prospérer dans les économies du numérique et des concerts, ce qui stimule la croissance et les opportunités mondiales. - L'évolution de l'enseignement : À l'intersection de la technologie et du potentiel humain, nous repoussons les limites de ce qui est possible, écrivant un avenir où l'innovation et les capacités humaines fusionnent de manière puissante et sans précédent. Notre équipe est une puissance mondiale de talent, travaillant à distance de tous les coins du monde. Si vous êtes passionné par la marque dans l'espace fintech, c'est l'occasion de collaborer avec certains des esprits les plus brillants, de repousser les frontières et de fixer de nouvelles normes. Nous avons grandi rapidement, sommes restés maigres et nous avons obtenu notre place de leader dans l'industrie. - Oui. Si vous avez d'excellentes compétences en communication anglaise et êtes prêt à contribuer à la plateforme la plus innovante de la planète, Tether est l'endroit pour vous. - Oui. Êtes-vous prêt à faire partie du futur ? - À propos du travail - Tether cherche un chef expérimenté et visionnaire des affaires réglementaires pour concevoir et exécuter des stratégies de réglementation mondiale pour notre entreprise Tether Data verticale. Chez Tether Data, nous nous engageons à faire des progrès pionniers dans les technologies d'IA et de pair à pair (P2P). Notre mission est d'innover et de diriger la création de solutions technologiques qui permettent aux personnes, aux communautés, aux villes et aux pays de devenir plus indépendants et souverains. Dans un monde en constante évolution et de plus en plus imprévisible, la technologie doit être utilisée pour garantir la liberté et le respect des droits de l'homme, plutôt que de capter la vie privée numérique. ## Responsabilità - Promotion des politiques, surveillance, analyse et orientation : Surveiller, analyser et communiquer les changements dans les politiques réglementaires mondiales, et conseiller les dirigeants sur les risques et les possibilités potentiels en matière de réglementation, tout en stimulant les initiatives visant à influencer les cadres réglementaires ainsi que la surveillance des changements dans l'ensemble des règlements afin d'assurer la conformité proactive au besoin. - Plaidoyer en matière de réglementation et leadership de la pensée : Diriger ou participer aux interactions des organismes de réglementation et aux activités de plaidoyer concernant la législation pertinente dans ce domaine. Collaborer avec les autorités réglementaires compétentes, les organismes de l'industrie, les communautés de collaboration et les décideurs pour façonner le paysage réglementaire de l'IA et du P2P. - Élaboration d'une stratégie de réglementation : Le cas échéant, diriger l'élaboration et l'exécution de stratégies de réglementation, identifier les marchés/s à partir desquels il est préférable de fonctionner, et veiller à ce que l'entreprise soit prête à se conformer aux réglementations nationales et internationales pertinentes. - Leadership interfonctionnel et développement de produits : Collaborer avec des équipes internes (p. ex., R-D, juridique, conformité) à la fois à Tether et avec nos partenaires afin d'intégrer des considérations réglementaires à la conception et au déploiement de modèles et de technologies d'IA, selon le cas. - Leadership de la pensée : agir en tant que leader de la pensée à l'extérieur et au sein de l'organisation, éduquer les équipes internes sur les questions réglementaires, les tendances et les meilleures pratiques dans l'espace AI et P2P. ##
• Requisiti - Expérience éprouvée dans un rôle de réglementation senior, idéalement dans les industries de la technologie, de l'IA ou du numérique. - Une vaste expérience pratique en matière de réglementation de l'IA est essentielle (non négociable) - Expertise en matière de gouvernance de l'IA et de politique de l'IA non seulement en Europe, mais aussi dans différentes juridictions (il s'agit là d'un impératif puisqu'il s'agit d'un rôle mondial) - Forte connaissance de la réglementation mondiale de l'IA, des lois sur la protection des données (p. ex. RGPD) et des tendances émergentes en matière de gouvernance de l'IA et de P2P. Le contexte juridique, de conformité ou de politique avec une compréhension approfondie des principes éthiques de l'IA est un atout. - Compréhension démontrée des architectures d'IA/P2P décentralisées, autosuffisantes et exécutées localement — et des implications réglementaires de ces modèles — distincte des approches traditionnelles centralisées des plates-formes. - Expérience démontrée en collaboration avec les organismes de réglementation et les organismes gouvernementaux qui préconisent et conseillent en matière de réglementation, avec des réalisations démontrées garantissant des positions politiques favorables au nom d'une autre organisation. - Expertise dans la préparation de documents réglementaires complexes et d'autres présentations réglementaires importantes, y compris la préparation et l'exécution d'interactions avec les autorités réglementaires. - Baccalauréat ou maîtrise en droit, politique, informatique ou domaines connexes. - Excellentes compétences en communication écrite et verbale, avec la capacité de synthétiser des sujets réglementaires complexes pour les publics non techniques. - Capacité éprouvée de gérer plusieurs parties prenantes au-delà des frontières et des fuseaux horaires. - Communication : Compétences exceptionnelles en communication, tant écrite qu'orale, avec une expérience de la parole publique et de la représentation des entreprises dans les discussions réglementaires. - Doit être un acteur fort de l'équipe, et prêt à être pleinement engagé avec les parties prenantes clés à la fois dans notre entreprise mais aussi avec nos partenaires. Doit être un professionnel pratique capable de travailler en collaboration et de manière indépendante. ## Informazioni importanti per i candidati - Les escroqueries de recrutement sont devenues de plus en plus fréquentes. Pour vous protéger, veuillez garder à l'esprit ce qui suit lorsque vous postulez pour des rôles : - Appliquer uniquement par le biais de nos canaux officiels. Nous n'utilisons pas de plates-formes ou d'agences tierces pour le recrutement à moins d'indication claire. Tous les rôles ouverts sont listés sur notre page de carrière officielle : https://tether.recruitee.com/ - Vérifier l'identité du recruteur. Tous nos recruteurs ont vérifié les profils LinkedIn. Si vous n'êtes pas sûr, vous pouvez confirmer leur identité en vérifiant leur profil ou en nous contactant via notre site Web. - Oui. Méfiez-vous des méthodes de communication inhabituelles. Nous ne menons pas d'entrevues sur WhatsApp, Telegram ou SMS. Toute communication se fait au moyen de courriels et de plateformes officiels de l'entreprise. - Vérifiez les adresses électroniques. Toute communication de nous viendra de courriels se terminant par @ tether.to ou @ sether. io - Nous ne demanderons jamais de paiement ou de détails financiers. Si quelqu'un demande des renseignements financiers personnels ou un paiement à tout moment pendant le processus d'embauche, c'est une escroquerie. Veuillez le signaler immédiatement. - En cas de doute, n'hésitez pas à contacter notre site officiel.

jobs.description:
Join Tether and Shape the Future of Digital Finance 
 At Tether, we’re not just building products, we’re pioneering a global financial revolution. Our cutting-edge solutions empower businesses—from exchanges and wallets to payment processors and ATMs—to seamlessly integrate reserve-backed tokens across blockchains. By harnessing the power of blockchain technology, Tether enables you to store, send, and receive digital tokens instantly, securely, and globally, all at a fraction of the cost. Transparency is the bedrock of everything we do, ensuring trust in every transaction. 
 
 Innovate with Tether 
 Tether Finance: Our innovative product suite features the world’s most trusted stablecoin, USDT , relied upon by hundreds of millions worldwide, alongside pioneering digital asset tokenization services. 
 But that’s just the beginning: 
 Tether Power: Driving sustainable growth, our energy solutions optimize excess power for Bitcoin mining using eco-friendly practices in state-of-the-art, geo-diverse facilities. 
 Tether Data: Fueling breakthroughs in AI and peer-to-peer technology, we reduce infrastructure costs and enhance global communications with cutting-edge solutions like KEET , our flagship app that redefines secure and private data sharing. 
 Tether Education : Democratizing access to top-tier digital learning, we empower individuals to thrive in the digital and gig economies, driving global growth and opportunity. 
 Tether Evolution : At the intersection of technology and human potential, we are pushing the boundaries of what is possible, crafting a future where innovation and human capabilities merge in powerful, unprecedented ways. 
 
 Why Join Us? 
 Our team is a global talent powerhouse, working remotely from every corner of the world. If you’re passionate about making a mark in the fintech space, this is your opportunity to collaborate with some of the brightest minds, pushing boundaries and setting new standards. We’ve grown fast, stayed lean, and secured our place as a leader in the industry. 
 If you have excellent English communication skills and are ready to contribute to the most innovative platform on the planet, Tether is the place for you. 
 Are you ready to be part of the future? 
 
 About the job 
 Tether is seeking an experienced and visionary Head of Regulatory Affairs to design and execute global regulatory affairs strategies for our Tether Data business vertical. At Tether Data, we are committed to pioneering advancements in AI and peer-to-peer (P2P) technologies. Our mission is to innovate and lead in the creation of technological solutions that empower people, communities, cities and countries to become more independent and sovereign. In a world constantly changing and becoming more unpredictable, technology should be used to ensure freedom and respect of human rights, rather than capturing people’s private digital lives. 
 
 Responsibilities 
 
• Policy Advocacy, Monitoring, Analysis and Guidance : Monitor, analyse and communicate changes in global regulatory policies, and advise executive leadership on potential regulatory risks and opportunities, while driving initiatives to influence regulatory frameworks as well as monitoring for change across regulations to ensure proactive compliance where required. 

• Regulatory Advocacy and Thought Leadership : Leading or participating in regulatory agency interactions and advocacy work regarding legislation relevant to this field. Engaging with relevant regulatory authorities, industry bodies, collaborative communities, and policymakers to shape the regulatory landscape for AI and P2P. 

• Regulatory Strategy Development : As appropriate, leading the development and execution of regulatory strategies, identifying preferable market/s from which to operate, and to ensure the company’s readiness for compliance with relevant national and international regulations. 

• Cross-functional Leadership and Product Development : Collaborate with internal teams (e.g., R&D, legal, compliance) in both Tether and with our partners to to integrate regulatory considerations into the design and deployment of AI models and technologies, as applicable. 

 
• Thought Leadership: Act as a thought leader both externally and within the organization, educating internal teams on regulatory issues, trends, and best practices in the AI and P2P space. 

 

 
• Proven experience in a senior regulatory role, ideally within the technology, AI, or digital industries. 

• Strong knowledge of global AI regulations, data privacy laws (e.g., GDPR), and emerging trends in AI and P2P governance. Legal, compliance, or policy background with a deep understanding of ethical AI principles is a plus. 

• Demonstrated understanding of decentralised, self-sovereign and locally executed AI/P2P architectures—and the regulatory implications of these models—distinct from traditional centralised platform approaches. 

• Demonstrated experience working with regulators and government bodies advocating and advising in a regulatory capacity, with demonstrated achievements securing favourable policy positions on behalf of another organisation. 

• Expertise in preparing complex regulatory documents and other major regulatory submissions, including the preparation and execution of interactions with regulatory authorities. 

• Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Law, Policy, Computer Science, or related fields. 

• Excellent written and verbal communication skills, with the ability to synthesise complex regulatory topics for non-technical audiences. 

• Proven ability to manage multiple stakeholders across borders and time zones. 

• Communication: Exceptional communication skills, both written and verbal, with experience in public speaking and representing companies in regulatory discussions. 

• Must be a strong team player, and willing to be fully engaged with key stakeholders both in our company but also with our partners. Must be a hands-on professional capable of working collaboratively and independently. 
 

 
 
 Important information for candidates 
Recruitment scams have become increasingly common. To protect yourself, please keep the following in mind when applying for roles:
 
• Apply only through our official channels. We do not use third-party platforms or agencies for recruitment unless clearly stated. All open roles are listed on our official careers page: https://tether.recruitee.com/

• Verify the recruiter’s identity. All our recruiters have verified LinkedIn profiles. If you’re unsure, you can confirm their identity by checking their profile or contacting us through our website.

• Be cautious of unusual communication methods. We do not conduct interviews over WhatsApp, Telegram, or SMS. All communication is done through official company emails and platforms.

• Double-check email addresses. All communication from us will come from emails ending in @ tether.to or @ tether.io 

• We will never request payment or financial details. If someone asks for personal financial information or payment at any point during the hiring process, it is a scam. Please report it immediately.

 When in doubt, feel free to reach out through our official website.

titleByLocale.de: Regulatory Affairs and Licensing Lead - Argentina

jobs.description:
Join Tether and Shape the Future of Digital Finance 
 At Tether, we’re not just building products, we’re pioneering a global financial revolution. Our cutting-edge solutions empower businesses—from exchanges and wallets to payment processors and ATMs—to seamlessly integrate reserve-backed tokens across blockchains. By harnessing the power of blockchain technology, Tether enables you to store, send, and receive digital tokens instantly, securely, and globally, all at a fraction of the cost. Transparency is the bedrock of everything we do, ensuring trust in every transaction. 
 
 Innovate with Tether 
 Tether Finance: Our innovative product suite features the world’s most trusted stablecoin, USDT , relied upon by hundreds of millions worldwide, alongside pioneering digital asset tokenization services. 
 But that’s just the beginning: 
 Tether Power: Driving sustainable growth, our energy solutions optimize excess power for Bitcoin mining using eco-friendly practices in state-of-the-art, geo-diverse facilities. 
 Tether Data: Fueling breakthroughs in AI and peer-to-peer technology, we reduce infrastructure costs and enhance global communications with cutting-edge solutions like KEET , our flagship app that redefines secure and private data sharing. 
 Tether Education : Democratizing access to top-tier digital learning, we empower individuals to thrive in the digital and gig economies, driving global growth and opportunity. 
 Tether Evolution : At the intersection of technology and human potential, we are pushing the boundaries of what is possible, crafting a future where innovation and human capabilities merge in powerful, unprecedented ways. 
 
 Why Join Us? 
 Our team is a global talent powerhouse, working remotely from every corner of the world. If you’re passionate about making a mark in the fintech space, this is your opportunity to collaborate with some of the brightest minds, pushing boundaries and setting new standards. We’ve grown fast, stayed lean, and secured our place as a leader in the industry. 
 If you have excellent English communication skills and are ready to contribute to the most innovative platform on the planet, Tether is the place for you. 
 Are you ready to be part of the future? 
 
 About the job 
 Tether and its affiliated entities (e.g. Bitfinex) are searching for an organized self-starter to join our Regulatory and Licensing team. The successful candidate is someone with a deep understanding of legal and regulatory requirements pertaining to the crypto-asset industry in Argentina, and who is excited by the opportunity to apply their existing regulatory experience in an exciting and dynamic business environment. 
 The successful candidate will report directly to the Head of Regulatory Affairs & Licensing – Latin America, serving as the primary point of contact for regulatory and licensing matters within Argentina. This is a senior position designed for professionals with proven experience engaging with or working within financial regulators, supervisory authorities, or policy-making bodies. The ideal candidate combines strategic insight with hands-on execution, demonstrates a diplomatic, solutions-oriented approach in navigating complex regulatory environments, and is able to anticipate regulatory changes and adapt strategies proactively to evolving market and legal environments. You will represent the company in regulatory discussions, contribute to regional initiatives under the guidance of the Head of Regulatory Affairs & Licensing – Latin America, and ensure local implementation aligns with the company’s broader Latin American regulatory objectives. 
 To succeed in this role, the incumbent will continuously strive to self-develop and enhance their skill sets including understanding the Company’s products and services, blockchain technology, crypto-assets and the regulatory requirements. Engage with industry associations, chambers, and other stakeholder groups to promote innovation and collaboration. 
 
You will have a focus around translating regulatory requirements in Argentina into clear and actionable strategic recommendations, managing relationships and communications between various stakeholders both internal and external to the business. 
 
 
 Responsibilities 
 
 
• Regulatory Strategy Development: development and execution of regulatory strategies, identifying preferable market/s in the region from which to operate. Ensure local implementation aligns with Tether’s broader Latin American regulatory objectives. 

• Regulatory Advocacy and Collaboration : participating in regulatory agency interactions, engaging with relevant regulatory authorities, industry bodies, and policymakers to shape the regulatory landscape for stablecoin issuers, advocating for policies that promote innovation while ensuring safety and compliance. Actively contribute to public consultations, working groups, and industry forums, maintaining a high standard of professionalism and institutional diplomacy. 

• Policy Analysis and Guidance : Provide analysis on local regulatory proposals, and advise the business on potential regulatory risks and opportunities, while driving initiatives to influence regulatory frameworks as well as monitoring for change across regulations to ensure proactive compliance. Produce concise internal policy briefs and recommendations to inform senior management decision-making. 

• Regulatory approval process : contribute to the process of obtaining necessary license approvals in identified markets, where appropriate. Support the preparation and coordination of documentation and responses to regulatory inquiries, ensuring strategic consistency and accuracy. 

• Cross-functional Leadership : Collaborate with internal teams (e.g., expansion, legal, compliance, finance) to ensure alignment with regulatory requirements and to proactively address emerging regulatory challenges. Serve as the local regulatory lead, ensuring effective communication and alignment with regional priorities. 

 

 
• Minimum of 5 years regulatory experience within the financial services or crypto-asset industry. 

• Preferred: Minimum of 5–8 years regulatory experience within financial services, fintech, or crypto-asset industries. 

• Ability to apply knowledge of key regulatory frameworks in Argentina both strategically and operationally and provide direction to resolve complex regulatory issues. 

• Demonstrated diplomatic skills and ability to manage complex stakeholder relationships. 

• Expertise in preparing regulatory analysis including the preparation and execution of interactions with regulatory authorities, such as regulatory consultation response submissions. 

• Proven experience working with or within regulatory authorities (e.g., central banks, financial supervisory agencies, or ministries of finance) is strongly preferred. 

• Demonstrated ability to draft or contribute to public policy responses, regulatory filings, or industry position papers. 

• Communication: Exceptional communication skills, both written and verbal, with experience in public speaking and representing companies in regulatory discussions. 

• Must be a strong team player, and willing to be fully engaged with key stakeholders both in our company but also with our partners. Must have hands-on professional capable of working collaboratively and independently, with excellent verbal and written communication skills 

• Fluency in English and native proficiency in the local language of Argentina. 

• University degree. 

• Advanced degree in Law, Economics, Political Science, or a related field preferred. 

 
 Important information for candidates 
Recruitment scams have become increasingly common. To protect yourself, please keep the following in mind when applying for roles:
 
• Apply only through our official channels. We do not use third-party platforms or agencies for recruitment unless clearly stated. All open roles are listed on our official careers page: https://tether.recruitee.com/

• Verify the recruiter’s identity. All our recruiters have verified LinkedIn profiles. If you’re unsure, you can confirm their identity by checking their profile or contacting us through our website.

• Be cautious of unusual communication methods. We do not conduct interviews over WhatsApp, Telegram, or SMS. All communication is done through official company emails and platforms.

• Double-check email addresses. All communication from us will come from emails ending in @ tether.to or @ tether.io 

• We will never request payment or financial details. If someone asks for personal financial information or payment at any point during the hiring process, it is a scam. Please report it immediately.

 When in doubt, feel free to reach out through our official website.

If you’re passionate about making a mark in the fintech space, this is your opportunity to collaborate with some of the brightest minds, pushing boundaries and setting new standards. We’ve grown fast, stayed lean, and secured our place as a leader in the industry. If you have excellent English communication skills and are ready to contribute to the most innovative platform on the planet, Tether is the place for you. Are you ready to be part of the future? About the job Tether and its affiliated entities (e.g. Bitfinex) are searching for an organized self-starter to join our Regulatory and Licensing team. The successful candidate is someone with a deep understanding of legal and regulatory requirements pertaining to the crypto-asset industry in Argentina, and who is excited by the opportunity to apply their existing regulatory experience in an exciting and dynamic business environment. The successful candidate will report directly to the Head of Regulatory Affairs & Licensing – Latin America, serving as the primary point of contact for regulatory and licensing matters within Argentina. This is a senior position designed for professionals with proven experience engaging with or working within financial regulators, supervisory authorities, or policy-making bodies. The ideal candidate combines strategic insight with hands-on execution, demonstrates a diplomatic, solutions-oriented approach in navigating complex regulatory environments, and is able to anticipate regulatory changes and adapt strategies proactively to evolving market and legal environments. You will represent the company in regulatory discussions, contribute to regional initiatives under the guidance of the Head of Regulatory Affairs & Licensing – Latin America, and ensure local implementation aligns with the company’s broader Latin American regulatory objectives. To succeed in this role, the incumbent will continuously strive to self-develop and enhance their skill sets including understanding the Company’s products and services, blockchain technology, crypto-assets and the regulatory requirements. Engage with industry associations, chambers, and other stakeholder groups to promote innovation and collaboration. You will have a focus around translating regulatory requirements in Argentina into clear and actionable strategic recommendations, managing relationships and communications between various stakeholders both internal and external to the business. Responsibilities
• Regulatory Strategy Development: development and execution of regulatory strategies, identifying preferable market/s in the region from which to operate. Ensure local implementation aligns with Tether’s broader Latin American regulatory objectives.
• Regulatory Advocacy and Collaboration : participating in regulatory agency interactions, engaging with relevant regulatory authorities, industry bodies, and policymakers to shape the regulatory landscape for stablecoin issuers, advocating for policies that promote innovation while ensuring safety and compliance. Actively contribute to public consultations, working groups, and industry forums, maintaining a high standard of professionalism and institutional diplomacy.
• Policy Analysis and Guidance : Provide analysis on local regulatory proposals, and advise the business on potential regulatory risks and opportunities, while driving initiatives to influence regulatory frameworks as well as monitoring for change across regulations to ensure proactive compliance. Produce concise internal policy briefs and recommendations to inform senior management decision-making.
• Regulatory approval process : contribute to the process of obtaining necessary license approvals in identified markets, where appropriate. Support the preparation and coordination of documentation and responses to regulatory inquiries, ensuring strategic consistency and accuracy.
• Cross-functional Leadership : Collaborate with internal teams (e.g., expansion, legal, compliance, finance) to ensure alignment with regulatory requirements and to proactively address emerging regulatory challenges. Serve as the local regulatory lead, ensuring effective communication and alignment with regional priorities.
• Minimum of 5 years regulatory experience within the financial services or crypto-asset industry.
• Preferred: Minimum of 5–8 years regulatory experience within financial services, fintech, or crypto-asset industries.
• Ability to apply knowledge of key regulatory frameworks in Argentina both strategically and operationally and provide direction to resolve complex regulatory issues.
• Demonstrated diplomatic skills and ability to manage complex stakeholder relationships.
• Expertise in preparing regulatory analysis including the preparation and execution of interactions with regulatory authorities, such as regulatory consultation response submissions.
• Proven experience working with or within regulatory authorities (e.g., central banks, financial supervisory agencies, or ministries of finance) is strongly preferred.
• Demonstrated ability to draft or contribute to public policy responses, regulatory filings, or industry position papers.
• Communication: Exceptional communication skills, both written and verbal, with experience in public speaking and representing companies in regulatory discussions.
• Must be a strong team player, and willing to be fully engaged with key stakeholders both in our company but also with our partners. Must have hands-on professional capable of working collaboratively and independently, with excellent verbal and written communication skills
• Fluency in English and native proficiency in the local language of Argentina.
• University degree.
• Advanced degree in Law, Economics, Political Science, or a related field preferred. Important information for candidates Recruitment scams have become increasingly common. To protect yourself, please keep the following in mind when applying for roles:
• Apply only through our official channels. We do not use third-party platforms or agencies for recruitment unless clearly stated. All open roles are listed on our official careers page: https://tether.recruitee.com/
• Verify the recruiter’s identity. All our recruiters have verified LinkedIn profiles. If you’re unsure, you can confirm their identity by checking their profile or contacting us through our website.
• Be cautious of unusual communication methods. We do not conduct interviews over WhatsApp, Telegram, or SMS. All communication is done through official company emails and platforms.
• Double-check email addresses. All communication from us will come from emails ending in @ tether.to or @ tether.io
• We will never request payment or financial details. If someone asks for personal financial information or payment at any point during the hiring process, it is a scam. Please report it immediately. When in doubt, feel free to reach out through our official website.

Produce concise internal policy briefs and recommendations to inform senior management decision-making.
• Regulatory approval process : contribute to the process of obtaining necessary license approvals in identified markets, where appropriate. Support the preparation and coordination of documentation and responses to regulatory inquiries, ensuring strategic consistency and accuracy.
