• Be cautious of unusual communication methods. We do not conduct interviews over WhatsApp, Telegram, or SMS. All communication is done through official company emails and platforms.
• Double-check email addresses. All communication from us will come from emails ending in @ tether.to or @ tether.io
• We will never request payment or financial details. If someone asks for personal financial information or payment at any point during the hiring process, it is a scam. Please report it immediately. When in doubt, feel free to reach out through our official website.
descriptionByLocale.de:
Descrizione Tritt Tether bei und präge die Zukunft der digitalen Finanzen Bei Tether bauen wir nicht nur Produkte, sondern sind Pioniere einer globalen Finanzrevolution. Unsere modernsten Lösungen ermöglichen es Unternehmen – von Börsen und Wallets bis hin zu Zahlungsabwicklern und Geldautomaten – nahtlos reservierte Tokens über Blockchains hinweg zu integrieren. Durch die Nutzung der Blockchain-Technologie ermöglicht Tether Ihnen, digitale Token sofort, sicher und global zu speichern, zu senden und zu empfangen. Transparenz ist das Fundament von allem, was wir tun, und gewährleistet Vertrauen in jeder Transaktion. Innovieren Sie mit Tether Tether Finance: Unsere innovative Produktpalette umfasst den weltweit vertrauenswürdigsten Stablecoin, USDT, auf den Hunderte Millionen weltweit vertrauen, sowie bahnbrechende Tokenisierungsdienste für digitale Vermögenswerte. Aber das ist erst der Anfang: Tether Power: Unsere Energielösungen fördern nachhaltiges Wachstum und optimieren überschüssige Energie für das Bitcoin-Mining mit umweltfreundlichen Praktiken in modernsten, geodiversen Einrichtungen. Tether Data: Indem wir Durchbrüche in KI und Peer-to-Peer-Technologie vorantreiben, senken wir die Infrastrukturkosten und verbessern die globale Kommunikation mit modernsten Lösungen wie KEET, unserer Flaggschiff-App, die sicheren und privaten Datenaustausch neu definiert. Tether Education: Durch die Demokratisierung des Zugangs zu erstklassigem digitalem Lernen befähigen wir Einzelpersonen, in der digitalen und Gig-Ökonomie zu gedeihen und so globales Wachstum und Chancen voranzutreiben. Tether Evolution: An der Schnittstelle von Technologie und menschlichem Potenzial verschieben wir die Grenzen des Möglichen und gestalten eine Zukunft, in der Innovation und menschliche Fähigkeiten auf kraftvolle, beispiellose Weise verschmelzen. Warum trittst du uns an? Unser Team ist eine globale Talentkraft und arbeitet remote aus allen Ecken der Welt. Wenn Sie leidenschaftlich daran interessiert sind, im Fintech-Bereich Fuß zu fassen, ist dies Ihre Gelegenheit, mit einigen der klügsten Köpfe zusammenzuarbeiten, Grenzen zu verschieben und neue Standards zu setzen. Wir sind schnell gewachsen, sind schlank geblieben und haben uns als führende Persönlichkeit in der Branche gesichert. Wenn Sie über ausgezeichnete englische Kommunikationsfähigkeiten verfügen und bereit sind, zur innovativsten Plattform der Welt beizutragen, ist Tether der richtige Ort für Sie. Bist du bereit, Teil der Zukunft zu sein? Zum Job: Der Senior Technical Product Manager wird für die Gesamtproduktführung von Hadron verantwortlich sein, einschließlich Produktvision, Roadmap-Definition und Umsetzung der Lieferung. Die Rolle dient als zentraler Verantwortlichkeitspunkt für die Plattform, um institutionelle Kundenbedürfnisse, technische Bereitstellung und regulatorische/Compliance-Anforderungen zu erfüllen. Im Gegensatz zu einer traditionellen Produktmanagerrolle erfordert diese Position klare Entscheidungsbefugnisse, um:
• Roadmap-Prioritäten festzulegen und durchzusetzen, einschließlich des Widerstands gegen nicht notwendige Anfragen.
• Koordination mit externen Ingenieurpartnern und Aufrechterhaltung der Disziplin im Umfang.
• Konflikte zwischen Kundenanfragen, technischer Machbarkeit und Compliance-Einschränkungen zu lösen.
• Treffen Sie Go/No-Go-Entscheidungen zu Integrationen, Produktfunktionen und Releases.
• Sicherstellen, dass die Produktentwicklung mit der langfristigen Architektur und Skalierbarkeit der Hadron-Plattform übereinstimmt. Critical Context Hadron bedient institutionelle Kunden weltweit mit vielfältigen und oft widersprüchlichen Tokenisierungsanforderungen, darunter verschiedene Anlageklassen, Blockchain-Netzwerke, Compliance-Rahmenwerke und Vertriebsmodelle. Der Product Manager muss diese Komplexität managen, indem er eine klare Produktstrategie verfolgt und rücksichtslos priorisiert und Scope Crep verhindert. Die Rolle erfordert starke Eigenverantwortung und die Fähigkeit, schwierige Priorisierungsentscheidungen in einem sich schnell verändernden institutionellen Umfeld zu treffen. Reporting & Collaboration Bericht an: VP Product Der Product Manager arbeitet eng mit dem Head of Expansion und Product Advisor von Hadron zusammen, um eine starke Abstimmung zwischen institutioneller Kundennachfrage, Marktchancen und der Hadron-Produktroadmap sicherzustellen. Head of Expansion & Product Advisor liefert kontinuierliches Marktfeedback basierend auf institutionellen Kundenkontakten und strategischen Partnerschaften und stellt sicher, dass die Produktentwicklung die reale Marktnachfrage widerspiegelt. Der Product Manager ist dafür verantwortlich, diese Eingaben in Produktprioritäten, Roadmap-Entscheidungen und technische Umsetzung umzusetzen. Große Roadmap-Initiativen, kundenorientierte Feature-Anfragen und neue Integrationen werden voraussichtlich zwischen dem Produktmanager und dem Head of Expansion und Product Advisor vor der Implementierung abgestimmt. Der ideale Kandidat Wir suchen speziell Kandidaten, die auf einer höheren Ebene tätig sind und eine tiefe, praxisnahe Erfahrung in Tokenisierung und traditioneller Finanzinfrastruktur nachweisen können. Sie sollten sich in den meisten folgenden Bereichen wiedererkennen können: Tokenisierung, End-to-End-• Sie haben persönlich ein Tokenisierungsprodukt gebaut, ausgeliefert oder besessen – von der Asset-Onboarding und Smart-Contract-Spezifikation bis hin zur Verwahrungsintegration, Investoren-Cap Table Management und sekundären Transfermechaniken.
• Man kann den gesamten Token-Lebenszyklus (Ausgabe, Übertragung, Einlösung, Unternehmensmaßnahmen, Verbrennung) durchlaufen, ohne etwas nachschlagen zu müssen, und man versteht die Abwägungen zwischen verschiedenen Implementierungsansätzen.
• Sie verstehen Verwahrungsmodelle: den Unterschied zwischen Selbstverwahrung, qualifizierten Verwahrermodellen, Omnibus- und getrennten Wallet-Strukturen und was jede für Compliance und operative Risiken bedeutet.
• Du hast praktische Kenntnisse über On-Chain-Siedlungsmechaniken und wie sie mit traditionellen T+1/T+2-Siedlungsschienen (DTCC, Euroclear, SWIFT) interagieren.
• Sie sind fließend in Token-Standards über mehrere Ketten hinweg vertraut und wissen, wann Sie auf ERC-20, ERC-1400 oder proprietäre Strukturen zurückgreifen müssen und warum. TradFi-Tiefe
• Sie haben ein gutes Verständnis davon, wie institutionelle Finanzinfrastruktur funktioniert: wie Fonds strukturiert und verwaltet werden, wie Broker-Dealer clearen und abwickeln, wie Banken Trust- und Verwahrungsverhältnisse verwalten und wie Prime Brokerage funktioniert.
• Sie verstehen die tokenisierten Instrumente: Geldmarktfonds, Anleihen, strukturierte Kredite, Aktien, Immobilien, Rohstoffe, einschließlich der Art und Weise, wie jedes in der traditionellen Welt bepreist, übertragen und betreut wird.
• Sie sind mit regulatorischen Rahmenbedingungen für tokenisierte Vermögenswerte wie MiCA, Reg D/S, MAS MAS Notice, VARA vertraut und können die Compliance-Einschränkungen identifizieren, die im Produktdesign kodiert werden müssen.
• Sie können institutionelle Dokumente lesen und schnell interpretieren: RFPs, Term Sheets, Sorgerechtsvereinbarungen und Due-Diligence-Fragebögen und diese ohne umfangreiche Anleitung in Produktanforderungen übersetzen. Institutionelle Nachfrage, schnelle Übersetzung
• Sie haben direkt mit institutionellen Kunden wie Vermögensmanagern, Banken, Staatsfonds und Family Offices als primärer Product Owner zusammengearbeitet und wissen, wie man deren Erwartungen steuert und Signale aus dem Rauschen herausfiltert.
• Sie können einen neuen institutionellen Anwendungsfall oder eine komplexe Integrationsanforderung hören und schnell Machbarkeit, Umfang und Priorität bewerten, ohne tagelang die Grundlagen zu recherchieren.
• Sie haben Erfahrung darin, zwischen Anfragen zu unterscheiden, die echte Produktlücken offenbaren, und solchen, die maßgeschneiderte Kundenanpassungen sind, und wissen, wie Sie beides handhaben, ohne den Fahrplan zu unterbrechen. Zentrale Verantwortlichkeiten Produktstrategie & Roadmap
• Definieren und pflegen Sie die Hadron-Produktroadmap.
• Produktinitiativen basierend auf Marktnachfrage, technischer Machbarkeit und geschäftlichen Auswirkungen priorisieren.
• Eine klare Produktvision für Hadron über mehrere Anlageklassen und Blockchain-Netzwerke hinweg aufrechtzuerhalten.
• Sicherstellung langfristiger Plattformskalierbarkeit und Produktkohärenz. Produktentwicklung & Lieferung
• Umsetzen Sie Geschäfts- und Marktbedürfnisse in klare Produktanforderungen.
• Den Produktrückstand und die Entwicklungsprioritäten aufrechterhalten.
• Koordination von Entwicklungszyklen und Feature-Releases.
• Sicherstellung der pünktlichen Umsetzung von Roadmap-Meilensteinen. Ingenieurskoordination
• Fungiert als primäre Schnittstelle zwischen Produkt und Ingenieurwesen.
• Koordination der Entwicklungsarbeit mit internen Ingenieuren und externen Technologiepartnern.
• Klare Dokumentation der Produktfunktionen, APIs und Plattformfähigkeiten zu pflegen.
• Plattformleistung, Fehler und technische Verbesserungen verfolgen. Kunden- und Integrationsfeedback
• Sammeln und strukturieren Sie Feedback von institutionellen Kunden und internen Teams.
• Identifiziere wiederkehrende Integrationsherausforderungen und übersetze sie in Produktverbesserungen.
• Verbesserung der Onboarding-Workflows und des Entwickler-Erlebnisses. Requisiti
• 5+ Jahre Erfahrung im Produktmanagement oder Produkteigentum, davon mindestens 3 Jahre in digitalen Vermögenswerten, Tokenisierung oder Finanzinfrastruktur.
• Demonstrierte praktische Erfahrung beim Versand eines Tokenisierungs- oder RWA-Produkts mit Verantwortung für den gesamten Token-Lebenszyklus.
• Tiefgehendes Wissen über die TradFi-Kapitalmarktinfrastruktur einschließlich Abwicklung, Verwahrung, Clearing und Fondsstrukturen.
• Nachgewiesene Fähigkeit, institutionelle Anforderungen schnell zu analysieren und in umsetzbare Produktentscheidungen umzusetzen.
• Erfahrung im Management externer Ingenieurpartner und bei der Durchsetzung von Disziplin im Umfang komplexer Multi-Stakeholder-Programme hinweg.
• Regulatorische Kompetenz in mindestens zwei wichtigen Tokenisierungsrahmen (MiCA, MAS, SEC, VARA oder gleichwertig).
• Ausgezeichnetes geschriebenes und gesprochenes Englisch. In der Lage, präzise Produktspezifikationen, kundenorientierte Dokumentationen und Executive Summary zu erstellen. Schön zu haben:
• Vorherige Erfahrung bei einer Bank, Vermögensverwalter, Verwahrer oder reguliertem Fintech in einer Produkt-, Technologie- oder Marktposition.
• Praktische Erfahrung mit mehreren Token-Standards und Blockchain-Netzwerken im Produktionskontext.
• Erfahrung in der Entwicklung oder Integration von Custody-APIs, Übertragungsagentensystemen oder Fondsverwaltungsplattformen.
• Verständnis von On-Chain-Compliance-Mechanismen: Whitelisting, Übertragungsbeschränkungen, KYC/AML-Hooks auf Smart-Contract-Ebene.
• Exposition gegenüber Multi-Chain-Deployment-Strategien und den Abwägungen zwischen L1-, L2- und permissioned-Chain-Umgebungen.
• Erfahrung mit institutionellen Kunden-Onboarding-Workflows in einem regulierten Kontext. Wichtige Informationen für Kandidaten: Rekrutierungsbetrug ist immer häufiger geworden. Um sich zu schützen, beachten Sie bitte Folgendes bei der Bewerbung:
• Bewerben Sie sich ausschließlich über unsere offiziellen Kanäle. Wir nutzen keine Drittanbieterplattformen oder Agenturen für die Rekrutierung, es sei denn, dies ist ausdrücklich angegeben. Alle offenen Stellen sind auf unserer offiziellen Karriereseite aufgeführt: https://tether.recruitee.com/
• Verifizieren Sie die Identität des Personalvermittlers. Alle unsere Recruiter haben verifizierte LinkedIn-Profile. Wenn Sie unsicher sind, können Sie ihre Identität bestätigen, indem Sie ihr Profil überprüfen oder uns über unsere Website kontaktieren.
• Seien Sie vorsichtig bei ungewöhnlichen Kommunikationsmethoden. Wir führen keine Interviews über WhatsApp, Telegram oder SMS durch. Alle Kommunikation erfolgt über offizielle Firmen-E-Mails und Plattformen.
• E-Mail-Adressen doppelt überprüfen. Alle Kommunikation von uns erfolgt über E-Mails, die mit @ tether.to oder @ tether.io enden
• Wir werden niemals Zahlungs- oder Finanzdetails verlangen. Wenn jemand während des Einstellungsprozesses nach persönlichen Finanzinformationen oder einer Zahlung fragt, handelt es sich um einen Betrug. Bitte melden Sie es sofort.
descriptionByLocale.fr:
Descrizione Rejoignez Tether et façonnez l’avenir de la finance numérique Chez Tether, nous ne construisons pas seulement des produits, nous sommes des pionniers d’une révolution financière mondiale. Nos solutions de pointe permettent aux entreprises — des plateformes d’échange et portefeuilles aux processeurs de paiement et distributeurs automatiques — d’intégrer sans effort les jetons garantis par réserve à travers les blockchains. En exploitant la puissance de la technologie blockchain, Tether vous permet de stocker, envoyer et recevoir des jetons numériques instantanément, de manière sécurisée et mondiale, le tout à une fraction du coût. La transparence est la base de tout ce que nous faisons, garantissant la confiance dans chaque transaction. Innovez avec Tether Tether Finance : Notre suite de produits innovants propose le stablecoin le plus fiable au monde, USDT, utilisé par des centaines de millions de personnes dans le monde, ainsi que des services pionniers de tokenisation d’actifs numériques. Mais ce n’est que le début : Tether Power : Stimulant une croissance durable, nos solutions énergétiques optimisent l’excédent d’énergie pour le minage de Bitcoin en utilisant des pratiques écologiques dans des installations à la pointe de la technologie et géodiversifiées. Tether Data : En favorisant des avancées en IA et en technologie peer-to-peer, nous réduisons les coûts d’infrastructure et améliorons les communications mondiales grâce à des solutions de pointe comme KEET, notre application phare qui redéfinit le partage sécurisé et privé des données. Tether Education : Démocratisant l’accès à un apprentissage numérique de premier ordre, nous donnons aux individus les moyens de prospérer dans les économies numérique et des petits boulots, stimulant la croissance mondiale et les opportunités. Évolution du câble : À l’intersection de la technologie et du potentiel humain, nous repoussons les limites du possible, en bâtissant un avenir où innovation et capacités humaines fusionnent de manière puissante et sans précédent. Pourquoi nous rejoindre ? Notre équipe est une puissance mondiale des talents, travaillant à distance depuis tous les coins du monde. Si vous êtes passionné par le fait de vous démarquer dans le domaine fintech, c’est votre opportunité de collaborer avec certains des esprits les plus brillants, de repousser les limites et d’établir de nouveaux standards. Nous avons rapidement grandi, resté épurés et assurés notre place de leader dans le secteur. Si vous avez d’excellentes compétences en communication anglaise et êtes prêt à contribuer à la plateforme la plus innovante au monde, Tether est l’endroit qu’il vous faut. Êtes-vous prêt à faire partie de l’avenir ? À propos du poste Le Senior Technical Product Manager sera responsable du leadership global du produit Hadron, incluant la vision produit, la définition de la feuille de route et l’exécution de la livraison. Ce rôle sert de point unique de responsabilité pour la plateforme afin de répondre aux besoins des clients institutionnels, à la prestation technique et aux exigences réglementaires/conformes. Contrairement à un poste traditionnel de Product Manager, ce poste requiert une autorité décisionnelle claire pour :
• Définir et faire respecter les priorités de la feuille de route, y compris la résistance aux demandes non essentielles.
• Coordonner avec des partenaires d’ingénierie externes et maintenir la discipline de champ d’application.
• Résoudre les conflits entre les demandes des clients, la faisabilité technique et les contraintes de conformité.
• Prendre des décisions de go/no-go concernant les intégrations, les fonctionnalités produit et les sorties.
• Garantir que le développement produit s’aligne sur l’architecture à long terme et la scalabilité de la plateforme Hadron. Contexte critique Hadron sert des clients institutionnels à l’échelle mondiale avec des exigences de tokenisation diverses et souvent contradictoires, incluant différentes classes d’actifs, réseaux blockchain, cadres de conformité et modèles de distribution. Le chef de produit doit gérer cette complexité en maintenant une stratégie produit claire, en priorisant sans pitié et en évitant l’élargissement de la portée. Le poste exige une forte responsabilité et la capacité de prendre des décisions difficiles de priorisation dans un environnement institutionnel en constante évolution. Reporting & Collaboration Rend compte à : VP Produit Le Product Manager travaille en étroite collaboration avec le Responsable de l’Expansion et du Conseiller Produit chez Hadron afin d’assurer un fort alignement entre la demande des clients institutionnels, les opportunités de marché et la feuille de route des produits Hadron. Le responsable de l’expansion et du conseiller produit fournit un retour continu sur le marché basé sur les engagements institutionnels avec les clients et les partenariats stratégiques, garantissant que le développement produit reflète la demande réelle du marché. Le chef de produit est responsable de traduire ces intrants en priorités produit, décisions de feuille de route et exécution de l’ingénierie. Les principales initiatives de feuille de route, les demandes de fonctionnalités orientées par le client et les nouvelles intégrations devraient être alignées entre le chef de produit et le responsable de l’expansion & conseiller produit avant la mise en œuvre. Le candidat idéal Nous recherchons spécifiquement des candidats ayant travaillé à un niveau supérieur et pouvant démontrer une expérience pratique approfondie de la tokenisation et de l’infrastructure financière traditionnelle. Vous devriez pouvoir vous reconnaître dans la plupart des éléments suivants : Tokenisation, de bout en bout
• Vous avez personnellement construit, expédié ou possédé un produit de tokenisation — de l’intégration d’actifs et la spécification des smart contracts jusqu’à l’intégration de la garde, la gestion de la table de capitalisation investisseur, et les mécaniques de transfert secondaires.
• Vous pouvez parcourir tout le cycle de vie du token (émission, transfert, rachats, actions d’entreprise, burn) sans avoir besoin de chercher quoi que ce soit, et vous comprenez les compromis entre les différentes approches d’implémentation.
• Vous comprenez les modèles de garde : la différence entre l’auto-garde, les modèles de dépositaires qualifiés, les structures omnibus vs. portefeuilles séparés, et ce que chacun signifie pour la conformité et le risque opérationnel.
• Vous avez des connaissances pratiques sur les mécaniques de colonie on-chain et leur interaction avec les rails traditionnels T+1/T+2 (DTCC, Euroclear, SWIFT).
• Vous maîtrisez parfaitement les standards de jetons sur plusieurs chaînes et comprenez quand recourir à ERC-20, ERC-1400 ou aux structures propriétaires, et pourquoi. Profondeur TradFi
• Vous avez une solide compréhension du fonctionnement de l’infrastructure financière institutionnelle : comment les fonds sont structurés et administrés, comment les courtiers négociants liquident et réglent, comment les banques gèrent les relations de fiducie et de garde, et comment fonctionne le courtage principal.
• Vous comprenez les instruments tokenisés : fonds du marché monétaire, obligations, crédit structuré, actions, immobilier, matières premières, y compris la manière dont chacun est valorisé, transféré et géré dans le monde traditionnel.
• Vous êtes à l’aise avec les cadres réglementaires pertinents pour les actifs tokenisés tels que MiCA, Reg D/S, MAS MAS notice, VARA et pouvez identifier les contraintes de conformité à coder dans la conception produit.
• Vous pouvez lire et interpréter rapidement des documents institutionnels : RFP, feuilles de conditions, accords de garde et questionnaires de diligence raisonnable, et les traduire en exigences produits sans un accompagnement approfondi. Demande institutionnelle, traduction rapide
• Vous avez travaillé directement avec des clients institutionnels tels que gestionnaires d’actifs, banques, fonds souverains, family offices en tant que principal product owner, et vous savez gérer leurs attentes et extraire des signaux du bruit.
• Vous pouvez entendre un nouveau cas d’utilisation institutionnel ou une exigence d’intégration complexe et évaluer rapidement la faisabilité, la portée et la priorité, sans avoir besoin de plusieurs jours pour étudier les bases.
• Vous avez de l’expérience à distinguer les demandes qui révèlent de véritables lacunes de produit et celles qui sont des personnalisations personnalisées pour les clients, et vous savez gérer les deux sans compromettre la feuille de route. Responsabilités clés Stratégie produit & feuille de route
• Définir et maintenir la feuille de route des produits Hadron.
• Prioriser les initiatives produit en fonction de la demande du marché, de la faisabilité technique et de l’impact sur l’entreprise.
• Maintenir une vision claire du produit pour Hadron à travers plusieurs classes d’actifs et réseaux blockchain.
• Garantir la scalabilité à long terme de la plateforme et la cohérence du produit. Développement et livraison de produits
• Traduire les besoins commerciaux et du marché en exigences claires du produit.
• Maintenir le backlog produit et les priorités de développement.
• Coordonner les cycles de développement et la mise à disposition des fonctionnalités.
• Garantir la livraison rapide des jalons de la feuille de route. Coordination de l’ingénierie
• Agir comme l’interface principale entre le produit et l’ingénierie.
• Coordonner le travail de développement avec les ingénieurs internes et les partenaires technologiques externes.
• Maintenir une documentation claire des fonctionnalités du produit, des API et des capacités de la plateforme.
• Suivre les performances des plateformes, les bugs et les améliorations techniques. Retour client et intégration
• Collecter et structurer les retours des clients institutionnels et des équipes internes.
• Identifier les défis récurrents d’intégration et les traduire en améliorations produit.
• Améliorer les flux de travail d’intégration et l’expérience des développeurs. Exigences
• 5+ ans d’expérience en gestion de produit ou propriété de produit, avec au moins 3 ans en actifs numériques, tokenisation ou infrastructure financière.
• Expérience pratique démontrée dans la livraison d’un produit de tokenisation ou RWA, avec responsabilité pour l’ensemble du cycle de vie du jeton.
• Connaissance approfondie et pratique de l’infrastructure des marchés de capitaux TradFi, y compris le règlement, la garde, la compensation et les structures de fonds.
• Capacité avérée à analyser rapidement les exigences institutionnelles et à les traduire en décisions produit exploitables.
• Expérience de la gestion de partenaires d’ingénierie externes et de l’application de la discipline du périmètre dans des programmes complexes et multipartites.
• Littératie réglementaire à travers au moins deux grands cadres de tokenisation (MiCA, MAS, SEC, VARA ou équivalent).
• Excellent anglais écrit et parlé. Capable de rédiger des spécifications produites concises, une documentation destinée aux clients et des résumés exécutifs. C’est agréable à avoir :
• Expérience préalable dans une banque, un gestionnaire d’actifs, un dépositaire ou une fintech réglementée dans un rôle dans un produit, une technologie ou un marché.
• Expérience pratique avec plusieurs standards de jetons et réseaux blockchain en contexte de production.
• Expérience de conception ou d’intégration avec des API de garde, des systèmes d’agents de transfert ou des plateformes d’administration de fonds.
• Compréhension des mécanismes de conformité on-chain : liste blanche, restrictions de transfert, crochets KYC/AML au niveau des contrats intelligents.
• Exposition aux stratégies de déploiement multi-chaînes et aux compromis entre environnements L1, L2 et chaîne autorisée.
• Expérience des flux de travail d’intégration des clients institutionnels dans un contexte réglementé. Informations importantes pour les candidats Les arnaques au recrutement sont devenues de plus en plus courantes. Pour vous protéger, veuillez garder à l’esprit les éléments suivants lors de votre candidature :
• Postulez uniquement par nos canaux officiels. Nous n’utilisons pas de plateformes ou agences tierces pour le recrutement, sauf indication claire. Tous les postes ouverts sont listés sur notre page officielle des carrières : https://tether.recruitee.com/
• Vérifier l’identité du recruteur. Tous nos recruteurs ont des profils LinkedIn vérifiés. Si vous n’êtes pas sûr, vous pouvez confirmer leur identité en consultant leur profil ou en nous contactant via notre site web.
• Soyez prudent face aux méthodes de communication inhabituelles. Nous ne réalisons pas d’interviews via WhatsApp, Telegram ou SMS. Toute la communication se fait par les emails officiels de l’entreprise et les plateformes.
• Vérifier deux fois les adresses e-mail. Toute communication de notre part proviendra d’emails se terminant par @ tether.to ou @ tether.io
• Nous ne demanderons jamais de paiement ou de détails financiers. Si quelqu’un demande des informations financières personnelles ou un paiement à un moment donné du processus d’embauche, c’est une arnaque. Veuillez le signaler immédiatement.

jobs.title: Senior Frontend Developer (100% Remote Worldwide)
jobs.description:
Join Tether and Shape the Future of Digital Finance 
 At Tether, we’re not just building products, we’re pioneering a global financial revolution. Our cutting-edge solutions empower businesses—from exchanges and wallets to payment processors and ATMs—to seamlessly integrate reserve-backed tokens across blockchains. By harnessing the power of blockchain technology, Tether enables you to store, send, and receive digital tokens instantly, securely, and globally, all at a fraction of the cost. Transparency is the bedrock of everything we do, ensuring trust in every transaction. 
 
 Innovate with Tether 
 Tether Finance: Our innovative product suite features the world’s most trusted stablecoin, USDT , relied upon by hundreds of millions worldwide, alongside pioneering digital asset tokenization services. 
 But that’s just the beginning: 
 Tether Power: Driving sustainable growth, our energy solutions optimize excess power for Bitcoin mining using eco-friendly practices in state-of-the-art, geo-diverse facilities. 
 Tether Data: Fueling breakthroughs in AI and peer-to-peer technology, we reduce infrastructure costs and enhance global communications with cutting-edge solutions like KEET , our flagship app that redefines secure and private data sharing. 
 Tether Education : Democratizing access to top-tier digital learning, we empower individuals to thrive in the digital and gig economies, driving global growth and opportunity. 
 Tether Evolution : At the intersection of technology and human potential, we are pushing the boundaries of what is possible, crafting a future where innovation and human capabilities merge in powerful, unprecedented ways. 
 
 Why Join Us? 
 Our team is a global talent powerhouse, working remotely from every corner of the world. If you’re passionate about making a mark in the fintech space, this is your opportunity to collaborate with some of the brightest minds, pushing boundaries and setting new standards. We’ve grown fast, stayed lean, and secured our place as a leader in the industry. 
 If you have excellent English communication skills and are ready to contribute to the most innovative platform on the planet, Tether is the place for you. 
 Are you ready to be part of the future? 
 
 About the job 
 As a senior Frontend Developer, you will be a part of the team that works on the development and maintenance of the frontend components of multiple applications related to the platform. This includes: 
 
• New Products and Features - Tether continuously strives to create innovative new features in order to provide the most professional experience for customers. These are developed and deployed using agile methodologies, to ensure the user experience remains the best in the industry. 

• Performance - all ui components that power Tether platform must remain effortlessly smooth, responsive, and real-time for customers as the platform continues to scale to accommodate new user growth. 

• Security - Tether makes Security its most important feature. The Frontend Development team is responsible for building all the interactions with API services with the highest security principles and standard, in order to protect the safety of the entire user base. 

 
 
 Responsibilities 
 Collaborate with the team to work on the development of the Bitfinex KYC webapps. Including: 
 
• New Features: Create innovative new features in order to provide the most professional KYC experience for customers and compliance officers. These are developed and deployed using agile methodologies. 

• Scalability: The web application must remain effortlessly smooth, responsive, and real-time for customers as the platform continues to scale to accommodate new user growth. 

• Design: Build beautiful reactive applications and trading tools. 

• Domain knowledge: willing to learn the domain-related logic and condition-based logic, including the one based on difference between multiple users scenarios and combinations of factors 

• Debugging: Being able to debug hidden/hard to find issues when needed, advanced usage of browser debugging tools, including network, source, stop points etc. 

 

 
• With 5+ years of proven experience in software development, with a strong focus on Frontend. 

• Knowledgeable and experienced with micro-service architecture. 

• Comfortable with high-availability concepts. 

• Highly proficient in JavaScript and ES6+. 

• Thoroughly experienced with React, SASS, Redux, build tools and the core principles surrounding these. 

• Some backend experience to be able to run the app locally via NodeJS, with MongoDB, configuring ports and local environment 

• Familiar with modern front-end pipelines and tools. 

• Experienced with RESTful and RPC-based APIs. 

• Interest in bringing diverse, innovative applications to life. 

• Interest in modernising and optimising different web applications. 

 
 
 
 Important information for candidates 
Recruitment scams have become increasingly common. To protect yourself, please keep the following in mind when applying for roles:
 
• Apply only through our official channels. We do not use third-party platforms or agencies for recruitment unless clearly stated. All open roles are listed on our official careers page: https://tether.recruitee.com/

• Verify the recruiter’s identity. All our recruiters have verified LinkedIn profiles. If you’re unsure, you can confirm their identity by checking their profile or contacting us through our website.

• Be cautious of unusual communication methods. We do not conduct interviews over WhatsApp, Telegram, or SMS. All communication is done through official company emails and platforms.

• Double-check email addresses. All communication from us will come from emails ending in @ tether.to or @ tether.io 

• We will never request payment or financial details. If someone asks for personal financial information or payment at any point during the hiring process, it is a scam. Please report it immediately.

 When in doubt, feel free to reach out through our official website.

jobs.title: Technical Lead (100% remote Worldwide)
jobs.description:
Join Tether and Shape the Future of Digital Finance 
 At Tether, we’re not just building products, we’re pioneering a global financial revolution. Our cutting-edge solutions empower businesses—from exchanges and wallets to payment processors and ATMs—to seamlessly integrate reserve-backed tokens across blockchains. By harnessing the power of blockchain technology, Tether enables you to store, send, and receive digital tokens instantly, securely, and globally, all at a fraction of the cost. Transparency is the bedrock of everything we do, ensuring trust in every transaction.
 
 Innovate with Tether 
 Tether Finance: Our innovative product suite features the world’s most trusted stablecoin, USDT , relied upon by hundreds of millions worldwide, alongside pioneering digital asset tokenization services.
 But that’s just the beginning:
 Tether Power: Driving sustainable growth, our energy solutions optimize excess power for Bitcoin mining using eco-friendly practices in state-of-the-art, geo-diverse facilities.
 Tether Data: Fueling breakthroughs in AI and peer-to-peer technology, we reduce infrastructure costs and enhance global communications with cutting-edge solutions like KEET , our flagship app that redefines secure and private data sharing.
 Tether Education : Democratizing access to top-tier digital learning, we empower individuals to thrive in the digital and gig economies, driving global growth and opportunity.
 Tether Evolution : At the intersection of technology and human potential, we are pushing the boundaries of what is possible, crafting a future where innovation and human capabilities merge in powerful, unprecedented ways.
 
 Why Join Us? 
 Our team is a global talent powerhouse, working remotely from every corner of the world. If you’re passionate about making a mark in the fintech space, this is your opportunity to collaborate with some of the brightest minds, pushing boundaries and setting new standards. We’ve grown fast, stayed lean, and secured our place as a leader in the industry.
 If you have excellent English communication skills and are ready to contribute to the most innovative platform on the planet, Tether is the place for you.
 Are you ready to be part of the future? 
 
 About the job 
 We’re looking for a Technical Lead to lead our development efforts in building cross platform peer-to-peer applications using the Pear Runtime and the broader ecosystem created by Holepunch.
 You’ll define technical direction, support engineers in day-to-day development, and act as the main liaison with Holepunch engineers - translating upstream developments into actionable work, coordinating releases, and contributing to the evolution of our peer-to-peer ecosystem.
 
 What you’ll work on 
 
• Act as the primary technical liaison between our dev team and the Holepunch engineers.

• Lead knowledge-sharing sessions between the teams for everyone to stay up-to-date.

• Build and maintain flagship desktop (Electron) and mobile (React Native) applications that run fully peer-to-peer with zero central servers.

• Design beautiful, performant cross-platform UX for file sharing, messaging, video calls, and collaborative tools.

• Integrate and extend the Pear Runtime / Holepunch stack (Hypercore, Hyperdrive, Hyperswarm, etc.).

• Ship new features rapidly, participate in code reviews, write tests, and optimize performance.

• Help external partners and the open-source community build on the platform.

• Occasionally contribute improvements and bug fixes back to the underlying open-source modules.

 
 
 Responsibilities 
 
• Act as the primary technical liaison between our dev team and the Holepunch engineers.

• Lead knowledge-sharing sessions between the teams for everyone to stay up-to-date.

• Translate product requirements into clear technical plans and architectures aligned with the Holepunch stack.

• Ensure our applications follow a modular approach and are designed according to best practices. 

• Coordinate internal and external documentation and training plans.

• Coordinate consolidated feedback from our dev team and external projects to the Holepunch team

• Guide and mentor the different engineering teams.

 
 
• Strong production experience with React Native and/or Electron (shipping apps that real users love)

• A strong background in building and managing modular codebases and creating reusable npm modules.

• 5+ years of professional software engineering experience

• Experience leading small development teams and coordinating with internal and external stakeholders.

• Experience with mobile application stores, browser stores or Desktop stores.

• Very comfortable with Node.js and modern JavaScript/TypeScript ecosystems

• Proven experience designing and building local-first applications where the local data model is the primary source of truth.

• Hands-on experience with local-first data technologies (storage, conflict resolution, event sourcing, etc.)

• Familiarity with cross-platform packaging & deployment

• Familiarity with end-to-end encryption and secure local storage.

• Solid grasp of asynchronous programming, networking, and data synchronization concepts

• Proficiency with Git, CI/CD and collaborative open-source workflows.

• Excellent communication skills (fully remote, global team)

 
 
 Important information for candidates 
Recruitment scams have become increasingly common. To protect yourself, please keep the following in mind when applying for roles:
 
• Apply only through our official channels. We do not use third-party platforms or agencies for recruitment unless clearly stated. All open roles are listed on our official careers page: https://tether.recruitee.com/

• Verify the recruiter’s identity. All our recruiters have verified LinkedIn profiles. If you’re unsure, you can confirm their identity by checking their profile or contacting us through our website.

• Be cautious of unusual communication methods. We do not conduct interviews over WhatsApp, Telegram, or SMS. All communication is done through official company emails and platforms.

• Double-check email addresses. All communication from us will come from emails ending in @ tether.to or @ tether.io 

• We will never request payment or financial details. If someone asks for personal financial information or payment at any point during the hiring process, it is a scam. Please report it immediately.

 When in doubt, feel free to reach out through our official website.

• Experience with mobile application stores, browser stores or Desktop stores.
• Very comfortable with Node.js and modern JavaScript/TypeScript ecosystems
• Proven experience designing and building local-first applications where the local data model is the primary source of truth.
• Hands-on experience with local-first data technologies (storage, conflict resolution, event sourcing, etc.)
• Familiarity with cross-platform packaging & deployment
• Familiarity with end-to-end encryption and secure local storage.
• Solid grasp of asynchronous programming, networking, and data synchronization concepts
• Proficiency with Git, CI/CD and collaborative open-source workflows.
• Excellent communication skills (fully remote, global team) Important information for candidates Recruitment scams have become increasingly common. To protect yourself, please keep the following in mind when applying for roles:

About the job We’re looking for a Technical Lead to lead our development efforts in building cross platform peer-to-peer applications using the Pear Runtime and the broader ecosystem created by Holepunch. You’ll define technical direction, support engineers in day-to-day development, and act as the main liaison with Holepunch engineers - translating upstream developments into actionable work, coordinating releases, and contributing to the evolution of our peer-to-peer ecosystem. What you’ll work on
• Act as the primary technical liaison between our dev team and the Holepunch engineers.
• Lead knowledge-sharing sessions between the teams for everyone to stay up-to-date.
• Build and maintain flagship desktop (Electron) and mobile (React Native) applications that run fully peer-to-peer with zero central servers.
• Design beautiful, performant cross-platform UX for file sharing, messaging, video calls, and collaborative tools.
• Integrate and extend the Pear Runtime / Holepunch stack (Hypercore, Hyperdrive, Hyperswarm, etc.).
• Ship new features rapidly, participate in code reviews, write tests, and optimize performance.
• Help external partners and the open-source community build on the platform.
• Occasionally contribute improvements and bug fixes back to the underlying open-source modules. Responsibilities
• Act as the primary technical liaison between our dev team and the Holepunch engineers.

• Coordinate internal and external documentation and training plans.
• Coordinate consolidated feedback from our dev team and external projects to the Holepunch team
• Guide and mentor the different engineering teams.
• Strong production experience with React Native and/or Electron (shipping apps that real users love)
• A strong background in building and managing modular codebases and creating reusable npm modules.

• Experience leading small development teams and coordinating with internal and external stakeholders.

jobs.description:
Join Tether and Shape the Future of Digital Finance 
 At Tether, we’re not just building products, we’re pioneering a global financial revolution. Our cutting-edge solutions empower businesses—from exchanges and wallets to payment processors and ATMs—to seamlessly integrate reserve-backed tokens across blockchains. By harnessing the power of blockchain technology, Tether enables you to store, send, and receive digital tokens instantly, securely, and globally, all at a fraction of the cost. Transparency is the bedrock of everything we do, ensuring trust in every transaction. 
 
 Innovate with Tether 
 Tether Finance: Our innovative product suite features the world’s most trusted stablecoin, USDT , relied upon by hundreds of millions worldwide, alongside pioneering digital asset tokenization services. 
 But that’s just the beginning: 
 Tether Power: Driving sustainable growth, our energy solutions optimize excess power for Bitcoin mining using eco-friendly practices in state-of-the-art, geo-diverse facilities. 
 Tether Data: Fueling breakthroughs in AI and peer-to-peer technology, we reduce infrastructure costs and enhance global communications with cutting-edge solutions like KEET , our flagship app that redefines secure and private data sharing. 
 Tether Education : Democratizing access to top-tier digital learning, we empower individuals to thrive in the digital and gig economies, driving global growth and opportunity. 
 Tether Evolution : At the intersection of technology and human potential, we are pushing the boundaries of what is possible, crafting a future where innovation and human capabilities merge in powerful, unprecedented ways. 
 
 Why Join Us? 
 Our team is a global talent powerhouse, working remotely from every corner of the world. If you’re passionate about making a mark in the fintech space, this is your opportunity to collaborate with some of the brightest minds, pushing boundaries and setting new standards. We’ve grown fast, stayed lean, and secured our place as a leader in the industry. 
 If you have excellent English communication skills and are ready to contribute to the most innovative platform on the planet, Tether is the place for you. 
 Are you ready to be part of the future? 
 
 
 About the job 
 The role involves working in a dynamic environment with a diverse team of senior backend developers, product managers and leadership to build crypto wallet solutions . The applications are meant to be high performance, light-weight and highly intuitive to cater to a variety of audiences. 
 You will be working on developing cutting edge mobile applications integrating crypto wallets and defi features . 
 You will also contribute to backend components when needed to support mobile features and unblock mobile delivery. 
 You will also provide technical leadership , guide mobile engineering best practices, and support other engineers through reviews and mentoring. 
 
 Responsibilities 
 
• Leadership: Lead a small group of React Native engineers. Drive architectural decisions, enforce coding standards, and ensure timely high quality delivery. 

• Development: Design and build advanced cross platform applications for the iOS and Android platforms using React Native, review work from other engineers to ensure quality and architectural alignment, and contribute to backend services or APIs when required to support mobile functionality. 

• Integration: Work closely with backend developers, integrate Javascript SDKs, libraries, and backend services into mobile applications, and extend backend logic when needed to complete end-to-end features. 

• Collaboration: Collaborate with product managers, designers, and other developers to deliver innovative solutions. 

• Architecture: Own and define patterns for state management, navigation, performance, modularization, and security across mobile applications. 

 
 Mandatory 
 
• Thoroughly experienced with React, React-Native (mainly around Expo), Redux and the core principles surrounding these. 

• Highly proficient in JavaScript and ES6+ . 

• Experience with CI/CD pipelines for mobile development. 

• Familiar with modern front-end pipelines and tools . 

• Experienced with Native modules (C++) , WebSockets, RESTful based APIs. 

• Experience in Swift/Objective-C (iOS) or Kotlin/Java (Android) for low level implementation. 

• Proven experience leading or mentoring mobile engineers . 

• Demonstrated ability to own architecture for large scale React Native applications . 

• Strong decision making skills in evaluating frameworks, tooling, and mobile development patterns. 

• Experience with b ackend development using Node or similar environments , with the ability to implement or adjust APIs and services that power mobile features. 

• Comfortable working across the stack when required, while still maintaining strong depth in mobile development. 

 
 Important information for candidates 
Recruitment scams have become increasingly common. To protect yourself, please keep the following in mind when applying for roles:
 
• Apply only through our official channels. We do not use third-party platforms or agencies for recruitment unless clearly stated. All open roles are listed on our official careers page: https://tether.recruitee.com/

• Verify the recruiter’s identity. All our recruiters have verified LinkedIn profiles. If you’re unsure, you can confirm their identity by checking their profile or contacting us through our website.

• Be cautious of unusual communication methods. We do not conduct interviews over WhatsApp, Telegram, or SMS. All communication is done through official company emails and platforms.

• Double-check email addresses. All communication from us will come from emails ending in @ tether.to or @ tether.io 

• We will never request payment or financial details. If someone asks for personal financial information or payment at any point during the hiring process, it is a scam. Please report it immediately.

 When in doubt, feel free to reach out through our official website.

jobs.description:
Join Tether and Shape the Future of Digital Finance 
 At Tether, we’re not just building products, we’re pioneering a global financial revolution. Our cutting-edge solutions empower businesses—from exchanges and wallets to payment processors and ATMs—to seamlessly integrate reserve-backed tokens across blockchains. By harnessing the power of blockchain technology, Tether enables you to store, send, and receive digital tokens instantly, securely, and globally, all at a fraction of the cost. Transparency is the bedrock of everything we do, ensuring trust in every transaction. 
 
 Innovate with Tether 
 Tether Finance: Our innovative product suite features the world’s most trusted stablecoin, USDT , relied upon by hundreds of millions worldwide, alongside pioneering digital asset tokenization services. 
 But that’s just the beginning: 
 Tether Power: Driving sustainable growth, our energy solutions optimize excess power for Bitcoin mining using eco-friendly practices in state-of-the-art, geo-diverse facilities. 
 Tether Data: Fueling breakthroughs in AI and peer-to-peer technology, we reduce infrastructure costs and enhance global communications with cutting-edge solutions like KEET , our flagship app that redefines secure and private data sharing. 
 Tether Education : Democratizing access to top-tier digital learning, we empower individuals to thrive in the digital and gig economies, driving global growth and opportunity. 
 Tether Evolution : At the intersection of technology and human potential, we are pushing the boundaries of what is possible, crafting a future where innovation and human capabilities merge in powerful, unprecedented ways. 
 
 Why Join Us? 
 Our team is a global talent powerhouse, working remotely from every corner of the world. If you’re passionate about making a mark in the fintech space, this is your opportunity to collaborate with some of the brightest minds, pushing boundaries and setting new standards. We’ve grown fast, stayed lean, and secured our place as a leader in the industry. 
 If you have excellent English communication skills and are ready to contribute to the most innovative platform on the planet, Tether is the place for you. 
 Are you ready to be part of the future? 
 
 About the job 
 The role involves working in a dynamic environment with a diverse team of senior backend developers, product managers and leadership to build crypto wallet solutions . The applications are meant to be high performance, light-weight and highly intuitive to cater to a variety of audiences. 
 You will be working on developing cutting edge mobile applications integrating crypto wallets and defi features. 
 
 Responsibilities 
 
• Development: Design and build advanced and secure cross platform applications for the [iOS/Android] platform using React Native. Collaborate with UI/UX designers to ensure applications are visually appealing and intuitive. 

• Integration: Work closely with backend developers and integrate Javascript SDKs, libraries, and backend services into mobile applications. 

• Collaboration: Collaborate with product managers, designers, and other developers to deliver innovative solutions. 

 
 Mandatory 
 
• 3+ years of experience with React , React-Native (mainly around Expo) , Redux and the core principles surrounding these. 

• Highly proficient in JavaScript and ES6+ . 

• Experience with CI/CD pipelines for mobile development . 

• Familiar with modern front-end pipelines and tools . 

• Experienced with Native modules (C++) , WebSockets, RESTful based APIs . 

• Experience in Swift/Objective-C (iOS) or Kotlin/Java (Android) for low level implementation. 

 
 Important information for candidates 
Recruitment scams have become increasingly common. To protect yourself, please keep the following in mind when applying for roles:
 
• Apply only through our official channels. We do not use third-party platforms or agencies for recruitment unless clearly stated. All open roles are listed on our official careers page: https://tether.recruitee.com/

• Verify the recruiter’s identity. All our recruiters have verified LinkedIn profiles. If you’re unsure, you can confirm their identity by checking their profile or contacting us through our website.

• Be cautious of unusual communication methods. We do not conduct interviews over WhatsApp, Telegram, or SMS. All communication is done through official company emails and platforms.

• Double-check email addresses. All communication from us will come from emails ending in @ tether.to or @ tether.io 

• We will never request payment or financial details. If someone asks for personal financial information or payment at any point during the hiring process, it is a scam. Please report it immediately.

 When in doubt, feel free to reach out through our official website.

jobs.description:
Join Tether and Shape the Future of Digital Finance 
 At Tether, we’re not just building products, we’re pioneering a global financial revolution. Our cutting-edge solutions empower businesses—from exchanges and wallets to payment processors and ATMs—to seamlessly integrate reserve-backed tokens across blockchains. By harnessing the power of blockchain technology, Tether enables you to store, send, and receive digital tokens instantly, securely, and globally, all at a fraction of the cost. Transparency is the bedrock of everything we do, ensuring trust in every transaction.
 
 Innovate with Tether 
 Tether Finance: Our innovative product suite features the world’s most trusted stablecoin, USDT , relied upon by hundreds of millions worldwide, alongside pioneering digital asset tokenization services.
 But that’s just the beginning:
 Tether Power: Driving sustainable growth, our energy solutions optimize excess power for Bitcoin mining using eco-friendly practices in state-of-the-art, geo-diverse facilities.
 Tether Data: Fueling breakthroughs in AI and peer-to-peer technology, we reduce infrastructure costs and enhance global communications with cutting-edge solutions like KEET , our flagship app that redefines secure and private data sharing.
 Tether Education : Democratizing access to top-tier digital learning, we empower individuals to thrive in the digital and gig economies, driving global growth and opportunity.
 Tether Evolution : At the intersection of technology and human potential, we are pushing the boundaries of what is possible, crafting a future where innovation and human capabilities merge in powerful, unprecedented ways.
 
 Why Join Us? 
 Our team is a global talent powerhouse, working remotely from every corner of the world. If you’re passionate about making a mark in the fintech space, this is your opportunity to collaborate with some of the brightest minds, pushing boundaries and setting new standards. We’ve grown fast, stayed lean, and secured our place as a leader in the industry.
 If you have excellent English communication skills and are ready to contribute to the most innovative platform on the planet, Tether is the place for you.
 Are you ready to be part of the future? 
 
 About the job: 
 As a member of the AI model team, you will drive innovation in architecture development for cutting-edge models of various scales, including small, large, and multi-modal systems. Your work will enhance intelligence, improve efficiency, and introduce new capabilities to advance the field.
 
 You will have a deep expertise in LLM architectures, a strong grasp of pre-training optimization with a hands-on, research-driven approach. Your mission is to explore and implement novel techniques and algorithms that lead to groundbreaking advancements: data curation, strengthening baselines, identifying and resolving existing pre-training bottlenecks to push the limits of AI performance.
 
 Responsibilities :
 
• Conduct pre-training AI models on large, distributed servers equipped with thousands of NVIDIA GPUs.

• Design, prototype, and scale innovative architectures to enhance model intelligence.

• Independently and collaboratively execute experiments, analyze results, and refine methodologies for optimal performance.

• Investigate, debug, and improve both model efficiency and computational performance.

• Contribute to the advancement of training systems to ensure seamless scalability and efficiency on target platforms.

 
 
• A degree in Computer Science or related field. Ideally PhD in NLP, Machine Learning, or a related field, complemented by a solid track record in AI R&D (with good publications in A* conferences).

• Hands-on experience contributing to large-scale LLM training runs on large, distributed servers equipped with thousands of NVIDIA GPUs, ensuring scalability and impactful advancements in model performance.

• Familiarity and practical experience with large-scale, distributed training frameworks, libraries and tools.

• Deep knowledge of state-of-the-art transformer and non-transformer modifications aimed at enhancing intelligence, efficiency and scalability.

• Strong expertise in PyTorch and Hugging Face libraries with practical experience in model development, continual pretraining, and deployment.

Tether Education : Democratizing access to top-tier digital learning, we empower individuals to thrive in the digital and gig economies, driving global growth and opportunity. Tether Evolution : At the intersection of technology and human potential, we are pushing the boundaries of what is possible, crafting a future where innovation and human capabilities merge in powerful, unprecedented ways. Why Join Us? Our team is a global talent powerhouse, working remotely from every corner of the world. If you’re passionate about making a mark in the fintech space, this is your opportunity to collaborate with some of the brightest minds, pushing boundaries and setting new standards. We’ve grown fast, stayed lean, and secured our place as a leader in the industry. If you have excellent English communication skills and are ready to contribute to the most innovative platform on the planet, Tether is the place for you. Are you ready to be part of the future? About the job: As a member of the AI model team, you will drive innovation in architecture development for cutting-edge models of various scales, including small, large, and multi-modal systems. Your work will enhance intelligence, improve efficiency, and introduce new capabilities to advance the field. You will have a deep expertise in LLM architectures, a strong grasp of pre-training optimization with a hands-on, research-driven approach. Your mission is to explore and implement novel techniques and algorithms that lead to groundbreaking advancements: data curation, strengthening baselines, identifying and resolving existing pre-training bottlenecks to push the limits of AI performance. Responsibilities :
• Conduct pre-training AI models on large, distributed servers equipped with thousands of NVIDIA GPUs.
• Design, prototype, and scale innovative architectures to enhance model intelligence.
• Independently and collaboratively execute experiments, analyze results, and refine methodologies for optimal performance.
• Investigate, debug, and improve both model efficiency and computational performance.
• Contribute to the advancement of training systems to ensure seamless scalability and efficiency on target platforms.
• A degree in Computer Science or related field. Ideally PhD in NLP, Machine Learning, or a related field, complemented by a solid track record in AI R&D (with good publications in A* conferences).
• Hands-on experience contributing to large-scale LLM training runs on large, distributed servers equipped with thousands of NVIDIA GPUs, ensuring scalability and impactful advancements in model performance.
• Familiarity and practical experience with large-scale, distributed training frameworks, libraries and tools.
• Deep knowledge of state-of-the-art transformer and non-transformer modifications aimed at enhancing intelligence, efficiency and scalability.
• Strong expertise in PyTorch and Hugging Face libraries with practical experience in model development, continual pretraining, and deployment.

jobs.description:
Join Tether and Shape the Future of Digital Finance 
 At Tether, we’re not just building products, we’re pioneering a global financial revolution. Our cutting-edge solutions empower businesses—from exchanges and wallets to payment processors and ATMs—to seamlessly integrate reserve-backed tokens across blockchains. By harnessing the power of blockchain technology, Tether enables you to store, send, and receive digital tokens instantly, securely, and globally, all at a fraction of the cost. Transparency is the bedrock of everything we do, ensuring trust in every transaction. 
 
 Innovate with Tether 
 Tether Finance: Our innovative product suite features the world’s most trusted stablecoin, USDT , relied upon by hundreds of millions worldwide, alongside pioneering digital asset tokenization services. 
 But that’s just the beginning: 
 Tether Power: Driving sustainable growth, our energy solutions optimize excess power for Bitcoin mining using eco-friendly practices in state-of-the-art, geo-diverse facilities. 
 Tether Data: Fueling breakthroughs in AI and peer-to-peer technology, we reduce infrastructure costs and enhance global communications with cutting-edge solutions like KEET , our flagship app that redefines secure and private data sharing. 
 Tether Education : Democratizing access to top-tier digital learning, we empower individuals to thrive in the digital and gig economies, driving global growth and opportunity. 
 Tether Evolution : At the intersection of technology and human potential, we are pushing the boundaries of what is possible, crafting a future where innovation and human capabilities merge in powerful, unprecedented ways. 
 
 Why Join Us? 
 Our team is a global talent powerhouse, working remotely from every corner of the world. If you’re passionate about making a mark in the fintech space, this is your opportunity to collaborate with some of the brightest minds, pushing boundaries and setting new standards. We’ve grown fast, stayed lean, and secured our place as a leader in the industry. 
 If you have excellent English communication skills and are ready to contribute to the most innovative platform on the planet, Tether is the place for you. 
 Are you ready to be part of the future? 
 
 About the job
 
 The Senior Technical Product Manager will be responsible for the overall product leadership of Hadron, including product vision, roadmap definition, and delivery execution. 
 The role serves as the single point of accountability for the platform to serve institutional client needs, engineering delivery, and regulatory/compliance requirements. 
 Unlike a traditional Product Manager role, this position requires clear decision-making authority to: 
 
• Set and enforce roadmap priorities, including pushing back on non-essential requests. 

• Coordinate with external engineering partners and maintain scope discipline. 

• Resolve conflicts between client requests, technical feasibility, and compliance constraints. 

• Make go/no-go decisions on integrations, product features, and releases. 

• Ensure product development aligns with the long-term architecture and scalability of the Hadron platform.
 

 Critical Context 
 Hadron serves institutional clients globally with diverse and often conflicting tokenization requirements, including different asset classes, blockchain networks, compliance frameworks, and distribution models. 
 The Product Manager must manage this complexity by maintaining a clear product strategy, prioritizing ruthlessly, and preventing scope creep. The role requires strong ownership and the ability to make difficult prioritization decisions in a fast-moving institutional environment.
 
 Reporting & Collaboration 
 Reports to: VP Product 
 The Product Manager works in close partnership with the Head of Expansion & Product Advisor for Hadron to ensure strong alignment between institutional client demand, market opportunities, and the Hadron product roadmap. 
 Head of Expansion & Product Advisor provides continuous market feedback based on institutional client engagements and strategic partnerships, ensuring that product development reflects real market demand. 
 The Product Manager is responsible for translating these inputs into product priorities, roadmap decisions, and engineering execution. 
 Major roadmap initiatives, client-driven feature requests, and new integrations are expected to be aligned between the Product Manager and the Head of Expansion & Product Advisor before implementation. 
 
 The Ideal Candidate 
 We are specifically looking for candidates who have operated at a senior level and can demonstrate deep, hands-on exposure to tokenization and traditional financial infrastructure. You should be able to recognise yourself in most of the following: 
 
 Tokenization, end-to-end 
 
• You have personally built, shipped, or owned a tokenization product — from asset onboarding and smart contract specification through to custody integration, investor cap table management, and secondary transfer mechanics. 

• You can walk through the full token lifecycle (issuance, transfer, redemption, corporate actions, burn) without needing to look anything up, and you understand the tradeoffs between different implementation approaches. 

• You understand custody models: the difference between self-custody, qualified custodian models, omnibus vs. segregated wallet structures, and what each means for compliance and operational risk. 

• You have practical knowledge of on-chain settlement mechanics and how they interact with traditional T+1/T+2 settlement rails (DTCC, Euroclear, SWIFT). 

• You are fluent in token standards across multiple chains and understand when to reach for ERC-20, ERC-1400, or proprietary structures, and why. 

 TradFi depth 
 
• You have a strong grasp of how institutional financial infrastructure works: how funds are structured and administered, how broker-dealers clear and settle, how banks manage trust and custody relationships, and how prime brokerage operates. 

• You understand the instruments being tokenized: money market funds, bonds, structured credit, equities, real estate, commodities including how each is priced, transferred, and serviced in the traditional world. 

• You are comfortable with regulatory frameworks relevant to tokenized assets such as MiCA, Reg D/S, MAS MAS notice, VARA and can identify the compliance constraints that must be encoded into product design. 

• You can read and rapidly interpret institutional documents: RFPs, term sheets, custody agreements, and due diligence questionnaires, and translate them into product requirements without extensive hand-holding. 

 Institutional demand, rapid translation 
 
• You have worked directly with institutional clients such as asset managers, banks, sovereign funds, family offices as the primary product owner, and you know how to manage their expectations and extract signals from noise. 

• You can hear a new institutional use case or a complex integration requirement and rapidly assess feasibility, scope, and priority, without needing days to research the basics. 

• You have experience distinguishing between requests that reveal genuine product gaps and those that are bespoke client customisations and you know how to handle both without derailing the roadmap. 

 
 Key Responsibilities
 
 Product Strategy & Roadmap 
 
• Define and maintain the Hadron product roadmap. 

• Prioritize product initiatives based on market demand, technical feasibility, and business impact. 

• Maintain a clear product vision for Hadron across multiple asset classes and blockchain networks. 

• Ensure long-term platform scalability and product coherence. 

 Product Development & Delivery 
 
• Translate business and market needs into clear product requirements. 

• Maintain the product backlog and development priorities. 

• Coordinate development cycles and feature releases. 

• Ensure timely delivery of roadmap milestones. 

 Engineering Coordination 
 
• Act as the primary interface between product and engineering. 

• Coordinate development work with internal engineers and external technology partners. 

• Maintain clear documentation of product features, APIs, and platform capabilities. 

• Track platform performance, bugs, and technical improvements. 

 Client & Integration Feedback 
 
• Collect and structure feedback from institutional clients and internal teams. 

• Identify recurring integration challenges and translate them into product improvements. 

• Improve onboarding workflows and developer experience. 

 

 
• 5+ years of experience in product management or product ownership, with at least 3 years in digital assets, tokenization, or financial infrastructure. 

 
• Demonstrated hands-on experience shipping a tokenization or RWA product, with accountability for the full token lifecycle. 

• Deep, working knowledge of TradFi capital markets infrastructure including settlement, custody, clearing, fund structures. 

• Proven ability to rapidly parse institutional requirements and translate them into actionable product decisions. 

• Experience managing external engineering partners and enforcing scope discipline across complex, multi-stakeholder programmes. 

• Regulatory literacy across at least two major tokenization frameworks (MiCA, MAS, SEC, VARA, or equivalent). 

• Excellent written and spoken English. Able to author crisp product specs, client-facing documentation, and executive summaries. 

 
 Nice to have: 
 
• Prior experience at a bank, asset manager, custodian, or regulated fintech in a product, technology, or markets role. 

• Hands-on experience with multiple token standards and blockchain networks in a production context. 

• Experience designing or integrating with custody APIs, transfer agent systems, or fund administration platforms. 

• Understanding of on-chain compliance mechanisms: whitelisting, transfer restrictions, KYC/AML hooks at the smart contract level. 

• Exposure to multi-chain deployment strategies and the tradeoffs between L1, L2, and permissioned chain environments. 

• Experience with institutional client onboarding workflows in a regulated context. 

 
 Important information for candidates 
Recruitment scams have become increasingly common. To protect yourself, please keep the following in mind when applying for roles:
 
• Apply only through our official channels. We do not use third-party platforms or agencies for recruitment unless clearly stated. All open roles are listed on our official careers page: https://tether.recruitee.com/

• Verify the recruiter’s identity. All our recruiters have verified LinkedIn profiles. If you’re unsure, you can confirm their identity by checking their profile or contacting us through our website.

• Be cautious of unusual communication methods. We do not conduct interviews over WhatsApp, Telegram, or SMS. All communication is done through official company emails and platforms.

• Double-check email addresses. All communication from us will come from emails ending in @ tether.to or @ tether.io 

• We will never request payment or financial details. If someone asks for personal financial information or payment at any point during the hiring process, it is a scam. Please report it immediately.

 When in doubt, feel free to reach out through our official website.
