jobs.title: Investment Associate - RISE Fund (100% Remote)

titleByLocale.fr: Associé en investissement - RISE Fund (100 % à distance)

jobs.description:
Join Tether and Shape the Future of Digital Finance 
 At Tether, we’re not just building products, we’re pioneering a global financial revolution. Our cutting-edge solutions empower businesses—from exchanges and wallets to payment processors and ATMs—to seamlessly integrate reserve-backed tokens across blockchains. By harnessing the power of blockchain technology, Tether enables you to store, send, and receive digital tokens instantly, securely, and globally, all at a fraction of the cost. Transparency is the bedrock of everything we do, ensuring trust in every transaction. 
 
 Innovate with Tether 
 Tether Finance: Our innovative product suite features the world’s most trusted stablecoin, USDT , relied upon by hundreds of millions worldwide, alongside pioneering digital asset tokenization services. 
 But that’s just the beginning: 
 Tether Power: Driving sustainable growth, our energy solutions optimize excess power for Bitcoin mining using eco-friendly practices in state-of-the-art, geo-diverse facilities. 
 Tether Data: Fueling breakthroughs in AI and peer-to-peer technology, we reduce infrastructure costs and enhance global communications with cutting-edge solutions like KEET , our flagship app that redefines secure and private data sharing. 
 Tether Education : Democratizing access to top-tier digital learning, we empower individuals to thrive in the digital and gig economies, driving global growth and opportunity. 
 Tether Evolution : At the intersection of technology and human potential, we are pushing the boundaries of what is possible, crafting a future where innovation and human capabilities merge in powerful, unprecedented ways. 
 
 Why Join Us? 
 Our team is a global talent powerhouse, working remotely from every corner of the world. If you’re passionate about making a mark in the fintech space, this is your opportunity to collaborate with some of the brightest minds, pushing boundaries and setting new standards. We’ve grown fast, stayed lean, and secured our place as a leader in the industry. 
 If you have excellent English communication skills and are ready to contribute to the most innovative platform on the planet, Tether is the place for you. 
 Are you ready to be part of the future? 
 
 About the job 
 As an Investment Associate in the Expansion Investments team at Tether, you will contribute to our private equity and venture capital investments, focusing on key strategic investments and expansion enablers. Working closely with senior team members, you will play a vital role in the analysis, due diligence, and monitoring of potential investees. This role offers an excellent opportunity to gain hands-on experience in deal execution and investment management within a dynamic and fast-paced environment. 
 
 Responsibilities 
 
• Deal Execution and Transaction Management Support 

 Support the full lifecycle of investment transactions from term sheet through close, coordinating legal, financial, and strategic workstreams with internal teams and external advisors. 
 Structure and negotiate deal terms (valuation, governance rights, pro-rata, information rights) ensuring alignment with RISE fund's risk appetite and return thresholds. 
 
• Due Diligence 

 Synthesise diligence findings into investment-grade analysis, stress-testing key assumptions, identifying material risks, and articulating mitigation strategies. 
 Coordinate specialist deep-dives (regulatory, cyber, AML/KYC where relevant for investment targets) given RISE fund’s needs. 
 
• Investment Committee Preparation and Governance 

 Author Investment Committee memoranda — including thesis articulation, market sizing, competitive positioning, valuation modelling, risk matrices, and proposed terms. 
 Maintain rigorous documentation standards across all Venture IC materials, ensuring auditability and consistency with internal governance framework and fund’s investment guidelines. 
 
• Portfolio Management and Value Creation 

 Serve as the primary relationship owner for assigned portfolio companies post-close, conducting structured check-ins, board observer duties, and milestone tracking. 
 Support Reporting Team with monitoring of financial and operational KPIs, flagging inflection points, covenant concerns, or follow-on opportunities to the RISE fund. 
 Work alongside Reporting and Finance Team to produce periodic portfolio reporting for internal stakeholders and senior leadership, maintaining accurate valuation marks and strategic commentary. 
 
• Rise Fund Platform Development 

 Support the build-out and continuous improvement of Tether RISE fund’s Investment operating infrastructure around investment processes, deal flow tracking, portfolio management systems, and reporting cadences. 
 Coordination and discussion with the Expansion Team to improve Tether RISE fund’s strategy by working on inputs related to market intelligence, thematic coverage, and ecosystem mapping. 
 
• Analytical Skills 

 Strong analytical abilities with the capacity to interpret financial data, perform valuation analyses, and evaluate investment opportunities. 
 
• Communication Skills: 

 Exhibit excellent written and verbal communication skills in English, with the ability to effectively communicate findings and recommendations to senior management and investment committees. 

 
• Education : Bachelor’s degree (minimum) in Finance, Economics, Business Administration, or a closely related discipline. A Master’s degree (MBA, MSc Finance, or equivalent) is strongly preferred. 

• Professional Certification : CFA charterholder or CAIA designation required (or demonstrable progression toward completion). These credentials are considered the baseline for the level of analytical rigour and investment governance expected in this role. 

• Experience : 3-5 years of directly relevant experience across venture capital, private equity, investment banking, or corporate development, with a material portion of that tenure spent executing and closing transactions. 

• Technical and Analytical Skills : Advanced financial modelling; strong command of Excel and PowerPoint; working knowledge of cap table management tools (e.g. Carta), CRM/deal flow platforms (e.g. Affinity, Salesforce), and data room management. Familiarity with portfolio management system tools is a plus. 

• Communication Skills: Exhibit excellent written and verbal communication skills in English, with the ability to effectively communicate findings and recommendations to senior management and investment committees. 

• Industry Knowledge : Strong understanding of venture and growth-stage investment dynamics. Knowledge of the financial services sector including regulatory frameworks, fintech ecosystems, and institutional investment constraints. 

• Language : Full professional proficiency in English (written and verbal) is required. Any other language is a plus. 

 
 Important information for candidates 
Recruitment scams have become increasingly common. To protect yourself, please keep the following in mind when applying for roles: 
 
• Apply only through our official channels. We do not use third-party platforms or agencies for recruitment unless clearly stated. All open roles are listed on our official careers page: https://tether.recruitee.com/ 

• Verify the recruiter’s identity. All our recruiters have verified LinkedIn profiles. If you’re unsure, you can confirm their identity by checking their profile or contacting us through our website. 

• Be cautious of unusual communication methods. We do not conduct interviews over WhatsApp, Telegram, or SMS. All communication is done through official company emails and platforms. 

• Double-check email addresses. All communication from us will come from emails ending in @ tether.to or @ tether.io 

• We will never request payment or financial details. If someone asks for personal financial information or payment at any point during the hiring process, it is a scam. Please report it immediately. 

 When in doubt, feel free to reach out through our official website.

descriptionByLocale.it: Unisciti a Tether e dai forma al futuro della finanza digitale In Tether non stiamo solo costruendo prodotti, siamo pionieri di una rivoluzione finanziaria globale. Le nostre soluzioni all'avanguardia consentono alle aziende, dagli scambi e portafogli ai processori di pagamento e agli sportelli bancomat, di integrare perfettamente token garantiti da riserve attraverso blockchain. Sfruttando la potenza della tecnologia blockchain, Tether ti consente di archiviare, inviare e ricevere token digitali in modo istantaneo, sicuro e globale, il tutto a una frazione del costo. La trasparenza è il fondamento di tutto ciò che facciamo, garantendo fiducia in ogni transazione. Innova con Tether Tether Finance: la nostra suite di prodotti innovativa comprende la stablecoin più affidabile al mondo, USDT, su cui fanno affidamento centinaia di milioni di persone in tutto il mondo, insieme a servizi pionieristici di tokenizzazione delle risorse digitali. Ma questo è solo l’inizio: Tether Power: guidando la crescita sostenibile, le nostre soluzioni energetiche ottimizzano l’energia in eccesso per l’estrazione di Bitcoin utilizzando pratiche ecocompatibili in strutture all’avanguardia e geodiversificate. Tether Data: alimentando innovazioni nell'intelligenza artificiale e nella tecnologia peer-to-peer, riduciamo i costi dell'infrastruttura e miglioriamo le comunicazioni globali con soluzioni all'avanguardia come KEET, la nostra app di punta che ridefinisce la condivisione sicura e privata dei dati. Tether Education: democratizzando l’accesso all’apprendimento digitale di alto livello, consentiamo alle persone di prosperare nelle economie digitali e gig economy, guidando la crescita e le opportunità globali. Tether Evolution: all'intersezione tra tecnologia e potenziale umano, stiamo spingendo i confini di ciò che è possibile, creando un futuro in cui innovazione e capacità umane si fondono in modi potenti e senza precedenti. Perché unirsi a noi? Il nostro team è una potenza globale di talenti, che lavora in remoto da ogni angolo del mondo. Se la tua passione è lasciare il segno nel settore fintech, questa è la tua occasione per collaborare con alcune delle menti più brillanti, spingendo oltre i confini e stabilendo nuovi standard. Siamo cresciuti rapidamente, siamo rimasti snelli e ci siamo assicurati il ​​posto di leader nel settore. Se hai eccellenti capacità di comunicazione in inglese e sei pronto a contribuire alla piattaforma più innovativa del pianeta, Tether è il posto che fa per te. Sei pronto a far parte del futuro? Informazioni sul lavoro In qualità di Investment Associate nel team Expansion Investments di Tether, contribuirai ai nostri investimenti di private equity e venture capital, concentrandoti su investimenti strategici chiave e facilitatori di espansione. Lavorando a stretto contatto con i membri senior del team, svolgerai un ruolo fondamentale nell'analisi, nella due diligence e nel monitoraggio dei potenziali partecipati. Questo ruolo offre un'eccellente opportunità per acquisire esperienza pratica nell'esecuzione di operazioni e nella gestione degli investimenti in un ambiente dinamico e frenetico. Responsabilità Supporto per l'esecuzione delle operazioni e la gestione delle transazioni Supportare l'intero ciclo di vita delle transazioni di investimento dal term sheet attraverso uno stretto coordinamento dei flussi di lavoro legali, finanziari e strategici con team interni e consulenti esterni. Strutturare e negoziare i termini dell'accordo (valutazione, diritti di governance, pro-rata, diritti di informazione) garantendo l'allineamento con la propensione al rischio e le soglie di rendimento del fondo RISE. Due Diligence Sintetizza i risultati della diligence in analisi investment grade, stress test sui presupposti chiave, identificazione dei rischi materiali e articolazione delle strategie di mitigazione. Coordinare approfondimenti specialistici (normativi, informatici, AML/KYC ove rilevante per gli obiettivi di investimento) in base alle esigenze del fondo RISE. Preparazione del comitato per gli investimenti e redazione dei memorandum del comitato per gli investimenti, tra cui l'articolazione della tesi, il dimensionamento del mercato, il posizionamento competitivo, il modello di valutazione, le matrici di rischio e i termini proposti. Mantenere rigorosi standard di documentazione su tutti i materiali Venture IC, garantendo verificabilità e coerenza con il quadro di governance interna e le linee guida di investimento del fondo. Gestione del portafoglio e creazione di valore Servire come titolare principale del rapporto per le società in portafoglio assegnate dopo la chiusura, conducendo check-in strutturati, compiti di osservatore del consiglio e monitoraggio delle tappe fondamentali. Supportare il team di reporting con il monitoraggio dei KPI finanziari e operativi, segnalando i punti di inflessione, le preoccupazioni sui patti o le opportunità di follow-on per il fondo RISE. Lavorare a fianco del team Reporting e Finanza per produrre report periodici di portafoglio per gli stakeholder interni e la leadership senior, mantenendo accurati voti di valutazione e commenti strategici. Sviluppo della piattaforma Rise Fund Supportare la creazione e il miglioramento continuo dell'infrastruttura operativa di investimento del fondo Tether RISE in merito ai processi di investimento, al monitoraggio del flusso delle operazioni, ai sistemi di gestione del portafoglio e alle cadenze di reporting. Coordinamento e discussione con il team di espansione per migliorare la strategia del fondo Tether RISE lavorando su input relativi all'intelligence di mercato, alla copertura tematica e alla mappatura dell'ecosistema. Competenze analitiche Forti capacità analitiche con la capacità di interpretare dati finanziari, eseguire analisi di valutazione e valutare opportunità di investimento. Abilità comunicative: mostrare eccellenti capacità di comunicazione scritta e verbale in inglese, con la capacità di comunicare in modo efficace risultati e raccomandazioni al senior management e ai comitati di investimento. Istruzione: laurea (minimo) in finanza, economia, amministrazione aziendale o una disciplina strettamente correlata. Un Master (MBA, Master in Finanza o equivalente) è fortemente preferito. Certificazione professionale: titolare della licenza CFA o designazione CAIA richiesta (o progressione dimostrabile verso il completamento). Queste credenziali sono considerate la base per il livello di rigore analitico e di governance degli investimenti attesi in questo ruolo. Esperienza: 3-5 anni di esperienza direttamente rilevante nel capitale di rischio, nel private equity, nell'investment banking o nello sviluppo aziendale, con una parte materiale di tale mandato spesa nell'esecuzione e nella chiusura di transazioni. Competenze tecniche e analitiche: modellazione finanziaria avanzata; forte padronanza di Excel e PowerPoint; conoscenza pratica degli strumenti di gestione delle tabelle cap (ad esempio Carta), piattaforme CRM/deal flow (ad esempio Affinity, Salesforce) e gestione della data room. La familiarità con gli strumenti del sistema di gestione del portafoglio è un vantaggio. Abilità comunicative: mostrare eccellenti capacità di comunicazione scritta e verbale in inglese, con la capacità di comunicare in modo efficace risultati e raccomandazioni al senior management e ai comitati di investimento. Conoscenza del settore: profonda conoscenza delle dinamiche di investimento in venture capital e in fase di crescita. Conoscenza del settore dei servizi finanziari, compresi i quadri normativi, gli ecosistemi fintech e i vincoli di investimento istituzionale. Lingua: è richiesta la piena conoscenza professionale della lingua inglese (scritta e orale). Qualsiasi altra lingua è un vantaggio. Informazioni importanti per i candidati Le truffe nel reclutamento sono diventate sempre più comuni. Per proteggerti, tieni presente quanto segue quando fai domanda per un ruolo: fai domanda solo attraverso i nostri canali ufficiali. Non utilizziamo piattaforme o agenzie di terze parti per il reclutamento se non chiaramente indicato. Tutti i ruoli aperti sono elencati nella nostra pagina ufficiale delle carriere: https://tether.recruitee.com/ Verifica l'identità del reclutatore. Tutti i nostri reclutatori hanno profili LinkedIn verificati. Se non sei sicuro, puoi confermare la loro identità controllando il loro profilo o contattandoci tramite il nostro sito web. Fai attenzione ai metodi di comunicazione insoliti. Non conduciamo interviste tramite WhatsApp, Telegram o SMS. Tutte le comunicazioni avvengono tramite e-mail e piattaforme ufficiali dell'azienda. Ricontrolla gli indirizzi email. Tutte le nostre comunicazioni arriveranno da e-mail che terminano con @ tether.to o @ tether.io Non richiederemo mai pagamenti o dettagli finanziari. Se qualcuno chiede informazioni finanziarie personali o un pagamento in qualsiasi momento durante il processo di assunzione, si tratta di una truffa. Per favore segnalatelo immediatamente. In caso di dubbi, non esitate a contattarci tramite il nostro sito Web ufficiale.
descriptionByLocale.en:
Join Tether and Shape the Future of Digital Finance At Tether, we’re not just building products, we’re pioneering a global financial revolution. Our cutting-edge solutions empower businesses—from exchanges and wallets to payment processors and ATMs—to seamlessly integrate reserve-backed tokens across blockchains. By harnessing the power of blockchain technology, Tether enables you to store, send, and receive digital tokens instantly, securely, and globally, all at a fraction of the cost. Transparency is the bedrock of everything we do, ensuring trust in every transaction. Innovate with Tether Tether Finance: Our innovative product suite features the world’s most trusted stablecoin, USDT , relied upon by hundreds of millions worldwide, alongside pioneering digital asset tokenization services. But that’s just the beginning: Tether Power: Driving sustainable growth, our energy solutions optimize excess power for Bitcoin mining using eco-friendly practices in state-of-the-art, geo-diverse facilities. Tether Data: Fueling breakthroughs in AI and peer-to-peer technology, we reduce infrastructure costs and enhance global communications with cutting-edge solutions like KEET , our flagship app that redefines secure and private data sharing. Tether Education : Democratizing access to top-tier digital learning, we empower individuals to thrive in the digital and gig economies, driving global growth and opportunity. Tether Evolution : At the intersection of technology and human potential, we are pushing the boundaries of what is possible, crafting a future where innovation and human capabilities merge in powerful, unprecedented ways. Why Join Us? Our team is a global talent powerhouse, working remotely from every corner of the world. If you’re passionate about making a mark in the fintech space, this is your opportunity to collaborate with some of the brightest minds, pushing boundaries and setting new standards. We’ve grown fast, stayed lean, and secured our place as a leader in the industry. If you have excellent English communication skills and are ready to contribute to the most innovative platform on the planet, Tether is the place for you. Are you ready to be part of the future? About the job As an Investment Associate in the Expansion Investments team at Tether, you will contribute to our private equity and venture capital investments, focusing on key strategic investments and expansion enablers. Working closely with senior team members, you will play a vital role in the analysis, due diligence, and monitoring of potential investees. This role offers an excellent opportunity to gain hands-on experience in deal execution and investment management within a dynamic and fast-paced environment. Responsibilities
• Deal Execution and Transaction Management Support Support the full lifecycle of investment transactions from term sheet through close, coordinating legal, financial, and strategic workstreams with internal teams and external advisors. Structure and negotiate deal terms (valuation, governance rights, pro-rata, information rights) ensuring alignment with RISE fund's risk appetite and return thresholds.
• Due Diligence Synthesise diligence findings into investment-grade analysis, stress-testing key assumptions, identifying material risks, and articulating mitigation strategies. Coordinate specialist deep-dives (regulatory, cyber, AML/KYC where relevant for investment targets) given RISE fund’s needs.
• Investment Committee Preparation and Governance Author Investment Committee memoranda — including thesis articulation, market sizing, competitive positioning, valuation modelling, risk matrices, and proposed terms. Maintain rigorous documentation standards across all Venture IC materials, ensuring auditability and consistency with internal governance framework and fund’s investment guidelines.
• Portfolio Management and Value Creation Serve as the primary relationship owner for assigned portfolio companies post-close, conducting structured check-ins, board observer duties, and milestone tracking. Support Reporting Team with monitoring of financial and operational KPIs, flagging inflection points, covenant concerns, or follow-on opportunities to the RISE fund. Work alongside Reporting and Finance Team to produce periodic portfolio reporting for internal stakeholders and senior leadership, maintaining accurate valuation marks and strategic commentary.
• Rise Fund Platform Development Support the build-out and continuous improvement of Tether RISE fund’s Investment operating infrastructure around investment processes, deal flow tracking, portfolio management systems, and reporting cadences. Coordination and discussion with the Expansion Team to improve Tether RISE fund’s strategy by working on inputs related to market intelligence, thematic coverage, and ecosystem mapping.
• Analytical Skills Strong analytical abilities with the capacity to interpret financial data, perform valuation analyses, and evaluate investment opportunities.
• Communication Skills: Exhibit excellent written and verbal communication skills in English, with the ability to effectively communicate findings and recommendations to senior management and investment committees.
• Education : Bachelor’s degree (minimum) in Finance, Economics, Business Administration, or a closely related discipline. A Master’s degree (MBA, MSc Finance, or equivalent) is strongly preferred.
• Professional Certification : CFA charterholder or CAIA designation required (or demonstrable progression toward completion). These credentials are considered the baseline for the level of analytical rigour and investment governance expected in this role.
• Experience : 3-5 years of directly relevant experience across venture capital, private equity, investment banking, or corporate development, with a material portion of that tenure spent executing and closing transactions.
• Technical and Analytical Skills : Advanced financial modelling; strong command of Excel and PowerPoint; working knowledge of cap table management tools (e.g. Carta), CRM/deal flow platforms (e.g. Affinity, Salesforce), and data room management. Familiarity with portfolio management system tools is a plus.
• Communication Skills: Exhibit excellent written and verbal communication skills in English, with the ability to effectively communicate findings and recommendations to senior management and investment committees.
• Industry Knowledge : Strong understanding of venture and growth-stage investment dynamics. Knowledge of the financial services sector including regulatory frameworks, fintech ecosystems, and institutional investment constraints.
• Language : Full professional proficiency in English (written and verbal) is required. Any other language is a plus. Important information for candidates Recruitment scams have become increasingly common. To protect yourself, please keep the following in mind when applying for roles:
• Apply only through our official channels. We do not use third-party platforms or agencies for recruitment unless clearly stated. All open roles are listed on our official careers page: https://tether.recruitee.com/
• Verify the recruiter’s identity. All our recruiters have verified LinkedIn profiles. If you’re unsure, you can confirm their identity by checking their profile or contacting us through our website.
• Be cautious of unusual communication methods. We do not conduct interviews over WhatsApp, Telegram, or SMS. All communication is done through official company emails and platforms.
• Double-check email addresses. All communication from us will come from emails ending in @ tether.to or @ tether.io
• We will never request payment or financial details. If someone asks for personal financial information or payment at any point during the hiring process, it is a scam. Please report it immediately. When in doubt, feel free to reach out through our official website.
descriptionByLocale.de:
Treten Sie Tether bei und gestalten Sie die Zukunft des digitalen Finanzwesens. Bei Tether entwickeln wir nicht nur Produkte, wir sind Vorreiter einer globalen Finanzrevolution. Unsere hochmodernen Lösungen ermöglichen es Unternehmen – von Börsen und Wallets bis hin zu Zahlungsabwicklern und Geldautomaten –, rücklagegesicherte Token nahtlos über Blockchains hinweg zu integrieren. Durch die Nutzung der Leistungsfähigkeit der Blockchain-Technologie ermöglicht Ihnen Tether das sofortige, sichere und globale Speichern, Senden und Empfangen digitaler Token – und das alles zu einem Bruchteil der Kosten. Transparenz ist die Grundlage unseres Handelns und gewährleistet Vertrauen bei jeder Transaktion. Innovation mit Tether Tether Finance: Unsere innovative Produktsuite umfasst den vertrauenswürdigsten Stablecoin der Welt, USDT, auf den sich Hunderte Millionen Menschen auf der ganzen Welt verlassen, sowie bahnbrechende Dienste zur Tokenisierung digitaler Vermögenswerte. Aber das ist erst der Anfang: Tether Power: Unsere Energielösungen fördern nachhaltiges Wachstum und optimieren überschüssigen Strom für das Bitcoin-Mining durch umweltfreundliche Praktiken in hochmodernen, geografisch vielfältigen Anlagen. Tether Data: Wir treiben Durchbrüche in der KI- und Peer-to-Peer-Technologie voran, senken Infrastrukturkosten und verbessern die globale Kommunikation mit modernsten Lösungen wie KEET, unserer Flaggschiff-App, die den sicheren und privaten Datenaustausch neu definiert. Tether Education: Durch die Demokratisierung des Zugangs zu erstklassigem digitalen Lernen ermöglichen wir Einzelpersonen, in der Digital- und Gig-Wirtschaft erfolgreich zu sein und so globales Wachstum und Chancen voranzutreiben. Tether Evolution: An der Schnittstelle von Technologie und menschlichem Potenzial verschieben wir die Grenzen des Möglichen und gestalten eine Zukunft, in der Innovation und menschliche Fähigkeiten auf kraftvolle, beispiellose Weise verschmelzen. Warum sollten Sie bei uns mitmachen? Unser Team ist ein globales Talent-Powerhouse, das von überall auf der Welt aus arbeitet. Wenn es Ihnen am Herzen liegt, sich im Fintech-Bereich einen Namen zu machen, ist dies Ihre Gelegenheit, mit einigen der klügsten Köpfe zusammenzuarbeiten, Grenzen zu überschreiten und neue Standards zu setzen. Wir sind schnell gewachsen, schlank geblieben und haben uns unseren Platz als Branchenführer gesichert. Wenn Sie über ausgezeichnete Englischkenntnisse verfügen und bereit sind, einen Beitrag zur innovativsten Plattform der Welt zu leisten, ist Tether der richtige Ort für Sie. Sind Sie bereit, Teil der Zukunft zu sein? Über die Stelle: Als Investment Associate im Expansion Investments-Team von Tether tragen Sie zu unseren Private-Equity- und Risikokapitalinvestitionen bei und konzentrieren sich dabei auf wichtige strategische Investitionen und Expansionsfaktoren. In enger Zusammenarbeit mit hochrangigen Teammitgliedern spielen Sie eine wichtige Rolle bei der Analyse, Due Diligence und Überwachung potenzieller Investitionsempfänger. Diese Rolle bietet eine hervorragende Gelegenheit, in einem dynamischen und schnelllebigen Umfeld praktische Erfahrungen in der Geschäftsabwicklung und im Investmentmanagement zu sammeln. Verantwortlichkeiten: Unterstützung bei der Geschäftsabwicklung und beim Transaktionsmanagement. Unterstützen Sie den gesamten Lebenszyklus von Investitionstransaktionen vom Term Sheet bis zum Abschluss und koordinieren Sie rechtliche, finanzielle und strategische Arbeitsabläufe mit internen Teams und externen Beratern. Strukturieren und verhandeln Sie die Vertragsbedingungen (Bewertung, Governance-Rechte, anteilig, Informationsrechte) und stellen Sie sicher, dass sie mit der Risikobereitschaft und den Renditeschwellen des RISE-Fonds übereinstimmen. Due Diligence: Fassen Sie die Ergebnisse der Due Diligence in Investment-Grade-Analysen um, testen Sie wichtige Annahmen, identifizieren Sie wesentliche Risiken und formulieren Sie Abhilfestrategien. Koordinieren Sie detaillierte Spezialanalysen (Regulierung, Cyber, AML/KYC, sofern für Anlageziele relevant) unter Berücksichtigung der Bedürfnisse des RISE-Fonds. Vorbereitung und Governance des Anlageausschusses Verfasser von Memoranden des Anlageausschusses – einschließlich Formulierung der These, Marktgröße, Wettbewerbspositionierung, Bewertungsmodellierung, Risikomatrizen und vorgeschlagene Bedingungen. Halten Sie strenge Dokumentationsstandards für alle Venture-IC-Materialien ein und stellen Sie Überprüfbarkeit und Konsistenz mit dem internen Governance-Rahmen und den Anlagerichtlinien des Fonds sicher. Portfoliomanagement und Wertschöpfung: Sie fungieren nach dem Abschluss als primärer Beziehungseigentümer für die zugewiesenen Portfoliounternehmen und führen strukturierte Check-ins,
• Aufgaben als Vorstandsbeobachter und die Nachverfolgung von Meilensteinen durch. Unterstützen Sie das Reporting-Team bei der Überwachung finanzieller und betrieblicher KPIs, der Erkennung von Wendepunkten, Vertragsbedenken oder Folgemöglichkeiten für den RISE-Fonds. Arbeiten Sie mit dem Reporting- und Finanzteam zusammen, um regelmäßige Portfolioberichte für interne Stakeholder und Führungskräfte zu erstellen und dabei genaue Bewertungsnoten und strategische Kommentare zu pflegen. Entwicklung der Rise Fund-Plattform. Unterstützen Sie den Ausbau und die kontinuierliche Verbesserung der Investment-Betriebsinfrastruktur des Tether RISE-Fonds rund um Anlageprozesse, Dealflow-Verfolgung, Portfoliomanagementsysteme und Berichtsrhythmen. Koordination und Diskussion mit dem Expansionsteam zur Verbesserung der Strategie des Tether RISE-Fonds durch die Arbeit an Inputs im Zusammenhang mit Marktinformationen, thematischer Abdeckung und Ökosystemkartierung. Analytische Fähigkeiten Starke analytische Fähigkeiten mit der Fähigkeit, Finanzdaten zu interpretieren, Bewertungsanalysen durchzuführen und Investitionsmöglichkeiten zu bewerten. Kommunikationsfähigkeiten: Sie verfügen über hervorragende schriftliche und mündliche Kommunikationsfähigkeiten in Englisch und sind in der Lage, Ergebnisse und Empfehlungen effektiv an die Geschäftsleitung und Investitionsausschüsse zu kommunizieren. Ausbildung: Bachelor-Abschluss (mindestens) in Finanzen, Wirtschaftswissenschaften, Betriebswirtschaftslehre oder einer eng verwandten Disziplin. Ein Master-Abschluss (MBA, MSc Finance oder gleichwertig) wird dringend bevorzugt. Professionelle Zertifizierung: CFA-Charterholder oder CAIA-Bezeichnung erforderlich (oder nachweisbare Fortschritte in Richtung Abschluss). Diese Qualifikationen gelten als Grundlage für das Maß an analytischer Genauigkeit und Investment-Governance, das in dieser Rolle erwartet wird. Erfahrung: 3–5 Jahre direkt relevante Erfahrung in den Bereichen Risikokapital, Private Equity, Investment Banking oder Unternehmensentwicklung, wobei ein wesentlicher Teil dieser Tätigkeit mit der Durchführung und dem Abschluss von Transaktionen verbracht wurde. Technische und analytische Fähigkeiten: Fortgeschrittene Finanzmodellierung; gute Kenntnisse in Excel und PowerPoint; Kenntnisse in Cap-Table-Management-Tools (z. B. Carta), CRM/Deal-Flow-Plattformen (z. B. Affinity, Salesforce) und Datenraumverwaltung. Vertrautheit mit den Tools des Portfoliomanagementsystems ist von Vorteil. Kommunikationsfähigkeiten: Sie verfügen über hervorragende schriftliche und mündliche Kommunikationsfähigkeiten in Englisch und sind in der Lage, Ergebnisse und Empfehlungen effektiv an die Geschäftsleitung und Investitionsausschüsse zu kommunizieren. Branchenkenntnisse: Ausgeprägtes Verständnis der Investitionsdynamik in der Risiko- und Wachstumsphase. Kenntnisse des Finanzdienstleistungssektors, einschließlich regulatorischer Rahmenbedingungen, Fintech-Ökosysteme und institutioneller Investitionsbeschränkungen. Sprache: Vollständige professionelle Englischkenntnisse (schriftlich und mündlich) sind erforderlich. Jede andere Sprache ist von Vorteil. Wichtige Informationen für Kandidaten: Betrug bei der Personalbeschaffung kommt immer häufiger vor. Um sich selbst zu schützen, beachten Sie bitte Folgendes, wenn Sie sich auf Stellen bewerben: Bewerben Sie sich ausschließlich über unsere offiziellen Kanäle. Wir nutzen für die Rekrutierung keine Plattformen oder Agenturen Dritter, sofern dies nicht ausdrücklich angegeben ist. Alle offenen Stellen sind auf unserer offiziellen Karriereseite aufgeführt: https://tether.recruitee.com/ Überprüfen Sie die Identität des Personalvermittlers. Alle unsere Personalvermittler verfügen über verifizierte LinkedIn-
• Profile. Wenn Sie sich nicht sicher sind, können Sie ihre Identität bestätigen, indem Sie ihr Profil überprüfen oder uns über unsere Website kontaktieren. Seien Sie vorsichtig bei ungewöhnlichen Kommunikationsmethoden. Wir führen keine Interviews über WhatsApp, Telegram oder SMS durch. Die gesamte Kommunikation erfolgt über offizielle E-Mails und Plattformen des Unternehmens. Überprüfen Sie die E-Mail-Adressen noch einmal. Die gesamte Kommunikation von uns erfolgt über E-Mails mit der Endung @ tether.to oder @ tether.io. Wir werden niemals nach Zahlungs- oder Finanzdaten fragen. Wenn jemand zu irgendeinem Zeitpunkt während des Einstellungsprozesses nach persönlichen Finanzinformationen oder Zahlungen fragt, handelt es sich um Betrug. Bitte melden Sie es umgehend. Im Zweifelsfall können Sie sich gerne über unsere offizielle Website an uns wenden.
descriptionByLocale.fr: Rejoignez Tether et façonnez l'avenir de la finance numérique Chez Tether, nous ne nous contentons pas de créer des produits, nous sommes les pionniers d'une révolution financière mondiale. Nos solutions de pointe permettent aux entreprises (des bourses et portefeuilles aux processeurs de paiement et aux distributeurs automatiques) d'intégrer de manière transparente les jetons adossés à des réserves dans les blockchains. En exploitant la puissance de la technologie blockchain, Tether vous permet de stocker, d'envoyer et de recevoir des jetons numériques instantanément, en toute sécurité et à l'échelle mondiale, le tout pour une fraction du coût. La transparence est le fondement de tout ce que nous faisons, garantissant la confiance dans chaque transaction. Innovez avec Tether Tether Finance : notre suite de produits innovants comprend le stablecoin le plus fiable au monde, l'USDT, sur lequel s'appuient des centaines de millions de personnes dans le monde, ainsi que des services pionniers de tokenisation d'actifs numériques. Mais ce n’est qu’un début : Tether Power : favorisant une croissance durable, nos solutions énergétiques optimisent l’énergie excédentaire pour l’extraction de Bitcoin en utilisant des pratiques respectueuses de l’environnement dans des installations de pointe et géodiverses. Tether Data : En alimentant les percées dans l'IA et la technologie peer-to-peer, nous réduisons les coûts d'infrastructure et améliorons les communications mondiales avec des solutions de pointe comme KEET, notre application phare qui redéfinit le partage de données sécurisé et privé. Tether Education : en démocratisant l'accès à un apprentissage numérique de haut niveau, nous permettons aux individus de s'épanouir dans l'économie numérique et des petits boulots, stimulant ainsi la croissance et les opportunités mondiales. Tether Evolution : À l'intersection de la technologie et du potentiel humain, nous repoussons les limites de ce qui est possible, en créant un avenir où l'innovation et les capacités humaines fusionnent de manière puissante et sans précédent. Pourquoi nous rejoindre ? Notre équipe est une centrale mondiale de talents, travaillant à distance depuis tous les coins du monde. Si vous souhaitez vous démarquer dans le domaine de la fintech, c'est l'occasion de collaborer avec certains des esprits les plus brillants, de repousser les limites et d'établir de nouvelles normes. Nous avons connu une croissance rapide, sommes restés minces et avons assuré notre place de leader du secteur. Si vous possédez d'excellentes compétences en communication en anglais et êtes prêt à contribuer à la plateforme la plus innovante de la planète, Tether est fait pour vous. Êtes-vous prêt à faire partie du futur ? À propos du poste En tant qu'associé en investissement au sein de l'équipe Investissements d'expansion chez Tether, vous contribuerez à nos investissements en capital-investissement et en capital-risque, en vous concentrant sur les investissements stratégiques clés et les catalyseurs d'expansion. En travaillant en étroite collaboration avec les membres supérieurs de l'équipe, vous jouerez un rôle essentiel dans l'analyse, la diligence raisonnable et le suivi des sociétés potentielles. Ce rôle offre une excellente opportunité d'acquérir une expérience pratique dans l'exécution de transactions et la gestion d'investissements dans un environnement dynamique et en évolution rapide. Responsabilités Soutien à l'exécution des transactions et à la gestion des transactions Soutenir le cycle de vie complet des transactions d'investissement, depuis la feuille de conditions jusqu'à la clôture, en coordonnant les flux de travail juridiques, financiers et stratégiques avec les équipes internes et les conseillers externes. Structurer et négocier les conditions des transactions (valorisation, droits de gouvernance, prorata, droits d'information) en garantissant l'alignement avec l'appétit pour le risque et les seuils de rendement du fonds RISE. Due Diligence Synthétiser les résultats de la diligence dans une analyse de qualité investissement, tester les hypothèses clés, identifier les risques importants et articuler des stratégies d'atténuation. Coordonner des analyses approfondies spécialisées (réglementaire, cyber, AML/KYC, le cas échéant pour les objectifs d'investissement) en fonction des besoins du fonds RISE. Préparation du comité d'investissement et gouvernance Notes de l'auteur du comité d'investissement - y compris l'articulation de la thèse, la taille du marché, le positionnement concurrentiel, la modélisation de la valorisation, les matrices de risque et les conditions proposées. Maintenir des normes de documentation rigoureuses pour tous les documents de Venture IC, garantissant l’auditabilité et la cohérence avec le cadre de gouvernance interne et les directives d’investissement du fonds. Gestion de portefeuille et création de valeur Servir de principal responsable de la relation pour les sociétés de portefeuille assignées après la clôture, en effectuant des enregistrements structurés, des tâches d'observateur au conseil d'administration et le suivi des jalons. Soutenir l'équipe de reporting dans le suivi des KPI financiers et opérationnels, en signalant les points d'inflexion, les problèmes liés aux engagements ou les opportunités de suivi du fonds RISE. Travailler aux côtés de l'équipe de reporting et des finances pour produire des rapports périodiques sur le portefeuille pour les parties prenantes internes et la haute direction, en maintenant des notes d'évaluation et des commentaires stratégiques précis. Développement de la plateforme Rise Fund Soutenir le développement et l'amélioration continue de l'infrastructure opérationnelle d'investissement du fonds Tether RISE autour des processus d'investissement, du suivi des flux de transactions, des systèmes de gestion de portefeuille et des cadences de reporting. Coordination et discussion avec l'équipe d'expansion pour améliorer la stratégie du fonds Tether RISE en travaillant sur les apports liés à l'intelligence du marché, à la couverture thématique et à la cartographie de l'écosystème. Compétences analytiques Solides capacités analytiques avec la capacité d'interpréter des données financières, d'effectuer des analyses de valorisation et d'évaluer les opportunités d'investissement. Compétences en communication : faire preuve d'excellentes compétences en communication écrite et verbale en anglais, avec la capacité de communiquer efficacement les conclusions et les recommandations à la haute direction et aux comités d'investissement. Éducation : Baccalauréat (minimum) en finance, économie, administration des affaires ou dans une discipline étroitement liée. Un diplôme de maîtrise (MBA, MSc Finance ou équivalent) est fortement préféré. Certification professionnelle : titulaire du titre CFA ou CAIA requis (ou progression démontrable vers l'achèvement). Ces qualifications sont considérées comme la base du niveau de rigueur analytique et de gouvernance des investissements attendu dans ce rôle. Expérience : 3 à 5 ans d'expérience directement pertinente dans les domaines du capital-risque, du capital-investissement, de la banque d'investissement ou du développement d'entreprise, avec une partie importante de cette période consacrée à l'exécution et à la clôture de transactions. Compétences techniques et analytiques : Modélisation financière avancée ; bonne maîtrise d'Excel et de PowerPoint; connaissance pratique des outils de gestion des tables de plafond (par exemple Carta), des plateformes CRM/flux de transactions (par exemple Affinity, Salesforce) et de la gestion de salles de données. La connaissance des outils du système de gestion de portefeuille est un plus. Compétences en communication : faire preuve d'excellentes compétences en communication écrite et verbale en anglais, avec la capacité de communiquer efficacement les conclusions et les recommandations à la haute direction et aux comités d'investissement. Connaissance de l'industrie : Solide compréhension de la dynamique des investissements en capital-risque et en phase de croissance. Connaissance du secteur des services financiers, y compris les cadres réglementaires, les écosystèmes fintech et les contraintes d'investissement institutionnels. Langue : Une maîtrise professionnelle complète de l'anglais (écrit et oral) est requise. Toute autre langue est un plus. Informations importantes pour les candidats Les escroqueries au recrutement sont devenues de plus en plus courantes. Pour vous protéger, veuillez garder les points suivants à l'esprit lorsque vous postulez à des postes : postulez uniquement via nos canaux officiels. Nous n'utilisons pas de plateformes ou d'agences tierces pour le recrutement, sauf indication contraire. Tous les postes ouverts sont répertoriés sur notre page officielle des carrières : https://tether.recruitee.com/ Vérifiez l'identité du recruteur. Tous nos recruteurs ont des profils LinkedIn vérifiés. En cas de doute, vous pouvez confirmer leur identité en vérifiant leur profil ou en nous contactant via notre site Web. Méfiez-vous des méthodes de communication inhabituelles. Nous ne menons pas d'entretiens via WhatsApp, Telegram ou SMS. Toutes les communications se font via les e-mails et les plateformes officielles de l'entreprise. Vérifiez les adresses e-mail. Toutes les communications de notre part proviendront d'e-mails se terminant par @ tether.to ou @ tether.io. Nous ne demanderons jamais de paiement ou de détails financiers. Si quelqu’un demande des informations financières personnelles ou un paiement à tout moment du processus d’embauche, il s’agit d’une arnaque. Veuillez le signaler immédiatement. En cas de doute, n'hésitez pas à nous contacter via notre site officiel.

jobs.title: Compliance Governance Analyst (100% remote)
jobs.description:
Join Tether and Shape the Future of Digital Finance 
 At Tether, we’re not just building products, we’re pioneering a global financial revolution. Our cutting-edge solutions empower businesses—from exchanges and wallets to payment processors and ATMs—to seamlessly integrate reserve-backed tokens across blockchains. By harnessing the power of blockchain technology, Tether enables you to store, send, and receive digital tokens instantly, securely, and globally, all at a fraction of the cost. Transparency is the bedrock of everything we do, ensuring trust in every transaction. 
 
 Innovate with Tether 
 Tether Finance: Our innovative product suite features the world’s most trusted stablecoin, USDT , relied upon by hundreds of millions worldwide, alongside pioneering digital asset tokenization services. 
 But that’s just the beginning: 
 Tether Power: Driving sustainable growth, our energy solutions optimize excess power for Bitcoin mining using eco-friendly practices in state-of-the-art, geo-diverse facilities. 
 Tether Data: Fueling breakthroughs in AI and peer-to-peer technology, we reduce infrastructure costs and enhance global communications with cutting-edge solutions like KEET , our flagship app that redefines secure and private data sharing. 
 Tether Education : Democratizing access to top-tier digital learning, we empower individuals to thrive in the digital and gig economies, driving global growth and opportunity. 
 Tether Evolution : At the intersection of technology and human potential, we are pushing the boundaries of what is possible, crafting a future where innovation and human capabilities merge in powerful, unprecedented ways. 
 
 Why Join Us? 
 Our team is a global talent powerhouse, working remotely from every corner of the world. If you’re passionate about making a mark in the fintech space, this is your opportunity to collaborate with some of the brightest minds, pushing boundaries and setting new standards. We’ve grown fast, stayed lean, and secured our place as a leader in the industry. 
 If you have excellent English communication skills and are ready to contribute to the most innovative platform on the planet, Tether is the place for you. 
 Are you ready to be part of the future? 
 
 About the job 
 The primary purpose of this role is to collaborate with the Governance & Oversight Manager in ensuring the effectiveness of our Compliance Department by identifying process improvements, implementing best practices, and supporting key initiatives. This position requires a proactive individual with strong analytical skills and a commitment to maintaining high standards of compliance and operational excellence. 
 
 Responsibilities 
 
• Provide administrative and analytical support to the Compliance Team. 

• Collaborate with the management of the lifecycle of Compliance Policies and Procedures, ensuring their periodic review, update, and alignment with current regulations and internal standards. 

• Document and formalize compliance processes through detailed process mapping to identify gaps, enhance efficiency, and ensure consistency and scalability. 

 
• Document meeting minutes, key decisions, and compliance outcomes from AML Committees and working groups. 

• Ensure the timely tracking and follow-up of all action items to meet regulatory deadlines. 

• Continuously self-develop and enhance skill sets. 

• Stay informed about compliance governance best practices and apply this knowledge to enhance compliance processes. 

• Ensure the company’s compliance with robust regulatory standards. 

 

 
• Bachelor's degree in Law, Business Administration, Finance, or a related field. 

• Advanced English language skills. 

• Demonstrated experience in the related fields and ability to handle complex projects from start to finish. Knowledge of project management methodologies and tools. 

• Ability to critically evaluate processes and systems, identifying potential areas for improvement or innovation. 

 
• Attention to detail in all aspects of work, ensuring accuracy and consistency in data management and process documentation. 

• Ability to effectively and efficiently support teams through transitions and change initiatives. Skilled in conducting risk assessments and implementing risk management strategies in documented procedures and operational processes. 

• Strong team player who can work effectively in cross-functional teams and build productive relationships with colleagues at all organizational levels. 

• Excellent communication skills, with the ability to present complex information clearly and concisely to diverse audiences. 

• Commitment to continuous professional development and staying abreast of the latest trends and best practices in Compliance. 

• Strong ethical standards and a commitment to upholding the company's values and compliance policies. 

• ACAMS designation (Preferred) 

 
 Important information for candidates 
Recruitment scams have become increasingly common. To protect yourself, please keep the following in mind when applying for roles:
 
• Apply only through our official channels. We do not use third-party platforms or agencies for recruitment unless clearly stated. All open roles are listed on our official careers page: https://tether.recruitee.com/

• Verify the recruiter’s identity. All our recruiters have verified LinkedIn profiles. If you’re unsure, you can confirm their identity by checking their profile or contacting us through our website.

• Be cautious of unusual communication methods. We do not conduct interviews over WhatsApp, Telegram, or SMS. All communication is done through official company emails and platforms.

• Double-check email addresses. All communication from us will come from emails ending in @ tether.to or @ tether.io 

• We will never request payment or financial details. If someone asks for personal financial information or payment at any point during the hiring process, it is a scam. Please report it immediately.

 When in doubt, feel free to reach out through our official website.

 About the job 
 This role is integral to the Product & Engineering Performance Management Team, serving as a critical support function for maintaining operational excellence across the Engineering and Product departments. Your work will be vital in maintaining the operational workflows that provide executive leadership with clear visibility into team performance, potential risks, and financial adherence.
 
 Responsibilities 
 
• Data Maintenance & Reporting : Assist in the rigorous tracking of engineering and product team performance by updating dashboards and verification logs.

• Documentation Management : Maintain and organize operational standards, coordination protocols, and technical standards within Confluence to ensure department-wide visibility.

• OKR Support : Provide administrative support in the tracking and reporting of OKRs on the agreed-upon cadence.

• Hiring Coordination : Update and monitor the hiring pipeline data to ensure the leadership team has an accurate view of candidate influx and resource needs.

• Audit Assistance : Support in-depth due diligence by gathering necessary data and documentation to verify that teams are functioning as intended.

• Financial Tracking Support : Assist in overseeing budget spreadsheets and expenditure logs to help identify potential cost overruns or inefficiencies.

 
 
• Minimum of 2+ years of experience in a high-impact role focused on operations or administrative support, with demonstrated success working in fast-paced and dynamic environments.

• Exceptional communication skills and the ability to work effectively within a team reporting to executive leadership.

• Proficiency in Confluence and Jira for process verification and visibility.

• Analytical mindset with a proven ability to identify and surface potential delays or risks.

 
 Important information for candidates 
Recruitment scams have become increasingly common. To protect yourself, please keep the following in mind when applying for roles:
 
• Apply only through our official channels. We do not use third-party platforms or agencies for recruitment unless clearly stated. All open roles are listed on our official careers page: https://tether.recruitee.com/

• Verify the recruiter’s identity. All our recruiters have verified LinkedIn profiles. If you’re unsure, you can confirm their identity by checking their profile or contacting us through our website.

• Be cautious of unusual communication methods. We do not conduct interviews over WhatsApp, Telegram, or SMS. All communication is done through official company emails and platforms.

• Double-check email addresses. All communication from us will come from emails ending in @ tether.to or @ tether.io 

• We will never request payment or financial details. If someone asks for personal financial information or payment at any point during the hiring process, it is a scam. Please report it immediately.

 When in doubt, feel free to reach out through our official website.

jobs.description:
Join Tether and Shape the Future of Digital Finance 
 At Tether, we’re not just building products, we’re pioneering a global financial revolution. Our cutting-edge solutions empower businesses—from exchanges and wallets to payment processors and ATMs—to seamlessly integrate reserve-backed tokens across blockchains. By harnessing the power of blockchain technology, Tether enables you to store, send, and receive digital tokens instantly, securely, and globally, all at a fraction of the cost. Transparency is the bedrock of everything we do, ensuring trust in every transaction. 
 
 Innovate with Tether 
 Tether Finance: Our innovative product suite features the world’s most trusted stablecoin, USDT , relied upon by hundreds of millions worldwide, alongside pioneering digital asset tokenization services. 
 But that’s just the beginning: 
 Tether Power: Driving sustainable growth, our energy solutions optimize excess power for Bitcoin mining using eco-friendly practices in state-of-the-art, geo-diverse facilities. 
 Tether Data: Fueling breakthroughs in AI and peer-to-peer technology, we reduce infrastructure costs and enhance global communications with cutting-edge solutions like KEET , our flagship app that redefines secure and private data sharing. 
 Tether Education : Democratizing access to top-tier digital learning, we empower individuals to thrive in the digital and gig economies, driving global growth and opportunity. 
 Tether Evolution : At the intersection of technology and human potential, we are pushing the boundaries of what is possible, crafting a future where innovation and human capabilities merge in powerful, unprecedented ways. 
 
 Why Join Us? 
 Our team is a global talent powerhouse, working remotely from every corner of the world. If you’re passionate about making a mark in the fintech space, this is your opportunity to collaborate with some of the brightest minds, pushing boundaries and setting new standards. We’ve grown fast, stayed lean, and secured our place as a leader in the industry. 
 If you have excellent English communication skills and are ready to contribute to the most innovative platform on the planet, Tether is the place for you. 
 Are you ready to be part of the future? 
 
 About the job 
 At Tether, we are at the forefront of integrating artificial intelligence with brain-computer interface technologies. Our projects leverage deep learning, generative models, and representation learning to decode and interpret brain activity. With our foundation in both established and cutting-edge AI infrastructure, our mission is to bridge the gap between AI and neuroimaging, driving innovation that’s not only revolutionary but also accessible, transparent, and privacy-focused. 
 
 We are looking for a motivated and skilled machine learning intern to join our dynamic Brain & AI team for 3 to 6 months. This role focuses on developing AI models that enhance our understanding of neural mechanisms building encoding and decoding models and apply this knowledge to real-world applications such as brain computer interfaces. You will be instrumental in pushing the boundaries of what’s possible in AI and neuroscience, helping to solve some of the most complex and fascinating challenges in the field today. 
 
 Responsibilities 
 
• Develop and evaluate scalable deep learning algorithms that are central to our brain decoding initiatives. 

• Collaborate closely with data scientists to pioneer research in generative modeling and representation learning. 

• Identify bottlenecks in data processing pipelines and devise effective solutions, improving performance and reliability. 

• Maintain high standards of code quality, organization, and automatization across all projects. 

• Adapt machine learning and neural network algorithms to optimize performance in various computing environments, including distributed clusters and GPUs. 

• Write and revise papers, communicate and disseminate results. 

 
 
• Degree and currently involved in a PhD program in Computer Science, Statistics, Informatics, Physics, Math, Neuroscience or another quantitative field. 

• 1+ years of experience of working in industry or research. 

• Programming skills in Python, with experience in developing machine learning algorithms or infrastructure using Python and PyTorch. 

• Experience in deep learning techniques such as supervised, semi-supervised, self-supervised learning, and/or generative modeling. 

• Scientific background and ability to formulate and test novel hypotheses with proper experiments, draw conclusions and support claims. 

• Managing unstructured datasets with strong analytical skills. 

• Project management and organizational skills. 

• Proven ability to support and collaborate with cross-functional teams in a dynamic environment. 

 
 Preferred Qualifications: 
 
• Research experience in Computer Science, Statistics, Informatics, Physics, Math, Neuroscience or another quantitative field. 

• Scientific publications in AI and neuroscience conferences or peer reviewed journals 

• Familiarity with deep learning libraries such as Pytorch, Huggingface, Transformers, Accelerator and Diffuser. 

• Hands-on experience in training and fine-tuning generative models like diffusion models or large language models such as GPTs and LLAMAs. 

• Experience with data and model visualization tools. 

• Experience with non-invasive neural data (fMRI, EEG, MEG) or invasive neural recordings (ECoG, MEA, ecc). 

 
 Important information for candidates 
Recruitment scams have become increasingly common. To protect yourself, please keep the following in mind when applying for roles:
 
• Apply only through our official channels. We do not use third-party platforms or agencies for recruitment unless clearly stated. All open roles are listed on our official careers page: https://tether.recruitee.com/

• Verify the recruiter’s identity. All our recruiters have verified LinkedIn profiles. If you’re unsure, you can confirm their identity by checking their profile or contacting us through our website.

• Be cautious of unusual communication methods. We do not conduct interviews over WhatsApp, Telegram, or SMS. All communication is done through official company emails and platforms.

• Double-check email addresses. All communication from us will come from emails ending in @ tether.to or @ tether.io 

• We will never request payment or financial details. If someone asks for personal financial information or payment at any point during the hiring process, it is a scam. Please report it immediately.

 When in doubt, feel free to reach out through our official website.

• Develop and evaluate scalable deep learning algorithms that are central to our brain decoding initiatives.
• Collaborate closely with data scientists to pioneer research in generative modeling and representation learning.
• Identify bottlenecks in data processing pipelines and devise effective solutions, improving performance and reliability.
• Maintain high standards of code quality, organization, and automatization across all projects.
• Adapt machine learning and neural network algorithms to optimize performance in various computing environments, including distributed clusters and GPUs.
• Write and revise papers, communicate and disseminate results.
• Degree and currently involved in a PhD program in Computer Science, Statistics, Informatics, Physics, Math, Neuroscience or another quantitative field.
• 1+ years of experience of working in industry or research.
• Programming skills in Python, with experience in developing machine learning algorithms or infrastructure using Python and PyTorch.
• Experience in deep learning techniques such as supervised, semi-supervised, self-supervised learning, and/or generative modeling.
• Scientific background and ability to formulate and test novel hypotheses with proper experiments, draw conclusions and support claims.
• Managing unstructured datasets with strong analytical skills.
• Project management and organizational skills.
• Proven ability to support and collaborate with cross-functional teams in a dynamic environment. Preferred Qualifications:
• Research experience in Computer Science, Statistics, Informatics, Physics, Math, Neuroscience or another quantitative field.
• Scientific publications in AI and neuroscience conferences or peer reviewed journals
• Familiarity with deep learning libraries such as Pytorch, Huggingface, Transformers, Accelerator and Diffuser.
• Hands-on experience in training and fine-tuning generative models like diffusion models or large language models such as GPTs and LLAMAs.
• Experience with data and model visualization tools.
• Experience with non-invasive neural data (fMRI, EEG, MEG) or invasive neural recordings (ECoG, MEA, ecc). Important information for candidates Recruitment scams have become increasingly common. To protect yourself, please keep the following in mind when applying for roles:
• Apply only through our official channels. We do not use third-party platforms or agencies for recruitment unless clearly stated. All open roles are listed on our official careers page: https://tether.recruitee.com/
• Verify the recruiter’s identity. All our recruiters have verified LinkedIn profiles. If you’re unsure, you can confirm their identity by checking their profile or contacting us through our website.
• Be cautious of unusual communication methods. We do not conduct interviews over WhatsApp, Telegram, or SMS. All communication is done through official company emails and platforms.
• Double-check email addresses. All communication from us will come from emails ending in @ tether.to or @ tether.io
• We will never request payment or financial details. If someone asks for personal financial information or payment at any point during the hiring process, it is a scam. Please report it immediately. When in doubt, feel free to reach out through our official website.

jobs.title: Head of Regulatory Affairs - Japan
jobs.description:
Join Tether and Shape the Future of Digital Finance 
 At Tether, we’re not just building products, we’re pioneering a global financial revolution. Our cutting-edge solutions empower businesses—from exchanges and wallets to payment processors and ATMs—to seamlessly integrate reserve-backed tokens across blockchains. By harnessing the power of blockchain technology, Tether enables you to store, send, and receive digital tokens instantly, securely, and globally, all at a fraction of the cost. Transparency is the bedrock of everything we do, ensuring trust in every transaction. 
 
 Innovate with Tether 
 Tether Finance: Our innovative product suite features the world’s most trusted stablecoin, USDT , relied upon by hundreds of millions worldwide, alongside pioneering digital asset tokenization services. 
 But that’s just the beginning: 
 Tether Power: Driving sustainable growth, our energy solutions optimize excess power for Bitcoin mining using eco-friendly practices in state-of-the-art, geo-diverse facilities. 
 Tether Data: Fueling breakthroughs in AI and peer-to-peer technology, we reduce infrastructure costs and enhance global communications with cutting-edge solutions like KEET , our flagship app that redefines secure and private data sharing. 
 Tether Education : Democratizing access to top-tier digital learning, we empower individuals to thrive in the digital and gig economies, driving global growth and opportunity. 
 Tether Evolution : At the intersection of technology and human potential, we are pushing the boundaries of what is possible, crafting a future where innovation and human capabilities merge in powerful, unprecedented ways. 
 
 Why Join Us? 
 Our team is a global talent powerhouse, working remotely from every corner of the world. If you’re passionate about making a mark in the fintech space, this is your opportunity to collaborate with some of the brightest minds, pushing boundaries and setting new standards. We’ve grown fast, stayed lean, and secured our place as a leader in the industry. 
 If you have excellent English communication skills and are ready to contribute to the most innovative platform on the planet, Tether is the place for you. 
 Are you ready to be part of the future? 
 
 About the job 
 Tether and its affiliated entities (e.g. Bitfinex) are searching for an organized self-starter to join our Regulatory and Licensing team, to lead efforts in Japan. The successful candidate is someone with an understanding of the regulatory environment pertaining to the crypto-asset industry / stablecoin industry in the country, as well as broader legislation pertaining to topics such as communication technology and artificial intelligence, and who is excited by the opportunity to apply their existing regulatory affairs and / or legal experience in an exciting and dynamic business environment. 
 To succeed in this role, the incumbent will continuously strive to self-develop and enhance their skill sets including understanding the Company’s products and services, blockchain technology, and regulatory requirements. 
 You will have a focus around working with regulators to translate policy objectives of the companies into favourable regulatory requirements in the region, as part of enabling the broader business strategy across Tether’s business verticals. 
 The successful candidate should be comfortable managing relationships and communications between various stakeholders both internal and external to the business, including regulators and policy setters, as well as working with cross-functional teams such as Operations, Finance, Technology, Business Development. 
 You will report to the Vice President of the Regulatory and Licensing division, and work alongside project managers and members of the wider business to execute on regulatory affairs initiatives. 
 
 
 Responsibilities 
 Regulatory Affairs 
 
• Maintain proactive relationships with policymakers, regulators, central banks, and financial intelligence units relevant to the Company’s product and service lines. 

• Monitor regulatory developments impacting Tether and affiliates companies in the country. 

• Represent the company in consultations, workshops, industry roundtables, and regulatory dialogues. 

• Prepare briefing papers, comment letters, and policy submissions aligned with broader global regulatory strategy. 

• Identify and successfully realise opportunities to shape emerging frameworks in a risk-sensitive, innovation-oriented manner. 

 Strategy & Cross-Functional Collaboration 
 
• Provide actionable risk and regulatory insights to internal stakeholders (legal, product, compliance, risk, commercial). 

• Support enterprise-level planning for new products or expansions into the aforementioned countries, advising on regulatory constraints and enablers. 

• Contribute to internal reporting and executive briefings on policy risks and regulatory trajectory regionally. 

 

 
• Minimum of 8 years governmental affairs / regulatory affairs / legal experience ideally within the financial services or crypto-asset industry in Japan. 

• Experience engaging with regulators or government bodies advocating and advising in a regulatory capacity, with demonstrated achievements securing favourable policy positions on behalf of another organisation. 

• Excellent written and verbal communication skills, with the ability to synthesise complex regulatory topics for non-technical audiences. 

• Proven ability to manage multiple stakeholders across borders and time zones. 

• Communication: Exceptional communication skills, both written and verbal, with experience in public speaking and representing companies in regulatory discussions. 

• Must be a strong team player, and willing to be fully engaged with key stakeholders both in our company but also with our partners. Must be a hands-on professional capable of working collaboratively and independently. 

• English speaking. 
 

 
 Important information for candidates 
Recruitment scams have become increasingly common. To protect yourself, please keep the following in mind when applying for roles: 
 
• Apply only through our official channels. We do not use third-party platforms or agencies for recruitment unless clearly stated. All open roles are listed on our official careers page: https://tether.recruitee.com/ 

• Verify the recruiter’s identity. All our recruiters have verified LinkedIn profiles. If you’re unsure, you can confirm their identity by checking their profile or contacting us through our website. 

• Be cautious of unusual communication methods. We do not conduct interviews over WhatsApp, Telegram, or SMS. All communication is done through official company emails and platforms. 

• Double-check email addresses. All communication from us will come from emails ending in @ tether.to or @ tether.io 

• We will never request payment or financial details. If someone asks for personal financial information or payment at any point during the hiring process, it is a scam. Please report it immediately. 

 When in doubt, feel free to reach out through our official website.

The successful candidate is someone with an understanding of the regulatory environment pertaining to the crypto-asset industry / stablecoin industry in the country, as well as broader legislation pertaining to topics such as communication technology and artificial intelligence, and who is excited by the opportunity to apply their existing regulatory affairs and / or legal experience in an exciting and dynamic business environment. To succeed in this role, the incumbent will continuously strive to self-develop and enhance their skill sets including understanding the Company’s products and services, blockchain technology, and regulatory requirements. You will have a focus around working with regulators to translate policy objectives of the companies into favourable regulatory requirements in the region, as part of enabling the broader business strategy across Tether’s business verticals. The successful candidate should be comfortable managing relationships and communications between various stakeholders both internal and external to the business, including regulators and policy setters, as well as working with cross-functional teams such as Operations, Finance, Technology, Business Development. You will report to the Vice President of the Regulatory and Licensing division, and work alongside project managers and members of the wider business to execute on regulatory affairs initiatives. Responsibilities Regulatory Affairs
• Maintain proactive relationships with policymakers, regulators, central banks, and financial intelligence units relevant to the Company’s product and service lines.
• Monitor regulatory developments impacting Tether and affiliates companies in the country.
• Represent the company in consultations, workshops, industry roundtables, and regulatory dialogues.
• Prepare briefing papers, comment letters, and policy submissions aligned with broader global regulatory strategy.
• Identify and successfully realise opportunities to shape emerging frameworks in a risk-sensitive, innovation-oriented manner. Strategy & Cross-Functional Collaboration
• Provide actionable risk and regulatory insights to internal stakeholders (legal, product, compliance, risk, commercial).
• Support enterprise-level planning for new products or expansions into the aforementioned countries, advising on regulatory constraints and enablers.
• Contribute to internal reporting and executive briefings on policy risks and regulatory trajectory regionally.
• Minimum of 8 years governmental affairs / regulatory affairs / legal experience ideally within the financial services or crypto-asset industry in Japan.
• Experience engaging with regulators or government bodies advocating and advising in a regulatory capacity, with demonstrated achievements securing favourable policy positions on behalf of another organisation.
• Excellent written and verbal communication skills, with the ability to synthesise complex regulatory topics for non-technical audiences.
• Proven ability to manage multiple stakeholders across borders and time zones.
• Communication: Exceptional communication skills, both written and verbal, with experience in public speaking and representing companies in regulatory discussions.
• Must be a strong team player, and willing to be fully engaged with key stakeholders both in our company but also with our partners. Must be a hands-on professional capable of working collaboratively and independently.
• English speaking. Important information for candidates Recruitment scams have become increasingly common. To protect yourself, please keep the following in mind when applying for roles:
• Apply only through our official channels. We do not use third-party platforms or agencies for recruitment unless clearly stated. All open roles are listed on our official careers page: https://tether.recruitee.com/
• Verify the recruiter’s identity. All our recruiters have verified LinkedIn profiles. If you’re unsure, you can confirm their identity by checking their profile or contacting us through our website.
• Be cautious of unusual communication methods. We do not conduct interviews over WhatsApp, Telegram, or SMS. All communication is done through official company emails and platforms.
• Double-check email addresses. All communication from us will come from emails ending in @ tether.to or @ tether.io
• We will never request payment or financial details. If someone asks for personal financial information or payment at any point during the hiring process, it is a scam. Please report it immediately. When in doubt, feel free to reach out through our official website.
