jobs.title: Machine Learning Engineer Intern (100% Remote)
jobs.description:
Join Tether and Shape the Future of Digital Finance 
 At Tether, we’re not just building products, we’re pioneering a global financial revolution. Our cutting-edge solutions empower businesses—from exchanges and wallets to payment processors and ATMs—to seamlessly integrate reserve-backed tokens across blockchains. By harnessing the power of blockchain technology, Tether enables you to store, send, and receive digital tokens instantly, securely, and globally, all at a fraction of the cost. Transparency is the bedrock of everything we do, ensuring trust in every transaction. 
 
 Innovate with Tether 
 Tether Finance: Our innovative product suite features the world’s most trusted stablecoin, USDT , relied upon by hundreds of millions worldwide, alongside pioneering digital asset tokenization services. 
 But that’s just the beginning: 
 Tether Power: Driving sustainable growth, our energy solutions optimize excess power for Bitcoin mining using eco-friendly practices in state-of-the-art, geo-diverse facilities. 
 Tether Data: Fueling breakthroughs in AI and peer-to-peer technology, we reduce infrastructure costs and enhance global communications with cutting-edge solutions like KEET , our flagship app that redefines secure and private data sharing. 
 Tether Education : Democratizing access to top-tier digital learning, we empower individuals to thrive in the digital and gig economies, driving global growth and opportunity. 
 Tether Evolution : At the intersection of technology and human potential, we are pushing the boundaries of what is possible, crafting a future where innovation and human capabilities merge in powerful, unprecedented ways. 
 
 Why Join Us? 
 Our team is a global talent powerhouse, working remotely from every corner of the world. If you’re passionate about making a mark in the fintech space, this is your opportunity to collaborate with some of the brightest minds, pushing boundaries and setting new standards. We’ve grown fast, stayed lean, and secured our place as a leader in the industry. 
 If you have excellent English communication skills and are ready to contribute to the most innovative platform on the planet, Tether is the place for you. 
 Are you ready to be part of the future? 
 
 About the job 
 At Tether, we are at the forefront of integrating artificial intelligence with brain-computer interface technologies. Our projects leverage deep learning, generative models, and representation learning to decode and interpret brain activity. With our foundation in both established and cutting-edge AI infrastructure, our mission is to bridge the gap between AI and neuroimaging, driving innovation that’s not only revolutionary but also accessible, transparent, and privacy-focused. 
 
 We are looking for a motivated and skilled machine learning intern to join our dynamic Brain & AI team for 3 to 6 months. This role focuses on developing AI models that enhance our understanding of neural mechanisms building encoding and decoding models and apply this knowledge to real-world applications such as brain computer interfaces. You will be instrumental in pushing the boundaries of what’s possible in AI and neuroscience, helping to solve some of the most complex and fascinating challenges in the field today. 
 
 Responsibilities 
 
• Develop and evaluate scalable deep learning algorithms that are central to our brain decoding initiatives. 

• Collaborate closely with data scientists to pioneer research in generative modeling and representation learning. 

• Identify bottlenecks in data processing pipelines and devise effective solutions, improving performance and reliability. 

• Maintain high standards of code quality, organization, and automatization across all projects. 

• Adapt machine learning and neural network algorithms to optimize performance in various computing environments, including distributed clusters and GPUs. 

• Write and revise papers, communicate and disseminate results. 

 
 
• Degree and currently involved in a PhD program in Computer Science, Statistics, Informatics, Physics, Math, Neuroscience or another quantitative field. 

• 1+ years of experience of working in industry or research. 

• Programming skills in Python, with experience in developing machine learning algorithms or infrastructure using Python and PyTorch. 

• Experience in deep learning techniques such as supervised, semi-supervised, self-supervised learning, and/or generative modeling. 

• Scientific background and ability to formulate and test novel hypotheses with proper experiments, draw conclusions and support claims. 

• Managing unstructured datasets with strong analytical skills. 

• Project management and organizational skills. 

• Proven ability to support and collaborate with cross-functional teams in a dynamic environment. 

 
 Preferred Qualifications: 
 
• Research experience in Computer Science, Statistics, Informatics, Physics, Math, Neuroscience or another quantitative field. 

• Scientific publications in AI and neuroscience conferences or peer reviewed journals 

• Familiarity with deep learning libraries such as Pytorch, Huggingface, Transformers, Accelerator and Diffuser. 

• Hands-on experience in training and fine-tuning generative models like diffusion models or large language models such as GPTs and LLAMAs. 

• Experience with data and model visualization tools. 

• Experience with non-invasive neural data (fMRI, EEG, MEG) or invasive neural recordings (ECoG, MEA, ecc). 

 
 Important information for candidates 
Recruitment scams have become increasingly common. To protect yourself, please keep the following in mind when applying for roles:
 
• Apply only through our official channels. We do not use third-party platforms or agencies for recruitment unless clearly stated. All open roles are listed on our official careers page: https://tether.recruitee.com/

• Verify the recruiter’s identity. All our recruiters have verified LinkedIn profiles. If you’re unsure, you can confirm their identity by checking their profile or contacting us through our website.

• Be cautious of unusual communication methods. We do not conduct interviews over WhatsApp, Telegram, or SMS. All communication is done through official company emails and platforms.

• Double-check email addresses. All communication from us will come from emails ending in @ tether.to or @ tether.io 

• We will never request payment or financial details. If someone asks for personal financial information or payment at any point during the hiring process, it is a scam. Please report it immediately.

 When in doubt, feel free to reach out through our official website.

If you have excellent English communication skills and are ready to contribute to the most innovative platform on the planet, Tether is the place for you. Are you ready to be part of the future? About the job At Tether, we are at the forefront of integrating artificial intelligence with brain-computer interface technologies. Our projects leverage deep learning, generative models, and representation learning to decode and interpret brain activity. With our foundation in both established and cutting-edge AI infrastructure, our mission is to bridge the gap between AI and neuroimaging, driving innovation that’s not only revolutionary but also accessible, transparent, and privacy-focused. We are looking for a motivated and skilled machine learning intern to join our dynamic Brain & AI team for 3 to 6 months. This role focuses on developing AI models that enhance our understanding of neural mechanisms building encoding and decoding models and apply this knowledge to real-world applications such as brain computer interfaces. You will be instrumental in pushing the boundaries of what’s possible in AI and neuroscience, helping to solve some of the most complex and fascinating challenges in the field today. Responsibilities
• Develop and evaluate scalable deep learning algorithms that are central to our brain decoding initiatives.
• Collaborate closely with data scientists to pioneer research in generative modeling and representation learning.
• Identify bottlenecks in data processing pipelines and devise effective solutions, improving performance and reliability.
• Maintain high standards of code quality, organization, and automatization across all projects.
• Adapt machine learning and neural network algorithms to optimize performance in various computing environments, including distributed clusters and GPUs.
• Write and revise papers, communicate and disseminate results.
• Degree and currently involved in a PhD program in Computer Science, Statistics, Informatics, Physics, Math, Neuroscience or another quantitative field.
• 1+ years of experience of working in industry or research.
• Programming skills in Python, with experience in developing machine learning algorithms or infrastructure using Python and PyTorch.
• Experience in deep learning techniques such as supervised, semi-supervised, self-supervised learning, and/or generative modeling.
• Scientific background and ability to formulate and test novel hypotheses with proper experiments, draw conclusions and support claims.
• Managing unstructured datasets with strong analytical skills.
• Project management and organizational skills.
• Proven ability to support and collaborate with cross-functional teams in a dynamic environment. Preferred Qualifications:
• Research experience in Computer Science, Statistics, Informatics, Physics, Math, Neuroscience or another quantitative field.
• Scientific publications in AI and neuroscience conferences or peer reviewed journals
• Familiarity with deep learning libraries such as Pytorch, Huggingface, Transformers, Accelerator and Diffuser.
• Hands-on experience in training and fine-tuning generative models like diffusion models or large language models such as GPTs and LLAMAs.
• Experience with data and model visualization tools.
• Experience with non-invasive neural data (fMRI, EEG, MEG) or invasive neural recordings (ECoG, MEA, ecc). Important information for candidates Recruitment scams have become increasingly common. To protect yourself, please keep the following in mind when applying for roles:
• Apply only through our official channels. We do not use third-party platforms or agencies for recruitment unless clearly stated. All open roles are listed on our official careers page: https://tether.recruitee.com/
• Verify the recruiter’s identity. All our recruiters have verified LinkedIn profiles. If you’re unsure, you can confirm their identity by checking their profile or contacting us through our website.
• Be cautious of unusual communication methods. We do not conduct interviews over WhatsApp, Telegram, or SMS. All communication is done through official company emails and platforms.
• Double-check email addresses. All communication from us will come from emails ending in @ tether.to or @ tether.io
• We will never request payment or financial details. If someone asks for personal financial information or payment at any point during the hiring process, it is a scam. Please report it immediately. When in doubt, feel free to reach out through our official website.

jobs.title: AI & Optimization Engineer (100% Remote)
jobs.description:
Join Tether and Shape the Future of Digital Finance 
 At Tether, we’re not just building products, we’re pioneering a global financial revolution. Our cutting-edge solutions empower businesses—from exchanges and wallets to payment processors and ATMs—to seamlessly integrate reserve-backed tokens across blockchains. By harnessing the power of blockchain technology, Tether enables you to store, send, and receive digital tokens instantly, securely, and globally, all at a fraction of the cost. Transparency is the bedrock of everything we do, ensuring trust in every transaction. 
 
 Innovate with Tether 
 Tether Finance: Our innovative product suite features the world’s most trusted stablecoin, USDT , relied upon by hundreds of millions worldwide, alongside pioneering digital asset tokenization services. 
 But that’s just the beginning: 
 Tether Power: Driving sustainable growth, our energy solutions optimize excess power for Bitcoin mining using eco-friendly practices in state-of-the-art, geo-diverse facilities. 
 Tether Data: Fueling breakthroughs in AI and peer-to-peer technology, we reduce infrastructure costs and enhance global communications with cutting-edge solutions like KEET , our flagship app that redefines secure and private data sharing. 
 Tether Education : Democratizing access to top-tier digital learning, we empower individuals to thrive in the digital and gig economies, driving global growth and opportunity. 
 Tether Evolution : At the intersection of technology and human potential, we are pushing the boundaries of what is possible, crafting a future where innovation and human capabilities merge in powerful, unprecedented ways. 
 
 Why Join Us? 
 Our team is a global talent powerhouse, working remotely from every corner of the world. If you’re passionate about making a mark in the fintech space, this is your opportunity to collaborate with some of the brightest minds, pushing boundaries and setting new standards. We’ve grown fast, stayed lean, and secured our place as a leader in the industry. 
 If you have excellent English communication skills and are ready to contribute to the most innovative platform on the planet, Tether is the place for you. 
 Are you ready to be part of the future? 
 
 About the job 
 The AI & Optimization Lead — Bitcoin Mining Operations will play a crucial role in defining and executing the AI vision for MOS (Mining Operating System) and MDK (Mining Development Kit) — the core FOSS platforms powering Tether’s Bitcoin-mining operations worldwide. 
 This role is responsible for designing the data foundation and AI models that drive real-world operational efficiency across mining sites , with a focus on performance optimization, predictive insights, and intelligent automation. You will work closely with engineering, data, and operations teams to define a structured data baseline , ensure high-quality data modelling, and develop AI-driven solutions that are fully integrated into MOS/MDK. 
 Your mission is simple and ambitious:
 turn data into intelligence — and intelligence into site-level efficiency. 
 A strong background in data architecture, modelling, ML/AI systems, and mathematical optimization is essential. Prior exposure to Bitcoin mining or industrial/IoT environments is highly valuable, but not mandatory. 
 
 Responsibilities 
 AI Vision & Strategy 
 
• Define and lead the AI strategy for MOS & MDK with a focus on operational efficiency and measurable business outcomes. 

• Translate operational challenges into data and optimization problems that AI models can solve. 

• Establish best-practice frameworks for scalable, production-ready AI systems. 

 Data Foundation & Modelling 
 
• Design a standardized data baseline / schema for all mining-site telemetry and events. 

• Ensure data is structured, normalized, labelled and accessible for AI/ML use cases. 

• Work with backend engineers to evolve the data pipeline and integration standards. 

 Model Development & Optimization 
 
• Build and deploy ML/AI and optimization models such as: 
 
• performance optimization 

• anomaly detection 

• predictive failure & maintenance 

• energy-efficiency insights 

• operational automation recommendations 

 

• Continuously evaluate and improve model performance in production. 

 Integration & Delivery 
 
• Work with MOS & MDK engineering teams to embed AI models into platform workflows and APIs . 

• Ensure models are efficient, reliable, explainable, and maintainable.

 

 Cross-Team Collaboration 
 
• Collaborate with site-operations teams to validate results and gather feedback. 

• Align with leadership on AI roadmap, priorities, impact tracking, and KPIs. 

• Document systems, architecture, and modelling assumptions clearly.

 

 Culture & Mindset 
 
• Promote a data-driven, efficiency-first culture within the Mining Software team. 

• Stay updated on AI, optimization and industrial analytics trends. 

 

 
• Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Computer Science, Data Science, Applied Mathematics, Engineering, Statistics, or similar . 

• 3+ years’ experience in AI/ML, data science, or applied optimization roles. 

• Proven experience designing data models / schemas / baselines for large-scale, time-series–heavy datasets. 

• Strong proficiency in Python and modern ML frameworks (e.g., PyTorch, TensorFlow, Scikit-Learn). 

• Strong JavaScript / TypeScript proficiency (Node.js ecosystem) 

• Familiarity with containerized workloads (Docker) 

• Experience developing and deploying time-series, anomaly detection, classification, and predictive models for mechanical, electromechanical, or hardware-intensive equipment/systems in production environments. 

• Solid understanding of signal processing and feature extraction for sensor data (e.g., electrical, thermal, vibration, or telemetry signals). 

• Solid understanding of optimization techniques (linear/non-linear programming, simulation, decision systems, etc.). 

• Experience deploying, monitoring, maintaining AI models into production systems including handling model drift and evolving operating conditions. 

• Excellent English communication skills and ability to collaborate in distributed teams. 

 
 
 
 
 Important information for candidates 
Recruitment scams have become increasingly common. To protect yourself, please keep the following in mind when applying for roles:
 
• Apply only through our official channels. We do not use third-party platforms or agencies for recruitment unless clearly stated. All open roles are listed on our official careers page: https://tether.recruitee.com/

• Verify the recruiter’s identity. All our recruiters have verified LinkedIn profiles. If you’re unsure, you can confirm their identity by checking their profile or contacting us through our website.

• Be cautious of unusual communication methods. We do not conduct interviews over WhatsApp, Telegram, or SMS. All communication is done through official company emails and platforms.

• Double-check email addresses. All communication from us will come from emails ending in @ tether.to or @ tether.io 

• We will never request payment or financial details. If someone asks for personal financial information or payment at any point during the hiring process, it is a scam. Please report it immediately.

 When in doubt, feel free to reach out through our official website.

descriptionByLocale.it:
Descrizione Join Tether and Shape the Future of Digital Finance At Tether, non stiamo solo costruendo prodotti, siamo pionieri di una rivoluzione finanziaria globale. Le nostre soluzioni all'avanguardia consentono alle aziende, dagli scambi e dai portafogli ai processori di pagamento e agli sportelli bancomat, di integrare senza soluzione di continuità i gettoni di riserva in blockchains. Imbragando la potenza della tecnologia blockchain, Tether consente di memorizzare, inviare e ricevere gettoni digitali istantaneamente, in modo sicuro e globale, il tutto ad una frazione del costo. La trasparenza è la base di tutto ciò che facciamo, garantendo fiducia in ogni transazione. Innovare con Tether Tether Finance: La nostra innovativa suite di prodotti presenta il più affidabile stablecoin, USDT , basato su centinaia di milioni di persone in tutto il mondo, oltre a servizi di tokenizzazione digitale di asset. Ma questo è solo l'inizio: Tether Power: Guidare la crescita sostenibile, le nostre soluzioni energetiche ottimizzano l'eccesso di potenza per l'estrazione mineraria di Bitcoin utilizzando pratiche eco-friendly in strutture geo-diverse all'avanguardia. Tether Data: Riduciamo i costi delle infrastrutture e miglioriamo le comunicazioni globali con soluzioni all'avanguardia come KEET , la nostra app di punta che ridefinisce la condivisione dei dati sicura e privata. Tether Education: Democratizzazione dell'accesso all'apprendimento digitale di alto livello, forniamo agli individui di prosperare nelle economie digitali e di gig, guidando la crescita globale e l'opportunità. Tether Evolution: All'incrocio tra tecnologia e potenziale umano, stiamo spingendo i confini di ciò che è possibile, realizzando un futuro in cui innovazione e capacità umane si fondono in modi potenti e senza precedenti. Perché unirsi a noi? Il nostro team è una centrale di talento globale, che lavora a distanza da ogni angolo del mondo. Se siete appassionati di fare un segno nello spazio fintech, questa è la vostra opportunità di collaborare con alcune delle menti più brillanti, spingendo i confini e stabilendo nuovi standard. Siamo cresciuti veloci, siamo stati magra, e assicurato il nostro posto come leader nel settore. Se avete eccellenti capacità di comunicazione inglese e siete pronti a contribuire alla piattaforma più innovativa del pianeta, Tether è il posto per voi. Sei pronto a far parte del futuro? Riguardo al lavoro The AI & Optimization Lead — Bitcoin Mining Operations giocherà un ruolo cruciale nella definizione e nell'esecuzione della visione AI per MOS (Mining Operating System) e MDK (Mining Development Kit) — le principali piattaforme FOSS che alimentano le operazioni di Bitcoin-mining di Tether in tutto il mondo. Questo ruolo è responsabile della progettazione dei modelli di base dati e AI che guidano l'efficienza operativa nel mondo reale attraverso i siti minerari, con un focus sull'ottimizzazione delle prestazioni, le intuizioni predittive e l'automazione intelligente. Potrai lavorare a stretto contatto con team di ingegneria, dati e operazioni per definire una base di dati strutturata, garantire la modellazione di dati di alta qualità e sviluppare soluzioni basate su AI completamente integrate in MOS/MDK. La vostra missione è semplice e ambiziosa: trasformare i dati in intelligenza - e l'intelligenza in efficienza di livello del sito. Un forte background nell'architettura dei dati, nella modellazione, nei sistemi ML/AI e nell'ottimizzazione matematica è essenziale. L'esposizione precedente agli ambienti minerari o industriali/IoT di Bitcoin è altamente preziosa, ma non obbligatoria. ## Responsabilità ## AI Vision & Strategy - Definire e guidare la strategia AI per MOS & MDK con un focus sull'efficienza operativa e sui risultati aziendali misurabili. - Tradurre sfide operative nei dati e problemi di ottimizzazione che i modelli AI possono risolvere. - Stabilire strutture best practice per sistemi AI scalabili, pronti alla produzione. ### Data Foundation & Modelling - Progettare una base dati standardizzata / schema per tutte le telemetrie e gli eventi del cantiere minerario. - Assicurare che i dati siano strutturati, normalizzati, etichettati e accessibili per casi di utilizzo AI/ML. - Lavorare con gli ingegneri backend per evolvere gli standard di data pipeline e integrazione. ### Model Development & Optimization - Costruire e distribuire modelli ML/AI e di ottimizzazione come: - ottimizzazione delle prestazioni - rilevamento di anomalia - guasto predittivo & manutenzione - insight di efficienza energetica - raccomandazioni di automazione operativa - Valutare costantemente e migliorare le prestazioni del modello nella produzione. ### Integration & Delivery - Lavora con i team di ingegneria MOS & MDK per incorporare i modelli AI nei flussi di lavoro delle piattaforme e API. - Assicurare i modelli sono efficienti, affidabili, spiegabili e manutenbili. ### Cross-Team Collaboration - Collabora con i team di site-operation per convalidare i risultati e raccogliere feedback. - Allineare con la leadership sulla mappa stradale AI, priorità, monitoraggio degli impatti e KPI. - Sistemi di documentazione, architettura e presupposti di modellazione chiaramente. #### Culture & Mindset - Promuovere una cultura data-driven, efficiente-first all'interno del team di Mining Software. - Resta aggiornato sulle tendenze AI, ottimizzazione e analisi industriale. ##
• Requisiti - Laurea o Master in Informatica, Scienza dei dati, Matematica applicata, Ingegneria, Statistica, o simili. - 3+ anni di esperienza in AI/ML, scienza dei dati, o ruoli di ottimizzazione applicati. - Prove esperienze progettando modelli di dati / schemi / linee di base per set di dati su larga scala, serie temporali-pesanti. - Forte competenza in Python e moderni framework ML (per esempio PyTorch, TensorFlow, Scikit-Learn). - Forte competenza JavaScript / TypeScript (ecosistema Node.js) - Familiarità con carichi di lavoro containerizzati (Docker) - Esperienza di sviluppo e distribuzione di serie temporali, rilevamento di anomalia, classificazione e modelli predittivi per apparecchiature/sistemi meccanici, elettromeccanici o hardware-intensivi in ambienti di produzione. - Solida comprensione dell'elaborazione del segnale e dell'estrazione delle caratteristiche per i dati del sensore (ad esempio, segnali elettrici, termici, vibrazioni o telemetria). - Solida comprensione delle tecniche di ottimizzazione (programmazione lineare/non lineare, simulazione, sistemi decisionali, ecc.). - Esperienza di distribuzione, monitoraggio, mantenimento dei modelli AI nei sistemi di produzione, tra cui gestione del modello deriva e condizioni operative in evoluzione. - Eccellente capacità di comunicazione inglese e capacità di collaborare in team distribuiti. ## Informazioni importanti per i candidati Le truffe di reclutamento sono diventate sempre più comuni. Per proteggersi, si prega di tenere a mente il seguente quando si applica per i ruoli: - Applicare solo attraverso i nostri canali ufficiali. Non utilizziamo piattaforme o agenzie di terze parti per il reclutamento, a meno che non sia chiaro. Tutti i ruoli aperti sono elencati nella nostra pagina di carriera ufficiale: https://tether.recruitee.com/ - Verificare l’identità del reclutatore. Tutti i nostri reclutatori hanno verificato i profili LinkedIn. Se non sei sicuro, puoi confermare la loro identità controllando il loro profilo o contattandoci attraverso il nostro sito web. - No. Siate cauti di metodi di comunicazione insoliti. Non conduciamo interviste su WhatsApp, Telegram o SMS. Tutte le comunicazioni vengono effettuate tramite e-mail e piattaforme aziendali ufficiali. - Doppio indirizzo email. Tutte le comunicazioni da noi verranno da e-mail che terminano in @ tether.to o @ tether. io - Non chiederemo mai il pagamento o i dettagli finanziari. Se qualcuno chiede informazioni finanziarie personali o il pagamento in qualsiasi momento durante il processo di assunzione, è una truffa. Si prega di segnalare immediatamente. - No. Quando in dubbio, non esitate a raggiungere il nostro sito ufficiale.

descriptionByLocale.de:
Beschreiben Sie Tether und Gestalten Sie die Zukunft der digitalen Finanzen Bei Tether bauen wir nicht nur Produkte, wir sind Pionier einer globalen Finanzrevolution. Unsere hochmodernen Lösungen befähigen Unternehmen – von Börsen und Geldbörsen bis zu Zahlungsprozessoren und Geldautomaten –, über Blockchains lückenlos recycelte Token zu integrieren. Durch die Nutzung der Leistung der Blockchain-Technologie ermöglicht Tether, digitale Token sofort, sicher und global zu einem Bruchteil der Kosten zu speichern, zu senden und zu empfangen. Transparenz ist der Grundstein für alles, was wir tun, um Vertrauen in jede Transaktion zu gewährleisten. Innovate mit Tether Tether Finance: Unsere innovative Produkt-Suite verfügt über das weltweit vertrauenswürdigste Stallcoin, USDT, das von Hunderten von Millionen weltweit begehrt wird, sowie wegweisende digitale Asset-Tokenization-Dienste. Aber das ist nur der Anfang: Tether Power: Fahren Sie nachhaltiges Wachstum, unsere Energielösungen optimieren überschüssige Leistung für Bitcoin Bergbau mit umweltfreundlichen Praktiken in modernsten, geodiverse Anlagen. Tether Data: Durchbrüche in der KI- und Peer-to-Peer-Technologie reduzieren wir die Infrastrukturkosten und erhöhen die globale Kommunikation mit modernsten Lösungen wie KEET, unserer Flaggschiff-App, die den sicheren und privaten Datenaustausch neu definiert. Tether Education : Democratizing access to top-tier digital learning, wir befähigen Einzelpersonen, in den digitalen und gig-Wirtschaften zu leben, das globale Wachstum und die Chance zu treiben. Tether Evolution: An der Schnittstelle von Technologie und menschlichem Potenzial drängen wir die Grenzen von dem, was möglich ist, und schaffen eine Zukunft, in der Innovation und menschliche Fähigkeiten in mächtigen, beispiellosen Weisen verschmelzen. Warum bei uns? Unser Team ist ein globales Talent-Powerhouse, das von jeder Ecke der Welt entfernt arbeitet. Wenn Sie leidenschaftlich daran sind, eine Marke im Fintech-Raum zu machen, ist dies Ihre Gelegenheit, mit einigen der hellsten Köpfe zu kooperieren, Grenzen zu drängen und neue Standards zu setzen. Wir sind schnell gewachsen, blieben schlank und sicherten unseren Platz als Marktführer in der Branche. Wenn Sie hervorragende englische Kommunikationsfähigkeiten haben und bereit sind, zur innovativsten Plattform auf dem Planeten beizutragen, ist Tether der Ort für Sie. Sind Sie bereit, Teil der Zukunft zu sein? Der AI & Optimization Lead – Bitcoin Mining Operations wird eine entscheidende Rolle bei der Definition und Durchführung der AI Vision für MOS (Mining Operating System) und MDK (Mining Development Kit) spielen – die Kern-FOSS-Plattformen, die Tethers Bitcoin-Mining-Operationen weltweit betreiben. Diese Rolle ist für die Gestaltung der Datenbasis und der KI-Modelle verantwortlich, die die real-world-Betriebseffizienz über Bergbaustandorte hinweg treiben, mit dem Fokus auf Leistungsoptimierung, vorausschauende Erkenntnisse und intelligente Automatisierung. Sie arbeiten eng mit Ingenieur-, Daten- und Betriebsteams zusammen, um eine strukturierte Datenbank zu definieren, eine qualitativ hochwertige Datenmodellierung zu gewährleisten und AI-getriebene Lösungen zu entwickeln, die vollständig in MOS/MDK integriert sind. Ihre Mission ist einfach und ehrgeizig: Daten in Intelligenz verwandeln – und Intelligenz in die Effizienz der Website. Ein starker Hintergrund in der Datenarchitektur, Modellierung, ML/AI-Systeme und mathematische Optimierung ist unerlässlich. Vor der Exposition gegenüber Bitcoin Bergbau oder Industrie/IoT Umgebungen ist sehr wertvoll, aber nicht zwingend. ### AI Vision & Strategy - Definieren und führen Sie die AI-Strategie für MOS & MDK mit einem Fokus auf betriebliche Effizienz und messbare Geschäftsergebnisse. - Übersetzen Sie operative Herausforderungen in Daten- und Optimierungsprobleme, die KI-Modelle lösen können. - Best-Practice-Rahmen für skalierbare, produktionsbereite KI-Systeme schaffen. ### Data Foundation & Modelling - Entwerfen Sie eine standardisierte Datenbank / Schema für alle Bergbau-Site-Telemetrie und -Veranstaltungen. - Stellen Sie sicher, dass Daten strukturiert, normalisiert, markiert und für AI/ML-Nutzungsfälle zugänglich sind. - Arbeiten Sie mit Backend-Ingenieuren an der Entwicklung der Datenpipeline- und Integrationsstandards. ### Model Development & Optimization - ML/AI und Optimierungsmodelle wie: - Performance-Optimierung - Anomaly-Detektion - Predictive Ausfall & Maintenance - energieeffiziente Erkenntnisse - betriebliche Automatisierungsempfehlungen - Kontinuierlich die Modellleistung in der Produktion bewerten und verbessern. ### Integration & Delivery - Arbeiten Sie mit MOS & MDK Engineering-Teams, um AI-Modelle in Plattform-Workflows und APIs einzubetten. - Stellen Sie sicher, dass Modelle effizient, zuverlässig, erklärbar und pflegefähig sind. ### Cross-Team Collaboration - Zusammenarbeit mit Site-operations-Teams, um Ergebnisse zu validieren und Feedback zu sammeln. - Mit Führung auf AI Roadmap, Prioritäten, Impact Tracking und KPIs. - Dokumentensysteme, Architektur und Modellierung Annahmen klar. ### Culture & Mindset - Förderung einer datengetriebenen, effizienzersten Kultur innerhalb des Mining Software-Teams. - Bleiben Sie auf KI-, Optimierungs- und Industrieanalytiktrends aktualisiert.
• Requisiti - Bachelor- oder Master-Abschluss in Informatik, Data Science, Angewandte Mathematik, Engineering, Statistik oder ähnliches. - 3+ Jahre Erfahrung in AI/ML, Datenwissenschaft oder angewandte Optimierungsrollen. - Bewährte Erfahrung bei der Erstellung von Datenmodellen / Schemas / Basislinien für großformatige, zeitreihen-schwere Datensätze. - Starke Kenntnisse in Python und modernen ML-Frameworks (z.B. PyTorch, TensorFlow, Scikit-Learn). - Starke JavaScript / TypeScript-Proficiency (Node.js-Ökosystem) - Vertraut mit containerizzatoten Workloads (Docker) - Erleben Sie die Entwicklung und den Einsatz von Zeitserien, Anomalie-Erkennung, Klassifizierung und prädiktiven Modellen für mechanische, elektromechanische oder hardwareintensive Geräte/Systeme in Produktionsumgebungen. - Solides Verständnis der Signalverarbeitung und Merkmalsextraktion für Sensordaten (z.B. elektrische, thermische, Vibrations- oder Telemetriesignale). - Solides Verständnis von Optimierungstechniken (linear/nichtlineare Programmierung, Simulation, Entscheidungssysteme, etc.). - Erleben Sie die Bereitstellung, Überwachung, Aufrechterhaltung von KI-Modellen in Produktionssysteme, einschließlich der Handhabung von Modelldrift und der Entwicklung von Betriebsbedingungen. - Ausgezeichnete englische Kommunikationsfähigkeiten und Fähigkeit, in verteilten Teams zusammenzuarbeiten. Â Informazioni importanti per i candidati Recruitment Betrug sind immer häufiger geworden. Um sich selbst zu schützen, beachten Sie bitte bei der Beantragung von Rollen: - Bewerben Sie sich nur über unsere offiziellen Kanäle. Wir verwenden keine Plattformen oder Agenturen von Drittanbietern für die Rekrutierung, sofern nicht klar angegeben. Alle offenen Rollen sind auf unserer offiziellen Karriereseite aufgeführt: https://tether.recruitee.com/ - Überprüfen Sie die Identität des Rekruten. Alle unsere Rekrutierer haben LinkedIn-
• Profile überprüft. Wenn Sie sich nicht sicher sind, können Sie Ihre Identität bestätigen, indem Sie ihr Profil überprüfen oder uns über unsere Website kontaktieren. - Ja. Seien Sie vorsichtig mit ungewöhnlichen Kommunikationsmethoden. Wir führen keine Interviews über WhatsApp, Telegram oder SMS durch. Alle Kommunikation erfolgt über offizielle Firmen-E-Mails und Plattformen. - E-Mail-Adressen überprüfen. Alle Kommunikation von uns wird von E-Mails kommen, die in @ tether.to oder @ tether enden. io - Wir werden keine Zahlungs- oder Finanzdaten verlangen. Wenn jemand während des Einstellungsprozesses persönliche Finanzinformationen oder Zahlung an jedem Punkt verlangt, ist es ein Betrug. Bitte melden Sie es sofort. - Ja. descriptionByLocale.fr:
Descrizione Join Tether and Shape the Future of Digital Finance Chez Tether, nous ne sommes pas seulement des produits de construction, nous sommes pionniers d'une révolution financière mondiale. Nos solutions de pointe permettent aux entreprises, depuis les échanges et les portefeuilles jusqu'aux processeurs de paiement et aux distributeurs automatiques de billets, d'intégrer de façon transparente les jetons à l'aide de réserves dans toutes les chaînes de blocs. En exploitant la puissance de la technologie blockchain, Tether vous permet de stocker, d'envoyer et de recevoir des jetons numériques instantanément, en toute sécurité et globalement, le tout à une fraction du coût. La transparence est le fondement de tout ce que nous faisons, assurant la confiance dans chaque transaction. Innovez avec Tether Tether Finance: Notre suite de produits innovants dispose de la plus fiable écurie du monde, USDT , sur laquelle s'appuient des centaines de millions de monde, ainsi que des services de tokenisation d'actifs numériques pionniers. Mais ce n'est que le début : Tether Power : Pour une croissance durable, nos solutions énergétiques optimisent l'excès de puissance pour l'exploitation minière Bitcoin en utilisant des pratiques écologiques dans des installations géo-diverses à la fine pointe de la technologie. Tether Data: En alimentant les percées dans l'IA et la technologie pair à pair, nous réduisons les coûts d'infrastructure et améliorons les communications mondiales avec des solutions de pointe comme KEET , notre application phare qui redéfinit le partage de données sécurisé et privé. Tether Education : Démocratiser l'accès à l'apprentissage numérique de haut niveau, nous autonomisons les individus à prospérer dans les économies numériques et de concerts, moteur de la croissance mondiale et des opportunités. L'évolution de l'approche : À l'intersection de la technologie et du potentiel humain, nous repoussons les limites de ce qui est possible, écrivant un avenir où l'innovation et les capacités humaines fusionnent de manière puissante et sans précédent. Pourquoi nous rejoindre ? Notre équipe est une puissance mondiale de talents, travaillant à distance de tous les coins du monde. Si vous êtes passionné par la marque dans l'espace fintech, c'est l'occasion de collaborer avec certains des esprits les plus brillants, de repousser les frontières et de fixer de nouvelles normes. Nous avons grandi rapidement, sommes restés maigres et nous avons obtenu notre place de leader dans l'industrie. Si vous avez d'excellentes compétences en communication anglaise et êtes prêt à contribuer à la plateforme la plus innovante de la planète, Tether est l'endroit pour vous. Êtes-vous prêt à faire partie du futur ? À propos de l'emploi L'IA & Optimization Lead — Bitcoin Mining Operations jouera un rôle crucial dans la définition et l'exécution de la vision AI pour MOS (Mining Operating System) et MDK (Mining Development Kit) — le noyau des plates-formes FOSS d'alimentation de Tether. Ce rôle est responsable de la conception de la base de données et des modèles d'IA qui stimulent l'efficacité opérationnelle dans le monde réel à travers les sites miniers, en mettant l'accent sur l'optimisation des performances, les prévisions et l'automatisation intelligente. Vous travaillerez en étroite collaboration avec les équipes d'ingénierie, de données et d'opérations afin de définir une base de données structurée, d'assurer une modélisation de données de haute qualité et de développer des solutions basées sur l'IA qui sont pleinement intégrées dans MOS/MDK.
• Votre mission est simple et ambitieuse: transformer les données en intelligence — et le renseignement en efficacité au niveau du site. Une solide expérience en architecture de données, en modélisation, en systèmes ML/AI et en optimisation mathématique est essentielle. Avant l'exposition à l'exploitation minière Bitcoin ou des environnements industriels/IoT est très précieux, mais pas obligatoire. ## Responsabilités ### Vision et stratégie d'IA - Définir et diriger la stratégie d'IA pour les MOS et les MDC en mettant l'accent sur l'efficacité opérationnelle et les résultats opérationnels mesurables. - Traduire les défis opérationnels en données et les problèmes d'optimisation que les modèles d'IA peuvent résoudre. - Établir des cadres de meilleures pratiques pour les systèmes d'IA évolutifs et prêts à produire. ### Base de données et modélisation - Concevoir une base de données normalisée / schéma pour toutes les télémétries et les événements dans les sites miniers. - S'assurer que les données sont structurées, normalisées, étiquetées et accessibles pour les cas d'utilisation d'IA/ML. - Collaborer avec les ingénieurs de backend pour développer le pipeline de données et les normes d'intégration. ### Développement et optimisation des modèles - Construisez et déployez des modèles ML/AI et d'optimisation tels que: - optimisation des performances - détection d'anomalies - défaillance prédictive et maintenance - éclairages sur l'efficacité énergétique - recommandations d'automatisation opérationnelle - Évaluer et améliorer continuellement les performances des modèles dans la production. ### Intégration et livraison - Travaillez avec les équipes d'ingénierie MOS & MDK pour intégrer les modèles d'IA dans les workflows de plate-forme et les API. - S'assurer que les modèles sont efficaces, fiables, explicables et durables. ### Collaboration entre les équipes - Collaborer avec les équipes d'opérations sur place pour valider les résultats et recueillir des commentaires. - S'aligner avec le leadership sur la feuille de route, les priorités, le suivi de l'impact et les ICR. - Systèmes de documentation, architecture et hypothèses de modélisation clairement. ### Culture & Mindset - Promouvoir une culture axée sur les données et l'efficacité en premier au sein de l'équipe du logiciel minier. - Restez informé des tendances de l'IA, de l'optimisation et de l'analyse industrielle. ##
• Requisiti - Baccalauréat ou Master en Informatique, Data Science, Mathématiques appliquées, Ingénierie, Statistiques, ou similaire. - 3+ ans d'expérience en AI/ML, Data Science, ou les rôles d'optimisation appliquée. - Expérience éprouvée en matière de conception de modèles de données / schémas / lignes de base pour des ensembles de données à grande échelle, séries chronologiques et lourdes. - Forte maîtrise du Python et des cadres ML modernes (p. ex. PyTorch, TensorFlow, Scikit-Learn). - Forte compétence JavaScript / TypeScript (écosystème Node.js) - Familiarité avec les charges de travail conteneurisées (Docker) - Expérience de développement et de déploiement de séries chronologiques, de détection d'anomalies, de classification et de modèles prédictifs pour les équipements/systèmes mécaniques, électromécaniques ou à forte intensité matérielle dans les environnements de production. - Compréhension solide du traitement des signaux et extraction des caractéristiques pour les données des capteurs (p. ex. signaux électriques, thermiques, vibratoires ou télémétriques). - Une bonne compréhension des techniques d'optimisation (programmation linéaire/non linéaire, simulation, systèmes de décision, etc.). - Expérience du déploiement, de la surveillance, de la maintenance des modèles d'IA dans les systèmes de production, y compris la dérive des modèles de manutention et l'évolution des conditions d'exploitation. - Excellente capacité de communication et de collaboration en anglais dans les équipes distribuées. ## Information importantei per i candidati Les escroqueries de recrutement sont devenues de plus en plus fréquentes. Pour vous protéger, veuillez garder à l'esprit ce qui suit lorsque vous postulez pour des rôles : - Appliquer uniquement par le biais de nos canaux officiels. Nous n'utilisons pas de plates-formes ou d'agences tierces pour le recrutement à moins d'indication claire. Tous les rôles ouverts sont listés sur notre page de carrière officielle : https://tether.recruitee.com/ - Vérifier l'identité du recruteur. Tous nos recruteurs ont vérifié les profils LinkedIn. Si vous n'êtes pas sûr, vous pouvez confirmer leur identité en vérifiant leur profil ou en nous contactant via notre site Web. - Oui. Méfiez-vous des méthodes de communication inhabituelles. Nous ne menons pas d'entrevues sur WhatsApp, Telegram ou SMS. Toute communication se fait au moyen de courriels et de plateformes officiels de l'entreprise. - Vérifiez les adresses e-mail. Toute communication de nous viendra de courriels se terminant par @ tether.to ou @ sether. io - Nous ne demanderons jamais de paiement ou de détails financiers. Si quelqu'un demande des renseignements financiers personnels ou un paiement à tout moment pendant le processus d'embauche, c'est une escroquerie. Veuillez le signaler immédiatement. - Oui. En cas de doute, n'hésitez pas à contacter notre site officiel.

jobs.title: Engagement Manager (100% Remote)
jobs.description:
Join Tether and Shape the Future of Digital Finance 
 At Tether, we’re not just building products, we’re pioneering a global financial revolution. Our cutting-edge solutions empower businesses—from exchanges and wallets to payment processors and ATMs—to seamlessly integrate reserve-backed tokens across blockchains. By harnessing the power of blockchain technology, Tether enables you to store, send, and receive digital tokens instantly, securely, and globally, all at a fraction of the cost. Transparency is the bedrock of everything we do, ensuring trust in every transaction.
 
 Innovate with Tether 
 Tether Finance: Our innovative product suite features the world’s most trusted stablecoin, USDT , relied upon by hundreds of millions worldwide, alongside pioneering digital asset tokenization services.
 But that’s just the beginning:
 Tether Power: Driving sustainable growth, our energy solutions optimize excess power for Bitcoin mining using eco-friendly practices in state-of-the-art, geo-diverse facilities.
 Tether Data: Fueling breakthroughs in AI and peer-to-peer technology, we reduce infrastructure costs and enhance global communications with cutting-edge solutions like KEET , our flagship app that redefines secure and private data sharing.
 Tether Education : Democratizing access to top-tier digital learning, we empower individuals to thrive in the digital and gig economies, driving global growth and opportunity.
 Tether Evolution : At the intersection of technology and human potential, we are pushing the boundaries of what is possible, crafting a future where innovation and human capabilities merge in powerful, unprecedented ways.
 
 Why Join Us? 
 Our team is a global talent powerhouse, working remotely from every corner of the world. If you’re passionate about making a mark in the fintech space, this is your opportunity to collaborate with some of the brightest minds, pushing boundaries and setting new standards. We’ve grown fast, stayed lean, and secured our place as a leader in the industry.
 If you have excellent English communication skills and are ready to contribute to the most innovative platform on the planet, Tether is the place for you.
 Are you ready to be part of the future? 
 
 About the job 
 The Engagement Manager will lead the implementation journey of tokenization projects based on Hadron for institutional clients, acting as the primary technical and business point of contact throughout onboarding and early operations. 
 This role is pivotal in ensuring a seamless transition from contract signature through the first production token issuance and continuous monitoring of the initiative, maintaining alignment across stakeholders, and coordinating execution across internal teams, client counterparts, and external partners. 
 As Engagement Manager, you can expect to work with global institutional clients across multiple geographies and asset classes on complex tokenization initiatives involving digital asset issuance, custody frameworks, and integration into existing financial infrastructures within a regulated and rapidly evolving environment. 
 This role offers the opportunity to actively shape how institutions adopt tokenized assets, operating in a fully remote setup with flexible global collaboration. As the scope and volume of implementations grow, there is a clear path to evolve into broader technical strategy or client success leadership roles. 
 

 
 
 Responsibilities 
 Before the engagement (pre-sales) 
 
• Assist Expansion Managers in preparing and conducting demos 

• As consultant, propose solutions during pre-sales phase of the engagement 

• Assist in defining the engagement scope, ensuring it’s correctly reflected in the Client agreement 

 
 Onboarding & Integration 
 
• Lead project kickoffs and define the integration roadmap with clients 

• Guide clients through API documentation, sandbox testing, and UAT 

• Diagnose and troubleshoot client integration issues 

• Coordinate between clients, engineering teams, and external infrastructure partners during integrations 

• Track onboarding progress, milestones, and dependencies to ensure clients reach production within expected timelines 

• Prepare clients for production launch and conduct monitoring and hyper-care after launch 

• Maintain an enterprise-grade, consulting-like knowledge base around implementation use cases 

• Create integration documentation and operational runbooks and adapt them as needed to tailor each client implementation 

 
 Client Communication & Problem-Solving 
 
• Serve as the primary point of contact throughout the execution of the engagement 

• Translate technical complexity for non-technical stakeholders 

• Identify integration pain points and escalate product feedback 

• Proactively communicate timelines, blockers, and dependencies 

• Support transition clients to self-service with comprehensive documentation 

• Proactively identify up- and cross-sell opportunities, to be passed on to Expansion Managers 

 
 What You Won’t Do 
 
• Write or audit smart contracts (clients own their tokenomics) 

• Perform regulatory or legal structuring 

• Build custom features or bespoke integrations 

 

 Core skills 
 
• 3–6 years of experience in technical account management , solutions engineering, technical consulting, project management of technical implementations or integrations, or client success management 

• Strong understanding of APIs and system integrations 

• Comfort diagnosing and resolving integration issues 

• Excellent communication skills , with the ability to translate technical concepts for business stakeholders 

• Experience coordinating across multiple teams and external partners 

• Ability to track and manage technical project timelines 

• English proficiency is mandatory 

 Nice to Have 
 
• Familiarity with blockchain infrastructure or digital assets 

• Experience with fintech or institutional financial infrastructure 

• Familiarity with token standards (ERC-20, ERC-1400) or Ethereum basics 

• Background in fin-tech, supporting financial institutions or complex B2B integrations 

• Basic programming knowledge ( Python, JavaScript ) or API tools 

 Who You Are 
 
• Comfortable working in a remote, fast-paced, global environment 

• Self-directed and able to own integration workflows end-to-end 

• Detail-oriented, documenting decisions and learnings as you go 

• Collaborative, able to work effectively with engineering teams and demanding clients 

• Interested in the intersection of financial infrastructure and blockchain technology 

 
 
 Important information for candidates 
Recruitment scams have become increasingly common. To protect yourself, please keep the following in mind when applying for roles:
 
• Apply only through our official channels. We do not use third-party platforms or agencies for recruitment unless clearly stated. All open roles are listed on our official careers page: https://tether.recruitee.com/

• Verify the recruiter’s identity. All our recruiters have verified LinkedIn profiles. If you’re unsure, you can confirm their identity by checking their profile or contacting us through our website.

• Be cautious of unusual communication methods. We do not conduct interviews over WhatsApp, Telegram, or SMS. All communication is done through official company emails and platforms.

• Double-check email addresses. All communication from us will come from emails ending in @ tether.to or @ tether.io 

• We will never request payment or financial details. If someone asks for personal financial information or payment at any point during the hiring process, it is a scam. Please report it immediately.

 When in doubt, feel free to reach out through our official website.

• Assist in defining the engagement scope, ensuring it’s correctly reflected in the Client agreement Onboarding & Integration
• Lead project kickoffs and define the integration roadmap with clients
• Guide clients through API documentation, sandbox testing, and UAT
• Diagnose and troubleshoot client integration issues
• Coordinate between clients, engineering teams, and external infrastructure partners during integrations
• Track onboarding progress, milestones, and dependencies to ensure clients reach production within expected timelines
• Prepare clients for production launch and conduct monitoring and hyper-care after launch
• Maintain an enterprise-grade, consulting-like knowledge base around implementation use cases
• Create integration documentation and operational runbooks and adapt them as needed to tailor each client implementation Client Communication & Problem-Solving
• Serve as the primary point of contact throughout the execution of the engagement
• Translate technical complexity for non-technical stakeholders
• Identify integration pain points and escalate product feedback
• Proactively communicate timelines, blockers, and dependencies
• Support transition clients to self-service with comprehensive documentation
• Proactively identify up- and cross-sell opportunities, to be passed on to Expansion Managers What You Won’t Do
• Write or audit smart contracts (clients own their tokenomics)
• Perform regulatory or legal structuring
• Build custom features or bespoke integrations Core skills
• 3–6 years of experience in technical account management , solutions engineering, technical consulting, project management of technical implementations or integrations, or client success management
• Strong understanding of APIs and system integrations
• Comfort diagnosing and resolving integration issues
• Excellent communication skills , with the ability to translate technical concepts for business stakeholders
• Experience coordinating across multiple teams and external partners
• Ability to track and manage technical project timelines
• English proficiency is mandatory Nice to Have
• Familiarity with blockchain infrastructure or digital assets
• Experience with fintech or institutional financial infrastructure
• Familiarity with token standards (ERC-20, ERC-1400) or Ethereum basics
• Background in fin-tech, supporting financial institutions or complex B2B integrations
• Basic programming knowledge ( Python, JavaScript ) or API tools Who You Are
• Comfortable working in a remote, fast-paced, global environment
• Self-directed and able to own integration workflows end-to-end
• Detail-oriented, documenting decisions and learnings as you go
• Collaborative, able to work effectively with engineering teams and demanding clients
• Interested in the intersection of financial infrastructure and blockchain technology Important information for candidates Recruitment scams have become increasingly common. To protect yourself, please keep the following in mind when applying for roles:
• Apply only through our official channels. We do not use third-party platforms or agencies for recruitment unless clearly stated. All open roles are listed on our official careers page: https://tether.recruitee.com/
• Verify the recruiter’s identity. All our recruiters have verified LinkedIn profiles. If you’re unsure, you can confirm their identity by checking their profile or contacting us through our website.
• Be cautious of unusual communication methods. We do not conduct interviews over WhatsApp, Telegram, or SMS. All communication is done through official company emails and platforms.
• Double-check email addresses. All communication from us will come from emails ending in @ tether.to or @ tether.io
• We will never request payment or financial details. If someone asks for personal financial information or payment at any point during the hiring process, it is a scam. Please report it immediately. When in doubt, feel free to reach out through our official website.
descriptionByLocale.de:
Join Tether and Shape the Future of Digital Finance At Tether, we’re not just building products, we’re pioneering a global financial revolution. Our cutting-edge solutions empower businesses—from exchanges and wallets to payment processors and ATMs—to seamlessly integrate reserve-backed tokens across blockchains. By harnessing the power of blockchain technology, Tether enables you to store, send, and receive digital tokens instantly, securely, and globally, all at a fraction of the cost. Transparency is the bedrock of everything we do, ensuring trust in every transaction. Innovate with Tether Tether Finance: Our innovative product suite features the world’s most trusted stablecoin, USDT , relied upon by hundreds of millions worldwide, alongside pioneering digital asset tokenization services. But that’s just the beginning: Tether Power: Driving sustainable growth, our energy solutions optimize excess power for Bitcoin mining using eco-friendly practices in state-of-the-art, geo-diverse facilities. Tether Data: Fueling breakthroughs in AI and peer-to-peer technology, we reduce infrastructure costs and enhance global communications with cutting-edge solutions like KEET , our flagship app that redefines secure and private data sharing. Tether Education : Democratizing access to top-tier digital learning, we empower individuals to thrive in the digital and gig economies, driving global growth and opportunity. Tether Evolution : At the intersection of technology and human potential, we are pushing the boundaries of what is possible, crafting a future where innovation and human capabilities merge in powerful, unprecedented ways. Why Join Us? Our team is a global talent powerhouse, working remotely from every corner of the world. If you’re passionate about making a mark in the fintech space, this is your opportunity to collaborate with some of the brightest minds, pushing boundaries and setting new standards. We’ve grown fast, stayed lean, and secured our place as a leader in the industry. If you have excellent English communication skills and are ready to contribute to the most innovative platform on the planet, Tether is the place for you. Are you ready to be part of the future? About the job The Engagement Manager will lead the implementation journey of tokenization projects based on Hadron for institutional clients, acting as the primary technical and business point of contact throughout onboarding and early operations. This role is pivotal in ensuring a seamless transition from contract signature through the first production token issuance and continuous monitoring of the initiative, maintaining alignment across stakeholders, and coordinating execution across internal teams, client counterparts, and external partners. As Engagement Manager, you can expect to work with global institutional clients across multiple geographies and asset classes on complex tokenization initiatives involving digital asset issuance, custody frameworks, and integration into existing financial infrastructures within a regulated and rapidly evolving environment. This role offers the opportunity to actively shape how institutions adopt tokenized assets, operating in a fully remote setup with flexible global collaboration. As the scope and volume of implementations grow, there is a clear path to evolve into broader technical strategy or client success leadership roles. Responsibilities Before the engagement (pre-sales)
• Assist Expansion Managers in preparing and conducting demos
• As consultant, propose solutions during pre-sales phase of the engagement
• Assist in defining the engagement scope, ensuring it’s correctly reflected in the Client agreement Onboarding & Integration
• Lead project kickoffs and define the integration roadmap with clients
• Guide clients through API documentation, sandbox testing, and UAT
• Diagnose and troubleshoot client integration issues
• Coordinate between clients, engineering teams, and external infrastructure partners during integrations
• Track onboarding progress, milestones, and dependencies to ensure clients reach production within expected timelines
• Prepare clients for production launch and conduct monitoring and hyper-care after launch
• Maintain an enterprise-grade, consulting-like knowledge base around implementation use cases
• Create integration documentation and operational runbooks and adapt them as needed to tailor each client implementation Client Communication & Problem-Solving
• Serve as the primary point of contact throughout the execution of the engagement
• Translate technical complexity for non-technical stakeholders
• Identify integration pain points and escalate product feedback
• Proactively communicate timelines, blockers, and dependencies
• Support transition clients to self-service with comprehensive documentation
• Proactively identify up- and cross-sell opportunities, to be passed on to Expansion Managers What You Won’t Do
• Write or audit smart contracts (clients own their tokenomics)
• Perform regulatory or legal structuring
• Build custom features or bespoke integrations Core skills
• 3–6 years of experience in technical account management , solutions engineering, technical consulting, project management of technical implementations or integrations, or client success management
• Strong understanding of APIs and system integrations
• Comfort diagnosing and resolving integration issues
• Excellent communication skills , with the ability to translate technical concepts for business stakeholders
• Experience coordinating across multiple teams and external partners
• Ability to track and manage technical project timelines
• English proficiency is mandatory Nice to Have
• Familiarity with blockchain infrastructure or digital assets
• Experience with fintech or institutional financial infrastructure
• Familiarity with token standards (ERC-20, ERC-1400) or Ethereum basics
• Background in fin-tech, supporting financial institutions or complex B2B integrations
• Basic programming knowledge ( Python, JavaScript ) or API tools Who You Are
• Comfortable working in a remote, fast-paced, global environment
• Self-directed and able to own integration workflows end-to-end
• Detail-oriented, documenting decisions and learnings as you go
• Collaborative, able to work effectively with engineering teams and demanding clients
• Interested in the intersection of financial infrastructure and blockchain technology Important information for candidates Recruitment scams have become increasingly common. To protect yourself, please keep the following in mind when applying for roles:
• Apply only through our official channels. We do not use third-party platforms or agencies for recruitment unless clearly stated. All open roles are listed on our official careers page: https://tether.recruitee.com/
• Verify the recruiter’s identity. All our recruiters have verified LinkedIn profiles. If you’re unsure, you can confirm their identity by checking their profile or contacting us through our website.
• Be cautious of unusual communication methods. We do not conduct interviews over WhatsApp, Telegram, or SMS. All communication is done through official company emails and platforms.
• Double-check email addresses. All communication from us will come from emails ending in @ tether.to or @ tether.io
• We will never request payment or financial details. If someone asks for personal financial information or payment at any point during the hiring process, it is a scam. Please report it immediately. When in doubt, feel free to reach out through our official website.

jobs.title: Developer Advocate P2P (100% remote Worldwide)
jobs.description:
Join Tether and Shape the Future of Digital Finance 
 At Tether, we’re not just building products, we’re pioneering a global financial revolution. Our cutting-edge solutions empower businesses—from exchanges and wallets to payment processors and ATMs—to seamlessly integrate reserve-backed tokens across blockchains. By harnessing the power of blockchain technology, Tether enables you to store, send, and receive digital tokens instantly, securely, and globally, all at a fraction of the cost. Transparency is the bedrock of everything we do, ensuring trust in every transaction.
 
 Innovate with Tether 
 Tether Finance: Our innovative product suite features the world’s most trusted stablecoin, USDT , relied upon by hundreds of millions worldwide, alongside pioneering digital asset tokenization services.
 But that’s just the beginning:
 Tether Power: Driving sustainable growth, our energy solutions optimize excess power for Bitcoin mining using eco-friendly practices in state-of-the-art, geo-diverse facilities.
 Tether Data: Fueling breakthroughs in AI and peer-to-peer technology, we reduce infrastructure costs and enhance global communications with cutting-edge solutions like KEET , our flagship app that redefines secure and private data sharing.
 Tether Education : Democratizing access to top-tier digital learning, we empower individuals to thrive in the digital and gig economies, driving global growth and opportunity.
 Tether Evolution : At the intersection of technology and human potential, we are pushing the boundaries of what is possible, crafting a future where innovation and human capabilities merge in powerful, unprecedented ways.
 
 Why Join Us? 
 Our team is a global talent powerhouse, working remotely from every corner of the world. If you’re passionate about making a mark in the fintech space, this is your opportunity to collaborate with some of the brightest minds, pushing boundaries and setting new standards. We’ve grown fast, stayed lean, and secured our place as a leader in the industry.
 If you have excellent English communication skills and are ready to contribute to the most innovative platform on the planet, Tether is the place for you.
 Are you ready to be part of the future? 
 
 About the job 
 The primary goal of a Developer Relations is to engage, educate, and inspire the developer community - building trust, driving adoption of our technology, and ensuring developers have an exceptional experience with our products. This involves creating technical content, presenting at events, gathering feedback, and serving as the voice of the developer both externally and internally.
 The role is focused on bridging the gap between developers and our product teams, ensuring our solutions are accessible, well-understood, and developer-friendly, while fostering community growth, promoting best practices, and driving continuous improvement in how developers discover, learn, and build with our technology.
 Pear is a combined Peer-to-Peer (P2P) Runtime, Development & Deployment tool. Pear makes it possible to build, share and extend P2P applications using common Web and Mobile technology. Herein is everything needed to create unstoppable, zero-infrastructure P2P applications for Desktop, Terminal & Mobile.

 Responsibilities 
 Developer Advocacy & Community Building 
 
• Build and nurture relationships with developers, partners, and open-source communities.

• Engage and interact with the developer ecosystem — hosting AMAs, office hours, webinars, and play a part in online communities.

• Collect and synthesize developer feedback to inform product and engineering teams.

• Identify influential developers, projects, and communities to establish collaboration opportunities.

 Technical Content & Enablement 
 
• Create and maintain high-quality technical content (blog posts, tutorials, sample apps, videos, documentation, SDK guides, etc.) directly targeted to developers.

• Develop demos, prototypes, and reference implementations that showcase real-world use cases.

• Contribute to improving developer experience through documentation feedback, onboarding flows, and API design suggestions.

• Support developer onboarding through workshops, hackathons, and training sessions.

 Product Evangelism 
 
• Advocate for the company’s technology stack at industry events, developer meetups, and online communities.

• Translate complex technical concepts into clear, relatable value propositions.

• Collaborate with marketing to align technical storytelling with broader brand messaging.

• Track and report community sentiment and adoption metrics to measure evangelism impact.

 Cross-Functional Collaboration 
 
• Partner closely with engineering, product management, and marketing to align developer needs with product strategy.

• Provide structured feedback loops between external developers and internal teams to improve product usability.

• Support launch strategies for new developer-facing features, APIs, and SDKs.

• Contribute to roadmap discussions to ensure developer experience remains a strategic priority.

• Support initial technical discussions with potential customers and partners

 Thought Leadership 
 
• Represent the company as a credible technical voice in the ecosystem through public speaking, open-source contributions, and community engagement.

• Stay ahead of industry trends, tools, and frameworks relevant to the developer community.

• Mentor internal teams on effective developer communication and community engagement practices.

 
 
• Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or related field - or equivalent professional experience.

 
• 3+ years of professional software development experience.

• Previous experience as a Developer Advocate, Developer Relations, or Technical Community Manager.

• Strong hands-on experience with JavaScript, TypeScript, and Node.js - able to write production-level code and explain it clearly to other developers.

• Demonstrated experience building, testing, and maintaining applications or APIs.

• Proven ability to create technical content (tutorials, sample projects, blog posts, videos, or documentation) that educates and inspires developers.

• Experience presenting at public events, such as developer conferences, meetups, webinars, or internal company talks.

• Excellent communication and presentation skills, both written and verbal, with the ability to translate complex technical concepts into simple, engaging messages.

• Experience engaging with developer communities through events, GitHub, forums, or social media.

• Strong understanding of developer experience principles and best practices.

• Ability to collaborate effectively with product, engineering, and marketing teams.

• Strong production experience with React Native and/or Electron (shipping apps that real users love)

• Very comfortable with Node.js and modern JavaScript/TypeScript ecosystems

• English fluency — outstanding written and verbal communication skills are required for public-facing content and developer engagement.
 

 Preferred 
 
• Experience designing, documenting, or promoting SDKs or developer tools.

• Experience developing or integrating apps (web, mobile, or desktop).

• 4–6 years of experience in software development or developer relations.

• Experience leveraging AI tools (such as Cursor, Codex, or similar AI-assisted development workflows) to enhance productivity and problem-solving efficiency

• Contributions to open-source projects or maintaining public GitHub repositories.

• Understanding of DevRel success metrics - content reach, community engagement, and product adoption.

• Experience in technical writing, developer education, or public speaking.

• Passion for community building, mentoring, and empowering developers through content and collaboration.

 
 Important information for candidates 
Recruitment scams have become increasingly common. To protect yourself, please keep the following in mind when applying for roles:
 
• Apply only through our official channels. We do not use third-party platforms or agencies for recruitment unless clearly stated. All open roles are listed on our official careers page: https://tether.recruitee.com/

• Verify the recruiter’s identity. All our recruiters have verified LinkedIn profiles. If you’re unsure, you can confirm their identity by checking their profile or contacting us through our website.

• Be cautious of unusual communication methods. We do not conduct interviews over WhatsApp, Telegram, or SMS. All communication is done through official company emails and platforms.

• Double-check email addresses. All communication from us will come from emails ending in @ tether.to or @ tether.io 

• We will never request payment or financial details. If someone asks for personal financial information or payment at any point during the hiring process, it is a scam. Please report it immediately.

 When in doubt, feel free to reach out through our official website.

Pear is a combined Peer-to-Peer (P2P) Runtime, Development & Deployment tool. Pear makes it possible to build, share and extend P2P applications using common Web and Mobile technology. Herein is everything needed to create unstoppable, zero-infrastructure P2P applications for Desktop, Terminal & Mobile. Responsibilities Developer Advocacy & Community Building
• Build and nurture relationships with developers, partners, and open-source communities.
• Engage and interact with the developer ecosystem — hosting AMAs, office hours, webinars, and play a part in online communities.
• Collect and synthesize developer feedback to inform product and engineering teams.
• Identify influential developers, projects, and communities to establish collaboration opportunities. Technical Content & Enablement
• Create and maintain high-quality technical content (blog posts, tutorials, sample apps, videos, documentation, SDK guides, etc.) directly targeted to developers.
• Develop demos, prototypes, and reference implementations that showcase real-world use cases.
• Contribute to improving developer experience through documentation feedback, onboarding flows, and API design suggestions.
• Support developer onboarding through workshops, hackathons, and training sessions. Product Evangelism
• Advocate for the company’s technology stack at industry events, developer meetups, and online communities.
• Translate complex technical concepts into clear, relatable value propositions.
• Collaborate with marketing to align technical storytelling with broader brand messaging.
• Track and report community sentiment and adoption metrics to measure evangelism impact. Cross-Functional Collaboration
• Partner closely with engineering, product management, and marketing to align developer needs with product strategy.
• Provide structured feedback loops between external developers and internal teams to improve product usability.
• Support launch strategies for new developer-facing features, APIs, and SDKs.
• Contribute to roadmap discussions to ensure developer experience remains a strategic priority.
• Support initial technical discussions with potential customers and partners Thought Leadership
• Represent the company as a credible technical voice in the ecosystem through public speaking, open-source contributions, and community engagement.
• Stay ahead of industry trends, tools, and frameworks relevant to the developer community.
• Mentor internal teams on effective developer communication and community engagement practices.
• Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or related field - or equivalent professional experience.
• 3+ years of professional software development experience.
• Previous experience as a Developer Advocate, Developer Relations, or Technical Community Manager.
• Strong hands-on experience with JavaScript, TypeScript, and Node.js - able to write production-level code and explain it clearly to other developers.
• Demonstrated experience building, testing, and maintaining applications or APIs.
• Proven ability to create technical content (tutorials, sample projects, blog posts, videos, or documentation) that educates and inspires developers.
• Experience presenting at public events, such as developer conferences, meetups, webinars, or internal company talks.
• Excellent communication and presentation skills, both written and verbal, with the ability to translate complex technical concepts into simple, engaging messages.
• Experience engaging with developer communities through events, GitHub, forums, or social media.
• Strong understanding of developer experience principles and best practices.
• Ability to collaborate effectively with product, engineering, and marketing teams.
• Strong production experience with React Native and/or Electron (shipping apps that real users love)
• Very comfortable with Node.js and modern JavaScript/TypeScript ecosystems
• English fluency — outstanding written and verbal communication skills are required for public-facing content and developer engagement. Preferred
• Experience designing, documenting, or promoting SDKs or developer tools.
• Experience developing or integrating apps (web, mobile, or desktop).
• 4–6 years of experience in software development or developer relations.
• Experience leveraging AI tools (such as Cursor, Codex, or similar AI-assisted development workflows) to enhance productivity and problem-solving efficiency
• Contributions to open-source projects or maintaining public GitHub repositories.
• Understanding of DevRel success metrics - content reach, community engagement, and product adoption.
• Experience in technical writing, developer education, or public speaking.
• Passion for community building, mentoring, and empowering developers through content and collaboration. Important information for candidates Recruitment scams have become increasingly common. To protect yourself, please keep the following in mind when applying for roles:
• Apply only through our official channels. We do not use third-party platforms or agencies for recruitment unless clearly stated. All open roles are listed on our official careers page: https://tether.recruitee.com/
• Verify the recruiter’s identity. All our recruiters have verified LinkedIn profiles. If you’re unsure, you can confirm their identity by checking their profile or contacting us through our website.
• Be cautious of unusual communication methods. We do not conduct interviews over WhatsApp, Telegram, or SMS. All communication is done through official company emails and platforms.
• Double-check email addresses. All communication from us will come from emails ending in @ tether.to or @ tether.io
• We will never request payment or financial details. If someone asks for personal financial information or payment at any point during the hiring process, it is a scam. Please report it immediately. When in doubt, feel free to reach out through our official website.
